                ctxIndex: ctx?.index ?? null, isCollapsed: window.getSelection()?.isCollapsed ?? null,
                anchorNodeType: window.getSelection()?.anchorNode?.nodeType ?? null,
                anchorText: window.getSelection()?.anchorNode?.textContent ?? null,
                anchorOffset: window.getSelection()?.anchorOffset ?? null
            });

            if (!ctx) { this.debugEnter('beforeinput aborted: no context'); return; }

            const idx = ctx.index;
            const block = this.state.doc.blocks[idx];
            if (!block || block.type !== 'text') {
                this.debugEnter('beforeinput aborted: non-text block', { idx, blockType: block?.type ?? null });
                return;
            }

            e.preventDefault();
            this.splitBlock(idx);
        });
    }

    setupFocusTracking() {
        document.addEventListener('focusin', (e) => {
            const blockEl = this.resolveBlockElementFromNode(e.target);
            if (blockEl) {
                this.lastFocusedBlockEl = blockEl;
                this.activeBlockId = this.getBlockIdFromElement(blockEl);
                this.activeBlockIndex = this.activeBlockId
                    ? this.state.getBlockIndexById(this.activeBlockId)
                    : parseInt(blockEl.dataset.index);
                this.debugEnter('focusin', {
                    activeBlockIndex: this.activeBlockIndex,
                    activeBlockId: this.activeBlockId,
                    datasetIndex: blockEl.dataset.index,
                    className: blockEl.className
                });
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
            const blockEl = this.resolveBlockElementFromNode(e.target);
            if (blockEl) {
                this.lastFocusedBlockEl = blockEl;
                this.activeBlockId = this.getBlockIdFromElement(blockEl);
                this.activeBlockIndex = this.activeBlockId
                    ? this.state.getBlockIndexById(this.activeBlockId)
                    : parseInt(blockEl.dataset.index);
                this.debugEnter('mousedown', {
                    activeBlockIndex: this.activeBlockIndex,
                    activeBlockId: this.activeBlockId,
                    datasetIndex: blockEl.dataset.index,
                    className: blockEl.className
                });
            }
        });
    }

    setupPageCanvasCaret() {
        const editableSelector = [
            '.block-text[contenteditable="true"]',
            '.list-item-text[contenteditable="true"]',
            '.checklist-text[contenteditable="true"]',
            'td[contenteditable="true"]',
            'th[contenteditable="true"]'
        ].join(',');

        document.addEventListener('mousedown', (event) => {
            if (event.button !== 0 || event.defaultPrevented) return;
            const area = event.target?.closest?.('.page-content-area');
            if (!area || event.target.closest(editableSelector)) return;

            const editables = Array.from(area.querySelectorAll(editableSelector))
                .filter(element => {
                    const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
                    return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0;
                });
            if (!editables.length) return;

            const containingItem = event.target.closest('li, td, th');
            let target = containingItem?.querySelector?.(editableSelector) || null;
            let position = 'end';

            if (!target) {
                target = editables.find(element => event.clientY <= element.getBoundingClientRect().bottom)
                    || editables[editables.length - 1];
                const rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();
                position = event.clientY < rect.top ? 'start' : 'end';
            }

            // The page body itself is deliberately not contenteditable. Resolve clicks
            // in its unused paper space to the nearest real editing position instead.
            event.preventDefault();
            this.focusEditableElement(target, position);
        });
    }

    initPersistence() {
        const savedZoom = this.loadPreference('zoom');
        if (savedZoom) this.renderer.setZoom(parseFloat(savedZoom));

        const savedMode = this.loadPreference('viewMode');
        if (savedMode && savedMode !== 'page') {
            this.renderer.setMode(savedMode === 'pageless');
        }

        this.outline._outlineCollapseState = this.loadPreference('outlineCollapse') || {};
    }

    savePreference(key, value) {
        try { localStorage.setItem(`opendoc_${key}`, JSON.stringify(value)); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
    }

    loadPreference(key) {
        try { const val = localStorage.getItem(`opendoc_${key}`); return val ? JSON.parse(val) : null; } catch (e) { return null; }
    }

    computeBlockStats(block) {
        if (!block) return { words: 0, chars: 0, style: null };
        let text = '';
        if (typeof block.content === 'string') {
            if (block.type === 'text') {
                this._statsScratchElement ||= document.createElement('div');
                this._statsScratchElement.innerHTML = block.content;
                text = this._statsScratchElement.textContent || '';
            } else text = block.content;
        }
        return {
            words: text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length,
            chars: text.length,
            style: block.style || null
        };
    }

    renderDocumentStats() {
        const wordEl = document.getElementById('word-count');
        if (wordEl) wordEl.innerText = `${this._documentStats.words.toLocaleString()} words`;
        const charEl = document.getElementById('char-count');
        if (charEl) charEl.innerText = `${this._documentStats.chars.toLocaleString()} chars`;
    }

    updateStats(blocks) {
        this._blockStatsCache.clear();
        this._documentStats = { words: 0, chars: 0 };
        (blocks || []).forEach(block => {
            const stats = this.computeBlockStats(block);
            if (block?.id) this._blockStatsCache.set(String(block.id), stats);
            this._documentStats.words += stats.words;
            this._documentStats.chars += stats.chars;
        });
        this.renderDocumentStats();
    }

    updateStatsIncrementally(blocks, dirtyBlockIds) {
        if (!this._blockStatsCache.size && (blocks || []).length) return false;
        for (const blockId of dirtyBlockIds) {
            const block = this.state.getBlockById(blockId);
            if (!block) return false;
            const previous = this._blockStatsCache.get(String(blockId)) || { words: 0, chars: 0 };
            const next = this.computeBlockStats(block);
            this._documentStats.words += next.words - previous.words;
            this._documentStats.chars += next.chars - previous.chars;
            this._blockStatsCache.set(String(blockId), next);
        }
        this.renderDocumentStats();
        return true;
    }

    metadataEditAffectsOutline(blocks, dirtyBlockIds) {
        return dirtyBlockIds.some(blockId => {
            const block = this.state.getBlockById(blockId);
            const previous = this._blockStatsCache.get(String(blockId));
            return /^h[1-6]$/.test(block?.style || '') || /^h[1-6]$/.test(previous?.style || '');
        });
    }

    debugEnter(label, data = {}) {
        if (!window.DEBUG_ENTER) return;
        try { console.log(`[ENTER DEBUG] ${label}`, data); } catch (err) { console.log(`[ENTER DEBUG] ${label}`); }
    }

    setupWelcomePage() {
        const welcome = document.getElementById('welcome-page');
        const btnNew = document.getElementById('btn-welcome-new');
        const btnOpen = document.getElementById('btn-welcome-open');
        const recentList = document.getElementById('welcome-recent-list');
        const recentSection = document.getElementById('welcome-recent');

        if (btnNew) {
            btnNew.addEventListener('click', async () => {
                await this.state.createNewDoc();
                if (welcome) welcome.classList.add('hidden');
            });
        }

        if (btnOpen) {
            btnOpen.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const sb = document.getElementById('doc-sidebar');
                if (sb) {
                    sb.classList.remove('hidden');
                    const btnDocs = document.getElementById('btn-docs');
                    if (btnDocs) btnDocs.click();
                }
            });
        }

        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            const card = e.target.closest('.welcome-template-card');
            if (!card) return;
            const template = card.dataset.template;
            this.createFromTemplate(template);
            if (welcome) welcome.classList.add('hidden');
        });

        if (recentList && recentSection) {
            this.loadRecentDocs(recentList, recentSection);
        }
    }

    async loadRecentDocs(recentList, recentSection) {
        try {
            const docs = await this.state.loadDocsList();
            if (!docs || docs.length === 0) {
                recentSection.style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }

            const sorted = docs.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.updatedAt) - new Date(a.updatedAt));
            const recent = sorted.slice(0, 5);
            recentList.innerHTML = '';

            recent.forEach(doc => {
                const item = document.createElement('div');
                item.className = 'welcome-recent-item';
                item.innerHTML = `
                    <div>
                        <div class="welcome-recent-item-name">${doc.title}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="welcome-recent-item-date">${new Date(doc.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString()}</div>
                `;
                item.addEventListener('click', async () => {
                    await this.state.loadDoc(doc.id);
                    const welcome = document.getElementById('welcome-page');
                    if (welcome) welcome.classList.add('hidden');
                });
                recentList.appendChild(item);
            });
        } catch (e) {
            recentSection.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    createFromTemplate(template) {
        if (template === 'blank') {
            this.state.createNewDoc();
            return;
        }

        const templateContent = {
            report: {
                title: 'Report',
                blocks: [
                    { type: 'text', style: 'h1', content: 'Report Title', id: Date.now() + Math.random() },
                    { type: 'text', style: 'h2', content: 'Executive Summary', id: Date.now() + Math.random() + 1 },
                    { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'Enter your executive summary here.', id: Date.now() + Math.random() + 2 },
                    { type: 'text', style: 'h2', content: 'Findings', id: Date.now() + Math.random() + 3 },
                    { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'Details of your findings here.', id: Date.now() + Math.random() + 4 },
                ]
            },
            letter: {
                title: 'Letter',
                blocks: [
                    { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'Dear Recipient,<br><br>', id: Date.now() + Math.random() },
                    { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'Body of your letter here.', id: Date.now() + Math.random() + 1 },
                    { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: '<br>Sincerely,<br>Your Name', id: Date.now() + Math.random() + 2 },
                ]
            },
            notes: {
                title: 'Meeting Notes',
                blocks: [
                    { type: 'text', style: 'h1', content: 'Meeting Notes', id: Date.now() + Math.random() },
                    { type: 'ul', items: [{ text: 'Date: ', level: 0 }, { text: 'Attendees: ', level: 0 }, { text: 'Location: ', level: 0 }], id: Date.now() + Math.random() + 1 },
                    { type: 'text', style: 'h2', content: 'Agenda', id: Date.now() + Math.random() + 2 },
                    { type: 'ol', items: [{ text: 'Item 1', level: 0 }, { text: 'Item 2', level: 0 }], id: Date.now() + Math.random() + 3 },
                ]
            }
        }[template];

        if (templateContent) {
            this.state.createNewDoc({ title: templateContent.title, blocks: templateContent.blocks });
        } else {
            this.state.createNewDoc();
        }
    }

    setupStatusBarViewButtons() {
        const btnPage = document.getElementById('btn-view-page-sb');
        const btnWeb = document.getElementById('btn-view-web-sb');
        const btnSplit = document.getElementById('btn-split-view-sb');
        const btnViewPage = document.getElementById('btn-view-page');
        const btnViewWeb = document.getElementById('btn-view-web');

        const updateViewBtns = () => {
            if (btnPage) btnPage.classList.toggle('active', this.renderer.isPageView);
            if (btnWeb) btnWeb.classList.toggle('active', !this.renderer.isPageView);
        };

        if (btnPage) btnPage.addEventListener('click', () => this.renderer.setMode(true));
        if (btnWeb) btnWeb.addEventListener('click', () => this.renderer.setMode(false));
        if (btnSplit) btnSplit.addEventListener('click', () => this.toggleSplitView());
        if (btnViewPage) {
            btnViewPage.addEventListener('click', () => { this.renderer.setMode(true); updateViewBtns(); });
        }
        if (btnViewWeb) {
            btnViewWeb.addEventListener('click', () => { this.renderer.setMode(false); updateViewBtns(); });
        }

        this.state.subscribe(() => updateViewBtns());
    }

    toggleSplitView() {
        const splitWrapper = document.getElementById('workspace-split-wrapper');
        const mainWrapper = document.getElementById('workspace-wrapper');
        if (!splitWrapper || !mainWrapper) return;

        if (this.splitViewActive) {
            splitWrapper.classList.add('hidden');
            mainWrapper.style.display = '';
            this.splitViewActive = false;
        } else {
            mainWrapper.style.display = 'none';
            splitWrapper.classList.remove('hidden');
            this.splitViewActive = true;
            this.setupSplitViewDragDrop();
        }
    }

    setupSplitViewDragDrop() {
        const leftPane = document.getElementById('workspace-split-l');
        const rightPane = document.getElementById('workspace-split-r');
        if (!leftPane || !rightPane || leftPane.dataset._splitSetup) return;

        leftPane.dataset._splitSetup = '1';
        rightPane.dataset._splitSetup = '1';

        this.renderer.render(this.state.doc, this.state.hfMode);
        const leftClone = document.getElementById('workspace').cloneNode(true);
        leftPane.innerHTML = '';
        leftPane.appendChild(leftClone);

        const closeBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.split-close-btn');
        closeBtns.forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.toggleSplitView());
        });
    }

    updatePageCount(count) {
        const el = document.getElementById('page-count');
        if (el) el.innerText = `Page ${count || 1}`;
    }

    updateReviewPanel() {
        this.reviewManager?.renderReviewPanel();
    }

    setupMobileNav() {
        const navItems = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-item');
        const overlay = document.getElementById('mobile-sheet-overlay');
        const sheetOutline = document.getElementById('mobile-sheet-outline');
        const sheetCloseBtn = sheetOutline?.querySelector('.mobile-sheet-close-btn');

        if (!navItems.length) return;

        const closeSheet = () => {
            overlay?.classList.remove('open');
            sheetOutline?.classList.remove('open');
            document.body.style.overflow = '';
        };

        const openSheet = (sheet) => {
            closeSheet();
            if (sheet) {
                overlay?.classList.add('open');
                sheet.classList.add('open');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
            }
        };

        navItems.forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const nav = item.dataset.nav;
                navItems.forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
                item.classList.add('active');

                switch (nav) {
                    case 'docs': {
                        const sb = document.getElementById('doc-sidebar');
                        if (sb) sb.classList.remove('hidden');
                        const btnDocs = document.getElementById('btn-docs');
                        if (btnDocs) btnDocs.click();
                        break;
                    }
                    case 'outline': {
                        if (this.state.doc && this.state.doc.blocks) {
                            this.outline.updateOutline(this.state.doc.blocks);
                        }
                        openSheet(sheetOutline);
                        break;
                    }
                    case 'find': {
                        this.modal.openFind();
                        break;
                    }
                    case 'review': {
                        const rp = document.getElementById('review-panel');
                        if (rp) {
                            rp.classList.toggle('hidden');
                            this.updateReviewPanel();
                        }
                        break;
                    }
                    case 'more': {
                        const toggle = document.getElementById('btn-toolbar-toggle');
                        if (toggle) toggle.click();
                        break;
                    }
                }
            });
        });

        if (overlay) {
            overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (e.target === overlay) closeSheet();
            });
        }

        if (sheetCloseBtn) {
            sheetCloseBtn.addEventListener('click', closeSheet);
        }

        if (sheetOutline) {
            const searchInput = document.getElementById('inp-mob-outline-search');
            if (searchInput) {
                searchInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
                    const query = searchInput.value.trim();
                    const container = document.getElementById('mob-outline-content');
                    if (!container) return;
                    const items = container.querySelectorAll('.outline-item');
                    items.forEach(item => {
                        const text = item.textContent || '';
                        item.style.display = (!query || text.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())) ? '' : 'none';
                    });
                });
            }
        }
    }
}

.sidebar {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 300px;
  background: var(--bg-sidebar);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--color-gray-300);

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/ai/ai-action-applier.js (2026-07-10 01:54:14) =====
import { Transaction } from '../transaction.js';
import { cloneDocumentValue } from '../schema.js';
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';
import { getBlockRuns, getBlockText, withBlockRuns } from '../inline/block-inline.js';
import { applyMark, replaceRange, splitRunsAtRange } from '../inline/inline-operations.js';
import { createRun, getMarksAtOffset, normalizeRuns } from '../inline/inline-model.js';
import { Formatter } from '../../formatter.js';
import { validateClientBundle } from './ai-action-schema.js';
import { AICitationManager } from './ai-citation-manager.js';

function textHtml(text) { return Formatter.escapeHtml(String(text ?? '')).replace(/\n/g, '<br>') || '<br>'; }
function clampOffset(value, length) { return Math.max(0, Math.min(length, Number(value) || 0)); }
function revision(type, instruction = '') { return { id: createStableId('rev'), type, kind: 'text', author: 'OpenDoc AI', createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), instruction: String(instruction || '').slice(0, 500) }; }
function normalizeGeneratedBlock(state, input = {}, suggesting = false) {
  const type = input.type || 'text'; let block;
  if (type === 'text') block = { id: input.id || createStableId('blk'), type, style: input.style || 'normal', content: textHtml(input.content ?? input.text ?? '') };
  else if (['ul', 'ol', 'checklist'].includes(type)) block = { id: input.id || createStableId('blk'), type, items: (input.items || []).map(item => ({ text: String(item?.text ?? item ?? ''), level: Number(item?.level) || 0, ...(type === 'checklist' ? { checked: !!item?.checked } : {}) })) };
  else if (type === 'table') block = { id: input.id || createStableId('blk'), type, rows: (input.rows || []).map(row => row.map(cell => String(cell ?? ''))), headerRows: Number(input.headerRows) || 1 };
  else block = { id: input.id || createStableId('blk'), type };
  block = state.ensureBlockId(block); if (suggesting) block.revision = revision('insertion', 'AI generated block'); return block;
}

export class AIActionApplier {
  constructor(controller) { this.ctrl = controller; this.state = controller.state; this.citations = new AICitationManager(this.state); }
  blockReplaceOperation(blockId, next, working, source = 'ai') {
    const index = working.findIndex(block => block.id === blockId); if (index < 0) return null; const previous = cloneDocumentValue(working[index]); working[index] = cloneDocumentValue(next);
    return { type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE', index, blockId, block: cloneDocumentValue(next), prevBlock: previous, source };
  }
  replaceTextBlock(block, action, suggesting, instruction) {
    const length = getBlockText(block).length; const from = clampOffset(action.startOffset, length); const to = clampOffset(action.endOffset, length); const runs = getBlockRuns(block); const inherited = getMarksAtOffset(runs, from);
    let nextRuns;
    if (suggesting) {
      const parts = splitRunsAtRange(runs, from, to); const revisionId = createStableId('rev'); const common = { author: 'OpenDoc AI', createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), instruction: String(instruction || '').slice(0, 500), id: revisionId, kind: 'text' };
      const deleted = parts.selected.map(run => ({ ...run, marks: { ...run.marks, revision: { ...common, type: 'deletion' } } }));
      const insertedMarks = { ...inherited, revision: { ...common, type: 'insertion' } }; delete insertedMarks.revision?.previous;
      const inserted = action.text ? [createRun(action.text, insertedMarks)] : [];
      nextRuns = normalizeRuns([...parts.before, ...deleted, ...inserted, ...parts.after]);
    } else nextRuns = replaceRange(runs, from, to, action.text ? [createRun(action.text, inherited)] : []);
    return withBlockRuns(block, nextRuns);
  }
  operationsFor(bundle, selectedActions = null, options = {}) {
    validateClientBundle(bundle, this.state); const actions = selectedActions || bundle.actions || []; const suggesting = (options.outputMode || 'suggest') === 'suggest'; const working = cloneDocumentValue(this.state.doc.blocks || []); const operations = [];
    for (const action of actions) {
      if (action.command === 'replaceText' || action.command === 'insertText' || action.command === 'deleteRange') {
        const block = working.find(item => item.id === action.blockId); if (!block || block.type !== 'text') continue;
        const normalized = action.command === 'insertText' ? { ...action, endOffset: action.startOffset } : action.command === 'deleteRange' ? { ...action, text: '' } : action;
        if (options.outputMode === 'insert' && normalized.text) {
          const currentIndex = working.findIndex(item => item.id === block.id); const inserted = normalizeGeneratedBlock(this.state, { type: 'text', style: block.style || 'normal', content: normalized.text }, suggesting); const index = currentIndex + 1;
          operations.push({ type: 'ADD_BLOCK', index, blockId: inserted.id, block: cloneDocumentValue(inserted), previousBlockId: block.id, nextBlockId: working[index]?.id || null, source: 'ai' }); working.splice(index, 0, inserted); continue;
        }
        const next = this.replaceTextBlock(block, normalized, suggesting, options.instruction); const operation = this.blockReplaceOperation(block.id, next, working); if (operation) operations.push(operation);
      } else if (action.command === 'setBlockStyle') {
        const block = working.find(item => item.id === action.blockId); if (!block) continue; const operation = this.blockReplaceOperation(block.id, { ...block, style: action.style }, working); if (operation) operations.push(operation);
      } else if (action.command === 'setInlineFormatting') {
        const block = working.find(item => item.id === action.blockId); if (!block || block.type !== 'text') continue; let runs = getBlockRuns(block); const length = getBlockText(block).length; const from = clampOffset(action.startOffset ?? 0, length); const to = clampOffset(action.endOffset ?? length, length);
        for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(action.formatting || {})) runs = applyMark(runs, from, to, key, value, 'set'); const next = withBlockRuns(block, runs); const operation = this.blockReplaceOperation(block.id, next, working); if (operation) operations.push(operation);
      } else if (action.command === 'convertBlock') {
        const block = working.find(item => item.id === action.blockId); if (!block) continue; let next;
        if (['ul', 'ol', 'checklist'].includes(action.type)) next = { id: block.id, type: action.type, items: (action.items?.length ? action.items : getBlockText(block).split(/\n|;|(?<=[.!?])\s+/)).filter(Boolean).map(text => ({ text: String(text).trim(), level: 0, ...(action.type === 'checklist' ? { checked: false } : {}) })) };
        else next = { id: block.id, type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: textHtml(['ul', 'ol', 'checklist'].includes(block.type) ? (block.items || []).map(item => item.text).join('; ') : getBlockText(block)) };
        const operation = this.blockReplaceOperation(block.id, next, working); if (operation) operations.push(operation);
      } else if (action.command === 'insertBlocks') {
        if (action.replaceDocument) {
          for (let index = working.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) { const block = working[index]; operations.push({ type: 'REMOVE_BLOCK', index, blockId: block.id, block: cloneDocumentValue(block), previousBlockId: working[index - 1]?.id || null, nextBlockId: working[index + 1]?.id || null, source: 'ai' }); working.splice(index, 1); }
        }
        let index = Math.max(0, Math.min(working.length, Number(action.index) || 0));
        for (const raw of action.blocks || []) { const block = normalizeGeneratedBlock(this.state, raw, suggesting); operations.push({ type: 'ADD_BLOCK', index, blockId: block.id, block: cloneDocumentValue(block), previousBlockId: working[index - 1]?.id || null, nextBlockId: working[index]?.id || null, source: 'ai' }); working.splice(index, 0, block); index += 1; }
      } else if (action.command === 'createTable') {
        const block = normalizeGeneratedBlock(this.state, { type: 'table', rows: action.rows, headerRows: action.headerRows }, suggesting); const index = Math.max(0, Math.min(working.length, Number(action.index) || working.length)); operations.push({ type: 'ADD_BLOCK', index, blockId: block.id, block, previousBlockId: working[index - 1]?.id || null, nextBlockId: working[index]?.id || null, source: 'ai' }); working.splice(index, 0, block);
      } else if (action.command === 'updateTable') {
        const block = working.find(item => item.id === action.blockId); if (!block || block.type !== 'table') continue; const operation = this.blockReplaceOperation(block.id, { ...block, rows: action.rows || block.rows, headerRows: action.headerRows ?? block.headerRows }, working); if (operation) operations.push(operation);
      } else if (action.command === 'addComment') {
        const comment = { id: createStableId('comment'), threadId: createStableId('thread'), author: 'OpenDoc AI', anchor: { blockId: action.blockId || null }, status: 'open', createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), messages: [{ id: createStableId('message'), author: 'OpenDoc AI', body: action.body, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }] }; operations.push({ type: 'ADD_COMMENT_STATE', comment });
      } else if (action.command === 'addCitation') operations.push(this.citations.operation(action, action.blockId, this.state.doc.aiPreferences?.citationStyle || 'footnotes'));
      else if (action.command === 'addFootnote') operations.push({ type: 'ADD_FOOTNOTE_STATE', footnote: { id: createStableId('fn'), blockId: action.blockId || null, content: action.content } });
      else if (action.command === 'applyDocumentStyle') {
        const presetStyles = action.preset === 'plain-language' ? { normal: { fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 12, lineHeight: 1.35, spacingAfter: 9 }, h1: { fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 21, bold: true, spacingBefore: 14, spacingAfter: 7 } } : { normal: { fontFamily: 'Aptos', fontSize: 11, lineHeight: 1.15, spacingAfter: 8 }, title: { fontFamily: 'Aptos Display', fontSize: 28, bold: true, spacingAfter: 16 }, h1: { fontFamily: 'Aptos Display', fontSize: 20, bold: true, color: '#1f4e79', spacingBefore: 14, spacingAfter: 7 }, h2: { fontFamily: 'Aptos Display', fontSize: 15, bold: true, color: '#2f5597', spacingBefore: 12, spacingAfter: 6 }, caption: { fontFamily: 'Aptos', fontSize: 9, italic: true, color: '#5f6368' } };
        operations.push({ type: 'SET_DOCUMENT_STYLES', styles: { ...cloneDocumentValue(this.state.doc.styles || {}), ...presetStyles, ...(action.styles || {}) }, prevStyles: cloneDocumentValue(this.state.doc.styles || {}), preset: action.preset });
      }
    }
    return operations;
  }
  apply(bundle, selectedActions = null, options = {}) {
    const operations = this.operationsFor(bundle, selectedActions, options); if (!operations.length) return null;
    const transaction = new Transaction({ source: 'ai', operations, selectionBefore: this.ctrl.engine.captureSelection?.(), meta: { mergeable: false, source: 'ai', requestId: bundle.requestId, task: bundle.task, instruction: options.instruction || '', outputMode: options.outputMode || 'suggest', summary: bundle.summary } });
    this.state.applyTransaction(transaction); this.state.signal?.('AI_ACTIONS_APPLIED', { bundle, transaction }); return transaction;
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/ai/ai-action-schema.js (2026-07-10 01:53:33) =====
export const AI_ACTION_COMMANDS = new Set(['replaceText', 'insertText', 'insertBlocks', 'deleteRange', 'setBlockStyle', 'setInlineFormatting', 'convertBlock', 'createTable', 'updateTable', 'addComment', 'addCitation', 'addFootnote', 'applyDocumentStyle']);

export function validateClientBundle(bundle, state) {
  if (!bundle || Number(bundle.schemaVersion) !== 1) throw new Error('Unsupported AI response schema.');
  if (Number(bundle.baseRevision) !== Number(state.doc.revision)) { const error = new Error('The document changed while AI was working. Regenerate or rebase the proposal.'); error.code = 'revision_conflict'; throw error; }
  const ids = new Set((state.doc.blocks || []).map(block => block.id));
  const actions = (bundle.actions || []).filter(action => AI_ACTION_COMMANDS.has(action.command)).filter(action => !action.blockId || ids.has(action.blockId));
  return { ...bundle, actions };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/ai/ai-citation-manager.js (2026-07-10 01:53:34) =====
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';
export class AICitationManager {
  constructor(state) { this.state = state; }
  citationText(citation, style = 'simple') {
    const title = citation.title || citation.url; const publisher = citation.publisher ? `${citation.publisher}. ` : ''; const date = citation.publishedAt ? `${citation.publishedAt}. ` : '';
    if (style === 'footnotes' || style === 'chicago') return `${title}. ${publisher}${date}${citation.url}`;
    if (style === 'apa') return `${citation.publisher || title}. (${citation.publishedAt || 'n.d.'}). ${title}. ${citation.url}`;
    return `${title} (${citation.url})`;
  }
  operation(citation, blockId = null, style = 'simple') {
    const footnote = { id: createStableId('fn'), blockId, content: this.citationText(citation, style), citation: { ...citation } };
    return { type: 'ADD_FOOTNOTE_STATE', footnote };
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/ai/ai-client.js (2026-07-10 01:53:39) =====
export class AIClient {
  constructor(state) { this.state = state; this.activeRequestId = null; }
  async capabilities() { const response = await fetch('/api/ai/capabilities', { cache: 'no-store' }); if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Unable to load AI capabilities (${response.status})`); return response.json(); }
  async usage() { const response = await fetch('/api/ai/usage', { cache: 'no-store' }); if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Unable to load AI usage (${response.status})`); return response.json(); }
  requestPayload(options = {}) {
    const requestId = options.requestId || `ai_${crypto.randomUUID?.() || `${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`}`;
    this.activeRequestId = requestId;
    return { ...options, requestId, baseRevision: Number(this.state.doc.revision) || 0 };
  }
  async run(options = {}) {
    const payload = this.requestPayload(options); const id = encodeURIComponent(this.state.doc.id);
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/docs/${id}/ai/run`, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
      const result = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) { const error = new Error(result.message || result.error || `AI request failed (${response.status})`); error.code = result.error; error.currentRevision = result.currentRevision; error.usage = result.usage; throw error; }
      return result;
    } finally { if (this.activeRequestId === payload.requestId) this.activeRequestId = null; }
  }
  async stream(options = {}, onEvent = () => {}) {
    const payload = this.requestPayload(options); const id = encodeURIComponent(this.state.doc.id);
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/docs/${id}/ai/stream`, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Accept: 'text/event-stream' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
      if (!response.ok || !response.body) throw new Error(`AI stream failed (${response.status})`);
      const reader = response.body.getReader(); const decoder = new TextDecoder(); let buffer = ''; let result = null;
      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read(); if (done) break; buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
        let boundary; while ((boundary = buffer.indexOf('\n\n')) >= 0) {
          const chunk = buffer.slice(0, boundary); buffer = buffer.slice(boundary + 2); let event = 'message'; let data = '{}';
          chunk.split('\n').forEach(line => { if (line.startsWith('event:')) event = line.slice(6).trim(); if (line.startsWith('data:')) data = line.slice(5).trim(); });
          let parsed; try { parsed = JSON.parse(data); } catch (_) { parsed = { message: data }; }
          onEvent(event, parsed); if (event === 'result') result = parsed; if (event === 'error') { const error = new Error(parsed.message || parsed.error); error.code = parsed.error; error.currentRevision = parsed.currentRevision; throw error; }
        }
      }
      return result;
    } finally { if (this.activeRequestId === payload.requestId) this.activeRequestId = null; }
  }
  async cancel() { if (!this.activeRequestId) return false; const requestId = this.activeRequestId; this.activeRequestId = null; const response = await fetch(`/api/ai/cancel/${encodeURIComponent(requestId)}`, { method: 'POST' }); const result = await response.json().catch(() => ({})); return !!result.cancelled; }
}

const esc = value => Formatter.escapeHtml(String(value ?? ''));
const COMMANDS = [

  { id: 'glossary', task: 'ask', label: 'Create a glossary', icon: 'book-open-text', category: 'Ask', instruction: 'Create a glossary of technical terms, acronyms, defined terms, and organization-specific language used in this document.' },

  { id: 'cover_email', task: 'ask', label: 'Draft a cover email', icon: 'mail', category: 'Create', instruction: 'Draft a concise professional cover email that introduces this document, summarizes its purpose, and states the requested next action.' },
  { id: 'comment_responses', task: 'ask', label: 'Draft responses to comments', icon: 'message-square-reply', category: 'Review', instruction: 'Summarize unresolved comments and tracked changes and draft a professional response to each reviewer point.' }
];

function inferTask(query) {
  const q = String(query || '').toLowerCase();
  if (/fact|verify|source|citation/.test(q)) return 'fact_check';
  if (/proof|grammar|spelling|clarity|readability/.test(q)) return 'proofread';
  if (/format|style|heading|report design/.test(q)) return 'format';
  if (/summar/.test(q)) return 'summarize';
  if (/short|concise|tighten/.test(q)) return 'shorten';
  if (/expand|detail|elaborate/.test(q)) return 'expand';
  if (/translate/.test(q)) return 'translate';
  if (/continue|finish/.test(q)) return 'continue_writing';
  if (/draft|write (a|an|the)|create (a|an|the)/.test(q)) return 'draft';
  if (/review|contradiction|missing|repeat/.test(q)) return 'review';
  if (/\?$|what|why|where|which|who|how/.test(q)) return 'ask';
  return 'rewrite';
}

export class AICommandManager {
  constructor(controller) {
    this.ctrl = controller; this.state = controller.state; this.panel = null; this.output = null; this.lastBundle = null; this.lastRequest = null; this.capabilities = null; this.smartPasteText = '';
    this.client = new AIClient(this.state); this.context = new AIContextBuilder(controller); this.applier = new AIActionApplier(controller); this.preview = new AIPreviewManager(this); this.draftWizard = new AIDraftWizard(this); this.factChecks = new AIFactCheckManager(); this.preferences = new AIPreferencesManager(this.state); this.usage = new AIUsageManager(this.client);
  }

  setup() {
    this.ensureUi(); this.bindToolbar(); this.bindKeyboard(); this.bindSlashCommands(); this.bindSmartPaste(); this.bindDocumentEvents(); this.loadCapabilities();
  }

  bindDocumentEvents() {
    this.state.subscribeTo?.('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => { this.preferences.preferences = this.preferences.load(); this.updateControlsFromPreferences(); });
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const review = document.querySelector('[data-panel="review"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="home"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('.ribbon-group-buttons');
    if (review && !document.getElementById('btn-ai-commands')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-ai-commands'; btn.title = 'Open AI copilot (Ctrl/Cmd+K)'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="sparkles"></i><span>AI Copilot</span>'; review.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPanel());
    }
    const floating = document.querySelector('#floating-toolbar .floating-toolbar-buttons');
    if (floating && !document.getElementById('flt-btn-ai')) {
      const sep = document.createElement('span'); sep.className = 'flt-sep'; const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'flt-btn-ai'; btn.title = 'Rewrite selection with AI'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="sparkles"></i>'; floating.append(sep, btn);
      btn.addEventListener('mousedown', event => { this.ctrl.toolbar?.captureToolbarSelection?.(); event.preventDefault(); }); btn.addEventListener('click', () => { this.ctrl.toolbar?.restoreToolbarSelection?.(); this.openPanel({ focus: true, scope: 'selection' }); });
    }
    const welcomeActions = document.querySelector('.welcome-actions');
    if (welcomeActions && !document.getElementById('btn-welcome-ai')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-welcome-ai'; btn.className = 'welcome-btn welcome-btn-secondary'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="sparkles"></i><span>Draft with AI</span>'; welcomeActions.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.draftWizard.open());
    }
    globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside'); this.panel.id = 'ai-command-panel'; this.panel.className = 'ai-command-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `<header class="ai-panel-header"><div><span class="ai-logo"><i data-lucide="sparkles"></i></span><div><strong>OpenDoc AI</strong><small id="ai-provider-status">Connecting…</small></div></div><button data-ai-action="close" aria-label="Close">×</button></header>
      <div class="ai-panel-tabs"><button data-ai-tab="commands" class="active">Create & edit</button><button data-ai-tab="research">Research</button><button data-ai-tab="settings">Settings</button></div>
      <div class="ai-tab-page" data-ai-page="commands">
        <div class="ai-command-search"><textarea id="ai-command-query" rows="3" placeholder="Describe what you want AI to write, change, check, or format…"></textarea><div class="ai-run-row"><select id="ai-scope" title="AI scope"><option value="selection">Selection</option><option value="paragraph">Paragraph</option><option value="section">Section</option><option value="document">Entire document</option></select><select id="ai-output-mode" title="How to apply"><option value="suggest">Suggest changes</option><option value="preview">Preview only</option><option value="replace">Apply directly</option><option value="insert">Insert below</option><option value="comment">Add as comment</option></select><button data-ai-action="run-freeform" class="primary"><i data-lucide="send"></i>Run</button></div></div>
        <div class="ai-command-toolbar"><button data-ai-action="open-draft"><i data-lucide="file-plus-2"></i>Whole document</button><button data-ai-action="run:proofread"><i data-lucide="spell-check-2"></i>Proofread</button><button data-ai-action="run:fact_check"><i data-lucide="badge-check"></i>Fact-check</button><button data-ai-action="run:format"><i data-lucide="palette"></i>Format</button></div>
        <div id="ai-command-list" class="ai-command-list"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-tab-page hidden" data-ai-page="research"><label>Source links or notes <textarea id="ai-source-list" rows="7" placeholder="One source URL per line. Supplied links are references; claims are supported only when source evidence is available."></textarea></label><div class="ai-research-actions"><button data-ai-action="run:fact_check" class="primary">Check document claims</button><button data-ai-action="run:review">Review logic</button><button data-ai-action="run:summarize">Create sourced summary</button></div><p class="ai-privacy-note"><i data-lucide="shield-check"></i>OpenDoc only labels a claim supported when source evidence is attached. Bare links and model-supplied citations remain unverified.</p></div>
      <div class="ai-tab-page hidden" data-ai-page="settings"><div class="ai-settings-grid"><label>Default tone<select id="ai-pref-tone"><option>professional</option><option>neutral and analytical</option><option>friendly</option><option>persuasive</option><option>diplomatic</option><option>direct</option></select></label><label>Language<input id="ai-pref-language" value="en-CA"></label><label>Citation style<select id="ai-pref-citation"><option value="footnotes">Footnotes</option><option value="apa">APA</option><option value="chicago">Chicago</option><option value="simple">Links</option></select></label><label>Model class<select id="ai-pref-model"><option value="fast">Fast</option><option value="general">General</option><option value="strong">Strong</option><option value="research">Research</option></select></label><label class="wide">Preferred terminology<textarea id="ai-style-terms" rows="3" placeholder="customer=guest&#10;homeless people=people experiencing homelessness"></textarea></label><label class="wide">Phrases to avoid<textarea id="ai-style-avoid" rows="2" placeholder="moving forward, leverage"></textarea></label><label><input id="ai-pref-redact" type="checkbox"> Redact likely sensitive data</label><label><input id="ai-pref-numbers" type="checkbox" checked> Preserve numbers and dates</label><label><input id="ai-pref-exclude" type="checkbox" checked> Exclude confidential/protected blocks</label></div><button data-ai-action="save-settings" class="primary">Save document AI style guide</button><p id="ai-usage-label" class="ai-usage-label"></p></div>
      <div id="ai-command-output" class="ai-command-output"><div class="ai-empty-state"><i data-lucide="sparkles"></i><strong>Write, revise, check, and format</strong><p>Select text or choose a document scope. All edits are previewed and remain undoable.</p></div></div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(this.panel); this.output = this.panel.querySelector('#ai-command-output');
    this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event));
    this.panel.addEventListener('input', event => { if (event.target.id === 'ai-command-query') this.renderCommands(event.target.value); });
    this.panel.addEventListener('change', event => {
      this.handlePreferenceChange(event);
      if (event.target.matches('[data-ai-claim-filter]')) this.filterClaims(event.target.value);
    }); this.updateControlsFromPreferences(); this.renderCommands(); globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
  }

  updateControlsFromPreferences() {
    const pref = this.preferences.get(); const set = (id, value) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el && value != null) el.value = value; };
    set('ai-scope', pref.scope); set('ai-output-mode', pref.outputMode); set('ai-pref-tone', pref.tone); set('ai-pref-language', pref.language); set('ai-pref-citation', pref.citationStyle); set('ai-pref-model', pref.modelClass);
    const redact = document.getElementById('ai-pref-redact'); if (redact) redact.checked = !!pref.redactSensitive; const numbers = document.getElementById('ai-pref-numbers'); if (numbers) numbers.checked = pref.preserveNumbers !== false; const exclude = document.getElementById('ai-pref-exclude'); if (exclude) exclude.checked = pref.excludeConfidential !== false;
    const terms = this.state.doc.aiStyleGuide?.preferredTerms || {}; set('ai-style-terms', Object.entries(terms).map(([from, to]) => `${from}=${to}`).join('\n')); set('ai-style-avoid', (this.state.doc.aiStyleGuide?.avoidPhrases || []).join(', '));
  }

  handlePreferenceChange(event) {
    if (event.target.id === 'ai-scope') this.preferences.update({ scope: event.target.value }, { persistDocument: false });
    if (event.target.id === 'ai-output-mode') this.preferences.update({ outputMode: event.target.value }, { persistDocument: false });
  }

  async loadCapabilities() {
    try { this.capabilities = await this.client.capabilities(); const status = document.getElementById('ai-provider-status'); if (status) status.textContent = this.capabilities.configured ? `${this.capabilities.provider} · ${this.capabilities.model}` : 'Local fallback · add AI_API_KEY for model results'; const usage = await this.usage.refresh(); const label = document.getElementById('ai-usage-label'); if (label) label.textContent = this.usage.label(usage); }
    catch (error) { const status = document.getElementById('ai-provider-status'); if (status) status.textContent = `AI unavailable: ${error.message}`; }
  }

  openPanel({ focus = true, scope = null } = {}) { if (scope) { const select = document.getElementById('ai-scope'); if (select) select.value = scope; } this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); this.renderCommands(); if (focus) document.getElementById('ai-command-query')?.focus(); }
  closePanel() { this.panel.classList.add('hidden'); }

  switchTab(tab) { this.panel.querySelectorAll('[data-ai-tab]').forEach(button => button.classList.toggle('active', button.dataset.aiTab === tab)); this.panel.querySelectorAll('[data-ai-page]').forEach(page => page.classList.toggle('hidden', page.dataset.aiPage !== tab)); }

  handleClick(event) {
    const tab = event.target.closest('[data-ai-tab]')?.dataset.aiTab; if (tab) return this.switchTab(tab);
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-ai-action]')?.dataset.aiAction; if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.closePanel();
    if (action === 'run-freeform') return this.runFreeform();
    if (action === 'open-draft') return this.draftWizard.open();
    if (action === 'cancel-request') return this.cancelRequest();
    if (action === 'apply-selected') return this.applyCurrent(this.preview.selectedActions(this.lastBundle));
    if (action.startsWith('apply-one:')) return this.applyCurrent([this.lastBundle.actions[Number(action.split(':')[1])]]);
    if (action === 'reject-result') return this.rejectCurrent();
    if (action === 'regenerate-result') return this.regenerate();
    if (action === 'adjust-result') return this.adjustCurrent();
    if (action === 'save-settings') return this.saveSettings();
    if (action.startsWith('apply-issue:')) return this.applyIssue(Number(action.split(':')[1]));
    if (action.startsWith('apply-claim:')) return this.applyClaim(Number(action.split(':')[1]));
    if (action.startsWith('insert-citation:')) return this.insertClaimCitation(Number(action.split(':')[1]));
    if (action === 'post-draft-proofread') return this.runAI('proofread', { scope: 'document', instruction: 'Run a final grammar, clarity, consistency, terminology, readability, and accessibility review of the drafted document.' });
    if (action === 'post-draft-factcheck') return this.runAI('fact_check', { scope: 'document', instruction: 'Extract and assess every factual claim in the drafted document. Do not invent evidence or citations.' });
    if (action.startsWith('run:')) return this.runCommand(action.slice(4));
  }

  renderCommands(query = '') {
    const list = document.getElementById('ai-command-list'); if (!list) return; const q = String(query || '').toLowerCase(); const commands = COMMANDS.filter(command => command.id !== 'draft' && (!q || command.label.toLowerCase().includes(q) || command.id.includes(q)));
    const groups = new Map(); commands.forEach(command => { if (!groups.has(command.category)) groups.set(command.category, []); groups.get(command.category).push(command); });
    list.innerHTML = [...groups.entries()].map(([category, items]) => `<section><h4>${esc(category)}</h4>${items.map(command => `<button data-ai-action="run:${esc(command.id)}"><i data-lucide="${esc(command.icon)}"></i><span>${esc(command.label)}</span></button>`).join('')}</section>`).join('') || '<p>No matching commands.</p>'; globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
  }

  runFreeform() { const query = document.getElementById('ai-command-query')?.value.trim() || ''; if (!query) return; const task = inferTask(query); if (task === 'draft') return this.draftWizard.open(); return this.runAI(task, { instruction: query }); }
  runCommand(id) {
    const command = COMMANDS.find(item => item.id === id); const task = command?.task || id;
    const defaults = { shorten: 'Make this concise while preserving all important facts and numbers.', expand: 'Expand this with useful detail, evidence placeholders, transitions, and implications.', proofread: 'Proofread for grammar, spelling, clarity, consistency, terminology, accessibility, and readability.', fact_check: 'Extract and assess every factual claim. Do not invent sources.', format: 'Apply a professional report structure, semantic headings, consistent tables, captions, and document styles.', summarize: 'Create an accurate executive summary.', review: 'Find missing sections, contradictions, repetition, unclear logic, commitments, deadlines, and questions a reviewer may ask.', continue_writing: 'Continue in the same voice without repeating existing material.', translate: `Translate into ${this.preferences.get().language || 'en-CA'} while preserving formatting and facts.`, ask: 'What are the main findings, gaps, and next actions in this document?', rewrite: 'Improve clarity, flow, and precision while preserving meaning.' };
    return this.runAI(task, { instruction: document.getElementById('ai-command-query')?.value.trim() || command?.instruction || defaults[id] || '' });
  }

  sourceList() { return String(document.getElementById('ai-source-list')?.value || '').split('\n').map(value => value.trim()).filter(Boolean).map(value => { try { const url = new URL(value); return { type: 'url', url: url.toString(), title: url.hostname }; } catch (_) { return { type: 'note', title: 'Provided note', evidence: value }; } }); }

  redact(text) { return String(text || '').replace(/[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}/gi, '[REDACTED EMAIL]').replace(/\b(?:\+?1[-.\s]?)?(?:\(?\d{3}\)?[-.\s]?)\d{3}[-.\s]?\d{4}\b/g, '[REDACTED PHONE]').replace(/\b\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}\b/g, '[REDACTED ID]'); }

  async runAI(task, overrides = {}) {
    if (!this.state.doc?.id) return this.showError('Save or create the document before using AI.'); this.openPanel({ focus: false });
    const scope = overrides.scope || document.getElementById('ai-scope')?.value || this.preferences.get().scope || 'selection'; const outputMode = overrides.outputMode || document.getElementById('ai-output-mode')?.value || this.preferences.get().outputMode || 'suggest';
    const context = this.context.build(scope); const prefs = { ...this.preferences.get(), ...(overrides.preferences || {}), styleGuide: this.state.doc.aiStyleGuide || {} };
    if (this.state.isDirty && this.state.flushSave) {
      this.showStatus('Saving the latest document revision…');
      await this.state.flushSave('ai-context');
      if (this.state.isDirty) return this.showError('The latest document changes could not be saved. Save the document and try again.');
    }
    if (prefs.redactSensitive) context.selectedText = this.redact(context.selectedText);
    const request = { task, scope, outputMode, instruction: overrides.instruction || '', selection: context.selection, activeBlockId: context.activeBlockId, context: { selectedText: context.selectedText, activeBlockId: context.activeBlockId, blockIds: context.blockIds }, preferences: prefs, sources: this.sourceList() };
    this.lastRequest = request; this.lastBundle = null; this.showStatus('Preparing document context…', true);
    try {
      const bundle = await this.client.stream(request, (event, payload) => { if (event === 'status') this.showStatus(payload.phase === 'generating' ? 'Writing and validating proposal…' : 'Preparing document context…', true); });
      if (!bundle) throw new Error('AI returned no result.'); this.lastBundle = validateClientBundle(bundle, this.state);
      if (outputMode === 'replace' && !['proofread', 'fact_check', 'ask', 'review'].includes(task)) this.applyCurrent(this.lastBundle.actions);
      else if (outputMode === 'comment') {
        const proposed = this.lastBundle.answer || this.lastBundle.summary || this.lastBundle.actions?.find(action => action.text)?.text;
        if (!proposed) this.preview.render(this.lastBundle);
        else { this.state.addComment({ anchor: { blockId: context.activeBlockId }, body: proposed, author: 'OpenDoc AI' }); this.showMessage('AI response added as a comment.'); }
      }
      else this.preview.render(this.lastBundle);
      this.usage.refresh().then(value => { const label = document.getElementById('ai-usage-label'); if (label) label.textContent = this.usage.label(value); }).catch(() => undefined);
    } catch (error) {
      if (error.code === 'revision_conflict') return this.showConflict(error); this.showError(error.message || 'AI request failed.');
    }
  }

  showStatus(message, cancellable = false) { this.output.innerHTML = `<div class="ai-loading"><span class="ai-spinner"></span><strong>${esc(message)}</strong><p>The document remains editable. Changes are not applied until you approve them.</p>${cancellable ? '<button data-ai-action="cancel-request">Cancel request</button>' : ''}</div>`; }
  showError(message) { this.output.innerHTML = `<div class="ai-error"><strong>AI could not complete the request</strong><p>${esc(message)}</p><button data-ai-action="regenerate-result">Try again</button></div>`; }
  showMessage(message) {
    const postDraft = this.lastRequest?.task === 'draft' ? '<div class="ai-post-actions"><button data-ai-action="post-draft-proofread">Run final proofread</button><button data-ai-action="post-draft-factcheck">Fact-check draft</button></div>' : '';
    this.output.innerHTML = `<div class="ai-success"><i data-lucide="check-circle-2"></i><strong>${esc(message)}</strong>${postDraft}</div>`; globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
  }
  showConflict(error) { this.output.innerHTML = `<div class="ai-error"><strong>The document changed</strong><p>The AI proposal was based on an older revision. Regenerate it against revision ${esc(error.currentRevision ?? this.state.doc.revision)}.</p><button data-ai-action="regenerate-result" class="primary">Regenerate</button></div>`; }
  async cancelRequest() { const cancelled = await this.client.cancel().catch(() => false); this.showMessage(cancelled ? 'AI request cancelled.' : 'The request already finished.'); }

  applyCurrent(actions) {
    if (!this.lastBundle) return; try { const transaction = this.applier.apply(this.lastBundle, actions, { outputMode: this.lastRequest?.outputMode || 'suggest', instruction: this.lastRequest?.instruction }); if (!transaction) return this.showMessage('There were no applicable changes.'); this.showMessage(`${transaction.operations.length} AI change${transaction.operations.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} applied. Use Undo to revert them.`); }
    catch (error) { if (error.code === 'revision_conflict') return this.showConflict(error); this.showError(error.message); }
  }
  rejectCurrent() { this.lastBundle = null; this.showMessage('AI proposal rejected. No document changes were made.'); }
  regenerate() { if (!this.lastRequest) return; return this.runAI(this.lastRequest.task, this.lastRequest); }
  adjustCurrent() { const input = document.getElementById('ai-command-query'); if (input) { input.value = this.lastRequest?.instruction || ''; input.focus(); input.setSelectionRange(input.value.length, input.value.length); } }

  renderHealth(health = {}) {
    const labels = { clarity: 'Clarity', grammar: 'Grammar', consistency: 'Consistency', readability: 'Readability', accessibility: 'Accessibility' };
    const rows = Object.entries(labels).map(([key, label]) => { const value = health[key]; if (value == null) return ''; const numeric = Number(value); const display = Number.isFinite(numeric) ? `${Math.round(numeric)}${numeric <= 100 ? '%' : ''}` : esc(value); const width = Number.isFinite(numeric) ? Math.max(0, Math.min(100, numeric)) : 0; return `<div class="ai-health-row"><span>${label}</span><div><i style="width:${width}%"></i></div><strong>${display}</strong></div>`; }).join('');
    const readingLevel = health.readingLevel ? `<p><strong>Reading level:</strong> ${esc(health.readingLevel)}</p>` : health.readingGrade != null ? `<p><strong>Estimated reading grade:</strong> ${esc(Math.round(Number(health.readingGrade) || 0))}</p>` : ''; const unresolved = health.unresolvedClaims != null ? `<p><strong>Unresolved claims:</strong> ${esc(health.unresolvedClaims)}</p>` : '';
    return `<section class="ai-health"><h3>Document health</h3>${rows}${readingLevel}${unresolved}</section>`;
  }

  filterClaims(status) { this.output?.querySelectorAll('.ai-claim').forEach(card => { card.hidden = status !== 'all' && card.dataset.claimStatus !== status; }); }

  applyClaim(index) {
    const claim = this.lastBundle?.claimResults?.[index]; if (!claim?.suggestedText || !claim.claim) return;
    let target = null; let offset = -1;
    for (const block of this.state.doc.blocks || []) { if (block.type !== 'text') continue; const div = document.createElement('div'); div.innerHTML = block.content || ''; const text = div.textContent || ''; const found = text.indexOf(claim.claim); if (found >= 0) { target = block; offset = found; break; } }
    if (!target) return this.showError('The claim changed and could not be located in the current document.');
    const bundle = { schemaVersion: 1, baseRevision: this.state.doc.revision, requestId: this.lastBundle.requestId, task: 'fact_check', summary: 'Fact-check wording correction', actions: [{ command: 'replaceText', blockId: target.id, startOffset: offset, endOffset: offset + claim.claim.length, text: claim.suggestedText }] };
    this.lastBundle = bundle; this.applyCurrent(bundle.actions);
  }

  insertClaimCitation(index) {
    const claim = this.lastBundle?.claimResults?.[index]; const source = claim?.citations?.find(item => item.url && item.verification === 'verified-input'); if (!source) return this.showError('No verified citation evidence is attached to this claim.');
    let blockId = null; for (const block of this.state.doc.blocks || []) { if (block.type !== 'text') continue; const div = document.createElement('div'); div.innerHTML = block.content || ''; if ((div.textContent || '').includes(claim.claim || '')) { blockId = block.id; break; } }
    const bundle = { schemaVersion: 1, baseRevision: this.state.doc.revision, requestId: this.lastBundle.requestId, task: 'fact_check', summary: 'Insert verified citation', actions: [{ command: 'addCitation', blockId, ...source }] };
    this.lastBundle = bundle; this.applyCurrent(bundle.actions);
  }

  renderProofIssues(issues) { return `<section class="ai-proof-results"><h3>Writing and consistency issues</h3>${issues.map((issue, index) => `<article><header><strong>${esc(issue.type)}</strong><span class="severity ${esc(issue.severity)}">${esc(issue.severity)}</span></header><p>${esc(issue.text)}</p><small>${esc(issue.explanation)}</small>${issue.suggestion ? `<div class="suggestion">${esc(issue.suggestion)}</div><button data-ai-action="apply-issue:${index}">Apply correction</button>` : ''}</article>`).join('')}</section>`; }
  applyIssue(index) {
    const issue = this.lastBundle?.issues?.[index]; const block = issue?.blockId ? this.state.getBlockById(issue.blockId) : null; if (!issue || !block || block.type !== 'text' || !issue.suggestion) return;
    const text = block.content ? (() => { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.innerHTML = block.content; return div.textContent || ''; })() : ''; const offset = text.indexOf(issue.text); if (offset < 0) return this.showError('The issue text changed and could not be located.');
    const bundle = { schemaVersion: 1, baseRevision: this.state.doc.revision, requestId: this.lastBundle.requestId, task: 'proofread', summary: issue.type, actions: [{ command: 'replaceText', blockId: block.id, startOffset: offset, endOffset: offset + issue.text.length, text: issue.suggestion }] }; this.lastBundle = bundle; this.applyCurrent(bundle.actions);
  }

  saveSettings() {
    const preferredTerms = {}; String(document.getElementById('ai-style-terms')?.value || '').split('\n').forEach(line => { const [from, ...rest] = line.split('='); if (from?.trim() && rest.join('=').trim()) preferredTerms[from.trim()] = rest.join('=').trim(); });
    const avoidPhrases = String(document.getElementById('ai-style-avoid')?.value || '').split(/,|\n/).map(value => value.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    const values = { tone: document.getElementById('ai-pref-tone')?.value, language: document.getElementById('ai-pref-language')?.value, citationStyle: document.getElementById('ai-pref-citation')?.value, modelClass: document.getElementById('ai-pref-model')?.value, redactSensitive: !!document.getElementById('ai-pref-redact')?.checked, preserveNumbers: !!document.getElementById('ai-pref-numbers')?.checked, excludeConfidential: !!document.getElementById('ai-pref-exclude')?.checked };
    this.preferences.update(values); this.state.doc.aiStyleGuide = { ...(this.state.doc.aiStyleGuide || {}), tone: values.tone, locale: values.language, preferredTerms, avoidPhrases, citationStyle: values.citationStyle }; this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'AI_STYLE_GUIDE_UPDATED' }); this.showMessage('AI preferences and document style guide saved.');
  }

  bindKeyboard() { document.addEventListener('keydown', event => { if ((event.ctrlKey || event.metaKey) && event.key.toLowerCase() === 'k') { event.preventDefault(); this.openPanel(); } if (event.key === 'Escape' && !this.panel.classList.contains('hidden')) this.closePanel(); }); }
  bindSlashCommands() {
    document.addEventListener('keydown', event => { if (event.key !== 'Enter' || event.shiftKey || !event.target.closest?.('[contenteditable="true"]')) return; const ctx = this.ctrl.getActiveBlockContextFromSelection?.(); const block = ctx ? this.state.doc.blocks[ctx.index] : null; if (!block || block.type !== 'text') return; const div = document.createElement('div'); div.innerHTML = block.content || ''; const value = (div.textContent || '').trim(); const match = value.match(/^\/(draft|rewrite|shorten|expand|summarize|proofread|factcheck|format|translate|continue)(?:\s+(.*))?$/i); if (!match) return; event.preventDefault(); this.state.updateBlockContentById(block.id, '<br>', 'aiSlashCommand'); const taskMap = { factcheck: 'fact_check', continue: 'continue_writing' }; const task = taskMap[match[1].toLowerCase()] || match[1].toLowerCase(); if (task === 'draft') this.draftWizard.open(); else this.runAI(task, { instruction: match[2] || '' }); }, true);
  }
  bindSmartPaste() {
    document.addEventListener('paste', event => { const text = event.clipboardData?.getData('text/plain') || ''; if (text.length < 300) return; this.smartPasteText = text.slice(0, 50000); setTimeout(() => this.showSmartPasteChip(), 100); }, true);
  }
  showSmartPasteChip() {
    document.getElementById('ai-smart-paste-chip')?.remove(); const chip = document.createElement('div'); chip.id = 'ai-smart-paste-chip'; chip.className = 'ai-smart-paste-chip'; chip.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="sparkles"></i><span>Improve pasted content</span><button data-smart-ai="match">Match style</button><button data-smart-ai="summarize">Summarize</button><button data-smart-ai="dismiss">×</button>'; document.body.appendChild(chip); globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    chip.addEventListener('click', event => { const action = event.target.closest('[data-smart-ai]')?.dataset.smartAi; if (!action) return; chip.remove(); if (action === 'dismiss') return; this.openPanel({ scope: 'selection' }); this.runAI(action === 'summarize' ? 'summarize' : 'rewrite', { instruction: action === 'summarize' ? 'Summarize the pasted content accurately.' : 'Match the pasted content to this document\'s tone, terminology, and formatting.' }); }); setTimeout(() => chip.remove(), 12000);
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/ai/ai-context-builder.js (2026-07-10 01:53:42) =====
import { getBlockText } from '../inline/block-inline.js';

function listText(block) { return (block.items || []).map(item => String(item.text || '')).join('\n'); }
function tableText(block) { return (block.rows || []).map(row => row.map(cell => typeof cell === 'object' ? (cell.content || '') : cell).join('\t')).join('\n'); }
function plainText(block) { if (!block) return ''; if (block.type === 'text') return getBlockText(block); if (['ul', 'ol', 'checklist'].includes(block.type)) return listText(block); if (block.type === 'table') return tableText(block); return ''; }
function headingLevel(block) { const match = String(block?.style || '').match(/^h([1-6])$/); return match ? Number(match[1]) : null; }

export class AIContextBuilder {
  constructor(controller) { this.ctrl = controller; this.state = controller.state; }
  activeBlockId() { return this.ctrl.engine.captureSelection()?.anchor?.blockId || this.ctrl.activeBlockId || this.ctrl.getActiveBlockContextFromSelection?.()?.blockId || this.state.doc.blocks?.[0]?.id || null; }
  selectedText() { const selection = window.getSelection?.(); return selection && !selection.isCollapsed ? selection.toString() : ''; }
  selection() { return this.ctrl.engine.captureSelection?.() || null; }
  scopeBlockIds(scope = 'selection') {
    const blocks = this.state.doc.blocks || []; const activeId = this.activeBlockId(); const activeIndex = Math.max(0, blocks.findIndex(block => block.id === activeId));
    if (scope === 'document') return blocks.map(block => block.id);
    if (scope === 'section') {
      let start = activeIndex; while (start > 0 && headingLevel(blocks[start]) == null) start -= 1; const level = headingLevel(blocks[start]) || 1; let end = blocks.length;
      for (let index = start + 1; index < blocks.length; index += 1) { const candidate = headingLevel(blocks[index]); if (candidate != null && candidate <= level) { end = index; break; } }
      return blocks.slice(start, end).map(block => block.id);
    }
    return activeId ? [activeId] : [];
  }
  build(scope = 'selection') {
    const selection = this.selection(); const activeBlockId = this.activeBlockId();
    return { scope, selection, activeBlockId, blockIds: this.scopeBlockIds(scope), selectedText: scope === 'selection' ? this.selectedText() : '', previewText: this.scopeBlockIds(scope).map(id => plainText(this.state.getBlockById(id))).join('\n\n').slice(0, 5000) };
  }
}

export { plainText, headingLevel };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/ai/ai-diff-manager.js (2026-07-10 01:53:44) =====
function tokenize(value) { return String(value || '').split(/(\s+|[.,;:!?()\[\]{}])/).filter(Boolean); }
export class AIDiffManager {
  diff(before, after) {
    const left = tokenize(before); const right = tokenize(after); const rows = Array(left.length + 1).fill(null).map(() => Array(right.length + 1).fill(0));
    for (let i = left.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) for (let j = right.length - 1; j >= 0; j -= 1) rows[i][j] = left[i] === right[j] ? rows[i + 1][j + 1] + 1 : Math.max(rows[i + 1][j], rows[i][j + 1]);
    const parts = []; let i = 0; let j = 0;
    while (i < left.length && j < right.length) { if (left[i] === right[j]) { parts.push({ type: 'same', text: left[i] }); i += 1; j += 1; } else if (rows[i + 1][j] >= rows[i][j + 1]) { parts.push({ type: 'delete', text: left[i++] }); } else parts.push({ type: 'insert', text: right[j++] }); }
    while (i < left.length) parts.push({ type: 'delete', text: left[i++] }); while (j < right.length) parts.push({ type: 'insert', text: right[j++] }); return parts;
  }
}

export class AIDraftWizard {

  open() {
    if (!this.dialog) { this.dialog = document.createElement('dialog'); this.dialog.className = 'ai-draft-dialog'; document.body.appendChild(this.dialog); }
    this.dialog.innerHTML = `<form method="dialog" class="ai-draft-form"><header><div><strong>Draft with AI</strong><small>Build an outline, generate sections, proofread, and format.</small></div><button value="cancel" aria-label="Close">×</button></header><div class="ai-draft-grid"><label>Document type<select name="documentType"><option>Report</option><option>Proposal</option><option>Memo</option><option>Business letter</option><option>Policy document</option><option>Research brief</option><option>Financial analysis</option><option>Custom</option></select></label><label>Audience<input name="audience" placeholder="Board, customers, public..."></label><label class="wide">Purpose<textarea name="purpose" rows="3" placeholder="What should this document accomplish?"></textarea></label><label>Length<select name="length"><option value="short">Short</option><option value="medium" selected>Medium</option><option value="long">Long</option></select></label><label>Tone<select name="tone"><option>Professional</option><option>Neutral and analytical</option><option>Friendly</option><option>Persuasive</option><option>Diplomatic</option></select></label><label class="wide">Required sections<input name="sections" placeholder="Executive Summary, Background, Analysis, Recommendations"></label><label class="wide">Source material / key facts<textarea name="sources" rows="5" placeholder="Paste notes, facts, or an outline. AI will not invent missing sources."></textarea></label><label><input name="replaceDocument" type="checkbox" checked> Replace current document</label><label><input name="factCheck" type="checkbox"> Run claim review after drafting</label></div><footer><button value="cancel">Cancel</button><button value="generate" class="primary">Generate draft</button></footer></form>`;
    this.dialog.addEventListener('close', () => { if (this.dialog.returnValue !== 'generate') return; const data = new FormData(this.dialog.querySelector('form')); const sections = String(data.get('sections') || '').split(',').map(value => value.trim()).filter(Boolean); const purpose = String(data.get('purpose') || '').trim(); const sourceMaterial = String(data.get('sources') || '').trim(); const instruction = [purpose || 'Create a complete document.', sourceMaterial ? `Source material and confirmed facts:\n${sourceMaterial}` : ''].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n'); this.manager.runAI('draft', { instruction, scope: 'document', preferences: { documentType: data.get('documentType'), audience: data.get('audience'), purpose: data.get('purpose'), length: data.get('length'), tone: data.get('tone'), sections, sourceMaterial: data.get('sources'), replaceDocument: data.get('replaceDocument') === 'on', factCheck: data.get('factCheck') === 'on' } }); }, { once: true });
    this.dialog.showModal();
  }
}

export class AIFactCheckManager {
  render(claims = []) {
    if (!claims.length) return '<p class="ai-empty">No factual claims were identified.</p>';
    return `<section class="ai-claim-results"><header><h3>Claim review</h3><select data-ai-claim-filter aria-label="Filter claims"><option value="all">All claims</option><option value="not_enough_evidence">Needs evidence</option><option value="contradicted">Contradicted</option><option value="outdated">Outdated</option><option value="supported">Supported</option></select></header><div class="ai-claims">${claims.map((claim, index) => `<article class="ai-claim" data-claim-status="${esc(claim.status)}"><header><span class="ai-claim-status ${esc(claim.status)}">${esc(String(claim.status || '').replaceAll('_', ' '))}</span><span>${Math.round((claim.confidence || 0) * 100)}%</span></header><blockquote>${esc(claim.claim)}</blockquote><p>${esc(claim.explanation)}</p>${claim.suggestedText ? `<div class="ai-claim-suggestion"><strong>Suggested wording</strong><p>${esc(claim.suggestedText)}</p></div>` : ''}${(claim.citations || []).length ? `<ul>${claim.citations.map(source => `<li><a href="${esc(source.url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">${esc(source.title || source.url)}</a>${source.publisher ? ` — ${esc(source.publisher)}` : ''}${source.publishedAt ? ` <small>${esc(source.publishedAt)}</small>` : ''}${source.verification === 'model-supplied' ? ' <em>unverified</em>' : ''}</li>`).join('')}</ul>` : '<small>No verified citation attached.</small>'}<footer>${claim.suggestedText ? `<button data-ai-action="apply-claim:${index}">Use suggested wording</button>` : ''}${(claim.citations || []).some(source => source.verification === 'verified-input') ? `<button data-ai-action="insert-citation:${index}">Insert verified citation</button>` : ''}</footer></article>`).join('')}</div></section>`;
  }
}
