            meta: { inputType: 'enter', mergeable: false }
        });
    }

    normalizeTextSelection(selection = this.selection) {
        if (!selection || selection.type !== 'text' || !selection.anchor?.blockId || !selection.focus?.blockId) return null;
        const anchorIndex = this.state.getBlockIndexById(selection.anchor.blockId);
        const focusIndex = this.state.getBlockIndexById(selection.focus.blockId);
        if (anchorIndex < 0 || focusIndex < 0) return null;
        const forward = anchorIndex < focusIndex || (anchorIndex === focusIndex && selection.anchor.offset <= selection.focus.offset);
        return {
            start: forward ? selection.anchor : selection.focus,
            end: forward ? selection.focus : selection.anchor,
            startIndex: forward ? anchorIndex : focusIndex,
            endIndex: forward ? focusIndex : anchorIndex,
            direction: selection.direction || (forward ? 'forward' : 'backward')
        };
    }

    getBlockSelectionRange(block, blockIndex, normalizedSelection) {
        const length = getBlockTextLength(block);
        const from = blockIndex === normalizedSelection.startIndex ? Math.max(0, normalizedSelection.start.offset) : 0;
        const to = blockIndex === normalizedSelection.endIndex ? Math.min(length, normalizedSelection.end.offset) : length;
        return { from: Math.min(from, to), to: Math.max(from, to) };
    }

    createMarkTransaction(source, selection, key, value = true, mode = 'set') {
        const normalized = this.normalizeTextSelection(selection);
        if (!normalized) return null;
        if (normalized.startIndex === normalized.endIndex && normalized.start.offset === normalized.end.offset) {
            const block = this.state.doc.blocks[normalized.startIndex];
            const current = this.storedMarks || getMarksAtOffset(getBlockRuns(block), normalized.start.offset);
            const next = { ...current };
            if (mode === 'toggle' && next[key]) delete next[key];
            else if (value == null || value === false) delete next[key];
            else next[key] = value;
            this.storedMarks = next;
            return { handled: true };
        }

        const operations = [];
        for (let index = normalized.startIndex; index <= normalized.endIndex; index += 1) {
            const previous = this.state.doc.blocks[index];
            if (!previous || previous.type !== 'text') continue;
            const block = ensureBlockRuns(previous);
            const { from, to } = this.getBlockSelectionRange(block, index, normalized);
            if (from === to) continue;
            const children = applyMark(block.children, from, to, key, value, mode);
            const next = withBlockRuns(block, children);
            operations.push({
                type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE',
                blockId: previous.id,
                index,
                block: next,
                prevBlock: cloneDocumentValue(previous),
                source
            });
        }
        return new Transaction({ source, operations, selectionBefore: selection, selectionAfter: selection, meta: { inputType: 'format', mergeable: false } });
    }

    createClearFormattingTransaction(selection) {
        const normalized = this.normalizeTextSelection(selection);
        if (!normalized) return null;
        if (normalized.startIndex === normalized.endIndex && normalized.start.offset === normalized.end.offset) {
            this.storedMarks = {};
            return { handled: true };
        }
        const operations = [];
        for (let index = normalized.startIndex; index <= normalized.endIndex; index += 1) {
            const previous = this.state.doc.blocks[index];
            if (!previous || previous.type !== 'text') continue;
            const block = ensureBlockRuns(previous);
            const { from, to } = this.getBlockSelectionRange(block, index, normalized);
            const next = withBlockRuns(block, clearMarks(block.children, from, to));
            operations.push({ type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE', blockId: previous.id, index, block: next, prevBlock: cloneDocumentValue(previous), source: 'clearFormatting' });
        }
        return new Transaction({ source: 'clearFormatting', operations, selectionBefore: selection, selectionAfter: selection, meta: { inputType: 'format', mergeable: false } });
    }

    getSelectionMarks(selection = this.selection) {
        const normalized = this.normalizeTextSelection(selection);
        if (!normalized) return {};
        const block = this.state.doc.blocks[normalized.startIndex];
        if (!block || block.type !== 'text') return {};
        if (normalized.startIndex === normalized.endIndex && normalized.start.offset === normalized.end.offset) {
            return this.storedMarks || getMarksAtOffset(getBlockRuns(block), normalized.start.offset);
        }
        if (normalized.startIndex === normalized.endIndex) {
            return getCommonMarks(getBlockRuns(block), normalized.start.offset, normalized.end.offset);
        }
        let common = null;
        for (let index = normalized.startIndex; index <= normalized.endIndex; index += 1) {
            const current = this.state.doc.blocks[index];
            if (!current || current.type !== 'text') continue;
            const { from, to } = this.getBlockSelectionRange(current, index, normalized);
            const marks = getCommonMarks(getBlockRuns(current), from, to);
            if (common === null) common = { ...marks };
            else for (const key of Object.keys(common)) if (JSON.stringify(common[key]) !== JSON.stringify(marks[key])) delete common[key];
        }
        return common || {};
    }

}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/fields/field-manager.js (2026-07-09 12:10:58) =====
import { Formatter } from '../../formatter.js';
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

function clone(value) { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value)); }
function textFromHtml(html) { const tmp = document.createElement('div'); tmp.innerHTML = html || ''; return tmp.textContent || ''; }
function esc(value) { return Formatter.escapeHtml(String(value ?? '')); }

export class FieldManager {
  constructor(controller) { this.ctrl = controller; this.state = controller.state; this.panel = null; }

  setup() {
    this.ensureUi();
    this.bindToolbar();
    this.state.subscribeTo('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => this.updateFields({ silent: true }));
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside');
    this.panel.id = 'field-panel';
    this.panel.className = 'field-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `
      <header><strong>Fields & References</strong><button data-field-action="close">×</button></header>
      <section class="field-grid">
        <button data-field-action="pageNumber">Page number</button>
        <button data-field-action="pageCount">Total pages</button>
        <button data-field-action="date">Date</button>
        <button data-field-action="time">Time</button>
        <button data-field-action="title">Document title</button>
        <button data-field-action="author">Author</button>
      </section>
      <section class="field-grid">
        <button data-field-action="caption-figure">Caption: Figure</button>
        <button data-field-action="caption-table">Caption: Table</button>
        <button data-field-action="cross-ref">Cross-reference</button>
        <button data-field-action="update-fields">Update fields</button>
        <button data-field-action="update-toc">Update TOC</button>
      </section>
      <div id="field-reference-list" class="field-reference-list"></div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
    this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event));
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const refs = document.querySelector('[data-panel="references"] .ribbon-panel, [data-panel="references"]');
    const target = document.querySelector('[data-panel="references"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || refs;
    if (target && !document.getElementById('btn-field-panel')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-field-panel'; btn.title = 'Fields and references'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="braces"></i><span>Fields</span>';
      target.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPanel()); globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
  }

  openPanel() { this.renderReferences(); this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); }
  closePanel() { this.panel.classList.add('hidden'); }

  handleClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-field-action]')?.dataset.fieldAction;
    if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.closePanel();
    if (['pageNumber','pageCount','date','time','title','author'].includes(action)) return this.insertField(action);
    if (action === 'caption-figure') return this.insertCaption('Figure');
    if (action === 'caption-table') return this.insertCaption('Table');
    if (action === 'cross-ref') return this.insertCrossReference();
    if (action === 'update-fields') return this.updateFields();
    if (action === 'update-toc') return this.updateTocBlocks();
  }

  insertField(fieldType) {
    const id = createStableId('fld');
    const block = { id: createStableId('blk'), type: 'field', fieldId: id, fieldType, display: this.resolveField({ fieldType, fieldId: id }) };
    this.state.insertBlockAt(this.ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex() + 1, block, 'field');
  }

  insertCaption(label = 'Figure') {
    const baseIndex = this.ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex();
    const target = this.state.doc.blocks[baseIndex];
    const number = this.nextCaptionNumber(label);
    const text = prompt(`${label} caption`, `${label} ${number}: `);
    if (text === null) return;
    const caption = { id: createStableId('cap'), label, number, targetBlockId: target?.id || null, text: text.trim() || `${label} ${number}` };
    this.state.doc.captions ||= []; this.state.doc.captions.push(caption);
    this.state.insertBlockAt(baseIndex + 1, { id: createStableId('blk'), type: 'text', style: 'caption', content: esc(caption.text), captionId: caption.id }, 'caption');
    this.renderReferences();
  }

  insertCrossReference() {
    const captions = this.state.doc.captions || [];
    if (!captions.length) return alert('No captions yet. Insert a figure or table caption first.');
    const choices = captions.map((c, i) => `${i + 1}. ${c.text || `${c.label} ${c.number}`}`).join('\n');
    const pick = Number(prompt(`Cross-reference which caption?\n${choices}`, '1')) - 1;
    const caption = captions[pick]; if (!caption) return;
    const block = { id: createStableId('blk'), type: 'field', fieldId: createStableId('fld'), fieldType: 'crossReference', targetCaptionId: caption.id, display: caption.text || `${caption.label} ${caption.number}` };
    this.state.insertBlockAt(this.ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex() + 1, block, 'crossReference');
  }

  nextCaptionNumber(label) { return (this.state.doc.captions || []).filter(c => c.label === label).length + 1; }

  resolveField(field = {}) {
    const now = new Date();
    if (field.fieldType === 'pageNumber') return 'Page {n}';
    if (field.fieldType === 'pageCount') return '{pages}';
    if (field.fieldType === 'date') return now.toLocaleDateString();
    if (field.fieldType === 'time') return now.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
    if (field.fieldType === 'title') return this.state.doc.title || 'Untitled Document';
    if (field.fieldType === 'author') return this.state.currentUserName || 'Author';
    if (field.fieldType === 'crossReference') return (this.state.doc.captions || []).find(c => c.id === field.targetCaptionId)?.text || 'Missing reference';
    return field.display || '';
  }

  updateFields({ silent = false } = {}) {
    let changed = false;
    for (const block of this.state.doc.blocks || []) {
      if (block.type !== 'field') continue;
      const display = this.resolveField(block);
      if (display !== block.display) { block.display = display; changed = true; }
    }
    this.renumberCaptions();
    if (changed && !silent) { this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'FIELDS_UPDATED' }); }
    this.renderReferences();
  }

  renumberCaptions() {
    const counters = {};
    for (const block of this.state.doc.blocks || []) {
      if (!block.captionId) continue;
      const caption = (this.state.doc.captions || []).find(c => c.id === block.captionId);
      if (!caption) continue;
      counters[caption.label] = (counters[caption.label] || 0) + 1;
      caption.number = counters[caption.label];
      if (!caption.text || /^\w+ \d+:/.test(caption.text)) caption.text = `${caption.label} ${caption.number}: ${textFromHtml(block.content).replace(/^\w+ \d+:\s*/, '')}`;
    }
  }

  updateTocBlocks() {
    this.state.doc.blocks.forEach(block => { if (block.type === 'toc') block.updatedAt = new Date().toISOString(); });
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'TOC_UPDATED' });
  }

  renderReferences() {
    const box = document.getElementById('field-reference-list'); if (!box) return;
    const captions = this.state.doc.captions || [];
    box.innerHTML = `<strong>Captions</strong>${captions.length ? captions.map(c => `<button data-caption-id="${esc(c.id)}">${esc(c.text || `${c.label} ${c.number}`)}</button>`).join('') : '<p>No captions yet.</p>'}`;
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/forms/forms-manager.js (2026-07-09 17:49:26) =====
import { Formatter } from '../../formatter.js';
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

function esc(value) { return Formatter.escapeHtml(String(value ?? '')); }
function stripHtml(html) { const tmp = document.createElement('div'); tmp.innerHTML = html || ''; return tmp.textContent || ''; }

const BUILT_IN_TEMPLATES = {
  businessLetter: {
    title: 'Business Letter',
    blocks: [
      { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: '{{Date}}' },

      { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'Dear {{Recipient Name}},' },

  },

    title: 'Catering Quote',
    blocks: [

  },

      { type: 'table', headerRows: 1, tableStyle: { id: 'financial' }, rows: [['Description', 'Amount'], ['Services', '$0.00'], ['HST', '$0.00'], ['Total', '$0.00']] }
    ]
  },
  policyMemo: {
    title: 'Policy Memo',

      { type: 'formField', fieldType: 'text', label: 'From', value: '' },
      { type: 'formField', fieldType: 'date', label: 'Date', value: '' },
      { type: 'formField', fieldType: 'richText', label: 'Recommendation', placeholder: 'Summarize the recommendation.' }
    ]
  }
};

export class FormsManager {
  constructor(controller) {
    this.ctrl = controller;
    this.state = controller.state;
    this.panel = null;
  }

  setup() {
    this.ensureUi();
    this.bindToolbar();
    this.bindFormEditing();
    this.bindProtectionGuard();
    this.state.subscribeTo('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => this.renderTemplateList());
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const insert = document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"]');
    if (insert && !document.getElementById('btn-forms-panel')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.id = 'btn-forms-panel';
      btn.title = 'Forms and templates';
      btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="file-check-2"></i><span>Forms</span>';
      insert.appendChild(btn);
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPanel());
      globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside');
    this.panel.id = 'forms-panel';
    this.panel.className = 'forms-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `
      <header><strong>Forms & Templates</strong><button data-form-action="close" title="Close">×</button></header>
      <section class="forms-section"><h4>Insert form field</h4><div class="forms-grid">
        <button data-form-action="insert:text">Text</button>
        <button data-form-action="insert:richText">Rich text</button>
        <button data-form-action="insert:checkbox">Checkbox</button>
        <button data-form-action="insert:dropdown">Dropdown</button>
        <button data-form-action="insert:date">Date</button>
        <button data-form-action="insert:signature">Signature</button>
        <button data-form-action="insert:repeatingSection">Repeating section</button>
        <button data-form-action="insert:placeholder">Placeholder</button>
      </div></section>
      <section class="forms-section"><h4>Protection</h4><div class="forms-grid">
        <button data-form-action="protect:fillForms">Fill forms only</button>
        <button data-form-action="protect:readOnly">Read only</button>
        <button data-form-action="protect:lockStyles">Lock formatting</button>
        <button data-form-action="protect:none">Unlock</button>
      </div><p id="forms-protection-state" class="forms-hint"></p></section>
      <section class="forms-section"><h4>Templates</h4><div class="forms-grid"><button data-form-action="save-template">Save current as template</button><button data-form-action="export-template">Export template JSON</button></div><div id="template-list" class="template-list"></div></section>`;
    document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
    this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event));
  }

  openPanel() {
    this.renderTemplateList();
    this.updateProtectionState();
    this.panel.classList.remove('hidden');
  }

  handleClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-form-action]')?.dataset.formAction;
    if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.panel.classList.add('hidden');
    if (action.startsWith('insert:')) return this.insertFormField(action.slice(7));
    if (action.startsWith('protect:')) return this.setProtection(action.slice(8));
    if (action === 'save-template') return this.saveTemplate();
    if (action === 'export-template') return this.exportTemplate();
    if (action.startsWith('template:')) return this.applyTemplate(action.slice(9));
  }

  fieldLabel(type) {
    return ({ text: 'Text field', richText: 'Rich text', checkbox: 'Checkbox', dropdown: 'Dropdown', date: 'Date', signature: 'Signature', repeatingSection: 'Repeating section', placeholder: 'Placeholder' })[type] || 'Field';
  }

  insertFormField(type) {
    const label = window.prompt('Field label', this.fieldLabel(type));
    if (label === null) return false;
    let options = [];
    if (type === 'dropdown') {
      const raw = window.prompt('Dropdown options, separated by commas', 'Option 1, Option 2');
      options = (raw || '').split(',').map(item => item.trim()).filter(Boolean);
      if (!options.length) options = ['Option 1'];
    }
    const block = this.state.ensureBlockId({
      type: 'formField',
      fieldId: createStableId('field'),
      fieldType: type,
      label: label || this.fieldLabel(type),
      placeholder: type === 'placeholder' ? 'Click to enter text' : '',
      value: type === 'checkbox' ? false : (type === 'dropdown' ? options[0] : ''),
      options,
      required: false,
      locked: false
    });
    const insertAt = this.ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex() + 1;
    this.state.insertBlockAt(insertAt, block, 'insertFormField');
    this.ctrl.focusInsertedBlock(insertAt, 'text');
    return true;
  }

  bindFormEditing() {
    document.addEventListener('change', event => this.updateFieldFromEvent(event), true);
    document.addEventListener('input', event => this.updateFieldFromEvent(event), true);
  }

  updateFieldFromEvent(event) {
    const control = event.target.closest?.('[data-form-field-id]');
    if (!control) return;
    const fieldId = control.dataset.formFieldId;
    const block = (this.state.doc.blocks || []).find(item => item.type === 'formField' && item.fieldId === fieldId);
    if (!block || block.locked) return;
    if (block.fieldType === 'checkbox') block.value = !!control.checked;
    else if (control.isContentEditable) block.value = control.innerHTML;
    else block.value = control.value;
    this.state.markDirty();
    this.state.notify({ type: 'FORM_FIELD_UPDATED', fieldId, blockId: block.id });
  }

  bindProtectionGuard() {
    document.addEventListener('beforeinput', event => {
      const protection = this.state.doc.protection || {};
      if (!protection.enabled || protection.mode === 'none') return;
      const editableFormField = event.target.closest?.('[data-form-field-id]');
      if (protection.mode === 'fillForms' && editableFormField) return;
      event.preventDefault();
      this.ctrl.toolbar?.showShellToast?.(protection.message || 'Document protection is enabled.');
    }, true);
  }

  setProtection(mode) {
    if (mode === 'none') this.state.doc.protection = { enabled: false, mode: 'none' };
    else this.state.doc.protection = { enabled: true, mode, message: mode === 'fillForms' ? 'Only form fields can be edited.' : mode === 'readOnly' ? 'This document is read-only.' : 'Formatting is locked.' };
    this.state.markDirty();
    this.state.notify({ type: 'DOCUMENT_PROTECTION_CHANGED', protection: this.state.doc.protection });
    this.updateProtectionState();
  }

  updateProtectionState() {
    const el = document.getElementById('forms-protection-state');
    if (!el) return;
    const protection = this.state.doc.protection || {};
    el.textContent = protection.enabled ? `Protection: ${protection.mode}` : 'Protection: off';
  }

  userTemplates() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('opendoc_user_templates') || '{}') || {}; } catch (_) { return {}; }
  }

  saveUserTemplates(templates) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('opendoc_user_templates', JSON.stringify(templates)); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
  }

  renderTemplateList() {
    const list = document.getElementById('template-list');
    if (!list) return;
    const user = this.userTemplates();
    const all = { ...BUILT_IN_TEMPLATES, ...user };
    list.innerHTML = Object.entries(all).map(([id, template]) => `<button data-form-action="template:${esc(id)}"><strong>${esc(template.title || id)}</strong><span>${user[id] ? 'Custom' : 'Built in'}</span></button>`).join('');
  }

  saveTemplate() {
    const title = window.prompt('Template name', this.state.doc.title || 'New Template');
    if (!title) return;
    const id = title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '') || createStableId('template');
    const templates = this.userTemplates();
    templates[id] = { title, blocks: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.state.doc.blocks || [])), settings: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.state.doc.settings || {})), styles: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.state.doc.styles || {})) };
    this.saveUserTemplates(templates);
    this.renderTemplateList();
    this.ctrl.toolbar?.showShellToast?.('Template saved');
  }

  exportTemplate() {
    const template = { title: this.state.doc.title, blocks: this.state.doc.blocks, settings: this.state.doc.settings, styles: this.state.doc.styles };
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(template, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = `${this.state.doc.title || 'template'}.opendoc-template.json`; a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }

  applyTemplate(templateId) {
    const template = { ...BUILT_IN_TEMPLATES, ...this.userTemplates() }[templateId];
    if (!template) return;
    const blocks = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(template.blocks || [])).map(block => this.state.ensureBlockId(block));
    this.state.createNewDoc({ title: template.title || 'Template', blocks, settings: template.settings, styles: template.styles });
  }

  static fieldToPlainText(block) {
    if (block.fieldType === 'checkbox') return block.value ? '☑' : '☐';
    return stripHtml(block.value || block.placeholder || '');
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/id.js (2026-07-03 01:59:42) =====
const SAFE_ID = /^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_-]*$/;

function randomPart() {
    if (typeof crypto !== 'undefined' && typeof crypto.randomUUID === 'function') {
        return crypto.randomUUID().replace(/-/g, '');
    }
    const time = Date.now().toString(36);
    const rand = Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 12);
    return `${time}${rand}`;
}

export function createStableId(prefix = 'node') {
    return `${prefix}_${randomPart()}`;
}

export function isStableStringId(value) {
    return typeof value === 'string' && value.length > 0 && SAFE_ID.test(value);
}

export function normalizeStableId(value, prefix = 'node', used = null) {
    let id = isStableStringId(value) ? value : createStableId(prefix);
    if (used) {
        while (used.has(id)) id = createStableId(prefix);
        used.add(id);
    }
    return id;
}

export function ensureBlockIdentity(block, used = new Set()) {
    if (!block || typeof block !== 'object') return { changed: false, block };
    let changed = false;
    const nextId = normalizeStableId(block.id, 'blk', used);
    if (block.id !== nextId) {
        block.id = nextId;
        changed = true;
    }

    if (Array.isArray(block.items)) {
        const itemUsed = new Set();
        block.items.forEach((item, index) => {
            if (typeof item === 'string') return;
            if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') return;
            const itemId = normalizeStableId(item.id, 'item', itemUsed);
            if (item.id !== itemId) {
                item.id = itemId;
                changed = true;
            }
            if (!Number.isFinite(Number(item.order))) item.order = index;
        });
    }

    if (block.type === 'table' && Array.isArray(block.rows)) {
        if (!Array.isArray(block.rowIds)) {
            block.rowIds = [];
            changed = true;
        }
        if (!Array.isArray(block.cellIds)) {
            block.cellIds = [];
            changed = true;
        }
        const rowUsed = new Set();
        const cellUsed = new Set();
        block.rows.forEach((row, rowIndex) => {
            const rowId = normalizeStableId(block.rowIds[rowIndex], 'row', rowUsed);
            if (block.rowIds[rowIndex] !== rowId) {
                block.rowIds[rowIndex] = rowId;
                changed = true;
            }
            if (!Array.isArray(block.cellIds[rowIndex])) {
                block.cellIds[rowIndex] = [];
                changed = true;
            }
            (row || []).forEach((cell, colIndex) => {
                const cellId = normalizeStableId(block.cellIds[rowIndex][colIndex], 'cell', cellUsed);
                if (block.cellIds[rowIndex][colIndex] !== cellId) {
                    block.cellIds[rowIndex][colIndex] = cellId;
                    changed = true;
                }
            });
            if (block.cellIds[rowIndex].length > (row || []).length) {
                block.cellIds[rowIndex].length = row.length;
                changed = true;
            }
        });
        if (block.rowIds.length > block.rows.length) {
            block.rowIds.length = block.rows.length;
            changed = true;
        }
        if (block.cellIds.length > block.rows.length) {
            block.cellIds.length = block.rows.length;
            changed = true;
        }
    }

    return { changed, block };
}

export function ensureDocumentIdentity(document) {
    if (!document || typeof document !== 'object') return { changed: false, document };
    let changed = false;
    const used = new Set();
    (document.blocks || []).forEach((block) => {
        const result = ensureBlockIdentity(block, used);
        changed = changed || result.changed;
    });

    const migrateNotes = (notes, prefix) => {
        (notes || []).forEach((note) => {
            const noteId = normalizeStableId(note.id, prefix);
            if (note.id !== noteId) {
                note.id = noteId;
                changed = true;
            }
            if (!note.blockId && Number.isInteger(note.blockIndex)) {
                const block = document.blocks?.[note.blockIndex];
                if (block?.id) {
                    note.blockId = block.id;
                    changed = true;
                }
            }
        });
    };
    migrateNotes(document.footnotes, 'fn');
    migrateNotes(document.endnotes, 'en');

    return { changed, document };
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/inline/block-inline.js (2026-07-03 02:50:38) =====
import { htmlToRuns } from './html-to-runs.js';
import { cloneRuns, getRunsLength, getRunsText, normalizeRuns } from './inline-model.js';
import { runsToHtml } from './runs-to-html.js';

export function blockUsesRuns(block) {
    return !!block && block.type === 'text' && block.contentFormat === 'runs' && Array.isArray(block.children);
}

export function getBlockRuns(block) {
    if (!block || block.type !== 'text') return [];
    if (blockUsesRuns(block)) return normalizeRuns(block.children);
    return htmlToRuns(block.content || '');
}

export function withBlockRuns(block, runs) {
    const children = normalizeRuns(runs);
    return {
        ...block,
        contentFormat: 'runs',
        children: cloneRuns(children),
        content: runsToHtml(children)
    };
}

export function ensureBlockRuns(block) {
    return blockUsesRuns(block) ? withBlockRuns(block, block.children) : withBlockRuns(block, getBlockRuns(block));
}

export function getBlockHtml(block) {
    if (!block) return '';
    return blockUsesRuns(block) ? runsToHtml(block.children) : String(block.content || '');
}

export function getBlockText(block) {
    return getRunsText(getBlockRuns(block));
}

export function getBlockTextLength(block) {
    return getRunsLength(getBlockRuns(block));
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/inline/html-to-runs.js (2026-07-03 02:51:00) =====
import { createRun, normalizeRuns, normalizeMarks } from './inline-model.js';

function parseStyle(styleText = '') {
    const style = {};
    String(styleText).split(';').forEach(part => {
        const [rawKey, ...rest] = part.split(':');
        if (!rawKey || !rest.length) return;
        style[rawKey.trim().toLowerCase()] = rest.join(':').trim();
    });
    return style;
}

function deriveMarks(node, inherited) {
    const marks = { ...inherited };
    if (!node || node.nodeType !== 1) return marks;
    const tag = node.tagName.toLowerCase();
    if (tag === 'b' || tag === 'strong') marks.bold = true;
    if (tag === 'i' || tag === 'em') marks.italic = true;
    if (tag === 'u') marks.underline = true;
    if (tag === 's' || tag === 'strike' || tag === 'del') marks.strikethrough = true;
    if (tag === 'code') marks.code = true;
    if (tag === 'sup') marks.superscript = true;
    if (tag === 'sub') marks.subscript = true;
    if (tag === 'a' && node.getAttribute('href')) marks.link = { href: node.getAttribute('href'), title: node.getAttribute('title') || undefined };

    const style = parseStyle(node.getAttribute('style') || '');
    if (style['font-family']) marks.fontFamily = style['font-family'].replace(/["']/g, '').split(',')[0].trim();
    if (style['font-size']) marks.fontSize = style['font-size'];
    if (style.color) marks.color = style.color;
    if (style['background-color']) marks.highlight = style['background-color'];
    if (style['font-weight'] && (/bold/i.test(style['font-weight']) || Number(style['font-weight']) >= 600)) marks.bold = true;
    if (style['font-style'] === 'italic') marks.italic = true;
    if (style['text-decoration']) {
        if (style['text-decoration'].includes('underline')) marks.underline = true;
        if (style['text-decoration'].includes('line-through')) marks.strikethrough = true;
    }
    if (style['vertical-align'] === 'super') marks.superscript = true;
    if (style['vertical-align'] === 'sub') marks.subscript = true;
    return normalizeMarks(marks);
}

export function htmlToRuns(html = '') {
    if (typeof document === 'undefined') return normalizeRuns([createRun(String(html || '').replace(/<br\s*\/?\s*>/gi, '\n').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ''))]);
    const root = document.createElement('div');
    root.innerHTML = html || '';
    const runs = [];

    const walk = (node, marks = {}) => {
        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
            if (node.nodeValue) runs.push(createRun(node.nodeValue, marks));
            return;
        }
        if (node.nodeType !== Node.ELEMENT_NODE) return;
        const tag = node.tagName.toLowerCase();
        if (tag === 'br') {
            runs.push(createRun('\n', marks));
            return;
        }
        const nextMarks = deriveMarks(node, marks);
        node.childNodes.forEach(child => walk(child, nextMarks));
    };

    root.childNodes.forEach(node => walk(node, {}));
    return normalizeRuns(runs);
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/inline/inline-model.js (2026-07-03 02:50:44) =====
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

export const EMPTY_MARKS = Object.freeze({});

export function normalizeMarks(marks = {}) {
    const next = {};
    if (!marks || typeof marks !== 'object') return next;
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(marks)) {
        if (value === undefined || value === null || value === false || value === '') continue;
        if (key === 'link' && typeof value === 'string') next.link = { href: value };
        else if (key === 'link' && typeof value === 'object' && value.href) next.link = { ...value, href: String(value.href) };
        else next[key] = value;
    }
    return next;
}

export function marksEqual(a = {}, b = {}) {
    return JSON.stringify(normalizeMarks(a)) === JSON.stringify(normalizeMarks(b));
}

export function createRun(text = '', marks = {}, id = null) {
    return {
        id: id || createStableId('run'),
        text: String(text ?? ''),
        marks: normalizeMarks(marks)
    };
}

export function normalizeRuns(runs = [], { preserveEmpty = true } = {}) {
    const out = [];
    for (const value of Array.isArray(runs) ? runs : []) {
        if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') continue;
        const run = createRun(value.text ?? '', value.marks || {}, value.id);
        if (!run.text) continue;
        const previous = out[out.length - 1];
        if (previous && marksEqual(previous.marks, run.marks)) previous.text += run.text;
        else out.push(run);
    }
    if (!out.length && preserveEmpty) out.push(createRun(''));
    return out;
}

export function getRunsText(runs = []) {
    return normalizeRuns(runs).map(run => run.text).join('');
}

export function getRunsLength(runs = []) {
    return getRunsText(runs).length;
}

export function cloneRuns(runs = []) {
    return normalizeRuns(runs).map(run => ({ id: run.id, text: run.text, marks: { ...run.marks, ...(run.marks.link ? { link: { ...run.marks.link } } : {}) } }));
}

export function getMarksAtOffset(runs = [], offset = 0, affinity = 'backward') {
    const normalized = normalizeRuns(runs);
    let cursor = 0;
    const target = Math.max(0, Number(offset) || 0);
    for (let index = 0; index < normalized.length; index += 1) {
        const run = normalized[index];
        const end = cursor + run.text.length;
        if (target < end || (target === end && affinity === 'backward' && run.text.length)) return { ...run.marks };
        cursor = end;
    }
    return { ...(normalized[normalized.length - 1]?.marks || {}) };
}

export function getCommonMarks(runs = [], from = 0, to = null) {
    const normalized = normalizeRuns(runs);
    const endTarget = to == null ? getRunsLength(normalized) : Math.max(from, Number(to) || 0);
    let cursor = 0;
    let common = null;
    for (const run of normalized) {
        const end = cursor + run.text.length;
        if (end > from && cursor < endTarget) {
            const marks = normalizeMarks(run.marks);
            if (common === null) common = { ...marks };
            else {
                for (const key of Object.keys(common)) {
                    if (JSON.stringify(common[key]) !== JSON.stringify(marks[key])) delete common[key];
                }
            }
        }
        cursor = end;
    }
    return common || {};
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/inline/inline-operations.js (2026-07-03 02:50:51) =====
import { createRun, getCommonMarks, getMarksAtOffset, getRunsLength, marksEqual, normalizeMarks, normalizeRuns } from './inline-model.js';

export function splitRunsAtOffset(runs, offset) {
    const source = normalizeRuns(runs);
    const target = Math.max(0, Math.min(getRunsLength(source), Number(offset) || 0));
    const left = [];
    const right = [];
    let cursor = 0;
    for (const run of source) {
        const end = cursor + run.text.length;
        if (end <= target) left.push({ ...run, marks: { ...run.marks } });
        else if (cursor >= target) right.push({ ...run, marks: { ...run.marks } });
        else {
            const local = target - cursor;
            if (local > 0) left.push(createRun(run.text.slice(0, local), run.marks, run.id));
            if (local < run.text.length) right.push(createRun(run.text.slice(local), run.marks));
        }
        cursor = end;
    }
    return { left: normalizeRuns(left), right: normalizeRuns(right) };
}

export function splitRunsAtRange(runs, from, to) {
    const first = splitRunsAtOffset(runs, from);
    const second = splitRunsAtOffset(first.right, Math.max(0, to - from));
    return { before: first.left, selected: second.left, after: second.right };
}

export function replaceRange(runs, from, to, replacement = []) {
    const { before, after } = splitRunsAtRange(runs, from, to);
    return normalizeRuns([...before, ...normalizeRuns(replacement, { preserveEmpty: false }), ...after]);
}

export function insertText(runs, offset, text, marks = null) {
    if (!text) return normalizeRuns(runs);
    const inherited = marks == null ? getMarksAtOffset(runs, offset) : normalizeMarks(marks);
    return replaceRange(runs, offset, offset, [createRun(text, inherited)]);
}

export function deleteRange(runs, from, to) {
    return replaceRange(runs, from, to, []);
}

export function applyMark(runs, from, to, key, value = true, mode = 'set') {
    if (from === to) return normalizeRuns(runs);
    const parts = splitRunsAtRange(runs, from, to);
    let resolvedValue = value;
    if (mode === 'toggle') {
        const common = getCommonMarks(parts.selected, 0, getRunsLength(parts.selected));
        resolvedValue = common[key] ? null : value;
    }
    const selected = parts.selected.map(run => {
        const marks = { ...run.marks };
        if (resolvedValue === null || resolvedValue === false || resolvedValue === undefined) delete marks[key];
        else marks[key] = resolvedValue;
        return { ...run, marks };
    });
    return normalizeRuns([...parts.before, ...selected, ...parts.after]);
}

export function clearMarks(runs, from, to) {
    if (from === to) return normalizeRuns(runs);
    const parts = splitRunsAtRange(runs, from, to);
    return normalizeRuns([...parts.before, ...parts.selected.map(run => ({ ...run, marks: {} })), ...parts.after]);
}

export function concatRuns(...groups) {
    return normalizeRuns(groups.flat());
}

export function runsEqual(a, b) {
    const left = normalizeRuns(a);
    const right = normalizeRuns(b);
    if (left.length !== right.length) return false;
    return left.every((run, index) => run.text === right[index].text && marksEqual(run.marks, right[index].marks));
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/inline/runs-to-html.js (2026-07-03 13:36:37) =====
import { normalizeRuns } from './inline-model.js';

function escapeHtml(text) {
    return String(text ?? '')
        .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
        .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
        .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
        .replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
}

function escapeAttr(text) {
    return escapeHtml(text).replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
}

export function runToHtml(run) {
    const marks = run.marks || {};
    let html = escapeHtml(run.text).replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
    if (marks.code) html = `<code>${html}</code>`;
    if (marks.bold) html = `<strong>${html}</strong>`;
    if (marks.italic) html = `<em>${html}</em>`;
    if (marks.underline) html = `<u>${html}</u>`;
    if (marks.strikethrough) html = `<s>${html}</s>`;
    if (marks.superscript) html = `<sup>${html}</sup>`;
    if (marks.subscript) html = `<sub>${html}</sub>`;
    if (marks.revision?.type === 'insertion') html = `<ins class="rev-insertion" data-revision-id="${escapeAttr(marks.revision.id || '')}">${html}</ins>`;
    if (marks.revision?.type === 'deletion') html = `<del class="rev-deletion" data-revision-id="${escapeAttr(marks.revision.id || '')}">${html}</del>`;

    const styles = [];
    if (marks.fontFamily) styles.push(`font-family:${marks.fontFamily}`);
    if (marks.fontSize) styles.push(`font-size:${typeof marks.fontSize === 'number' ? `${marks.fontSize}pt` : marks.fontSize}`);
    if (marks.color) styles.push(`color:${marks.color}`);
    if (marks.highlight) styles.push(`background-color:${marks.highlight}`);
    if (styles.length) html = `<span style="${escapeAttr(styles.join(';'))}">${html}</span>`;
    if (marks.link?.href) html = `<a href="${escapeAttr(marks.link.href)}"${marks.link.title ? ` title="${escapeAttr(marks.link.title)}"` : ''}>${html}</a>`;
    return html;
}

export function runsToHtml(runs = []) {
    return normalizeRuns(runs).map(runToHtml).join('');
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/lists/advanced-list-manager.js (2026-07-09 12:11:09) =====
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

function clone(value) { return value === undefined ? undefined : JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value)); }

export class AdvancedListManager {
  constructor(controller) { this.ctrl = controller; this.state = controller.state; this.panel = null; }

  setup() {
    this.ensureUi();
    this.bindToolbar();
    this.state.subscribeTo('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => this.refreshPanel());
    this.state.subscribeTo('TRANSACTION_APPLIED', () => this.refreshPanel());
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside');
    this.panel.id = 'advanced-list-panel';
    this.panel.className = 'advanced-list-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `
      <header><strong>List & Numbering</strong><button type="button" data-list-action="close">×</button></header>
      <section>
        <button data-list-action="bullet">Bullet list</button>
        <button data-list-action="numbered">Numbered list</button>
        <button data-list-action="legal">Legal numbering</button>
        <button data-list-action="checklist">Checklist</button>
      </section>
      <section class="list-grid">
        <button data-list-action="promote">Promote</button>
        <button data-list-action="demote">Demote</button>
        <button data-list-action="restart">Restart at 1</button>
        <button data-list-action="continue">Continue numbering</button>
        <button data-list-action="set-value">Set value…</button>
        <button data-list-action="style-gallery">Save as list style</button>
      </section>
      <div id="list-style-gallery" class="list-style-gallery"></div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
    this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event));
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const after = document.getElementById('btn-ol');
    if (after && !document.getElementById('btn-list-panel')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.id = 'btn-list-panel'; btn.title = 'Advanced list and numbering'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="list-tree"></i>';
      after.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', btn);
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPanel());
      globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
    document.addEventListener('keydown', event => {
      const ctx = this.getActiveListContext();
      if (!ctx) return;
      if (event.key === 'Tab') { event.preventDefault(); this.adjustLevel(event.shiftKey ? -1 : 1); }
    }, true);
  }

  openPanel() { this.refreshPanel(); this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); }
  closePanel() { this.panel.classList.add('hidden'); }

  handleClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-list-action]')?.dataset.listAction;
    if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.closePanel();
    if (action === 'bullet') return this.ensureList('ul', { listStyleId: 'bullet' });
    if (action === 'numbered') return this.ensureList('ol', { listStyleId: 'decimal', numbering: { format: 'decimal' } });
    if (action === 'legal') return this.ensureList('ol', { listStyleId: 'legal', numbering: { format: 'legal', restartAt: 1 } });
    if (action === 'checklist') return this.ensureList('checklist', { listStyleId: 'checklist' });
    if (action === 'promote') return this.adjustLevel(-1);
    if (action === 'demote') return this.adjustLevel(1);
    if (action === 'restart') return this.updateActiveList({ numbering: { ...this.getActiveListContext()?.block.numbering, restartAt: 1, continueFromPrevious: false } });
    if (action === 'continue') return this.updateActiveList({ numbering: { ...this.getActiveListContext()?.block.numbering, restartAt: null, continueFromPrevious: true } });
    if (action === 'set-value') return this.setNumberingValue();
    if (action === 'style-gallery') return this.saveListStyle();
    if (action.startsWith('apply-style:')) return this.applyListStyle(action.slice('apply-style:'.length));
  }

  getActiveListContext() {
    const li = document.activeElement?.closest?.('li[data-idx]') || getSelection()?.anchorNode?.parentElement?.closest?.('li[data-idx]');
    const listEl = li?.closest?.('[data-block-id], [data-index]') || this.ctrl.getFallbackBlockElement?.();
    const blockId = listEl?.dataset?.blockId || null;
    const index = blockId ? this.state.getBlockIndexById(blockId) : Number.parseInt(listEl?.dataset?.index, 10);
    const block = Number.isInteger(index) ? this.state.doc.blocks[index] : null;
    if (!block || !['ul','ol','checklist'].includes(block.type)) return null;
    const itemIndex = li ? Number.parseInt(li.dataset.idx, 10) : 0;
    return { block, index, blockId: block.id, itemIndex: Number.isInteger(itemIndex) ? itemIndex : 0 };
  }

  ensureList(type, props = {}) {
    const ctx = this.getActiveListContext();
    if (ctx) return this.updateActiveList({ type, ...props });
    const idx = this.ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex();
    const block = this.state.doc.blocks[idx];
    if (block?.type === 'text') this.ctrl.engine.dispatch('convertBlockToList', { index: idx, listType: type });
    setTimeout(() => this.updateActiveList({ type, ...props }), 20);
  }

  updateActiveList(patch) {
    const ctx = this.getActiveListContext(); if (!ctx) return;
    const next = { ...clone(ctx.block), ...clone(patch) };
    if (patch.numbering) next.numbering = { ...(ctx.block.numbering || {}), ...patch.numbering };
    this.state.replaceBlockById(ctx.block.id, next, 'advancedList');
  }

  adjustLevel(delta) {
    const ctx = this.getActiveListContext(); if (!ctx) return;
    const next = clone(ctx.block); next.items ||= [];
    const item = next.items[ctx.itemIndex]; if (!item) return;
    item.level = Math.max(0, Math.min(8, Number(item.level || 0) + delta));
    if (!item.id) item.id = createStableId('item');
    this.state.replaceBlockById(next.id, next, 'listLevel');
    setTimeout(() => this.ctrl.focusListItem(this.state.getBlockIndexById(next.id), ctx.itemIndex, 'end'), 0);
  }

  setNumberingValue() {
    const value = Number(prompt('Start numbering at', '1'));
    if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return;
    this.updateActiveList({ numbering: { ...(this.getActiveListContext()?.block.numbering || {}), restartAt: value, continueFromPrevious: false } });
  }

  saveListStyle() {
    const ctx = this.getActiveListContext(); if (!ctx) return;
    const name = prompt('List style name', 'Custom List'); if (!name) return;
    const id = name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '') || `list-${Date.now()}`;
    this.state.doc.listStyles ||= {};
    this.state.doc.listStyles[id] = { id, name, type: ctx.block.type, format: ctx.block.numbering?.format || (ctx.block.type === 'ol' ? 'decimal' : 'bullet'), marker: ctx.block.marker || 'disc' };
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'LIST_STYLE_UPDATED', styleId: id }); this.refreshPanel();
  }

  applyListStyle(styleId) {
    const style = this.state.doc.listStyles?.[styleId]; if (!style) return;
    this.ensureList(style.type || 'ol', { listStyleId: style.id, numbering: { format: style.format || 'decimal' }, marker: style.marker });
  }

  refreshPanel() {
    const gallery = document.getElementById('list-style-gallery'); if (!gallery) return;
    const styles = Object.values(this.state.doc.listStyles || {});
    gallery.innerHTML = '<strong>List styles</strong>' + styles.map(style => `<button data-list-action="apply-style:${style.id}">${style.name || style.id}</button>`).join('');
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/mail-merge/mail-merge-manager.js (2026-07-09 17:49:40) =====
import { Formatter } from '../../formatter.js';
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

function esc(value) { return Formatter.escapeHtml(String(value ?? '')); }
function stripHtml(html) { const tmp = document.createElement('div'); tmp.innerHTML = html || ''; return tmp.textContent || ''; }

function parseCsv(text) {
  const rows = [];
  let row = [], cell = '', quoted = false;
  for (let i = 0; i < text.length; i += 1) {
    const ch = text[i];
    const next = text[i + 1];
    if (quoted && ch === '"' && next === '"') { cell += '"'; i += 1; continue; }
    if (ch === '"') { quoted = !quoted; continue; }
    if (!quoted && ch === ',') { row.push(cell); cell = ''; continue; }
    if (!quoted && (ch === '\n' || ch === '\r')) {
      if (ch === '\r' && next === '\n') i += 1;
      row.push(cell); cell = '';
      if (row.some(v => String(v).trim())) rows.push(row);
      row = [];
      continue;
    }
    cell += ch;
  }
  row.push(cell);
  if (row.some(v => String(v).trim())) rows.push(row);
  if (!rows.length) return { headers: [], records: [] };
  const headers = rows[0].map(h => String(h || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
  const records = rows.slice(1).map(row => Object.fromEntries(headers.map((h, i) => [h, row[i] ?? ''])));
  return { headers, records };
}

function replaceMergeFieldsInText(text, record) {
  return String(text || '').replace(/\{\{\s*([^{}]+?)\s*\}\}/g, (_, key) => record[key.trim()] ?? '');
}

function replaceMergeFieldsInBlock(block, record) {
  const next = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(block));
  if (typeof next.content === 'string') next.content = replaceMergeFieldsInText(next.content, record);
  if (Array.isArray(next.items)) next.items.forEach(item => { item.text = replaceMergeFieldsInText(item.text, record); });
  if (Array.isArray(next.rows)) next.rows = next.rows.map(row => row.map(cell => replaceMergeFieldsInText(cell, record)));
  if (next.type === 'formField') next.value = replaceMergeFieldsInText(next.value || next.placeholder || '', record);
  if (next.type === 'object' && next.objectType === 'textBox') (next.textBox?.blocks || []).forEach(item => { item.content = replaceMergeFieldsInText(item.content, record); });
  return next;
}

export class MailMergeManager {
  constructor(controller) {
    this.ctrl = controller;
    this.state = controller.state;
    this.panel = null;
    this.headers = [];
    this.records = [];
    this.currentRecordIndex = 0;
  }

  setup() {
    this.ensureUi();
    this.bindToolbar();
    this.loadStoredData();
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const mailings = document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"]');
    if (mailings && !document.getElementById('btn-mail-merge-panel')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.id = 'btn-mail-merge-panel';
      btn.title = 'Mail merge';
      btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="mail-plus"></i><span>Merge</span>';
      mailings.appendChild(btn);
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPanel());
      globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside');
    this.panel.id = 'mail-merge-panel';
    this.panel.className = 'mail-merge-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `
      <header><strong>Mail Merge</strong><button data-merge-action="close">×</button></header>
      <section class="merge-section"><h4>Data source</h4><textarea id="merge-csv-input" placeholder="First Name,Email\nAriana,ariana@example.com"></textarea><div class="merge-grid"><button data-merge-action="load-csv">Load CSV</button><button data-merge-action="clear-csv">Clear</button></div></section>
      <section class="merge-section"><h4>Fields</h4><div id="merge-field-list" class="merge-field-list"></div></section>
      <section class="merge-section"><h4>Preview and generate</h4><label>Record <select id="merge-record-select"></select></label><div class="merge-grid"><button data-merge-action="preview">Preview</button><button data-merge-action="generate-docs">Generate docs</button><button data-merge-action="download-html">Download HTML batch</button><button data-merge-action="download-csv-template">CSV template</button></div><div id="merge-preview" class="merge-preview"></div></section>`;
    document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
    this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event));
    this.panel.addEventListener('change', event => { if (event.target.id === 'merge-record-select') { this.currentRecordIndex = Number(event.target.value) || 0; this.renderPreview(); } });
  }

  openPanel() { this.render(); this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); }

  handleClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-merge-action]')?.dataset.mergeAction;
    if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.panel.classList.add('hidden');
    if (action === 'load-csv') return this.loadCsvFromInput();
    if (action === 'clear-csv') return this.clearData();
    if (action === 'preview') return this.renderPreview();
    if (action === 'generate-docs') return this.generateDocuments();
    if (action === 'download-html') return this.downloadHtmlBatch();
    if (action === 'download-csv-template') return this.downloadCsvTemplate();
    if (action.startsWith('insert-field:')) return this.insertMergeField(action.slice(13));
  }

  loadStoredData() {
    try {
      const stored = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('opendoc_mail_merge') || '{}');
      this.headers = stored.headers || [];
      this.records = stored.records || [];
    } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
  }

  saveStoredData() {
    try { localStorage.setItem('opendoc_mail_merge', JSON.stringify({ headers: this.headers, records: this.records })); } catch (_) { /* ignore */ }
  }

  loadCsvFromInput() {
    const text = document.getElementById('merge-csv-input')?.value || '';
    const parsed = parseCsv(text);
    this.headers = parsed.headers;
    this.records = parsed.records;
    this.currentRecordIndex = 0;
    this.saveStoredData();
    this.render();
  }

  clearData() {
    this.headers = []; this.records = []; this.saveStoredData(); this.render();
  }

  render() {
    const fieldList = document.getElementById('merge-field-list');
    const recordSelect = document.getElementById('merge-record-select');
    if (fieldList) fieldList.innerHTML = this.headers.length ? this.headers.map(h => `<button data-merge-action="insert-field:${esc(h)}">{{${esc(h)}}}</button>`).join('') : '<p>No CSV loaded.</p>';
    if (recordSelect) recordSelect.innerHTML = this.records.map((record, index) => `<option value="${index}">${index + 1}: ${esc(Object.values(record).find(Boolean) || 'Record')}</option>`).join('');
    this.renderPreview();
  }

  insertMergeField(name) {
    const token = `{{${name}}}`;
    try { this.ctrl.engine.dispatch('replaceSelection', { text: token, source: 'mailMergeField' }); }
    catch (_) {
      const block = this.state.ensureBlockId({ type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: esc(token) });
      this.state.insertBlockAt(this.ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex() + 1, block, 'mailMergeField');
    }
  }

  mergedBlocks(record = this.records[this.currentRecordIndex] || {}) {
    return (this.state.doc.blocks || []).map(block => this.state.ensureBlockId(replaceMergeFieldsInBlock(block, record)));
  }

  renderPreview() {
    const target = document.getElementById('merge-preview');
    if (!target) return;
    const record = this.records[this.currentRecordIndex] || {};
    if (!this.records.length) { target.innerHTML = '<p>Load CSV data to preview merged output.</p>'; return; }
    const snippets = this.mergedBlocks(record).slice(0, 8).map(block => `<p>${esc(stripHtml(block.content || block.value || block.type || '').slice(0, 160))}</p>`).join('');
    target.innerHTML = `<strong>Preview record ${this.currentRecordIndex + 1}</strong>${snippets}`;
  }

  async generateDocuments() {
    if (!this.records.length) return alert('Load CSV data first.');
    const confirmed = confirm(`Create ${this.records.length} merged documents?`);
    if (!confirmed) return;
    const sourceTitle = this.state.doc.title || 'Merged';
    const sourceBlocks = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.state.doc.blocks || []));
    const mergeSource = record => sourceBlocks.map(block => this.state.ensureBlockId(replaceMergeFieldsInBlock(block, record)));
    for (const [index, record] of this.records.entries()) {
      const titleSeed = Object.values(record).find(Boolean) || `Record ${index + 1}`;
      await this.state.createNewDoc({ title: `${sourceTitle} - ${titleSeed}`, blocks: mergeSource(record) });
    }
    this.ctrl.toolbar?.showShellToast?.(`${this.records.length} merged documents created`);
  }

  downloadHtmlBatch() {
    if (!this.records.length) return alert('Load CSV data first.');
    const pages = this.records.map((record, index) => `<section class="merged-record"><h1>Record ${index + 1}</h1>${this.mergedBlocks(record).map(block => block.content || `<p>${esc(block.value || '')}</p>`).join('\n')}</section>`).join('<hr style="page-break-after:always">');
    const blob = new Blob([`<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><title>Mail merge batch</title>${pages}`], { type: 'text/html' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = `${this.state.doc.title || 'mail-merge'}-batch.html`; a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }

  downloadCsvTemplate() {
    const fields = [...new Set((JSON.stringify(this.state.doc.blocks || []).match(/\{\{\s*([^{}]+?)\s*\}\}/g) || []).map(token => token.replace(/[{}]/g, '').trim()))];
    const headers = fields.length ? fields : ['First Name', 'Last Name', 'Email'];
    const blob = new Blob([headers.join(',') + '\n'], { type: 'text/csv' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = 'mail-merge-template.csv'; a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/model-input-manager.js (2026-07-03 02:51:08) =====
import { htmlToRuns } from './inline/html-to-runs.js';
import { getRunsText } from './inline/inline-model.js';

const SUPPORTED_INPUTS = new Set([
    'insertText',
    'insertReplacementText',
    'insertParagraph',
    'insertLineBreak',
    'deleteContentBackward',
    'deleteContentForward',
    'deleteWordBackward',
    'deleteWordForward',
    'insertFromPaste',
    'historyUndo',
    'historyRedo'
]);

export class ModelInputManager {
    constructor(engine) {
        this.engine = engine;
        this.composing = false;
        this.compositionTarget = null;
        this.compositionSelection = null;
        this._setup = false;
    }

    setup() {
        if (this._setup) return;
        this._setup = true;
        document.addEventListener('beforeinput', event => this.onBeforeInput(event), true);
        document.addEventListener('compositionstart', event => this.onCompositionStart(event), true);
        document.addEventListener('compositionend', event => this.onCompositionEnd(event), true);
    }

    getTextBlockElement(target) {
        const block = target?.closest?.('.block-text[data-block-id], .block-text[data-index]');
        if (!block) return null;
        const blockId = block.dataset.blockId || this.engine.state.doc.blocks[Number(block.dataset.index)]?.id;
        const model = blockId ? this.engine.state.getBlockById(blockId) : null;
        return model?.type === 'text' ? block : null;
    }

    handlesModelInput(contextOrTarget) {
        const target = contextOrTarget?.el || contextOrTarget;
        return !!this.getTextBlockElement(target);
    }

    onBeforeInput(event) {
        const blockEl = this.getTextBlockElement(event.target);
        if (!blockEl || this.composing || event.isComposing) return;
        if (!SUPPORTED_INPUTS.has(event.inputType)) return;

        const selection = this.engine.captureSelection();
        if (!selection || selection.type !== 'text') return;

        if (event.inputType === 'historyUndo') {
            event.preventDefault();
            this.engine.state.history.undo();
            return;
        }
        if (event.inputType === 'historyRedo') {
            event.preventDefault();
            this.engine.state.history.redo();
            return;
        }

        event.preventDefault();
        switch (event.inputType) {
            case 'insertText':
            case 'insertReplacementText':
                this.engine.dispatch('replaceSelection', { text: event.data || '' }, { selection });
                break;
            case 'insertParagraph':
                this.engine.dispatch('splitParagraph', {}, { selection });
                break;
            case 'insertLineBreak':
                this.engine.dispatch('insertLineBreak', {}, { selection });
                break;
            case 'deleteContentBackward':
                this.engine.dispatch('deleteBackward', { unit: 'character' }, { selection });
                break;
            case 'deleteContentForward':
                this.engine.dispatch('deleteForward', { unit: 'character' }, { selection });
                break;
            case 'deleteWordBackward':
                this.engine.dispatch('deleteBackward', { unit: 'word' }, { selection });
                break;
            case 'deleteWordForward':
                this.engine.dispatch('deleteForward', { unit: 'word' }, { selection });
                break;
            case 'insertFromPaste': {
                const transfer = event.dataTransfer || event.clipboardData;
                const html = transfer?.getData?.('text/html') || '';
                const text = transfer?.getData?.('text/plain') || event.data || '';
                this.engine.dispatch('replaceSelection', {
                    text: html ? getRunsText(htmlToRuns(html)) : text,
                    runs: html ? htmlToRuns(html) : null,
                    source: 'paste'
                }, { selection });
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    onCompositionStart(event) {
        const blockEl = this.getTextBlockElement(event.target);
        if (!blockEl) return;
        this.composing = true;
        this.compositionTarget = blockEl;
        this.compositionSelection = this.engine.captureSelection();
        blockEl.dataset.modelComposing = '1';
    }

    onCompositionEnd(event) {
        if (!this.composing) return;
        const target = this.compositionTarget;
        const selection = this.compositionSelection;
        this.composing = false;
        this.compositionTarget = null;
        this.compositionSelection = null;
        if (target) delete target.dataset.modelComposing;
        const text = event.data || '';
        if (selection && text) this.engine.dispatch('replaceSelection', { text, source: 'composition' }, { selection });
    }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/navigation/document-structure-manager.js (2026-07-18 03:14:04) =====
import { Formatter } from '../../formatter.js';
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

function textOf(html) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.innerHTML = html || ''; return (div.textContent || '').trim(); }
function esc(value) { return Formatter.escapeHtml(String(value ?? '')); }

export class DocumentStructureManager {
  constructor(controller) { this.ctrl = controller; this.state = controller.state; this.panel = null; }
  setup() {
    this.ensureUi();
    this.bindToolbar();
    this.state.subscribe(() => {
      if (!this.panel?.classList.contains('hidden')) this.render();
    });
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const viewPanel = document.querySelector('[data-panel="view"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="view"]');
    if (viewPanel && !document.getElementById('btn-structure-panel')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-structure-panel'; btn.title = 'Document Structure'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="navigation"></i><span>Structure</span>';
      viewPanel.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.open()); globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
    const insertPanel = document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"]');
    if (insertPanel && !document.getElementById('btn-bookmark')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-bookmark'; btn.title = 'Bookmark'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="bookmark"></i><span>Bookmark</span>';
      insertPanel.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.addBookmark()); globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside'); this.panel.id = 'document-structure-panel'; this.panel.className = 'document-structure-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `
      <header><strong>Navigation</strong><button data-structure-action="close">×</button></header>
      <nav class="structure-tabs"><button data-structure-tab="headings" class="active">Headings</button><button data-structure-tab="pages">Pages</button><button data-structure-tab="bookmarks">Bookmarks</button><button data-structure-tab="captions">Captions</button><button data-structure-tab="review">Review</button></nav>
      <div id="structure-content" class="structure-content"></div>`;
    this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event)); document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
  }

  open() { this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); this.render(); }
  activeTab() { return this.panel?.querySelector('.structure-tabs .active')?.dataset.structureTab || 'headings'; }
  headings() { return (this.state.doc.blocks || []).map((b,i) => ({ ...b, index:i })).filter(b => b.type === 'text' && /^h[1-6]$/.test(b.style || '')); }
  bookmarks() { return this.state.doc.bookmarks || []; }
  captions() { return (this.state.doc.blocks || []).filter(b => b.caption?.text || b.image?.caption).map(b => ({ id:b.id, text:b.caption?.text || b.image?.caption, type:b.type === 'table' ? 'Table' : b.objectType === 'image' ? 'Figure' : 'Caption' })); }

  render() {
    const target = document.getElementById('structure-content'); if (!target) return;
    const tab = this.activeTab();
    if (tab === 'headings') {
      const items = this.headings();
      target.innerHTML = items.length ? items.map(h => `<article class="structure-item level-${esc(h.style)}"><button data-structure-action="goto:${esc(h.id)}">${esc(textOf(h.content) || '(empty heading)')}</button><span><button data-structure-action="moveup:${esc(h.id)}">↑</button><button data-structure-action="movedown:${esc(h.id)}">↓</button></span></article>`).join('') : '<p>No headings yet.</p>';
    } else if (tab === 'pages') {
      const pages = [...document.querySelectorAll('#workspace .page')];
      target.innerHTML = pages.length ? pages.map((_,i) => `<article class="structure-item"><button data-structure-action="page:${i+1}">Page ${i+1}</button></article>`).join('') : '<p>No pages rendered yet.</p>';
    } else if (tab === 'bookmarks') {
      const items = this.bookmarks(); target.innerHTML = items.length ? items.map(b => `<article class="structure-item"><button data-structure-action="goto:${esc(b.blockId)}">🔖 ${esc(b.name)}</button><button data-structure-action="remove-bookmark:${esc(b.id)}">×</button></article>`).join('') : '<p>No bookmarks yet.</p>';
    } else if (tab === 'captions') {
      const items = this.captions(); target.innerHTML = items.length ? items.map(c => `<article class="structure-item"><button data-structure-action="goto:${esc(c.id)}">${esc(c.type)}: ${esc(c.text)}</button></article>`).join('') : '<p>No captions yet.</p>';
    } else {
      const comments = this.state.doc.comments || []; const revisions = (this.ctrl.reviewManager?.collectRevisions?.() || []);
      target.innerHTML = `<p>${comments.length} comment threads</p><p>${revisions.length} tracked changes</p>`;
    }
  }

  handleClick(event) {
    const tab = event.target.closest('[data-structure-tab]')?.dataset.structureTab;
    if (tab) { this.panel.querySelectorAll('[data-structure-tab]').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.structureTab === tab)); return this.render(); }
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-structure-action]')?.dataset.structureAction; if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.panel.classList.add('hidden');
    if (action.startsWith('goto:')) return this.gotoBlock(action.slice(5));
    if (action.startsWith('page:')) return this.gotoPage(Number(action.slice(5)));
    if (action.startsWith('moveup:')) return this.moveSection(action.slice(7), -1);
    if (action.startsWith('movedown:')) return this.moveSection(action.slice(9), 1);
    if (action.startsWith('remove-bookmark:')) return this.removeBookmark(action.slice(16));
  }

  gotoBlock(blockId) { const el = document.querySelector(`[data-block-id="${CSS.escape(blockId)}"]`); if (el) { el.scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth', block:'center' }); el.classList.add('outline-highlight'); setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('outline-highlight'), 1400); } }
  gotoPage(num) { document.querySelector(`#workspace .page[data-page-num="${num}"]`)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth', block:'start' }); }

  headingRange(blockId) {
    const blocks = this.state.doc.blocks || []; const start = this.state.getBlockIndexById(blockId); if (start < 0) return null;
    const level = Number(String(blocks[start].style || 'h1').slice(1)) || 1; let end = blocks.length;
    for (let i = start + 1; i < blocks.length; i += 1) if (blocks[i].type === 'text' && /^h[1-6]$/.test(blocks[i].style || '') && (Number(String(blocks[i].style).slice(1)) || 1) <= level) { end = i; break; }
    return { start, end };
  }

  moveSection(blockId, direction) {
    const range = this.headingRange(blockId); if (!range) return;
    const blocks = this.state.doc.blocks; const slice = blocks.slice(range.start, range.end);
    if (direction < 0) {
      const previous = this.headings().filter(h => h.index < range.start).at(-1); if (!previous) return;
      const target = this.headingRange(previous.id); if (!target) return;
      blocks.splice(range.start, slice.length); blocks.splice(target.start, 0, ...slice);
    } else {
      const next = this.headings().find(h => h.index >= range.end); if (!next) return;
      const target = this.headingRange(next.id); if (!target) return;
      blocks.splice(range.start, slice.length); blocks.splice(target.end - slice.length, 0, ...slice);
    }
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type:'MOVE_SECTION', blockId }); this.render();
  }

  addBookmark() {
    const ctx = this.ctrl.getActiveBlockContextFromSelection(); if (!ctx) return;
    const name = prompt('Bookmark name', textOf(this.state.doc.blocks[ctx.index]?.content).slice(0, 32) || 'Bookmark')?.trim(); if (!name) return;
    this.state.doc.bookmarks ||= []; this.state.doc.bookmarks.push({ id: createStableId('bm'), name, blockId: ctx.blockId || this.state.doc.blocks[ctx.index].id, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() });
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type:'BOOKMARK_ADDED' }); this.open();
  }
  removeBookmark(id) { this.state.doc.bookmarks = (this.state.doc.bookmarks || []).filter(b => b.id !== id); this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type:'BOOKMARK_REMOVED' }); this.render(); }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/objects/object-layout-manager.js (2026-07-09 17:28:28) =====
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

function esc(value) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = String(value ?? ''); return div.innerHTML; }
function clone(value) { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value)); }

const TEXT_BOX_PRESETS = {
  pullQuote: { label: 'Pull quote', width: 260, height: 120, appearance: { fill: '#f8fafc', borderColor: '#2563eb', borderWidth: 0, borderStyle: 'solid', cornerRadius: 8, shadow: '0 10px 24px rgba(37,99,235,.18)' }, textBox: { margins: { top: 16, right: 16, bottom: 16, left: 16 }, verticalAlign: 'middle', autoFit: 'resizeShape', columns: 1 } },
  sidebar: { label: 'Sidebar', width: 220, height: 360, appearance: { fill: '#eff6ff', borderColor: '#93c5fd', borderWidth: 1, borderStyle: 'solid', cornerRadius: 6 }, textBox: { margins: { top: 12, right: 12, bottom: 12, left: 12 }, verticalAlign: 'top', autoFit: 'resizeShape', columns: 1 } },
  callout: { label: 'Callout', width: 240, height: 120, appearance: { fill: '#fef3c7', borderColor: '#f59e0b', borderWidth: 1, borderStyle: 'solid', cornerRadius: 10 }, textBox: { margins: { top: 12, right: 12, bottom: 12, left: 12 }, verticalAlign: 'middle', autoFit: 'resizeShape', columns: 1 } },
  twoColumn: { label: 'Two-column box', width: 360, height: 180, appearance: { fill: '#ffffff', borderColor: '#cbd5e1', borderWidth: 1, borderStyle: 'solid', cornerRadius: 3 }, textBox: { margins: { top: 10, right: 10, bottom: 10, left: 10 }, verticalAlign: 'top', autoFit: 'scroll', columns: 2 } }
};

export class ObjectLayoutManager {
  constructor(controller) { this.ctrl = controller; this.state = controller.state; this.engine = controller.engine; this.panel = null; }
  setup() { this.ensureUi(); this.bindToolbar(); this.registerCommands(); this.state.subscribeTo('OBJECT_SELECTED', () => this.sync()); }

  registerCommands() {
    this.engine.registerCommand('linkTextBoxes', ({ state, payload, selection }) => {
      const source = state.getBlockById(payload.sourceId);
      const target = state.getBlockById(payload.targetId);
      if (source?.objectType !== 'textBox' || target?.objectType !== 'textBox') return null;
      const index = state.getBlockIndexById(source.id); const next = clone(source);
      next.textBox ||= {}; next.textBox.nextTextBoxId = target.id;
      return this.engine.createTransaction('linkTextBoxes', [{ type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE', index, blockId: source.id, block: next, prevBlock: clone(source), source: 'linkTextBoxes' }], selection);
    });
    this.engine.registerCommand('unlinkTextBox', ({ state, payload, selection }) => {
      const source = state.getBlockById(payload.objectId); if (source?.objectType !== 'textBox') return null;
      const index = state.getBlockIndexById(source.id); const next = clone(source); if (next.textBox) delete next.textBox.nextTextBoxId;
      return this.engine.createTransaction('unlinkTextBox', [{ type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE', index, blockId: source.id, block: next, prevBlock: clone(source), source: 'unlinkTextBox' }], selection);
    });
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const insertPanel = document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"]');
    if (insertPanel && !document.getElementById('btn-object-layout-panel')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-object-layout-panel'; btn.title = 'Object Layout'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="layout-template"></i><span>Objects</span>';
      insertPanel.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.open()); globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside'); this.panel.id = 'object-layout-panel'; this.panel.className = 'object-layout-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `
      <header><strong>Object & Text Box Tools</strong><button data-object-layout="close">×</button></header>
      <section class="object-layout-section"><h4>Text box presets</h4><div class="object-preset-grid">${Object.entries(TEXT_BOX_PRESETS).map(([id,p]) => `<button data-object-layout="preset:${id}">${esc(p.label)}</button>`).join('')}</div></section>
      <section class="object-layout-section object-layout-grid">
        <label>Auto-fit <select id="text-box-autofit"><option value="none">Do not autofit</option><option value="resizeShape">Resize shape</option><option value="shrinkText">Shrink text</option><option value="scroll">Fixed with scroll</option></select></label>
        <label>Columns <input id="text-box-columns" type="number" min="1" max="4" value="1"></label>
        <label>Text direction <select id="text-box-direction"><option value="horizontal">Horizontal</option><option value="vertical">Vertical</option></select></label>
        <label>Link to box <select id="text-box-link-target"><option value="">None</option></select></label>
        <button data-object-layout="apply-textbox">Apply text-box settings</button><button data-object-layout="unlink-textbox">Unlink overflow</button>
      </section>
      <section class="object-layout-section object-layout-grid">
        <button data-object-layout="crop-reset">Reset crop</button><button data-object-layout="original-size">Original size</button>
        <button data-object-layout="soft-shadow">Soft shadow</button><button data-object-layout="round-picture">Rounded picture</button>
        <button data-object-layout="alt-warning">Check alt text</button><button data-object-layout="compress-meta">Mark compressed</button>
      </section>
      <section class="object-layout-section object-layout-grid">
        <button data-object-layout="align-left">Align left</button><button data-object-layout="align-center">Align center</button><button data-object-layout="align-right">Align right</button>
        <button data-object-layout="align-top">Align top</button><button data-object-layout="align-middle">Align middle</button><button data-object-layout="align-bottom">Align bottom</button>
        <button data-object-layout="distribute-h">Distribute H</button><button data-object-layout="distribute-v">Distribute V</button>
      </section>`;
    this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event));
    document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
  }

  open() { this.sync(); this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); }
  selected() { return this.state._objectManager?.selectedObject || null; }
  selectedId() { return this.selected()?.id || null; }

  sync() {
    if (!this.panel) return;
    const block = this.selected();
    const target = document.getElementById('text-box-link-target');
    if (target) {
      const objects = (this.state.doc.blocks || []).filter(item => item.objectType === 'textBox' && item.id !== block?.id);
      target.innerHTML = '<option value="">None</option>' + objects.map(item => `<option value="${esc(item.id)}">${esc(this.label(item))}</option>`).join('');
      target.value = block?.textBox?.nextTextBoxId || '';
    }
    const fit = document.getElementById('text-box-autofit'); if (fit && block?.objectType === 'textBox') fit.value = block.textBox?.autoFit || 'none';
