    const cols = document.getElementById('text-box-columns'); if (cols && block?.objectType === 'textBox') cols.value = block.textBox?.columns || 1;
    const dir = document.getElementById('text-box-direction'); if (dir && block?.objectType === 'textBox') dir.value = block.textBox?.textDirection || 'horizontal';
  }

  label(block) {
    if (block.objectType === 'image') return block.image?.caption || block.image?.altText || 'Picture';
    if (block.objectType === 'shape') return `${block.shape?.kind || 'Shape'} ${block.id.slice(-4)}`;
    return (block.textBox?.blocks || []).map(b => String(b.content || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '')).join(' ').trim().slice(0, 24) || `Text box ${block.id.slice(-4)}`;
  }

  handleClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-object-layout]')?.dataset.objectLayout; if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.panel.classList.add('hidden');
    if (action.startsWith('preset:')) return this.applyPreset(action.slice(7));
    if (action === 'apply-textbox') return this.applyTextBoxSettings();
    if (action === 'unlink-textbox') return this.unlinkTextBox();
    if (action === 'crop-reset') return this.updateSelected({ image: { crop: { left: 0, right: 0, top: 0, bottom: 0 } } });
    if (action === 'original-size') return this.updateSelected({ layout: { width: 320, height: null }, image: { lockAspectRatio: true } });
    if (action === 'soft-shadow') return this.updateSelected({ image: { shadow: '0 12px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.24)' }, appearance: { shadow: '0 12px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.24)' } });
    if (action === 'round-picture') return this.updateSelected({ image: { cornerRadius: 14 }, appearance: { cornerRadius: 14 } });
    if (action === 'alt-warning') return this.checkAltText();
    if (action === 'compress-meta') return this.updateSelected({ image: { compressed: true, compression: { requestedAt: new Date().toISOString(), quality: .82 } } });
    if (action.startsWith('align-')) return this.alignSelected(action.slice(6));
    if (action === 'distribute-h') return this.distribute('h');
    if (action === 'distribute-v') return this.distribute('v');
  }

  updateSelected(patch) { const block = this.selected(); if (!block) return; this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch, source: 'objectLayoutV2' }, { restoreSelection: false }); }

  applyPreset(id) {
    const block = this.selected(); if (!block || block.objectType !== 'textBox') return;
    const preset = TEXT_BOX_PRESETS[id]; if (!preset) return;
    this.updateSelected({ layout: { width: preset.width, height: preset.height }, appearance: preset.appearance, textBox: preset.textBox });
  }

  applyTextBoxSettings() {
    const block = this.selected(); if (!block || block.objectType !== 'textBox') return;
    const target = document.getElementById('text-box-link-target')?.value || null;
    const patch = { textBox: { autoFit: document.getElementById('text-box-autofit')?.value || 'none', columns: Number(document.getElementById('text-box-columns')?.value || 1), textDirection: document.getElementById('text-box-direction')?.value || 'horizontal', nextTextBoxId: target || undefined } };
    this.updateSelected(patch);
    if (target) this.engine.dispatch('linkTextBoxes', { sourceId: block.id, targetId: target }, { restoreSelection: false });
  }

  unlinkTextBox() { const block = this.selected(); if (block?.objectType === 'textBox') this.engine.dispatch('unlinkTextBox', { objectId: block.id }, { restoreSelection: false }); }
  checkAltText() { const block = this.selected(); if (block?.objectType !== 'image') return; const ok = block.image?.decorative || String(block.image?.altText || '').trim(); alert(ok ? 'Alt text looks OK.' : 'This picture needs alt text or should be marked decorative.'); }

  alignSelected(where) {
    const block = this.selected(); if (!block) return;
    const page = document.querySelector('.page'); const pageW = page?.offsetWidth || 816; const pageH = page?.offsetHeight || 1056;
    const width = Number(block.layout?.width || 100); const height = Number(block.layout?.height || 100);
    const layout = { ...(block.layout || {}) };
    if (where === 'left') layout.x = 0; if (where === 'center') layout.x = Math.max(0, (pageW - width) / 2); if (where === 'right') layout.x = Math.max(0, pageW - width);
    if (where === 'top') layout.y = 0; if (where === 'middle') layout.y = Math.max(0, (pageH - height) / 2); if (where === 'bottom') layout.y = Math.max(0, pageH - height);
    this.updateSelected({ layout });
  }

  distribute(axis) {
    const selected = this.selected(); if (!selected?.groupId) return alert('Group objects first, then distribute.');
    const objects = (this.state.doc.blocks || []).filter(block => block.groupId === selected.groupId && block.type === 'object').sort((a,b) => Number(a.layout?.[axis === 'h' ? 'x' : 'y'] || 0) - Number(b.layout?.[axis === 'h' ? 'x' : 'y'] || 0));
    if (objects.length < 3) return;
    const key = axis === 'h' ? 'x' : 'y'; const first = Number(objects[0].layout?.[key] || 0); const last = Number(objects.at(-1).layout?.[key] || 0); const gap = (last - first) / (objects.length - 1);
    objects.slice(1, -1).forEach((block, i) => this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch: { layout: { [key]: Math.round((first + gap * (i + 1)) * 100) / 100 } }, source: 'distributeObjects' }, { restoreSelection: false }));
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/objects/object-manager.js (2026-07-09 05:09:01) =====
import { cloneDocumentValue } from '../schema.js';
import { createImageObject, createTextBoxObject, isObjectBlock, WRAP_TYPES } from './object-model.js';
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

const HANDLE_NAMES = ['nw', 'n', 'ne', 'e', 'se', 's', 'sw', 'w'];

function clamp(value, min, max) { return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, Number(value) || 0)); }

export class ObjectManager {
    constructor(controller) {
        this.ctrl = controller;
        this.state = controller.state;
        this.engine = controller.engine;
        this.selectedObjectId = null;
        this.cropMode = false;
        this.guideLayer = null;
    }

    setup() {
        this.registerCommands();
        this.ensureUi();
        document.addEventListener('pointerdown', event => {
            const host = event.target.closest?.('[data-object-id]');
            if (host) this.select(host.dataset.objectId);
            else if (!event.target.closest?.('.object-format-panel')) this.clearSelection();
        });
        document.addEventListener('dblclick', event => {
            const host = event.target.closest?.('[data-object-id]');
            if (host && this.state.getBlockById(host.dataset.objectId)?.objectType === 'textBox') this.enterTextBoxEditing(host);
        });
        document.addEventListener('keydown', event => this.onKeyDown(event));
        this.state.subscribeTo('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => this.clearSelection());
        this.state.subscribeTo('TRANSACTION_APPLIED', () => this.refreshUi());
    }

    registerCommands() {
        this.engine.registerCommand('insertImageObject', ({ payload, selection }) => {
            const block = createImageObject({
                image: { src: payload.src || '', assetId: payload.assetId || null, altText: payload.altText || '' },
                layout: { mode: payload.mode || 'inline', width: payload.width || 320, height: payload.height || null },
                wrap: { type: payload.wrapType || (payload.mode === 'floating' ? 'square' : 'inline'), side: payload.side || 'right' },
                anchor: { blockId: payload.anchorBlockId || selection?.anchor?.blockId || null }
            });
            return this.engine.commands.execute('insertBlock', { engine: this.engine, state: this.state, payload: { block, index: payload.index, source: 'object' }, selection, document: this.state.doc, controller: this.ctrl, renderer: this.ctrl.renderer });
        });
        this.engine.registerCommand('insertTextBoxObject', ({ payload, selection }) => {
            const block = createTextBoxObject({
                content: payload.content || 'Text box',
                layout: { x: payload.x ?? 48, y: payload.y ?? 48, width: payload.width ?? 220, height: payload.height ?? 110 },
                anchor: { blockId: payload.anchorBlockId || selection?.anchor?.blockId || null }
            });
            return this.engine.commands.execute('insertBlock', { engine: this.engine, state: this.state, payload: { block, index: payload.index, source: 'object' }, selection, document: this.state.doc, controller: this.ctrl, renderer: this.ctrl.renderer });
        });
        this.engine.registerCommand('updateObject', ({ state, payload, selection }) => {
            const index = state.getBlockIndexById(payload.objectId);
            const previous = state.doc.blocks[index];
            if (!isObjectBlock(previous)) return null;
            const next = cloneDocumentValue(previous);
            this.deepAssign(next, payload.patch || {});
            if (JSON.stringify(next) === JSON.stringify(previous)) return null;
            return this.engine.createTransaction(payload.source || 'object', [{
                type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE', blockId: previous.id, index,
                block: next, prevBlock: cloneDocumentValue(previous), source: payload.source || 'object'
            }], selection);
        });
        this.engine.registerCommand('duplicateObject', ({ state, payload, selection }) => {
            const index = state.getBlockIndexById(payload.objectId);
            const source = state.doc.blocks[index];
            if (!isObjectBlock(source)) return null;
            const copy = cloneDocumentValue(source);
            copy.id = createStableId('obj');
            if (Array.isArray(copy.textBox?.blocks)) {
                copy.textBox.blocks = copy.textBox.blocks.map(textBlock => ({
                    ...textBlock,
                    id: createStableId('tbblk'),
                    children: Array.isArray(textBlock.children)
                        ? textBlock.children.map(run => ({ ...run, id: createStableId('tbrun') }))
                        : textBlock.children
                }));
            }
            copy.layout.x = Number(copy.layout.x || 0) + 18;
            copy.layout.y = Number(copy.layout.y || 0) + 18;
            return this.engine.commands.execute('insertBlock', { engine: this.engine, state, payload: { block: copy, index: index + 1, source: 'objectDuplicate' }, selection, document: state.doc, controller: this.ctrl, renderer: this.ctrl.renderer });
        });
    }

    deepAssign(target, patch) {
        Object.entries(patch || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {
            if (value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value)) {
                if (!target[key] || typeof target[key] !== 'object') target[key] = {};
                this.deepAssign(target[key], value);
            } else target[key] = value;
        });
        return target;
    }

    select(objectId) {
        if (!this.state.getBlockById(objectId)) return;
        this.selectedObjectId = objectId;
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-object-id].object-selected').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('object-selected'));
        document.querySelectorAll(`[data-object-id="${CSS.escape(objectId)}"]`).forEach(el => el.classList.add('object-selected'));
        document.body.classList.add('object-selection-active');
        this.refreshUi();
        this.state.signal('OBJECT_SELECTED', { objectId });
    }

    clearSelection() {
        this.selectedObjectId = null;
        this.cropMode = false;
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-object-id].object-selected').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('object-selected'));
        document.body.classList.remove('object-selection-active');
        document.getElementById('object-format-panel')?.classList.add('hidden');
    }

    get selectedObject() { return this.selectedObjectId ? this.state.getBlockById(this.selectedObjectId) : null; }

    ensureUi() {
        if (document.getElementById('object-format-panel')) return;
        const panel = document.createElement('div');
        panel.id = 'object-format-panel';
        panel.className = 'object-format-panel hidden';
        panel.innerHTML = `
            <div class="object-panel-row object-panel-title"><strong>Object Format</strong><button data-action="close" title="Close">×</button></div>
            <label>Wrap <select data-field="wrap.type">${WRAP_TYPES.map(type => `<option value="${type}">${this.wrapLabel(type)}</option>`).join('')}</select></label>
            <label>Side <select data-field="wrap.side"><option value="both">Both sides</option><option value="left">Text left</option><option value="right">Text right</option><option value="largest">Largest side</option></select></label>
            <div class="object-panel-grid">
              <label>X <input data-field="layout.x" type="number" step="1"></label><label>Y <input data-field="layout.y" type="number" step="1"></label>
              <label>W <input data-field="layout.width" type="number" min="12" step="1"></label><label>H <input data-field="layout.height" type="number" min="12" step="1"></label>
              <label>Rotate <input data-field="layout.rotation" type="number" step="1"></label><label>Layer <input data-field="layout.zIndex" type="number" step="1"></label>
            </div>
            <div class="object-panel-row"><button data-action="front">Bring front</button><button data-action="back">Send back</button><button data-action="duplicate">Duplicate</button></div>
            <div class="object-panel-row image-actions"><button data-action="replace">Replace</button><button data-action="crop">Crop</button><button data-action="rotate-left">↶ 90°</button><button data-action="flip-x">Flip</button><button data-action="flip-y">Flip V</button></div>
            <label class="image-actions">Alt text <input data-field="image.altText" type="text"></label>
            <label class="image-actions">Caption <input data-field="image.caption" type="text"></label>
            <label class="image-actions">Link <input data-field="image.hyperlink" type="url"></label>
            <label class="image-actions"><input data-field="image.decorative" type="checkbox"> Decorative</label>
            <div class="object-panel-grid image-actions">
              <label>Crop L <input data-field="image.crop.left" type="number" min="0" max="0.95" step="0.01"></label><label>Crop R <input data-field="image.crop.right" type="number" min="0" max="0.95" step="0.01"></label>
              <label>Crop T <input data-field="image.crop.top" type="number" min="0" max="0.95" step="0.01"></label><label>Crop B <input data-field="image.crop.bottom" type="number" min="0" max="0.95" step="0.01"></label>
              <label>Brightness <input data-field="image.filters.brightness" type="number" min="0" max="3" step="0.05"></label><label>Contrast <input data-field="image.filters.contrast" type="number" min="0" max="3" step="0.05"></label>
              <label>Saturation <input data-field="image.filters.saturate" type="number" min="0" max="3" step="0.05"></label><label>Opacity <input data-field="image.filters.opacity" type="number" min="0" max="1" step="0.05"></label>
              <label>Radius <input data-field="image.cornerRadius" type="number" min="0" step="1"></label><label>Border <input data-field="image.border.width" type="number" min="0" step="1"></label>
            </div>
            <div class="textbox-actions">
              <div class="object-panel-grid"><label>Padding <input data-field="textBox.margins.top" type="number" min="0"></label><label>Columns <input data-field="textBox.columns" type="number" min="1" max="6"></label></div>
              <label>Vertical align <select data-field="textBox.verticalAlign"><option value="top">Top</option><option value="middle">Middle</option><option value="bottom">Bottom</option></select></label>
              <label>Auto fit <select data-field="textBox.autoFit"><option value="none">Do not autofit</option><option value="shrinkText">Shrink text</option><option value="resizeShape">Resize shape</option><option value="scroll">Scroll</option></select></label>
              <label>Fill <input data-field="appearance.fill" type="color"></label>
              <div class="object-panel-grid"><label>Border width <input data-field="appearance.borderWidth" type="number" min="0"></label><label>Corner radius <input data-field="appearance.cornerRadius" type="number" min="0"></label></div>
            </div>
            <div class="object-panel-row"><button data-action="wrap-distance">Text distance</button><button data-action="lock-anchor">Lock anchor</button><button data-action="delete" class="btn-danger-outline">Delete</button></div>`;
        document.body.appendChild(panel);
        panel.addEventListener('input', event => this.handleFieldInput(event));
        panel.addEventListener('change', event => this.handleFieldInput(event));
        panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleAction(event));
        this.guideLayer = document.createElement('div');
        this.guideLayer.className = 'object-guide-layer';
        document.body.appendChild(this.guideLayer);
    }

    wrapLabel(type) {
        return ({ inline: 'Inline', square: 'Square', topBottom: 'Top and bottom', behindText: 'Behind text', inFrontOfText: 'In front of text', tight: 'Tight', through: 'Through' })[type] || type;
    }

    refreshUi() {
        const panel = document.getElementById('object-format-panel');
        const block = this.selectedObject;
        if (!panel || !block) { panel?.classList.add('hidden'); return; }
        panel.classList.remove('hidden');
        panel.classList.toggle('is-textbox', block.objectType === 'textBox');
        panel.querySelectorAll('.image-actions').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('hidden', block.objectType !== 'image'));
        panel.querySelectorAll('.textbox-actions').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('hidden', block.objectType !== 'textBox'));
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-field]').forEach(input => {
            const value = this.readPath(block, input.dataset.field);
            if (input.type === 'checkbox') input.checked = !!value;
            else if (document.activeElement !== input) input.value = value ?? '';
            if (input.dataset.field === 'layout.x' || input.dataset.field === 'layout.y') {
                input.disabled = block.layout?.mode === 'inline';
            }
        });
    }

    readPath(object, path) { return path.split('.').reduce((value, key) => value?.[key], object); }
    pathPatch(path, value) {
        const root = {}; let cursor = root; const parts = path.split('.');
        parts.forEach((part, index) => { if (index === parts.length - 1) cursor[part] = value; else cursor = cursor[part] = {}; });
        return root;
    }

    handleFieldInput(event) {
        const input = event.target.closest('[data-field]');
        if (!input || !this.selectedObjectId) return;
        let value = input.type === 'checkbox' ? input.checked : input.value;
        if (input.type === 'number') {
            if (input.value.trim() === '') return;
            value = Number(value);
            if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return;
        }
        let patch = this.pathPatch(input.dataset.field, value);
        if (input.dataset.field === 'textBox.margins.top') patch = { textBox: { margins: { top: value, right: value, bottom: value, left: value } } };
        if (input.dataset.field === 'wrap.type') {
            const block = this.selectedObject;
            patch.layout = { mode: value === 'inline' ? 'inline' : 'floating' };
            if (value !== 'inline' && block?.layout?.mode === 'inline') {
                const element = document.querySelector(`[data-object-id="${CSS.escape(block.id)}"]`);
                const pageHost = element?.closest('.page, .mode-pageless');
                const pageRect = pageHost?.getBoundingClientRect?.();
                const rect = element?.getBoundingClientRect?.();
                if (element && pageRect && rect) {
                    const scale = Math.max(0.05, Number(this.ctrl.renderer?.zoom || 1));
                    const absoluteLeft = (rect.left - pageRect.left) / scale;
                    const absoluteTop = (rect.top - pageRect.top) / scale;
                    const position = this.buildPositionPatch(element, block, absoluteLeft, absoluteTop, { updateAnchor: false });
                    patch = this.deepAssign(position, patch);
                    patch.layout.width = Math.max(24, rect.width / scale);
                    patch.layout.height = Math.max(24, rect.height / scale);
                    patch.legacy = { ...(position.legacy || {}), widthPercent: null };
                }
            }
        }
        this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: this.selectedObjectId, patch, source: 'objectProperty' }, { restoreSelection: false });
    }

    async handleAction(event) {
        const action = event.target.closest('[data-action]')?.dataset.action;
        if (!action) return;
        const block = this.selectedObject;
        if (action === 'close') return this.clearSelection();
        if (!block) return;
        if (action === 'delete') return this.engine.dispatch('removeBlock', { blockId: block.id }, { restoreSelection: false });
        if (action === 'duplicate') return this.engine.dispatch('duplicateObject', { objectId: block.id }, { restoreSelection: false });
        if (action === 'front' || action === 'back') {
            const zIndex = action === 'front' ? Number(block.layout?.zIndex || 1) + 1 : Number(block.layout?.zIndex || 1) - 1;
            return this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch: { layout: { zIndex } }, source: 'arrange' }, { restoreSelection: false });
        }
        if (action === 'rotate-left') {
            const rotation = (Number(block.layout?.rotation || 0) - 90) % 360;
            return this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch: { layout: { rotation } }, source: 'rotate' }, { restoreSelection: false });
        }
        if (action === 'flip-x') return this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch: { image: { flipX: !block.image?.flipX } }, source: 'flip' }, { restoreSelection: false });
        if (action === 'flip-y') return this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch: { image: { flipY: !block.image?.flipY } }, source: 'flip' }, { restoreSelection: false });
        if (action === 'crop') { this.cropMode = !this.cropMode; this.paintCropMode(); return; }
        if (action === 'replace') return this.replaceSelectedImage();
        if (action === 'wrap-distance') return this.editWrapDistance();
        if (action === 'lock-anchor') return this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch: { anchor: { lockAnchor: !block.anchor?.lockAnchor } }, source: 'anchor' }, { restoreSelection: false });
    }

    async replaceSelectedImage() {
        const input = document.getElementById('inp-image-upload');
        if (!input) return;
        input.dataset.replaceObjectId = this.selectedObjectId;
        input.click();
    }

    editWrapDistance() {
        const block = this.selectedObject; if (!block) return;
        const current = block.wrap?.distance || {};
        const value = window.prompt('Distance from text in pixels (top,right,bottom,left)', `${current.top || 0},${current.right || 0},${current.bottom || 0},${current.left || 0}`);
        if (!value) return;
        const [top, right, bottom, left] = value.split(',').map(Number);
        if ([top, right, bottom, left].some(number => !Number.isFinite(number))) return;
        this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch: { wrap: { distance: { top, right, bottom, left } } }, source: 'wrapDistance' }, { restoreSelection: false });
    }

    decorateElement(element, block) {
        element.dataset.objectId = block.id;
        element.tabIndex = 0;
        if (this.selectedObjectId === block.id) element.classList.add('object-selected');
        if (!element.querySelector('.object-transform-handles')) {
            const handles = document.createElement('div');
            handles.className = 'object-transform-handles';
            handles.innerHTML = HANDLE_NAMES.map(name => `<span class="object-handle ${name}" data-handle="${name}"></span>`).join('') + '<span class="object-rotate-handle" data-handle="rotate"></span><span class="object-move-handle" data-handle="move" title="Move object" aria-label="Move object">⠿</span><span class="object-wrap-button" title="Wrap text">☰</span>';
            element.appendChild(handles);
            handles.querySelectorAll('[data-handle]').forEach(handle => handle.addEventListener('pointerdown', event => this.startTransform(event, element, block, handle.dataset.handle)));
            handles.querySelector('.object-wrap-button')?.addEventListener('click', event => { event.stopPropagation(); this.select(block.id); document.getElementById('object-format-panel')?.querySelector('[data-field="wrap.type"]')?.focus(); });
        }
        if (block.anchor?.blockId && !element.querySelector('.object-anchor-indicator')) {
            const anchor = document.createElement('span'); anchor.className = 'object-anchor-indicator'; anchor.title = `Anchored to ${block.anchor.blockId}`; anchor.textContent = '⚓'; element.appendChild(anchor);
        }
    }

    getAbsolutePosition(element, block) {
        const styleLeft = Number.parseFloat(element?.style?.left);
        const styleTop = Number.parseFloat(element?.style?.top);
        return {
            left: Number.isFinite(styleLeft) ? styleLeft : Number(block.layout?.x || 0),
            top: Number.isFinite(styleTop) ? styleTop : Number(block.layout?.y || 0)
        };
    }

    buildPositionPatch(element, block, absoluteLeft, absoluteTop, { updateAnchor = true } = {}) {
        const pageHost = element.closest('.page, .mode-pageless');
        const pageRect = pageHost?.getBoundingClientRect?.();
        const objectTop = element.getBoundingClientRect?.().top ?? 0;
        let anchorBlockId = block.anchor?.blockId || null;
        let anchorElement = anchorBlockId
            ? pageHost?.querySelector?.(`[data-block-id="${CSS.escape(anchorBlockId)}"]`)
            : null;

        if (updateAnchor && block.anchor?.moveWithText !== false && !block.anchor?.lockAnchor) {
            const candidates = [...(pageHost?.querySelectorAll?.('.page-content-area [data-block-id], :scope > [data-block-id]') || [])]
                .filter(candidate => candidate.dataset.blockId !== block.id && this.state.getBlockById(candidate.dataset.blockId)?.type === 'text');
            anchorElement = candidates.sort((a, b) => Math.abs(a.getBoundingClientRect().top - objectTop) - Math.abs(b.getBoundingClientRect().top - objectTop))[0] || anchorElement;
            anchorBlockId = anchorElement?.dataset.blockId || anchorBlockId;
        }

        let x = absoluteLeft;
        let y = absoluteTop;
        if (block.layout?.relativeTo === 'paragraph' && block.anchor?.moveWithText !== false && anchorElement && pageRect) {
            const anchorRect = anchorElement.getBoundingClientRect();
            const scale = Math.max(0.05, Number(this.ctrl.renderer?.zoom || 1));
            x -= (anchorRect.left - pageRect.left) / scale;
            y -= (anchorRect.top - pageRect.top) / scale;
        }

        return {
            layout: { x: Math.round(x * 100) / 100, y: Math.round(y * 100) / 100 },
            anchor: { blockId: anchorBlockId },
            legacy: { pageIndex: Math.max(0, Number(pageHost?.dataset?.pageNum || 1) - 1) }
        };
    }

    commitAbsolutePosition(element, block, absoluteLeft, absoluteTop, source = 'objectMove') {
        const patch = this.buildPositionPatch(element, block, absoluteLeft, absoluteTop);
        return this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch, source }, { restoreSelection: false });
    }

    startTransform(event, element, block, handle) {
        event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); this.select(block.id);
        if (block.layout?.lockPosition && handle === 'move') return;
        const absolute = this.getAbsolutePosition(element, block);
        const start = { x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY, width: element.offsetWidth, height: element.offsetHeight, left: absolute.left, top: absolute.top, rotation: Number(block.layout?.rotation || 0) };
        const ratio = start.width / Math.max(1, start.height);
        const scale = Math.max(0.05, Number(this.ctrl.renderer?.zoom || 1));
        let changed = false;
        const move = moveEvent => {
            const dx = (moveEvent.clientX - start.x) / scale, dy = (moveEvent.clientY - start.y) / scale;
            if (handle === 'move') {
                const left = Math.max(0, start.left + dx);
                const top = Math.max(0, start.top + dy);
                element.style.left = `${left}px`;
                element.style.top = `${top}px`;
                element.dataset.previewGeometry = JSON.stringify({ width: start.width, height: start.height, left, top });
                changed = true;
                this.showSnapGuides(element);
                return;
            }
            if (handle === 'rotate') {
                const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
                const angle = Math.atan2(moveEvent.clientY - (rect.top + rect.height / 2), moveEvent.clientX - (rect.left + rect.width / 2)) * 180 / Math.PI + 90;
                const frame = element.querySelector(':scope > .object-frame') || element;
                frame.style.transform = this.objectTransform(block, angle);
                element.dataset.previewRotation = String(Math.round(angle));
                changed = true;
                return;
            }
            let width = start.width, height = start.height, left = start.left, top = start.top;
            if (handle.includes('e')) width += dx;
            if (handle.includes('s')) height += dy;
            if (handle.includes('w')) { width -= dx; left += dx; }
            if (handle.includes('n')) { height -= dy; top += dy; }
            width = clamp(width, 24, 2000); height = clamp(height, 24, 2000);
            if (block.objectType === 'image' && block.image?.lockAspectRatio && !moveEvent.altKey) {
                if (Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)) height = width / ratio; else width = height * ratio;
            }
            element.style.width = `${width}px`; element.style.height = `${height}px`;
            if (block.layout?.mode === 'floating') { element.style.left = `${left}px`; element.style.top = `${top}px`; }
            element.dataset.previewGeometry = JSON.stringify({ width, height, left, top });
            changed = true;
            this.showSnapGuides(element);
        };
        const up = () => {
            document.removeEventListener('pointermove', move); document.removeEventListener('pointerup', up);
            this.clearGuides();
            if (!changed) return;
            if (element.dataset.previewRotation) {
                const rotation = Number(element.dataset.previewRotation); delete element.dataset.previewRotation;
                this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch: { layout: { rotation } }, source: 'objectTransform' }, { restoreSelection: false });
            } else {
                let geometry = {}; try { geometry = JSON.parse(element.dataset.previewGeometry || '{}'); } catch (_) {}
                delete element.dataset.previewGeometry;
                const left = geometry.left ?? start.left;
                const top = geometry.top ?? start.top;
                const positionPatch = this.buildPositionPatch(element, block, left, top, { updateAnchor: handle === 'move' });
                positionPatch.layout.width = geometry.width || element.offsetWidth;
                positionPatch.layout.height = geometry.height || element.offsetHeight;
                this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch: positionPatch, source: 'objectTransform' }, { restoreSelection: false });
            }
        };
        document.addEventListener('pointermove', move); document.addEventListener('pointerup', up, { once: true });
    }

    objectTransform(block, rotation = block.layout?.rotation || 0) {
        const sx = block.image?.flipX ? -1 : 1, sy = block.image?.flipY ? -1 : 1;
        return `rotate(${Number(rotation) || 0}deg) scale(${sx},${sy})`;
    }

    showSnapGuides(element) {
        if (!this.guideLayer) return;
        const page = element.closest('.page, .mode-pageless'); if (!page) return;
        const pageRect = page.getBoundingClientRect(), rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
        const guides = [];
        if (Math.abs((rect.left + rect.width / 2) - (pageRect.left + pageRect.width / 2)) < 8) guides.push(`<i class="guide-v" style="left:${pageRect.left + pageRect.width / 2}px"></i>`);
        if (Math.abs((rect.top + rect.height / 2) - (pageRect.top + pageRect.height / 2)) < 8) guides.push(`<i class="guide-h" style="top:${pageRect.top + pageRect.height / 2}px"></i>`);
        this.guideLayer.innerHTML = guides.join('');
    }
    clearGuides() { if (this.guideLayer) this.guideLayer.innerHTML = ''; }

    paintCropMode() {
        document.querySelectorAll(`[data-object-id="${CSS.escape(this.selectedObjectId || '')}"]`).forEach(element => element.classList.toggle('object-crop-mode', this.cropMode));
    }

    enterTextBoxEditing(host) {
        if (!host) return;
        host.classList.add('object-editing');
        const editor = host.querySelector('.text-box-editor');
        if (editor) {
            editor.focus();
            const range = document.createRange();
            range.selectNodeContents(editor);
            range.collapse(false);
            const selection = window.getSelection();
            selection.removeAllRanges();
            selection.addRange(range);
        }
    }

    onKeyDown(event) {
        if (event.key === 'Escape') {
            document.querySelectorAll('.object-editing').forEach(element => element.classList.remove('object-editing'));
            if (this.selectedObjectId) { event.preventDefault(); this.select(this.selectedObjectId); }
            return;
        }
        const block = this.selectedObject;
        if (!block || event.target.closest('input,select,textarea,[contenteditable="true"]')) return;
        if (event.key === 'Delete' || event.key === 'Backspace') { event.preventDefault(); this.engine.dispatch('removeBlock', { blockId: block.id }, { restoreSelection: false }); return; }
        if (!['ArrowLeft', 'ArrowRight', 'ArrowUp', 'ArrowDown'].includes(event.key)) return;
        if (block.layout?.mode !== 'floating' || block.layout?.lockPosition) return;
        event.preventDefault();
        const step = event.shiftKey ? 10 : 1;
        const patch = { layout: { x: Number(block.layout?.x || 0), y: Number(block.layout?.y || 0) } };
        if (event.key === 'ArrowLeft') patch.layout.x -= step;
        if (event.key === 'ArrowRight') patch.layout.x += step;
        if (event.key === 'ArrowUp') patch.layout.y -= step;
        if (event.key === 'ArrowDown') patch.layout.y += step;
        this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: block.id, patch, source: 'objectNudge' }, { restoreSelection: false });
    }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/objects/object-model.js (2026-07-03 17:41:30) =====
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

function cloneDocumentValue(value) {
    if (value === undefined) return undefined;
    if (typeof structuredClone === 'function') return structuredClone(value);
    return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value));
}

const DEFAULT_DISTANCE = Object.freeze({ top: 8, right: 8, bottom: 8, left: 8 });

export const WRAP_TYPES = Object.freeze([
    'inline',
    'square',
    'topBottom',
    'behindText',
    'inFrontOfText',
    'tight',
    'through'
]);

export function defaultObjectLayout(overrides = {}) {
    return {
        mode: 'inline',
        relativeTo: 'paragraph',
        x: 48,
        y: 48,
        width: 240,
        height: 160,
        rotation: 0,
        zIndex: 1,
        allowOverlap: true,
        lockPosition: false,
        ...overrides
    };
}

export function defaultObjectWrap(overrides = {}) {
    const distance = { ...DEFAULT_DISTANCE, ...(overrides.distance || {}) };
    return {
        type: 'inline',
        side: 'both',
        distance,
        contour: Array.isArray(overrides.contour) ? cloneDocumentValue(overrides.contour) : null,
        ...overrides,
        distance
    };
}

export function createImageObject(overrides = {}) {
    const image = overrides.image || {};
    return {
        id: overrides.id || createStableId('obj'),
        type: 'object',
        objectType: 'image',
        anchor: {
            blockId: null,
            offset: 0,
            moveWithText: true,
            lockAnchor: false,
            ...(overrides.anchor || {})
        },
        layout: defaultObjectLayout(overrides.layout || {}),
        wrap: defaultObjectWrap(overrides.wrap || {}),
        image: {
            assetId: null,
            src: '',
            naturalWidth: null,
            naturalHeight: null,
            lockAspectRatio: true,
            crop: { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0 },
            filters: { brightness: 1, contrast: 1, saturate: 1, grayscale: 0, sepia: 0, opacity: 1 },
            flipX: false,
            flipY: false,
            altText: '',
            decorative: false,
            caption: '',
            hyperlink: null,
            border: { color: 'transparent', width: 0, style: 'solid' },
            shadow: null,
            cornerRadius: 0,
            ...image,
            crop: { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0, ...(image.crop || {}) },
            filters: { brightness: 1, contrast: 1, saturate: 1, grayscale: 0, sepia: 0, opacity: 1, ...(image.filters || {}) },
            border: { color: 'transparent', width: 0, style: 'solid', ...(image.border || {}) }
        }
    };
}

export function createTextBoxObject(overrides = {}) {
    const textBox = overrides.textBox || {};
    const appearance = overrides.appearance || {};
    const initialContent = overrides.content || textBox.content || 'Text box';
    const blocks = Array.isArray(textBox.blocks) && textBox.blocks.length
        ? cloneDocumentValue(textBox.blocks)
        : [{ id: createStableId('tbblk'), type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: String(initialContent) }];
    return {
        id: overrides.id || createStableId('obj'),
        type: 'object',
        objectType: 'textBox',
        anchor: {
            blockId: null,
            offset: 0,
            moveWithText: true,
            lockAnchor: false,
            ...(overrides.anchor || {})
        },
        layout: defaultObjectLayout({ mode: 'floating', width: 220, height: 110, ...(overrides.layout || {}) }),
        wrap: defaultObjectWrap({ type: 'square', side: 'right', ...(overrides.wrap || {}) }),
        textBox: {
            blocks,
            margins: { top: 8, right: 8, bottom: 8, left: 8, ...(textBox.margins || {}) },
            verticalAlign: textBox.verticalAlign || 'top',
            autoFit: textBox.autoFit || 'resizeShape',
            columns: Math.max(1, Number(textBox.columns || 1)),
            linkedNextId: textBox.linkedNextId || null
        },
        appearance: {
            fill: '#ffffff',
            fillOpacity: 1,
            borderColor: '#64748b',
            borderWidth: 1,
            borderStyle: 'solid',
            cornerRadius: 2,
            shadow: null,
            opacity: 1,
            ...appearance
        }
    };
}

export function isObjectBlock(block) {
    return !!block && block.type === 'object' && ['image', 'textBox', 'shape'].includes(block.objectType);
}

export function isFlowObject(block) {
    if (!isObjectBlock(block)) return false;
    const wrapType = block.wrap?.type || (block.layout?.mode === 'inline' ? 'inline' : 'inFrontOfText');
    // Only truly inline objects belong in the canonical text flow. Floating
    // objects with square/tight/through wrapping are rendered in a page layer
    // and use an independent wrap proxy so their x/y position remains stable.
    return block.layout?.mode === 'inline' || wrapType === 'inline';
}

export function usesWrapProxy(block) {
    if (!isObjectBlock(block) || isFlowObject(block)) return false;
    return ['square', 'topBottom', 'tight', 'through'].includes(block.wrap?.type || '');
}

export function normalizeObjectBlock(block, { previousTextBlockId = null } = {}) {
    if (!block || typeof block !== 'object') return { block, changed: false };
    let normalized = block;
    let changed = false;

    if (block.type === 'image') {
        const pct = Math.max(10, Math.min(100, Number(block.width || 100)));
        normalized = createImageObject({
            id: block.id,
            anchor: { blockId: previousTextBlockId, moveWithText: true },
            layout: { mode: 'inline', width: pct, height: null },
            wrap: { type: 'inline', side: block.align === 'right' ? 'left' : block.align === 'left' ? 'right' : 'both' },
            image: {
                src: block.content || '',
                caption: block.caption || '',
                altText: block.altText || '',
                decorative: !!block.decorative,
                lockAspectRatio: block.lockAspectRatio !== false
            }
        });
        normalized.legacy = { align: block.align || 'center', widthPercent: pct };
        changed = true;
    } else if (block.type === 'floating') {
        const common = {
            id: block.id,
            anchor: { blockId: block.anchorBlockId || previousTextBlockId, moveWithText: block.moveWithText !== false },
            layout: {
                mode: 'floating',
                x: Number(block.x || 0),
                y: Number(block.y || 0),
                width: Number(block.w || 180),
                height: Number(block.h || 90),
                rotation: Number(block.rotation || 0),
                zIndex: Number(block.zIndex || 10),
                relativeTo: 'page'
            },
            wrap: { type: block.wrapType || 'inFrontOfText', side: block.wrapSide || 'both' }
        };
        normalized = block.subType === 'image'
            ? createImageObject({ ...common, image: { src: block.content || '', lockAspectRatio: block.lockAspectRatio !== false } })
            : createTextBoxObject({ ...common, content: block.content || 'Floating Text' });
        normalized.legacy = { pageIndex: Number(block.pageIndex || 0) };
        changed = true;
    } else if (isObjectBlock(block)) {
        if (block.objectType === 'image') normalized = { ...cloneDocumentValue(block), ...createImageObject(block) };
        else if (block.objectType === 'textBox') normalized = { ...cloneDocumentValue(block), ...createTextBoxObject(block) };
        else normalized = { ...block, layout: defaultObjectLayout(block.layout), wrap: defaultObjectWrap(block.wrap) };

        const wrapType = normalized.wrap?.type || 'inline';
        const expectedMode = wrapType === 'inline' ? 'inline' : 'floating';
        if (normalized.layout?.mode !== expectedMode) {
            normalized.layout = { ...normalized.layout, mode: expectedMode };
        }
        changed = JSON.stringify(normalized) !== JSON.stringify(block);
    }

    return { block: normalized, changed };
}

export function normalizeDocumentObjects(document) {
    if (!document || !Array.isArray(document.blocks)) return { document, changed: false };
    let changed = false;
    let previousTextBlockId = null;
    document.blocks = document.blocks.map(block => {
        if (block?.type === 'text') previousTextBlockId = block.id || previousTextBlockId;
        const result = normalizeObjectBlock(block, { previousTextBlockId });
        changed = changed || result.changed;
        return result.block;
    });
    return { document, changed };
}

export function objectTextHtml(block) {
    if (!block || block.objectType !== 'textBox') return '';
    return (block.textBox?.blocks || []).map(item => item.content || '').join('<div><br></div>');
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/position-mapper.js (2026-07-03 01:59:49) =====
import { cloneSelection, createTextPosition } from './selection-model.js';

function htmlTextLength(html) {
    if (typeof document === 'undefined') return String(html || '').replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').length;
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.innerHTML = html || '';
    return (el.textContent || '').length;
}

export class PositionMapper {
    constructor(stateManager) {
        this.state = stateManager;
    }

    mapSelection(selection, operations = [], context = {}) {
        if (!selection) return null;
        const next = cloneSelection(selection);
        if (next.type === 'text') {
            next.anchor = this.mapPosition(next.anchor, operations, context);
            next.focus = this.mapPosition(next.focus, operations, context);
            if (!next.anchor || !next.focus) return null;
        } else if (next.type === 'node') {
            if (this.wasBlockRemoved(next.blockId, operations)) {
                const fallback = this.findFallbackBlockId(next.blockId, operations, context);
                if (!fallback) return null;
                next.blockId = fallback;
                next.nodeId = fallback;
            }
        } else if (next.type === 'table' && this.wasBlockRemoved(next.tableId, operations)) {
            return null;
        }
        return next;
    }

    mapPosition(position, operations = [], context = {}) {
        if (!position?.blockId) return null;
        let current = createTextPosition(position.blockId, position.offset, position.affinity);

        for (const op of operations) {
            const blockId = op.blockId || op.block?.id || null;
            if (op.type === 'REMOVE_BLOCK' && String(blockId) === current.blockId) {
                const fallback = this.findFallbackBlockId(current.blockId, [op], context);
                if (!fallback) return null;
                current = createTextPosition(fallback, 0, current.affinity);
            }

            if (op.type === 'SPLIT_BLOCK' && String(blockId) === current.blockId && Number.isFinite(Number(op.splitOffset))) {
                const splitOffset = Number(op.splitOffset);
                if (current.offset > splitOffset || (current.offset === splitOffset && current.affinity === 'forward')) {
                    current.blockId = String(op.newBlockId || op.newBlock?.id);
                    current.offset = Math.max(0, current.offset - splitOffset);
                }
            }

            if (op.type === 'MERGE_BLOCKS') {
                const removedId = String(op.removedBlockId || op.removedBlock?.id || '');
                const targetId = String(op.targetBlockId || op.blockId || '');
                if (current.blockId === removedId && targetId) {
                    current.blockId = targetId;
                    current.offset += Number.isFinite(Number(op.targetLengthBefore))
                        ? Number(op.targetLengthBefore)
                        : htmlTextLength(op.prevContent);
                }
            }

            if (op.type === 'INSERT_TEXT' && String(blockId) === current.blockId) {
                const at = Number(op.offset) || 0;
                const length = String(op.text || '').length;
                if (current.offset > at || (current.offset === at && current.affinity === 'forward')) current.offset += length;
            }

            if (op.type === 'DELETE_TEXT' && String(blockId) === current.blockId) {
                const from = Math.max(0, Number(op.from) || 0);
                const to = Math.max(from, Number(op.to) || from);
                if (current.offset > to) current.offset -= to - from;
                else if (current.offset > from) current.offset = from;
            }
        }

        return current;
    }

    wasBlockRemoved(blockId, operations) {
        return operations.some(op => op.type === 'REMOVE_BLOCK'
            && String(op.blockId || op.block?.id || '') === String(blockId));
    }

    findFallbackBlockId(blockId, operations, context = {}) {
        for (const op of operations) {
            if (op.type !== 'REMOVE_BLOCK') continue;
            if (String(op.blockId || op.block?.id || '') !== String(blockId)) continue;
            if (op.nextBlockId) return String(op.nextBlockId);
            if (op.previousBlockId) return String(op.previousBlockId);
        }
        const blocks = context.documentAfter?.blocks || this.state?.doc?.blocks || [];
        return blocks[0]?.id ? String(blocks[0].id) : null;
    }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/proofing/proofing-manager.js (2026-07-10 01:55:25) =====
import { Formatter } from '../../formatter.js';

function stripHtml(html) { const tmp = document.createElement('div'); tmp.innerHTML = html || ''; return tmp.textContent || ''; }
function esc(value) { return Formatter.escapeHtml(String(value ?? '')); }

export class ProofingManager {
  constructor(controller) { this.ctrl = controller; this.state = controller.state; this.panel = null; this.issueCache = []; }

  setup() {
    this.ensureUi(); this.bindToolbar(); this.bindAutoCorrect();
    this.state.subscribeTo('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => this.scan({ silent: true }));
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside'); this.panel.id = 'proofing-panel'; this.panel.className = 'proofing-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `
      <header><strong>Proofing</strong><button data-proof-action="close">×</button></header>
      <div class="proofing-actions"><button data-proof-action="scan">Scan</button><button data-proof-action="readability">Readability</button><button data-proof-action="ai-review">Deep AI review</button><button data-proof-action="cleanup">Local cleanup</button><button data-proof-action="autocorrect-options">AutoCorrect</button><button data-proof-action="add-dictionary">Add word</button></div>
      <label class="proofing-toggle"><input id="chk-autocorrect" type="checkbox" checked> AutoCorrect common typos</label>
      <div id="proofing-summary" class="proofing-summary"></div>
      <div id="proofing-list" class="proofing-list"></div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(this.panel); this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event));
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const review = document.querySelector('[data-panel="review"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="review"]');
    if (review && !document.getElementById('btn-proofing-panel')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-proofing-panel'; btn.title = 'Proofing'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="spell-check"></i><span>Proofing</span>';
      review.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPanel()); globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
  }

  bindAutoCorrect() {
    document.addEventListener('beforeinput', event => {
      if (event.inputType !== 'insertText' || event.data !== ' ') return;
      const cfg = this.state.doc.autocorrect || {}; if (cfg.enabled === false || !document.getElementById('chk-autocorrect')?.checked) return;
      const ctx = this.ctrl.smartInput?.getActiveTextContext?.(event.target); if (!ctx) return;
      const before = ctx.textBeforeCaret || ''; const match = before.match(/(\S+)$/); if (!match) return;
      let replacement = cfg.replacements?.[match[1].toLowerCase()] || null;
      if (!replacement) return;
      event.preventDefault();
      const start = ctx.caretOffset - match[1].length;
      const selection = { type: 'text', anchor: { blockId: ctx.blockId, offset: start }, focus: { blockId: ctx.blockId, offset: ctx.caretOffset }, direction: 'forward' };
      this.ctrl.engine.dispatch('replaceSelection', { text: replacement + ' ', source: 'autocorrect' }, { selection });
    }, true);
  }

  openPanel() { this.scan({ silent: true }); this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); }
  handleClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-proof-action]')?.dataset.proofAction;
    if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.panel.classList.add('hidden');
    if (action === 'scan') return this.scan();
    if (action === 'readability') return this.showReadability();
    if (action === 'ai-review') { this.panel.classList.add('hidden'); return this.ctrl.aiCommandManager?.runAI('proofread', { scope: 'document', instruction: 'Proofread the full document for grammar, clarity, consistency, terminology, accessibility, and readability.' }); }
    if (action === 'cleanup') return this.cleanupDocument();
    if (action === 'autocorrect-options') return this.configureAutoCorrect();
    if (action === 'add-dictionary') return this.addDictionaryWord();
    if (action.startsWith('apply:')) return this.applyIssue(action.slice(6));
  }

  allText() { return (this.state.doc.blocks || []).filter(b => b.type === 'text').map(b => stripHtml(b.content)).join('\n'); }

  scan({ silent = false } = {}) {
    const issues = [];
    const repeatedWord = /\b(\w+)\s+\1\b/gi;
    const passive = /\b(?:is|are|was|were|be|been|being)\s+\w+ed\b/gi;
    const wordy = [{ re: /in order to/gi, fix: 'to' }, { re: /due to the fact that/gi, fix: 'because' }, { re: /at this point in time/gi, fix: 'now' }, { re: /utilize/gi, fix: 'use' }, { re: /prior to/gi, fix: 'before' }];
    const weak = /\b(very|really|quite|basically|actually)\b/gi;
    const cliches = /\b(at the end of the day|moving forward|circle back)\b/gi;
    this.state.doc.blocks.forEach((block, blockIndex) => {
      if (block.type !== 'text') return;
      const text = stripHtml(block.content);
      let m; while ((m = repeatedWord.exec(text))) issues.push({ id: `repeat-${block.id}-${m.index}`, type: 'Repeated word', blockId: block.id, blockIndex, text: m[0], suggestion: m[1] });
      while ((m = passive.exec(text))) issues.push({ id: `passive-${block.id}-${m.index}`, type: 'Passive voice', blockId: block.id, blockIndex, text: m[0], suggestion: 'Consider making the actor explicit.' });
      for (const rule of wordy) while ((m = rule.re.exec(text))) issues.push({ id: `wordy-${block.id}-${m.index}`, type: 'Wordiness', blockId: block.id, blockIndex, text: m[0], suggestion: rule.fix });
      while ((m = weak.exec(text))) issues.push({ id: `weak-${block.id}-${m.index}`, type: 'Weak modifier', blockId: block.id, blockIndex, text: m[0], suggestion: '' });
      while ((m = cliches.exec(text))) issues.push({ id: `cliche-${block.id}-${m.index}`, type: 'Cliché', blockId: block.id, blockIndex, text: m[0], suggestion: 'Use more specific wording.' });
      text.split(/(?<=[.!?])\s+/).forEach((sentence, sentenceIndex) => { const words = sentence.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean); if (words.length > 35) issues.push({ id: `long-${block.id}-${sentenceIndex}`, type: 'Long sentence', blockId: block.id, blockIndex, text: sentence.slice(0, 90), suggestion: 'Consider splitting this sentence.' }); });
    });
    this.issueCache = issues;
    if (!silent) this.renderIssues(); else this.renderIssues();
  }

  renderIssues() {
    const list = document.getElementById('proofing-list'); const summary = document.getElementById('proofing-summary'); if (!list || !summary) return;
    const text = this.allText(); const words = text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length; const sentences = text.split(/[.!?]+/).filter(s => s.trim()).length || 1;
    summary.innerHTML = `<strong>${this.issueCache.length}</strong> suggestions · ${words} words · ${Math.round(words / sentences)} words/sentence`;
    list.innerHTML = this.issueCache.length ? this.issueCache.map(issue => `<article class="proofing-issue"><strong>${esc(issue.type)}</strong><span>${esc(issue.text)}</span><em>${esc(issue.suggestion)}</em>${issue.suggestion && !issue.suggestion.includes('Consider') ? `<button data-proof-action="apply:${esc(issue.id)}">Apply</button>` : ''}</article>`).join('') : '<p>No proofing issues found.</p>';
  }

  applyIssue(issueId) {
    const issue = this.issueCache.find(i => i.id === issueId); if (!issue?.suggestion) return;
    const block = this.state.getBlockById(issue.blockId); if (!block) return;
    const next = { ...block, content: String(block.content || '').replace(issue.text, issue.suggestion) };
    this.state.replaceBlockById(block.id, next, 'proofingFix'); this.scan({ silent: true });
  }

  showReadability() {
    const text = this.allText(); const words = text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean); const sentences = Math.max(1, text.split(/[.!?]+/).filter(s => s.trim()).length); const syllables = words.reduce((sum, w) => sum + Math.max(1, (w.toLowerCase().match(/[aeiouy]+/g) || []).length), 0);
    const score = Math.round(206.835 - 1.015 * (words.length / sentences) - 84.6 * (syllables / Math.max(1, words.length)));
    document.getElementById('proofing-summary').innerHTML = `<strong>Readability:</strong> ${score} · ${words.length} words · ${sentences} sentences`;
  }

  cleanupDocument() {
    if (!confirm('Clean pasted formatting, normalize spaces, and simplify common wordy phrases?')) return;
    const replacements = [[/\s{2,}/g, ' '], [/\s+([,.;:!?])/g, '$1'], [/in order to/gi, 'to'], [/due to the fact that/gi, 'because']];
    this.state.doc.blocks.forEach(block => { if (block.type !== 'text') return; let html = block.content || ''; replacements.forEach(([re, to]) => { html = html.replace(re, to); }); block.content = html; });
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'PROOFING_CLEANUP' }); this.scan({ silent: true });
  }

  configureAutoCorrect() {
    const cfg = this.state.doc.autocorrect || { enabled: true, replacements: {} };
    const entries = Object.entries(cfg.replacements || {}).map(([wrong, right]) => `${wrong}=${right}`).join('\n');
    const result = prompt('AutoCorrect replacements (one per line: typo=correction):', entries || 'teh=the\nrecieve=receive');
    if (result == null) return;
    const replacements = {};
    result.split('\n').filter(Boolean).forEach(line => { const [wrong, ...rest] = line.split('='); if (wrong && rest.length) replacements[wrong.trim()] = rest.join('=').trim(); });
    this.state.doc.autocorrect = { enabled: cfg.enabled !== false, replacements };
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'AUTOCORRECT_CONFIGURED' });
  }

  addDictionaryWord() {
    const word = prompt('Add word to custom dictionary:', '')?.trim(); if (!word || !/^[a-zA-Z]+$/.test(word)) return;
    this.state.doc.customDictionary ||= [];
    if (this.state.doc.customDictionary.includes(word)) return alert(`"${word}" is already in the dictionary.`);
    this.state.doc.customDictionary.push(word);
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'DICTIONARY_UPDATED' });
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/publishing/publishing-manager.js (2026-07-09 17:49:53) =====
import { Formatter } from '../../formatter.js';

function esc(value) { return Formatter.escapeHtml(String(value ?? '')); }
function stripHtml(html) { const tmp = document.createElement('div'); tmp.innerHTML = html || ''; return tmp.textContent || ''; }

function documentPlainText(doc) {
  return (doc.blocks || []).map(block => {
    if (block.type === 'text') return stripHtml(block.content || '');
    if (['ul', 'ol', 'checklist'].includes(block.type)) return (block.items || []).map(item => `- ${stripHtml(item.text || '')}`).join('\n');
    if (block.type === 'table') return (block.rows || []).map(row => row.map(cell => stripHtml(cell || '')).join('\t')).join('\n');
    if (block.type === 'formField') return `${block.label || 'Field'}: ${stripHtml(block.value || '')}`;
    if (block.type === 'field') return block.display || block.fieldType || '';
    return '';
  }).filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
}

function documentMarkdown(doc) {
  return (doc.blocks || []).map(block => {
    if (block.type === 'text') {
      const text = stripHtml(block.content || '');
      if (/^h([1-6])$/.test(block.style || '')) return `${'#'.repeat(Number(block.style.slice(1)))} ${text}`;
      return text;
    }
    if (['ul', 'checklist'].includes(block.type)) return (block.items || []).map(item => `${block.type === 'checklist' ? (item.checked ? '- [x] ' : '- [ ] ') : '- '}${stripHtml(item.text || '')}`).join('\n');
    if (block.type === 'ol') return (block.items || []).map((item, i) => `${i + 1}. ${stripHtml(item.text || '')}`).join('\n');
    if (block.type === 'table') return (block.rows || []).map((row, i) => `| ${row.map(cell => stripHtml(cell || '')).join(' | ')} |${i === 0 ? `\n| ${row.map(() => '---').join(' | ')} |` : ''}`).join('\n');
    if (block.type === 'formField') return `**${block.label || 'Field'}:** ${stripHtml(block.value || '')}`;
    return '';
  }).filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
}

export class PublishingManager {
  constructor(controller) {
    this.ctrl = controller;
    this.state = controller.state;
    this.panel = null;
  }

  setup() { this.ensureUi(); this.bindToolbar(); }

  bindToolbar() {
    const filePanel = document.querySelector('[data-panel="file"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="file"]') || document.querySelector('.ribbon-group-buttons');
    if (filePanel && !document.getElementById('btn-publishing-panel')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.id = 'btn-publishing-panel';
      btn.title = 'Publishing and export options';
      btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="send"></i><span>Publish</span>';
      filePanel.appendChild(btn);
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPanel());
      globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside');
    this.panel.id = 'publishing-panel';
    this.panel.className = 'publishing-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `
      <header><strong>Publish & Export</strong><button data-publish-action="close">×</button></header>
      <section class="publishing-section"><h4>PDF</h4><label>Mode <select id="publish-pdf-mode"><option value="final">Final</option><option value="markup">With markup</option><option value="comments">With comments</option><option value="clean">Clean copy</option></select></label><label>Pages <input id="publish-page-range" placeholder="all or 1-3,5"></label><div class="publish-grid"><button data-publish-action="pdf">Export PDF</button><button data-publish-action="print-preview">Print preview</button></div></section>
      <section class="publishing-section"><h4>Other formats</h4><div class="publish-grid"><button data-publish-action="markdown">Markdown</button><button data-publish-action="html">HTML</button><button data-publish-action="text">Plain text</button><button data-publish-action="json">Backup JSON</button><button data-publish-action="png-plan">PNG per page</button><button data-publish-action="email-body">Email body</button></div></section>
      <section class="publishing-section"><h4>Compatibility</h4><div class="publish-grid"><button data-publish-action="compatibility">Check Word compatibility</button><button data-publish-action="compress-images">Mark images for compression</button></div><div id="publishing-report" class="publishing-report"></div></section>`;
    document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
    this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event));
  }

  openPanel() { this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); this.compatibilityReport({ silent: true }); }

  handleClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-publish-action]')?.dataset.publishAction;
    if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.panel.classList.add('hidden');
    if (action === 'pdf') return this.exportPdfWithOptions();
    if (action === 'print-preview') return this.ctrl.printDocument();
    if (action === 'markdown') return this.download(`${this.state.doc.title || 'document'}.md`, documentMarkdown(this.state.doc), 'text/markdown');
    if (action === 'html') return this.download(`${this.state.doc.title || 'document'}.html`, this.buildStandaloneHtml(), 'text/html');
    if (action === 'text') return this.download(`${this.state.doc.title || 'document'}.txt`, documentPlainText(this.state.doc), 'text/plain');
    if (action === 'json') return this.download(`${this.state.doc.title || 'document'}.opendoc.json`, JSON.stringify(this.state.doc, null, 2), 'application/json');
    if (action === 'png-plan') return this.pngPlan();
    if (action === 'email-body') return this.download(`${this.state.doc.title || 'document'}-email.html`, this.buildEmailBody(), 'text/html');
    if (action === 'compatibility') return this.compatibilityReport();
    if (action === 'compress-images') return this.markImagesForCompression();
  }

  pdfOptions() {
    return {
      mode: document.getElementById('publish-pdf-mode')?.value || 'final',
      pageRange: document.getElementById('publish-page-range')?.value || 'all'
    };
  }

  async exportPdfWithOptions() {
    if (!this.state.doc.id) return this.ctrl.exportPDF();
    this.ctrl.toolbar?.showShellToast?.('Generating PDF…');
    const res = await fetch(`/api/docs/${encodeURIComponent(this.state.doc.id)}/export/pdf`, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ exportOptions: this.pdfOptions() }) });
    if (!res.ok) return this.ctrl.toolbar?.showShellToast?.('PDF export failed');
    const blob = await res.blob();
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener');
    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 60000);
  }

  buildStandaloneHtml() {
    return `<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><title>${esc(this.state.doc.title || 'Document')}</title><main>${(this.state.doc.blocks || []).map(block => `<section data-type="${esc(block.type)}">${block.content || esc(block.value || block.type || '')}</section>`).join('\n')}</main>`;
  }

  buildEmailBody() {
    return (this.state.doc.blocks || []).filter(block => ['text', 'table', 'formField'].includes(block.type)).map(block => {
      if (block.type === 'text') return `<p>${block.content || ''}</p>`;
      if (block.type === 'formField') return `<p><strong>${esc(block.label || 'Field')}:</strong> ${esc(stripHtml(block.value || ''))}</p>`;
      if (block.type === 'table') return `<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0">${(block.rows || []).map(row => `<tr>${row.map(cell => `<td>${cell || ''}</td>`).join('')}</tr>`).join('')}</table>`;
      return '';
    }).join('\n');
  }

  download(filename, content, type) {
    const blob = new Blob([content], { type });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = filename; a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }

  pngPlan() {
    const pages = document.querySelectorAll('#workspace .page').length || 1;
    document.getElementById('publishing-report').innerHTML = `<p>PNG export plan prepared for ${pages} page${pages === 1 ? '' : 's'}. Browser raster export can be wired to html2canvas or a server endpoint later.</p>`;
  }

  compatibilityReport({ silent = false } = {}) {
    const issues = [];
    (this.state.doc.blocks || []).forEach((block, index) => {
      if (block.type === 'object' && ['tight', 'through'].includes(block.wrap?.type)) issues.push(`Block ${index + 1}: tight/through wrapping may not round-trip perfectly in DOCX.`);
      if (block.type === 'formField') issues.push(`Block ${index + 1}: form field exports as visible text unless DOCX content controls are enabled later.`);
      if (block.type === 'object' && block.objectType === 'shape' && block.shape?.kind === 'star') issues.push(`Block ${index + 1}: complex shape may export as simplified drawing.`);
      if (block.type === 'table' && block.cellMeta && Object.values(block.cellMeta).some(meta => meta.rowspan || meta.colspan)) issues.push(`Block ${index + 1}: merged cells need Word compatibility testing.`);
    });
    const report = document.getElementById('publishing-report');
    if (report && !silent) report.innerHTML = issues.length ? `<ul>${issues.map(issue => `<li>${esc(issue)}</li>`).join('')}</ul>` : '<p>No obvious DOCX compatibility issues found.</p>';
    if (report && silent) report.innerHTML = `<p>${issues.length} compatibility note${issues.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}.</p>`;
    return issues;
  }

  markImagesForCompression() {
    let count = 0;
    (this.state.doc.blocks || []).forEach(block => {
      if (block.type === 'image') { block.compression = { target: 'print', markedAt: new Date().toISOString() }; count += 1; }
      if (block.type === 'object' && block.objectType === 'image') { block.image ||= {}; block.image.compression = { target: 'print', markedAt: new Date().toISOString() }; count += 1; }
    });
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'IMAGES_MARKED_FOR_COMPRESSION', count });
    document.getElementById('publishing-report').innerHTML = `<p>${count} image${count === 1 ? '' : 's'} marked for compression metadata.</p>`;
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/review/review-collaboration-v2-manager.js (2026-07-18 03:14:08) =====
import { Formatter } from '../../formatter.js';

function esc(value) { return Formatter.escapeHtml(String(value ?? '')); }

export class ReviewCollaborationV2Manager {
  constructor(controller) {
    this.ctrl = controller;
    this.state = controller.state;
    this.panel = null;
    this.balloonLayer = null;
    this.currentRevisionIndex = -1;
    this._balloonFrame = null;
  }

  setup() {
    this.ensureUi();
    this.bindToolbar();
    this.state.subscribe(() => this.scheduleBalloonRender());
    this.state.subscribeTo('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => {
      if (!this.panel?.classList.contains('hidden')) this.renderPanel();
      this.scheduleBalloonRender();
    });
  }

  scheduleBalloonRender() {
    if (this._balloonFrame) return;
    this._balloonFrame = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      this._balloonFrame = null;
      this.renderBalloons();
    });
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const review = document.querySelector('[data-panel="review"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="review"]');
    if (review && !document.getElementById('btn-review-v2')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.id = 'btn-review-v2';
      btn.title = 'Review and collaboration tools';
      btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="messages-square"></i><span>Review v2</span>';
      review.appendChild(btn);
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPanel());
      globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (this.panel) return;
    this.panel = document.createElement('aside');
    this.panel.id = 'review-v2-panel';
    this.panel.className = 'review-v2-panel hidden';
    this.panel.innerHTML = `
      <header><strong>Review & Collaboration</strong><button data-review-v2="close">×</button></header>
      <section class="review-v2-section"><h4>Markup display</h4><div class="review-v2-grid">
        <button data-review-v2="markup:all">All markup</button>
        <button data-review-v2="markup:simple">Simple markup</button>
        <button data-review-v2="markup:none">No markup</button>
        <button data-review-v2="markup:original">Original</button>
      </div><label><input id="chk-review-balloons" type="checkbox" checked> Show balloons in margin</label></section>
      <section class="review-v2-section"><h4>Changes</h4><div class="review-v2-grid">
        <button data-review-v2="prev-change">Previous</button>
        <button data-review-v2="next-change">Next</button>
        <button data-review-v2="accept-current">Accept current</button>
        <button data-review-v2="reject-current">Reject current</button>
        <button data-review-v2="accept-author">Accept by author</button>
        <button data-review-v2="reject-author">Reject by author</button>
      </div><label>Author filter <select id="review-author-filter"></select></label></section>
      <section class="review-v2-section"><h4>Comments</h4><div class="review-v2-grid"><button data-review-v2="assign-comment">Assign selected comment</button><button data-review-v2="due-comment">Set due date</button><button data-review-v2="resolve-reason">Resolve with note</button></div></section>
      <section class="review-v2-section"><h4>Compare</h4><div class="review-v2-grid"><button data-review-v2="compare-revision">Compare with revision</button><button data-review-v2="restore-preview">Preview restore</button></div><div id="review-v2-summary"></div></section>`;
    document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
    this.balloonLayer = document.createElement('div');
    this.balloonLayer.id = 'revision-balloons-layer';
    this.balloonLayer.className = 'revision-balloons-layer';
    document.body.appendChild(this.balloonLayer);
    this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleClick(event));
    this.panel.addEventListener('change', event => {
      if (event.target.id === 'chk-review-balloons') this.renderBalloons();
      if (event.target.id === 'review-author-filter') this.renderPanel();
    });
  }

  openPanel() { this.renderPanel(); this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); this.renderBalloons(); }

  handleClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-review-v2]')?.dataset.reviewV2;
    if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.panel.classList.add('hidden');
    if (action.startsWith('markup:')) return this.setMarkupMode(action.slice(7));
    if (action === 'next-change') return this.goToChange(1);
    if (action === 'prev-change') return this.goToChange(-1);
    if (action === 'accept-current') return this.acceptRejectCurrent(true);
    if (action === 'reject-current') return this.acceptRejectCurrent(false);
    if (action === 'accept-author') return this.acceptRejectAuthor(true);
    if (action === 'reject-author') return this.acceptRejectAuthor(false);
    if (action === 'assign-comment') return this.assignSelectedComment();
    if (action === 'due-comment') return this.setSelectedCommentDueDate();
    if (action === 'resolve-reason') return this.resolveSelectedCommentWithReason();
    if (action === 'compare-revision') return this.compareWithRevision();
    if (action === 'restore-preview') return this.previewRestore();
  }

  revisions() { return this.state.listRunRevisions?.() || []; }

  authors() {
    return [...new Set(this.revisions().map(rev => rev.author || 'User'))].sort();
  }

  renderPanel() {
    const filter = document.getElementById('review-author-filter');
    if (filter) {
      const current = filter.value || 'all';
      filter.innerHTML = `<option value="all">All authors</option>${this.authors().map(author => `<option value="${esc(author)}">${esc(author)}</option>`).join('')}`;
      filter.value = [...filter.options].some(option => option.value === current) ? current : 'all';
    }
    const summary = document.getElementById('review-v2-summary');
    if (summary) {
      const revisions = this.filteredRevisions();
      const comments = this.state.doc.comments || [];
      summary.innerHTML = `<p><strong>${revisions.length}</strong> changes · <strong>${comments.filter(c => c.status !== 'resolved').length}</strong> open comments</p>`;
    }
  }

  filteredRevisions() {
    const author = document.getElementById('review-author-filter')?.value || 'all';
    return this.revisions().filter(rev => author === 'all' || (rev.author || 'User') === author);
  }

  setMarkupMode(mode) {
    this.state.doc.settings ||= {};
    this.state.doc.settings.markupMode = mode;
    document.body.dataset.markupMode = mode;
    this.state.markDirty();
    this.state.notify({ type: 'MARKUP_MODE_CHANGED', mode });
    this.renderBalloons();
  }

  goToChange(direction) {
    const revisions = this.filteredRevisions();
    if (!revisions.length) return;
    this.currentRevisionIndex = (this.currentRevisionIndex + direction + revisions.length) % revisions.length;
    const revision = revisions[this.currentRevisionIndex];
    this.ctrl.focusBlockById?.(revision.blockId, 'start');
    this.highlightBalloon(revision.id);
  }

  acceptRejectCurrent(accept) {
    const revisions = this.filteredRevisions();
    const revision = revisions[this.currentRevisionIndex] || revisions[0];
    if (!revision) return;
    this.ctrl.engine.dispatch(accept ? 'acceptRevision' : 'rejectRevision', { revisionId: revision.id, blockId: revision.blockId });
  }

  acceptRejectAuthor(accept) {
    const author = window.prompt(`${accept ? 'Accept' : 'Reject'} changes by author`, document.getElementById('review-author-filter')?.value || '');
    if (!author) return;
    this.revisions().filter(rev => (rev.author || 'User') === author).forEach(rev => this.ctrl.engine.dispatch(accept ? 'acceptRevision' : 'rejectRevision', { revisionId: rev.id, blockId: rev.blockId }, { restoreSelection: false }));
  }

  selectedComment() {
    const id = document.querySelector('.comment-thread[data-selected="1"]')?.dataset.commentId || document.querySelector('.comment-thread[data-comment-id]')?.dataset.commentId;
    return (this.state.doc.comments || []).find(comment => comment.id === id) || null;
  }

  assignSelectedComment() {
    const comment = this.selectedComment();
    if (!comment) return alert('Open the comments panel and select a comment first.');
    const assignee = window.prompt('Assign to', comment.assignedTo || this.state.currentUserName || '');
    if (!assignee) return;
    comment.assignedTo = assignee;
    comment.updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'COMMENT_ASSIGNED', commentId: comment.id });
  }

  setSelectedCommentDueDate() {
    const comment = this.selectedComment();
    if (!comment) return alert('Open the comments panel and select a comment first.');
    const due = window.prompt('Due date (YYYY-MM-DD)', comment.dueDate || new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10));
    if (!due) return;
    comment.dueDate = due;
    comment.updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'COMMENT_DUE_DATE', commentId: comment.id });
  }

  resolveSelectedCommentWithReason() {
    const comment = this.selectedComment();
    if (!comment) return alert('Open the comments panel and select a comment first.');
    const reason = window.prompt('Resolution note', 'Resolved');
    if (reason === null) return;
    comment.status = 'resolved';
    comment.resolvedReason = reason;
    comment.resolvedAt = new Date().toISOString();
    this.state.markDirty(); this.state.notify({ type: 'COMMENT_RESOLVED_WITH_REASON', commentId: comment.id });
  }

  async compareWithRevision() {
    if (!this.state.doc.id) return;
    const revision = window.prompt('Revision number to compare with');
    if (!revision) return;
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/docs/${encodeURIComponent(this.state.doc.id)}/revisions/${encodeURIComponent(revision)}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Revision not found');
      const oldDoc = await res.json();
      const oldText = (oldDoc.blocks || []).map(b => b.content || '').join('\n');
      const newText = (this.state.doc.blocks || []).map(b => b.content || '').join('\n');
      const added = newText.length - oldText.length;
      document.getElementById('review-v2-summary').innerHTML = `<p>Compared with revision ${esc(revision)}: ${added >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${added} characters changed.</p>`;
    } catch (error) { this.ctrl.toolbar?.showShellToast?.(error.message); }
  }
