  async previewRestore() {
    const revision = window.prompt('Revision number to preview');
    if (!revision || !this.state.doc.id) return;
    const res = await fetch(`/api/docs/${encodeURIComponent(this.state.doc.id)}/revisions/${encodeURIComponent(revision)}`);
    if (!res.ok) return this.ctrl.toolbar?.showShellToast?.('Revision not found');
    const doc = await res.json();
    const preview = (doc.blocks || []).slice(0, 8).map(block => `<p>${esc(String(block.content || block.text || block.type || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ').slice(0, 160))}</p>`).join('');
    document.getElementById('review-v2-summary').innerHTML = `<strong>Revision ${esc(revision)} preview</strong>${preview}`;
  }

  renderBalloons() {
    if (!this.balloonLayer) return;
    const enabled = document.getElementById('chk-review-balloons')?.checked !== false;
    const mode = this.state.doc.settings?.markupMode || 'all';
    if (!enabled || mode === 'none') { this.balloonLayer.innerHTML = ''; return; }
    const balloons = [];
    document.querySelectorAll('.rev-insertion,.rev-deletion,[data-revision-id]').forEach(el => {
      const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (!rect.width && !rect.height) return;
      const id = el.dataset.revId || el.dataset.revisionId || '';
      const type = el.classList.contains('rev-deletion') ? 'Deleted' : 'Inserted';
      balloons.push(`<button class="revision-balloon" data-revision-id="${esc(id)}" style="top:${Math.max(48, rect.top + window.scrollY)}px">${esc(type)}: ${esc((el.textContent || '').slice(0, 38))}</button>`);
    });
    (this.state.doc.comments || []).filter(c => c.status !== 'resolved').slice(0, 40).forEach((comment, i) => {
      const position = this.ctrl.engine.selectionBridge.resolvePosition(comment.anchor?.start || {});
      if (!position?.container) return;
      const range = document.createRange();
      try { range.setStart(position.container, position.offset); range.collapse(true); } catch (_) { return; }
      const rect = range.getBoundingClientRect();
      balloons.push(`<button class="revision-balloon comment-balloon" data-comment-id="${esc(comment.id)}" style="top:${Math.max(48, rect.top + window.scrollY + i * 2)}px">Comment: ${esc(comment.messages?.[0]?.body || '')}</button>`);
    });
    this.balloonLayer.innerHTML = balloons.join('');
  }

  highlightBalloon(revisionId) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.revision-balloon').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.revisionId === revisionId));
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/review/review-manager.js (2026-07-18 03:14:11) =====
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';
import { cloneDocumentValue } from '../schema.js';

export const DEFAULT_STYLES = {
    normal: { id: 'normal', name: 'Normal', type: 'paragraph', fontFamily: 'Segoe UI', fontSize: 12, lineHeight: 1.15, spacingAfter: 0 },
    h1: { id: 'h1', name: 'Heading 1', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 24, bold: true, outlineLevel: 1, keepWithNext: true },
    h2: { id: 'h2', name: 'Heading 2', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 20, bold: true, outlineLevel: 2, keepWithNext: true },
    h3: { id: 'h3', name: 'Heading 3', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 16, bold: true, outlineLevel: 3, keepWithNext: true },
    quote: { id: 'quote', name: 'Quote', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', italic: true, indentLeft: 0.4 }
};

export class ReviewManager {
    constructor(controller) {
        this.ctrl = controller;
        this.state = controller.state;
        this.engine = controller.engine;
        this.commentHighlightName = 'openword-comments';
        this._refreshFrame = null;
    }

    setup() {
        this.ensureResources();
        document.getElementById('btn-add-comment')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.addComment());
        document.getElementById('btn-insert-section-break')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.insertSectionBreak());
        document.getElementById('btn-manage-styles')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.manageStyles());
        document.getElementById('sel-block-style')?.addEventListener('focus', () => this.populateStyleSelect());
        const acceptAll = document.getElementById('rp-btn-accept-all');
        const rejectAll = document.getElementById('rp-btn-reject-all');
        if (acceptAll && !acceptAll.dataset.reviewBound) {
            acceptAll.dataset.reviewBound = '1';
            acceptAll.addEventListener('click', () => this.engine.dispatch('acceptAllRevisions'));
        }
        if (rejectAll && !rejectAll.dataset.reviewBound) {
            rejectAll.dataset.reviewBound = '1';
            rejectAll.addEventListener('click', () => this.engine.dispatch('rejectAllRevisions'));
        }
        this.state.subscribeTo('TRANSACTION_APPLIED', ({ transaction }) => this.mapCommentAnchors(transaction));
        this.state.subscribeTo('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => { this.ensureResources(); this.populateStyleSelect(); this.renderReviewPanel(); });
        this.state.subscribe(() => this.scheduleRefresh());
        this.populateStyleSelect();
    }

    scheduleRefresh() {
        if (this._refreshFrame) return;
        this._refreshFrame = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            this._refreshFrame = null;
            this.paintComments();
            const panel = document.getElementById('review-panel');
            if (panel && !panel.classList.contains('hidden')) this.renderReviewPanel();
        });
    }

    ensureResources() {
        this.state.doc.styles ||= cloneDocumentValue(DEFAULT_STYLES);
        this.state.doc.sections ||= [{ id: createStableId('sec'), startBlockId: this.state.doc.blocks[0]?.id || null, settings: cloneDocumentValue(this.state.doc.settings) }];
        this.state.doc.comments ||= [];
        this.state.doc.settings.editingMode ||= this.state.doc.settings.trackChanges ? 'suggesting' : 'editing';
    }

    populateStyleSelect() {
        this.ensureResources();
        const select = document.getElementById('sel-block-style');
        if (!select) return;
        const value = select.value;
        select.innerHTML = Object.values(this.state.doc.styles).map(style => `<option value="${style.id}">${style.name || style.id}</option>`).join('');
        if ([...select.options].some(option => option.value === value)) select.value = value;
    }

    manageStyles() {
        this.ensureResources();
        const currentId = document.getElementById('sel-block-style')?.value || 'normal';
        const current = this.state.doc.styles[currentId] || this.state.doc.styles.normal;
        const name = window.prompt('Style name', current.name || current.id);
        if (!name) return;
        const size = Number(window.prompt('Font size (pt)', current.fontSize || 12));
        const family = window.prompt('Font family', current.fontFamily || 'Segoe UI') || current.fontFamily;
        this.state.upsertNamedStyle(currentId, { ...current, name, fontSize: Number.isFinite(size) ? size : current.fontSize, fontFamily: family });
        this.populateStyleSelect();
    }

    insertSectionBreak() {
        const afterId = this.engine.captureSelection()?.anchor?.blockId || this.ctrl.activeBlockId;
        const orientation = window.prompt('Section orientation: portrait or landscape', 'portrait');
        this.state.insertSectionBreak(afterId, { orientation: orientation === 'landscape' ? 'landscape' : 'portrait' });
    }

    async addComment() {
        const selection = this.engine.captureSelection();
        if (selection?.type !== 'text') return false;
        const body = window.prompt('Comment');
        if (!body) return false;
        const anchor = { start: cloneDocumentValue(selection.anchor), end: cloneDocumentValue(selection.focus) };
        const saved = await this.requestComment('', 'POST', { anchor, body });
        if (!saved && !navigator.onLine) this.state.addComment({ anchor, body, author: this.state.currentUserName || 'User' });
        this.ctrl.toolbar.openShellPanel('comments');
        return true;
    }

    async requestComment(path, method, payload = {}) {
        const documentId = this.state.doc.id;
        if (!documentId || typeof fetch !== 'function') return false;
        try {
            if (this.state.isDirty && this.state.documentRole !== 'commenter') await this.state.flushSave('before-comment');
            const response = await fetch(`/api/docs/${encodeURIComponent(documentId)}/comments${path}`, {
                method,
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-OpenWord-Session': this.state.collaborationSessionId || ''
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({ ...payload, baseRevision: Number(this.state.doc.revision) || 0 })
            });
            const result = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error(result.error || `Comment update failed (${response.status})`);
            this.state.doc.comments = result.comments || [];
            if (Number.isFinite(Number(result.revision))) this.state.doc.revision = Number(result.revision);
            if (result.updatedAt) this.state.doc.updatedAt = result.updatedAt;
            this.state.isDirty = false;
            this.state.clearRecoveryBackup?.();
            this.state.setSaveStatus('Saved');
            this.state.notify({ type: 'COMMENTS_SYNCED', source: 'server' });
            return true;
        } catch (error) {
            this.ctrl.toolbar?.showShellToast?.(error.message || 'Unable to update comments');
            return false;
        }
    }

    renderComments(body) {
        this.ensureResources();
        const comments = this.state.doc.comments || [];
        body.innerHTML = `<div class="comment-panel-toolbar"><button id="panel-add-comment" class="btn-primary">Add comment</button><button id="panel-show-resolved">Show resolved</button></div><div class="comment-thread-list"></div>`;
        const list = body.querySelector('.comment-thread-list');
        const draw = showResolved => {
            const visible = comments.filter(comment => showResolved || comment.status !== 'resolved');
            list.innerHTML = visible.length ? visible.map(comment => `<article class="comment-thread ${comment.status === 'resolved' ? 'resolved' : ''}" data-comment-id="${comment.id}"><header><strong>${this.escape(comment.author || 'User')}</strong><span>${new Date(comment.createdAt).toLocaleString()}</span></header><p>${this.escape(comment.messages?.[0]?.body || '')}</p>${comment.assignedTo || comment.dueDate ? `<div class="comment-meta-line">${comment.assignedTo ? `Assigned: ${this.escape(comment.assignedTo)}` : ''}${comment.dueDate ? ` · Due: ${this.escape(comment.dueDate)}` : ''}</div>` : ''}${comment.resolvedReason ? `<div class="comment-meta-line">Resolved: ${this.escape(comment.resolvedReason)}</div>` : ''}${(comment.messages || []).slice(1).map(message => `<div class="comment-reply"><strong>${this.escape(message.author || 'User')}</strong> ${this.escape(message.body || '')}</div>`).join('')}<footer><button data-action="reply">Reply</button><button data-action="resolve">${comment.status === 'resolved' ? 'Reopen' : 'Resolve'}</button><button data-action="delete">Delete</button></footer></article>`).join('') : '<div class="shell-empty-state"><h3>No comments yet</h3><p>Select text and choose Add comment.</p></div>';
        };
        draw(false);
        body.querySelector('#panel-add-comment')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.addComment());
        body.querySelector('#panel-show-resolved')?.addEventListener('click', event => { event.currentTarget.dataset.show = event.currentTarget.dataset.show === '1' ? '0' : '1'; draw(event.currentTarget.dataset.show === '1'); });
        body.onclick = async event => {
            const thread = event.target.closest('[data-comment-id]'); const action = event.target.dataset.action; if (!thread) return;
            list.querySelectorAll('[data-comment-id]').forEach(item => { item.dataset.selected = item === thread ? '1' : '0'; });
            if (!action) return;
            const id = thread.dataset.commentId;
            if (action === 'reply') {
                const text = window.prompt('Reply');
                if (text) await this.requestComment(`/${encodeURIComponent(id)}/replies`, 'POST', { body: text });
            }
            if (action === 'resolve') {
                const comment = this.state.doc.comments?.find(item => item.id === id);
                await this.requestComment(`/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`, 'PATCH', { status: comment?.status === 'resolved' ? 'open' : 'resolved' });
            }
            if (action === 'delete') await this.requestComment(`/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`, 'DELETE');
            this.renderComments(body);
        };
    }

    escape(value) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = String(value || ''); return div.innerHTML; }

    mapCommentAnchors(transaction) {
        if (!transaction?.operations?.length || !this.state.doc.comments?.length) return;
        this.state.doc.comments.forEach(comment => {
            const selection = { type: 'text', anchor: comment.anchor.start, focus: comment.anchor.end, direction: 'forward' };
            const mapped = this.engine.positionMapper.mapSelection(selection, transaction.operations);
            if (mapped) comment.anchor = { start: mapped.anchor, end: mapped.focus };
        });
    }

    paintComments() {
        if (!globalThis.CSS?.highlights || typeof Highlight === 'undefined') return;
        const ranges = [];
        (this.state.doc.comments || []).filter(comment => comment.status !== 'resolved').forEach(comment => {
            const start = this.engine.selectionBridge.resolvePosition(comment.anchor.start);
            const end = this.engine.selectionBridge.resolvePosition(comment.anchor.end);
            if (!start || !end) return;
            try { const range = new Range(); range.setStart(start.container, start.offset); range.setEnd(end.container, end.offset); ranges.push(range); } catch (_) { /* stale anchor */ }
        });
        CSS.highlights.set(this.commentHighlightName, new Highlight(...ranges));
    }

    renderReviewPanel() {
        const list = document.getElementById('review-list'); if (!list) return;
        const revisions = this.state.listRunRevisions();
        const canEdit = !this.state.documentRole || ['owner', 'editor'].includes(this.state.documentRole);
        const acceptAll = document.getElementById('rp-btn-accept-all');
        const rejectAll = document.getElementById('rp-btn-reject-all');
        if (acceptAll) acceptAll.disabled = !canEdit || revisions.length === 0;
        if (rejectAll) rejectAll.disabled = !canEdit || revisions.length === 0;
        list.innerHTML = revisions.length ? revisions.map(revision => {
            const label = revision.kind === 'paragraphBreak'
                ? `${revision.type === 'insertion' ? 'Inserted' : 'Deleted'} paragraph break`
                : revision.type === 'insertion' ? 'Inserted' : 'Deleted';
            const preview = revision.text || (revision.kind === 'block' ? 'Document object' : 'Change');
            const when = revision.createdAt || revision.timestamp;
            return `<div class="review-item review-item-${revision.type}" data-revision-id="${this.escape(revision.id)}" data-block-id="${this.escape(revision.blockId)}" tabindex="0"><span class="review-item-type">${this.escape(label)}</span><span class="review-item-text">${this.escape(preview.slice(0, 120))}</span><span class="review-item-meta">${this.escape(revision.author || 'User')}${when ? ` · ${this.escape(new Date(when).toLocaleString())}` : ''}</span><div class="review-item-actions"><button type="button" data-action="accept" title="Accept change" ${canEdit ? '' : 'disabled'}>✓</button><button type="button" data-action="reject" title="Reject change" ${canEdit ? '' : 'disabled'}>×</button></div></div>`;
        }).join('') : '<div class="review-empty">No tracked changes</div>';
        list.querySelectorAll('[data-revision-id]').forEach(item => item.addEventListener('click', event => {
            const actionButton = event.target.closest('[data-action]');
            const action = actionButton?.dataset.action;
            const id = item.dataset.revisionId, blockId = item.dataset.blockId;
            if (!action) {
                this.ctrl.focusBlockById?.(blockId, 'start');
                return;
            }
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            if (!canEdit) return;
            if (action === 'accept') this.engine.dispatch('acceptRevision', { revisionId: id, blockId });
            else if (action === 'reject') this.engine.dispatch('rejectRevision', { revisionId: id, blockId });
        }));
    }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/schema.js (2026-07-10 01:55:27) =====
import { createStableId, ensureDocumentIdentity } from './id.js';
import { normalizeDocumentObjects } from './objects/object-model.js';
import { ensureDocumentStyleResources } from './styles/style-system.js';

export const OPENWORD_SCHEMA_VERSION = 4;

export function createTextBlock(overrides = {}) {
    return {
        id: createStableId('blk'),
        type: 'text',
        style: 'normal',
        content: '',
        ...overrides
    };
}

export function normalizeDocumentSchema(document) {
    if (!document || typeof document !== 'object') {
        return {
            changed: true,
            document: {
                schemaVersion: OPENWORD_SCHEMA_VERSION,
                blocks: [createTextBlock()]
            }
        };
    }

    let changed = false;
    if (document.schemaVersion !== OPENWORD_SCHEMA_VERSION) {
        document.schemaVersion = OPENWORD_SCHEMA_VERSION;
        changed = true;
    }
    if (!Array.isArray(document.blocks)) {
        document.blocks = [createTextBlock()];
        changed = true;
    }
    if (!document.styles || typeof document.styles !== 'object') { document.styles = {}; changed = true; }
    if (!Array.isArray(document.sections)) { document.sections = []; changed = true; }
    if (!Array.isArray(document.comments)) { document.comments = []; changed = true; }
    if (!document.aiPreferences || typeof document.aiPreferences !== 'object') { document.aiPreferences = { tone: 'professional', language: 'en-CA', outputMode: 'suggest', scope: 'selection', citationStyle: 'footnotes', modelClass: 'general', redactSensitive: false, preserveNumbers: true, excludeConfidential: true }; changed = true; }
    if (!document.aiStyleGuide || typeof document.aiStyleGuide !== 'object') { document.aiStyleGuide = { tone: 'professional', locale: 'en-CA', preferredTerms: {}, avoidPhrases: [], citationStyle: 'footnotes' }; changed = true; }
    document.settings ||= {};
    ensureDocumentStyleResources(document);
    if (!document.settings.editingMode) { document.settings.editingMode = document.settings.trackChanges ? 'suggesting' : 'editing'; changed = true; }

    const identity = ensureDocumentIdentity(document);
    changed = changed || identity.changed;
    const objects = normalizeDocumentObjects(document);
    changed = changed || objects.changed;
    return { changed, document: objects.document };
}

export function cloneDocumentValue(value) {
    if (value === undefined) return undefined;
    if (typeof structuredClone === 'function') return structuredClone(value);
    return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value));
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/selection-bridge.js (2026-07-13 01:00:35) =====
import { Formatter } from '../formatter.js';
import {
    createNodeSelection,
    createTableSelection,
    createTextPosition,
    createTextSelection
} from './selection-model.js';

function selectorEscape(value) {
    const text = String(value ?? '');
    if (typeof CSS !== 'undefined' && typeof CSS.escape === 'function') return CSS.escape(text);
    return text.replace(/(["\\])/g, '\\$1');
}

export class SelectionBridge {
    constructor(controller, stateManager) {
        this.controller = controller;
        this.state = stateManager;
        this.current = null;
    }

    get layoutMap() {
        return this.controller?.renderer?.layoutMap || null;
    }

    getBlockElement(node) {
        let element = node;
        if (element?.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) element = element.parentElement;
        if (!element?.closest) return null;
        return element.closest('[data-block-id], [data-index]');
    }

    getBlockId(element) {
        if (!element) return null;
        if (element.dataset?.blockId) return String(element.dataset.blockId);
        const index = Number.parseInt(element.dataset?.index, 10);
        return Number.isInteger(index) ? String(this.state.doc.blocks[index]?.id || '') : null;
    }

    getBlockIndex(element) {
        if (!element) return -1;
        const blockId = this.getBlockId(element);
        if (blockId && typeof this.state.getBlockIndexById === 'function') {
            const index = this.state.getBlockIndexById(blockId);
            if (index >= 0) return index;
        }
        const index = Number.parseInt(element.dataset?.index, 10);
        return Number.isInteger(index) ? index : -1;
    }

    capture() {
        const selection = window.getSelection?.();
        if (!selection || selection.rangeCount === 0 || !selection.anchorNode || !selection.focusNode) return this.current;

        const anchorBlock = this.getBlockElement(selection.anchorNode);
        const focusBlock = this.getBlockElement(selection.focusNode);
        if (!anchorBlock || !focusBlock) return this.current;

        const anchorCell = this.getCell(selection.anchorNode);
        const focusCell = this.getCell(selection.focusNode);
        if (anchorCell && focusCell && this.getBlockId(anchorBlock) === this.getBlockId(focusBlock)) {
            const tableId = this.getBlockId(anchorBlock);
            const model = createTableSelection({
                tableId,
                anchorCellId: anchorCell.dataset.cellId || `${anchorCell.dataset.row}:${anchorCell.dataset.col}`,
                focusCellId: focusCell.dataset.cellId || `${focusCell.dataset.row}:${focusCell.dataset.col}`,
                anchorOffset: Formatter.getTextOffsetFromDomPosition(anchorCell, selection.anchorNode, selection.anchorOffset) || 0,
                focusOffset: Formatter.getTextOffsetFromDomPosition(focusCell, selection.focusNode, selection.focusOffset) || 0
            });
            this.current = model;
            return model;
        }

        const anchorBlockId = this.getBlockId(anchorBlock);
        const focusBlockId = this.getBlockId(focusBlock);
        if (anchorBlockId && anchorBlockId === focusBlockId) {
            const block = this.state.getBlockById?.(anchorBlockId);
            if (block && ['image', 'horizontalRule', 'pageBreak', 'toc'].includes(block.type)) {
                const model = createNodeSelection(block.id);
                this.current = model;
                return model;
            }
        }

        const anchor = this.resolveEndpoint(selection.anchorNode, selection.anchorOffset, anchorBlock);
        const focus = this.resolveEndpoint(selection.focusNode, selection.focusOffset, focusBlock);
        if (!anchor || !focus) {
            const blockId = this.getBlockId(anchorBlock);
            if (blockId) this.current = createNodeSelection(blockId);
            return this.current;
        }

        const direction = this.getDirection(selection);
        this.current = createTextSelection(anchor, focus, direction);
        return this.current;
    }

    getCell(node) {
        let element = node;
        if (element?.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) element = element.parentElement;
        return element?.closest?.('td[data-row][data-col]') || null;
    }

    resolveEndpoint(node, offset, blockElement) {
        const blockId = this.getBlockId(blockElement);
        if (!blockId) return null;
        const parts = this.getTextParts(blockId);
        if (!parts.length) {
            const local = Formatter.getTextOffsetFromDomPosition(blockElement, node, offset);
            return local == null ? null : createTextPosition(blockId, local);
        }

        const host = this.getBlockElement(node);
        let partIndex = parts.indexOf(host);
        if (partIndex < 0) partIndex = parts.findIndex(part => part.contains(node));
        if (partIndex < 0) partIndex = 0;

        const activePart = parts[partIndex];
        const mappedFragment = this.layoutMap?.getFragmentForElement(activePart);
        let base = mappedFragment?.startOffset;
        if (!Number.isFinite(base)) {
            base = 0;
            for (let index = 0; index < partIndex; index += 1) {
                base += Formatter.getTextLengthFromDom(parts[index]);
            }
        }
        const local = Formatter.getTextOffsetFromDomPosition(activePart, node, offset);
        return createTextPosition(blockId, base + Math.max(0, local || 0));
    }

    getDirection(selection) {
        if (selection.isCollapsed) return 'forward';
        try {
            const probe = document.createRange();
            probe.setStart(selection.anchorNode, selection.anchorOffset);
            probe.setEnd(selection.focusNode, selection.focusOffset);
            return probe.collapsed ? 'backward' : 'forward';
        } catch (error) {
            return 'forward';
        }
    }

    getTextParts(blockId) {
        const escaped = selectorEscape(blockId);
        const parts = [...document.querySelectorAll(`[data-block-id="${escaped}"].block-text`)];
        parts.sort((a, b) => Number(a.dataset.splitPart || 0) - Number(b.dataset.splitPart || 0));
        return parts;
    }

    getAnyBlockElements(blockId) {
        const escaped = selectorEscape(blockId);
        return [...document.querySelectorAll(`[data-block-id="${escaped}"]`)];
    }

    restore(model = this.current, options = {}) {
        if (!model) return false;
        this.current = model;

        if (model.type === 'node') {
            const element = this.getAnyBlockElements(model.blockId)[0];
            if (!element) return false;
            element.focus?.({ preventScroll: !!options.preventScroll });
            return true;
        }

        if (model.type === 'table') return this.restoreTableSelection(model, options);
        if (model.type !== 'text') return false;

        const anchor = this.resolveDomPosition(model.anchor);
        const focus = this.resolveDomPosition(model.focus);
        if (!anchor || !focus) return false;

        const selection = window.getSelection?.();
        if (!selection) return false;
        anchor.host?.focus?.({ preventScroll: !!options.preventScroll });
        selection.removeAllRanges();

        if (typeof selection.setBaseAndExtent === 'function') {
            try {
                selection.setBaseAndExtent(anchor.container, anchor.offset, focus.container, focus.offset);
            } catch (error) {
                return this.restoreWithRange(selection, anchor, focus, model.direction);
            }
        } else {
            return this.restoreWithRange(selection, anchor, focus, model.direction);
        }

        if (!options.preventScroll) focus.host?.scrollIntoView?.({ block: 'nearest' });
        return true;
    }

    restoreWithRange(selection, anchor, focus, direction) {
        const range = document.createRange();
        const start = direction === 'backward' ? focus : anchor;
        const end = direction === 'backward' ? anchor : focus;
        try {
            range.setStart(start.container, start.offset);
            range.setEnd(end.container, end.offset);
        } catch (error) {
            return false;
        }
        selection.addRange(range);
        return true;
    }

    // Backwards-compatible public resolver used by collaboration, comments, and
    // integrations created before resolveDomPosition() was introduced. Keep this
    // as the stable API so mixed-version clients cannot crash presence painting.
    resolvePosition(position) {
        return this.resolveDomPosition(position);
    }

    resolveDomPosition(position) {
        if (!position?.blockId) return null;
        const parts = this.getTextParts(position.blockId);
        const candidates = parts.length ? parts : this.getAnyBlockElements(position.blockId);
        if (!candidates.length) return null;

        const absoluteOffset = Math.max(0, Number(position.offset) || 0);
        const mappedFragment = this.layoutMap?.findFragment(position.blockId, absoluteOffset);
        let host = mappedFragment?.element || candidates[candidates.length - 1];
        let remaining = mappedFragment
            ? Math.max(0, absoluteOffset - mappedFragment.startOffset)
            : absoluteOffset;
        if (!mappedFragment) {
            for (const candidate of candidates) {
                const length = Formatter.getTextLengthFromDom(candidate);
                if (remaining <= length) {
                    host = candidate;
                    break;
                }
                remaining -= length;
            }
        }
        const dom = Formatter.resolveDomPositionFromTextOffset(host, remaining);
        if (!dom?.container) return { container: host, offset: 0, host };
        return { ...dom, host };
    }

    restoreTableSelection(model, options = {}) {
        const table = this.getAnyBlockElements(model.tableId).find(el => el.tagName === 'TABLE')
            || this.getAnyBlockElements(model.tableId)[0];
        if (!table) return false;
        const anchorCell = table.querySelector(`[data-cell-id="${selectorEscape(model.anchorCellId)}"]`)
            || this.findLegacyCell(table, model.anchorCellId);
        const focusCell = table.querySelector(`[data-cell-id="${selectorEscape(model.focusCellId)}"]`)
            || this.findLegacyCell(table, model.focusCellId);
        if (!anchorCell || !focusCell) return false;
        const anchor = Formatter.resolveDomPositionFromTextOffset(anchorCell, model.anchorOffset || 0);
        const focus = Formatter.resolveDomPositionFromTextOffset(focusCell, model.focusOffset || 0);
        if (!anchor?.container || !focus?.container) return false;
        const selection = window.getSelection();
        anchorCell.focus({ preventScroll: !!options.preventScroll });
        selection.removeAllRanges();
        if (typeof selection.setBaseAndExtent === 'function') {
            selection.setBaseAndExtent(anchor.container, anchor.offset, focus.container, focus.offset);
        } else {
            const range = document.createRange();
            range.setStart(anchor.container, anchor.offset);
            range.setEnd(focus.container, focus.offset);
            selection.addRange(range);
        }
        return true;
    }

    findLegacyCell(table, id) {
        const match = String(id || '').match(/^(\d+):(\d+)$/);
        if (!match) return null;
        return table.querySelector(`td[data-row="${match[1]}"][data-col="${match[2]}"]`);
    }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/selection-model.js (2026-07-03 02:00:13) =====
import { cloneDocumentValue } from './schema.js';

export function createTextPosition(blockId, offset = 0, affinity = 'forward') {
    return {
        blockId: blockId == null ? null : String(blockId),
        offset: Math.max(0, Number(offset) || 0),
        affinity: affinity === 'backward' ? 'backward' : 'forward'
    };
}

export function createTextSelection(anchor, focus = anchor, direction = 'forward') {
    return {
        type: 'text',
        anchor: createTextPosition(anchor?.blockId, anchor?.offset, anchor?.affinity),
        focus: createTextPosition(focus?.blockId, focus?.offset, focus?.affinity),
        direction: direction === 'backward' ? 'backward' : 'forward'
    };
}

export function createNodeSelection(nodeId, blockId = nodeId) {
    return { type: 'node', nodeId: String(nodeId), blockId: String(blockId) };
}

export function createTableSelection({ tableId, anchorCellId, focusCellId = anchorCellId, anchorOffset = 0, focusOffset = anchorOffset } = {}) {
    return {
        type: 'table',
        tableId: tableId == null ? null : String(tableId),
        anchorCellId: anchorCellId == null ? null : String(anchorCellId),
        focusCellId: focusCellId == null ? null : String(focusCellId),
        anchorOffset: Math.max(0, Number(anchorOffset) || 0),
        focusOffset: Math.max(0, Number(focusOffset) || 0)
    };
}

export function cloneSelection(selection) {
    return cloneDocumentValue(selection);
}

export function isCollapsedSelection(selection) {
    if (!selection) return true;
    if (selection.type === 'text') {
        return selection.anchor?.blockId === selection.focus?.blockId
            && selection.anchor?.offset === selection.focus?.offset;
    }
    if (selection.type === 'table') {
        return selection.anchorCellId === selection.focusCellId
            && selection.anchorOffset === selection.focusOffset;
    }
    return true;
}

export function getSelectionBlockIds(selection) {
    if (!selection) return [];
    if (selection.type === 'text') {
        return [...new Set([selection.anchor?.blockId, selection.focus?.blockId].filter(Boolean))];
    }
    if (selection.type === 'table') return selection.tableId ? [selection.tableId] : [];
    return selection.blockId ? [selection.blockId] : [];
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/shapes/shape-manager.js (2026-07-09 17:28:59) =====
import { createStableId } from '../id.js';

function clone(value) { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value)); }
function esc(value) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = String(value ?? ''); return div.innerHTML; }

export function createShapeObject(overrides = {}) {
  const shape = overrides.shape || {};
  return {
    id: overrides.id || createStableId('obj'),
    type: 'object',
    objectType: 'shape',
    anchor: { blockId: null, offset: 0, moveWithText: true, lockAnchor: false, ...(overrides.anchor || {}) },
    layout: { mode: 'floating', relativeTo: 'paragraph', x: 72, y: 72, width: 160, height: 100, rotation: 0, zIndex: 10, allowOverlap: true, ...(overrides.layout || {}) },
    wrap: { type: 'inFrontOfText', side: 'both', distance: { top: 8, right: 8, bottom: 8, left: 8 }, ...(overrides.wrap || {}) },
    shape: { kind: 'rectangle', fill: '#dbeafe', outline: '#2563eb', outlineWidth: 1, dash: 'solid', opacity: 1, text: '', cornerRadius: 0, arrow: 'none', ...(shape || {}) }
  };
}

export class ShapeManager {
  constructor(controller) { this.ctrl = controller; this.state = controller.state; this.engine = controller.engine; this.panel = null; this.selectionPane = null; }

  setup() {
    this.registerCommands(); this.ensureUi(); this.bindToolbar();
    this.state.subscribeTo('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => this.renderSelectionPane());
    this.state.subscribeTo('TRANSACTION_APPLIED', () => this.renderSelectionPane());
    this.state.subscribeTo('OBJECT_SELECTED', () => this.renderSelectionPane());
  }

  registerCommands() {
    this.engine.registerCommand('insertShapeObject', ({ payload, selection }) => {
      const block = createShapeObject({
        shape: { kind: payload.kind || 'rectangle', text: payload.text || '' },
        layout: { x: payload.x ?? 72, y: payload.y ?? 72, width: payload.width ?? 160, height: payload.height ?? 100 },
        anchor: { blockId: payload.anchorBlockId || selection?.anchor?.blockId || null }
      });
      return this.engine.commands.execute('insertBlock', { engine: this.engine, state: this.state, payload: { block, index: payload.index, source: 'shape' }, selection, document: this.state.doc, controller: this.ctrl, renderer: this.ctrl.renderer });
    });
    this.engine.registerCommand('groupObjects', ({ state, payload, selection }) => {
      const ids = (payload.objectIds || []).filter(id => state.getBlockById(id)?.type === 'object');
      if (ids.length < 2) return null;
      const groupId = createStableId('grp');
      const operations = ids.map(id => {
        const index = state.getBlockIndexById(id); const block = state.doc.blocks[index]; const next = clone(block); next.groupId = groupId;
        return { type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE', blockId: id, index, block: next, prevBlock: clone(block), source: 'groupObjects' };
      });
      return this.engine.createTransaction('groupObjects', operations, selection);
    });
    this.engine.registerCommand('ungroupObjects', ({ state, payload, selection }) => {
      const ids = (payload.objectIds || []).filter(id => state.getBlockById(id)?.groupId);
      const operations = ids.map(id => { const index = state.getBlockIndexById(id); const block = state.doc.blocks[index]; const next = clone(block); delete next.groupId; return { type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE', blockId: id, index, block: next, prevBlock: clone(block), source: 'ungroupObjects' }; });
      return operations.length ? this.engine.createTransaction('ungroupObjects', operations, selection) : null;
    });
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    const insertPanel = document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="insert"]');
    if (insertPanel && !document.getElementById('btn-shapes-panel')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-shapes-panel'; btn.title = 'Shapes'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="shapes"></i><span>Shapes</span>';
      insertPanel.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPanel()); globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
    const viewPanel = document.querySelector('[data-panel="view"] .ribbon-group-buttons') || document.querySelector('[data-panel="view"]');
    if (viewPanel && !document.getElementById('btn-selection-pane')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-selection-pane'; btn.title = 'Selection Pane'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="list"></i><span>Selection</span>';
      viewPanel.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openSelectionPane()); globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (!this.panel) {
      this.panel = document.createElement('aside'); this.panel.id = 'shape-panel'; this.panel.className = 'shape-panel hidden';
      this.panel.innerHTML = `
        <header><strong>Shapes</strong><button data-shape-action="close">×</button></header>
        <div class="shape-gallery">
          ${['rectangle','roundRect','ellipse','line','arrow','callout','star','triangle','diamond','pentagon'].map(kind => `<button data-shape-action="insert:${kind}" class="shape-swatch shape-${kind}">${kind}</button>`).join('')}
        </div>
        <section class="shape-style-controls">
          <label>Fill <input id="shape-fill" type="color" value="#dbeafe"></label>
          <label>Outline <input id="shape-outline" type="color" value="#2563eb"></label>
          <label>Opacity <input id="shape-opacity" type="range" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="1"></label>
          <button data-shape-action="apply-style">Apply to selected</button>
        </section>`;
      document.body.appendChild(this.panel); this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleShapeClick(event));
    }
    if (!this.selectionPane) {
      this.selectionPane = document.createElement('aside'); this.selectionPane.id = 'selection-pane'; this.selectionPane.className = 'selection-pane hidden';
      this.selectionPane.innerHTML = `<header><strong>Selection</strong><button data-select-action="close">×</button></header><div class="selection-actions"><button data-select-action="front">Front</button><button data-select-action="back">Back</button><button data-select-action="group">Group</button><button data-select-action="ungroup">Ungroup</button></div><div id="selection-object-list"></div>`;
      document.body.appendChild(this.selectionPane); this.selectionPane.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleSelectionClick(event));
    }
  }

  openPanel() { this.panel.classList.remove('hidden'); }
  openSelectionPane() { this.renderSelectionPane(); this.selectionPane.classList.remove('hidden'); }

  handleShapeClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-shape-action]')?.dataset.shapeAction;
    if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.panel.classList.add('hidden');
    if (action.startsWith('insert:')) return this.insertShape(action.slice('insert:'.length));
    if (action === 'apply-style') return this.applyShapeStyle();
  }

  insertShape(kind) {
    const text = ['callout','rectangle','roundRect'].includes(kind) ? (prompt('Shape text (optional)', '') || '') : '';
    this.engine.dispatch('insertShapeObject', { kind, text, index: this.ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex() + 1 });
  }

  applyShapeStyle() {
    const selected = this.state._objectManager?.selectedObject; if (!selected) return;
    const patch = { shape: { ...(selected.shape || {}), fill: document.getElementById('shape-fill')?.value || '#dbeafe', outline: document.getElementById('shape-outline')?.value || '#2563eb', opacity: Number(document.getElementById('shape-opacity')?.value || 1) } };
    this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: selected.id, patch, source: 'shapeStyle' }, { restoreSelection: false });
  }

  renderSelectionPane() {
    const list = document.getElementById('selection-object-list'); if (!list) return;
    const objects = (this.state.doc.blocks || []).filter(block => block.type === 'object');
    const selectedId = this.state._objectManager?.selectedObjectId;
    list.innerHTML = objects.length ? objects.map(block => `<article class="selection-object ${block.id === selectedId ? 'active' : ''}" data-object-id="${esc(block.id)}"><button data-select-action="select:${esc(block.id)}">${esc(block.objectType)} ${esc(block.shape?.kind || block.image?.caption || block.textBox?.blocks?.[0]?.content?.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '').slice(0,24) || block.id)}</button><button data-select-action="toggle:${esc(block.id)}">👁</button></article>`).join('') : '<p>No objects in this document.</p>';
  }

  handleSelectionClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-select-action]')?.dataset.selectAction; if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.selectionPane.classList.add('hidden');
    const selected = this.state._objectManager?.selectedObject; const selectedId = selected?.id;
    if (action.startsWith('select:')) { this.state._objectManager?.select(action.slice(7)); return this.renderSelectionPane(); }
    if (!selectedId) return;
    if (action === 'front') return this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: selectedId, patch: { layout: { zIndex: 999 } }, source: 'arrange' }, { restoreSelection: false });
    if (action === 'back') return this.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: selectedId, patch: { layout: { zIndex: 1 } }, source: 'arrange' }, { restoreSelection: false });
    if (action === 'group') return this.engine.dispatch('groupObjects', { objectIds: this.getCheckedObjectIds(selectedId) }, { restoreSelection: false });
    if (action === 'ungroup') return this.engine.dispatch('ungroupObjects', { objectIds: this.getCheckedObjectIds(selectedId) }, { restoreSelection: false });
  }

  getCheckedObjectIds(fallback) { return [fallback]; }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/styles/style-manager.js (2026-07-09 12:12:03) =====
import { Formatter } from '../../formatter.js';
import { ensureDocumentStyleResources, resolveNamedStyle, styleToCss, getStyleDisplayName } from './style-system.js';

const CORE_STYLES = new Set(['normal', 'title', 'subtitle', 'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6', 'quote', 'caption', 'listParagraph']);

function safeHtml(value) { return Formatter.escapeHtml(String(value ?? '')); }
function num(value, fallback = 0) { const n = Number(value); return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : fallback; }

export class StyleManager {
  constructor(controller) {
    this.ctrl = controller;
    this.state = controller.state;
    this.panel = null;
    this.paragraphDialog = null;
  }

  setup() {
    ensureDocumentStyleResources(this.state.doc);
    this.ensureUi();
    this.bindToolbar();
    this.refreshSelectors();
    this.state.subscribeTo('DOCUMENT_LOADED', () => { ensureDocumentStyleResources(this.state.doc); this.refreshSelectors(); this.renderStyles(); });
    this.state.subscribeTo('STYLE_UPDATED', () => { this.refreshSelectors(); this.renderStyles(); });
    this.state.subscribeTo('STYLE_DELETED', () => { this.refreshSelectors(); this.renderStyles(); });
  }

  ensureUi() {
    if (!this.panel) {
      this.panel = document.createElement('aside');
      this.panel.id = 'style-pane';
      this.panel.className = 'style-pane hidden';
      this.panel.innerHTML = `
        <header><strong>Styles</strong><button type="button" data-style-action="close">×</button></header>
        <div class="style-pane-actions">
          <button type="button" data-style-action="new">New style</button>
          <button type="button" data-style-action="update">Update from selection</button>
          <button type="button" data-style-action="inspector">Inspector</button>
        </div>
        <div id="style-inspector" class="style-inspector hidden"></div>
        <div id="style-list" class="style-list"></div>`;
      document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
      this.panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handlePaneClick(event));
    }
    if (!this.paragraphDialog) {
      this.paragraphDialog = document.createElement('div');
      this.paragraphDialog.id = 'paragraph-settings-dialog';
      this.paragraphDialog.className = 'modal hidden';
      this.paragraphDialog.innerHTML = `
        <div class="modal-content paragraph-dialog-content">
          <div class="modal-header">Paragraph Settings <button type="button" data-paragraph-action="close">×</button></div>
          <div class="paragraph-tabs"><button class="active" data-tab="spacing">Indents & Spacing</button><button data-tab="breaks">Line & Page Breaks</button><button data-tab="tabs">Tabs</button></div>
          <div class="paragraph-tab-panel" data-panel="spacing">
            <label>Left indent (in)<input id="para-left-indent" type="number" step="0.05"></label>
            <label>Right indent (in)<input id="para-right-indent" type="number" step="0.05"></label>
            <label>First-line indent (in)<input id="para-first-line" type="number" step="0.05"></label>
            <label>Hanging indent (in)<input id="para-hanging" type="number" step="0.05"></label>
            <label>Spacing before (pt)<input id="para-before" type="number" step="1"></label>
            <label>Spacing after (pt)<input id="para-after" type="number" step="1"></label>
            <label>Line spacing<select id="para-line-height"><option value="1">Single</option><option value="1.15">1.15</option><option value="1.5">1.5</option><option value="2">Double</option><option value="exact">Exactly…</option></select></label>
          </div>
          <div class="paragraph-tab-panel hidden" data-panel="breaks">
            <label><input id="para-keep-next" type="checkbox"> Keep with next</label>
            <label><input id="para-keep-lines" type="checkbox"> Keep lines together</label>
            <label><input id="para-page-before" type="checkbox"> Page break before</label>
            <label><input id="para-widow" type="checkbox"> Widow/orphan control</label>
            <label>Minimum widow lines<input id="para-widow-lines" type="number" min="1" step="1"></label>
            <label>Minimum orphan lines<input id="para-orphan-lines" type="number" min="1" step="1"></label>
          </div>
          <div class="paragraph-tab-panel hidden" data-panel="tabs">
            <p class="dialog-hint">Enter tab stops as inches from the left margin, separated by commas.</p>
            <label>Tab stops<input id="para-tab-stops" type="text" placeholder="0.5, 1.25, 3"></label>
            <label>Leader<select id="para-tab-leader"><option value="none">None</option><option value="dots">Dots</option><option value="dashes">Dashes</option><option value="line">Line</option></select></label>
          </div>
          <footer><button data-paragraph-action="reset">Clear direct paragraph formatting</button><button class="btn-primary" data-paragraph-action="apply">Apply</button></footer>
        </div>`;
      document.body.appendChild(this.paragraphDialog);
      this.paragraphDialog.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleParagraphClick(event));
    }
  }

  bindToolbar() {
    document.getElementById('btn-manage-styles')?.addEventListener('click', () => this.openPane());
    const ribbon = document.querySelector('[data-panel="home"] .ribbon-group-buttons');
    if (ribbon && !document.getElementById('btn-paragraph-dialog')) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'btn-paragraph-dialog'; btn.title = 'Paragraph Settings'; btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="pilcrow"></i>';
      ribbon.appendChild(btn); btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openParagraphDialog());
      globalThis.lucide?.createIcons?.();
    }
    document.addEventListener('keydown', event => {
      if ((event.ctrlKey || event.metaKey) && event.altKey && event.shiftKey && event.key.toLowerCase() === 's') { event.preventDefault(); this.openPane(); }
    });
  }

  refreshSelectors() {
    ensureDocumentStyleResources(this.state.doc);
    const styles = Object.values(this.state.doc.styles || {});
    const options = styles.map(style => `<option value="${safeHtml(style.id)}">${safeHtml(style.name || style.id)}</option>`).join('');
    ['sel-block-style', 'flt-sel-style'].forEach(id => {
      const select = document.getElementById(id); if (!select) return;
      const current = select.value || 'normal'; select.innerHTML = options; if ([...select.options].some(o => o.value === current)) select.value = current;
    });
  }

  openPane() { this.renderStyles(); this.panel?.classList.remove('hidden'); }
  closePane() { this.panel?.classList.add('hidden'); }

  renderStyles() {
    ensureDocumentStyleResources(this.state.doc);
    const list = document.getElementById('style-list'); if (!list) return;
    const styles = Object.values(this.state.doc.styles || {}).sort((a,b) => (a.outlineLevel ?? 99) - (b.outlineLevel ?? 99) || String(a.name).localeCompare(String(b.name)));
    list.innerHTML = styles.map(style => {
      const preview = styleToCss(resolveNamedStyle(this.state.doc, style.id));
      const css = Object.entries(preview).map(([k,v]) => `${k.replace(/[A-Z]/g,m=>'-'+m.toLowerCase())}:${v}`).join(';');
      return `<article class="style-card" data-style-id="${safeHtml(style.id)}">
        <button type="button" class="style-preview" style="${safeHtml(css)}">${safeHtml(style.name || style.id)}</button>
        <div class="style-card-actions"><button data-style-action="select-style">Select all</button><button data-style-action="edit-style">Edit</button>${CORE_STYLES.has(style.id) ? '' : '<button data-style-action="delete-style">Delete</button>'}</div>
      </article>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  handlePaneClick(event) {
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-style-action]')?.dataset.styleAction;
    const card = event.target.closest('[data-style-id]');
    const styleId = card?.dataset.styleId;
    if (!action && event.target.closest('.style-preview') && styleId) return this.applyStyle(styleId);
    if (action === 'close') return this.closePane();
    if (action === 'new') return this.createStyleFromSelection();
    if (action === 'update') return this.updateStyleFromSelection();
    if (action === 'inspector') return this.showInspector();
    if (action === 'select-style' && styleId) return this.selectAllWithStyle(styleId);
    if (action === 'edit-style' && styleId) return this.editStyle(styleId);
    if (action === 'delete-style' && styleId) return this.state.deleteNamedStyle(styleId);
  }

  applyStyle(styleId) {
    const blockId = this.ctrl.activeBlockId || this.ctrl.getActiveBlockContextFromSelection()?.blockId;
    if (blockId) this.ctrl.engine.dispatch('setBlockStyle', { blockId, style: styleId });
  }

  getActiveTextBlock() {
    const blockId = this.ctrl.activeBlockId || this.ctrl.getActiveBlockContextFromSelection()?.blockId;
    const block = blockId ? this.state.getBlockById(blockId) : null;
    return block?.type === 'text' ? block : null;
  }

  createStyleFromSelection() {
    const name = prompt('New style name', 'Custom Style'); if (!name) return;
    const id = name.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '') || `style-${Date.now()}`;
    const block = this.getActiveTextBlock();
    this.state.upsertNamedStyle(id, { id, name, type: 'paragraph', basedOn: block?.style || 'normal', ...this.extractParagraphProperties(block) });
    this.applyStyle(id);
  }

  updateStyleFromSelection() {
    const block = this.getActiveTextBlock(); if (!block) return;
    const styleId = block.style || 'normal';
    this.state.upsertNamedStyle(styleId, { ...this.state.doc.styles?.[styleId], ...this.extractParagraphProperties(block) });
  }

  editStyle(styleId) {
    const current = resolveNamedStyle(this.state.doc, styleId);
    const name = prompt('Style name', current.name || styleId); if (!name) return;
    const fontSize = prompt('Font size (pt)', current.fontSize || 11);
    const spacingAfter = prompt('Spacing after (pt)', current.spacingAfter ?? 8);
    this.state.upsertNamedStyle(styleId, { ...this.state.doc.styles[styleId], name, fontSize: num(fontSize, current.fontSize || 11), spacingAfter: num(spacingAfter, current.spacingAfter || 0) });
  }

  extractParagraphProperties(block) {
    const el = block?.id ? document.querySelector(`[data-block-id="${CSS.escape(block.id)}"]`) : null;
    const cs = el ? getComputedStyle(el) : null;
    return {
      align: block?.align || cs?.textAlign,
      lineHeight: block?.lineHeight || (cs?.lineHeight && parseFloat(cs.lineHeight) ? Number((parseFloat(cs.lineHeight) / parseFloat(cs.fontSize || 16)).toFixed(2)) : undefined),
      leftIndent: block?.leftIndent ?? (block?.indent ? Number(block.indent) * 0.2 : undefined),
      firstLineIndent: block?.firstLineIndent,
      hangingIndent: block?.hangingIndent,
      spacingBefore: block?.marginTop,
      spacingAfter: block?.marginBottom,
      keepWithNext: block?.keepWithNext,
      keepLinesTogether: block?.keepLinesTogether
    };
  }

  selectAllWithStyle(styleId) {
    const elements = [...document.querySelectorAll(`[data-block-id].style-${CSS.escape(styleId)}`)];
    if (!elements.length) return;
    const range = document.createRange(); range.setStartBefore(elements[0]); range.setEndAfter(elements[elements.length - 1]);
    const sel = getSelection(); sel.removeAllRanges(); sel.addRange(range);
  }

  showInspector() {
    const box = document.getElementById('style-inspector'); if (!box) return;
    const block = this.getActiveTextBlock();
    if (!block) { box.textContent = 'No paragraph selected.'; box.classList.remove('hidden'); return; }
    const style = resolveNamedStyle(this.state.doc, block.style || 'normal');
    box.innerHTML = `<strong>${safeHtml(getStyleDisplayName(this.state.doc, block.style))}</strong><pre>${safeHtml(JSON.stringify({ style, direct: this.extractParagraphProperties(block) }, null, 2))}</pre>`;
    box.classList.toggle('hidden');
  }

  openParagraphDialog() {
    const block = this.getActiveTextBlock();
    const style = resolveNamedStyle(this.state.doc, block?.style || 'normal');
    const set = (id, value) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.type === 'checkbox' ? el.checked = !!value : el.value = value ?? ''; };
    set('para-left-indent', block?.leftIndent ?? style.leftIndent ?? '');
    set('para-right-indent', block?.rightIndent ?? style.rightIndent ?? '');
    set('para-first-line', block?.firstLineIndent ?? style.firstLineIndent ?? '');
    set('para-hanging', block?.hangingIndent ?? style.hangingIndent ?? '');
    set('para-before', block?.marginTop ?? style.spacingBefore ?? 0);
    set('para-after', block?.marginBottom ?? style.spacingAfter ?? 8);
    set('para-line-height', block?.lineHeight ?? style.lineHeight ?? 1.15);
    set('para-keep-next', block?.keepWithNext ?? style.keepWithNext);
    set('para-keep-lines', block?.keepLinesTogether ?? style.keepLinesTogether);
    set('para-page-before', block?.pageBreakBefore ?? style.pageBreakBefore);
    set('para-widow', block?.widowControl ?? true);
    set('para-widow-lines', block?.widowLines ?? style.widowLines ?? 2);
    set('para-orphan-lines', block?.orphanLines ?? style.orphanLines ?? 2);
    set('para-tab-stops', (block?.tabStops || []).map(t => t.position ?? t).join(', '));
    set('para-tab-leader', block?.tabLeader || 'none');
    this.paragraphDialog.classList.remove('hidden');
  }

  handleParagraphClick(event) {
    const tab = event.target.closest('[data-tab]');
    if (tab) {
      this.paragraphDialog.querySelectorAll('.paragraph-tabs button').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b === tab));
      this.paragraphDialog.querySelectorAll('.paragraph-tab-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.toggle('hidden', p.dataset.panel !== tab.dataset.tab));
      return;
    }
    const action = event.target.closest('[data-paragraph-action]')?.dataset.paragraphAction;
    if (!action) return;
    if (action === 'close') return this.paragraphDialog.classList.add('hidden');
    if (action === 'reset') return this.clearDirectParagraphFormatting();
    if (action === 'apply') return this.applyParagraphDialog();
  }

  applyParagraphDialog() {
    const block = this.getActiveTextBlock(); if (!block) return;
    const value = id => document.getElementById(id)?.value;
    const checked = id => !!document.getElementById(id)?.checked;
    const tabStops = String(value('para-tab-stops') || '').split(',').map(v => Number(v.trim())).filter(Number.isFinite).map(position => ({ position, align: 'left', leader: value('para-tab-leader') || 'none' }));
    const props = {
      leftIndent: value('para-left-indent') === '' ? undefined : num(value('para-left-indent')),
      rightIndent: value('para-right-indent') === '' ? undefined : num(value('para-right-indent')),
      firstLineIndent: value('para-first-line') === '' ? undefined : num(value('para-first-line')),
      hangingIndent: value('para-hanging') === '' ? undefined : num(value('para-hanging')),
      marginTop: num(value('para-before')),
      marginBottom: num(value('para-after')),
      lineHeight: value('para-line-height') || '1.15',
      keepWithNext: checked('para-keep-next'),
      keepLinesTogether: checked('para-keep-lines'),
      pageBreakBefore: checked('para-page-before'),
      widowControl: checked('para-widow'),
      widowLines: num(value('para-widow-lines'), 2),
      orphanLines: num(value('para-orphan-lines'), 2),
      tabStops,
      tabLeader: value('para-tab-leader') || 'none'
    };
    this.ctrl.engine.dispatch('updateBlockProps', { blockId: block.id, props });
    this.paragraphDialog.classList.add('hidden');
  }

  clearDirectParagraphFormatting() {
    const block = this.getActiveTextBlock(); if (!block) return;
    const next = { ...block };
    ['align','lineHeight','indent','leftIndent','rightIndent','firstLineIndent','hangingIndent','marginTop','marginBottom','keepWithNext','keepLinesTogether','pageBreakBefore','widowControl','widowLines','orphanLines','tabStops','tabLeader'].forEach(key => delete next[key]);
    this.state.replaceBlockById(block.id, next, 'clearParagraphFormatting');
    this.paragraphDialog.classList.add('hidden');
  }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/styles/style-system.js (2026-07-09 12:12:12) =====
export const DEFAULT_NAMED_STYLES = Object.freeze({
  normal: { id: 'normal', name: 'Normal', type: 'paragraph', fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 11, lineHeight: 1.15, spacingAfter: 8 },
  title: { id: 'title', name: 'Title', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 26, bold: true, spacingAfter: 12, outlineLevel: 0 },
  subtitle: { id: 'subtitle', name: 'Subtitle', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 15, color: '#5f6368', spacingAfter: 10 },
  h1: { id: 'h1', name: 'Heading 1', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 20, bold: true, spacingBefore: 12, spacingAfter: 6, keepWithNext: true, outlineLevel: 1 },
  h2: { id: 'h2', name: 'Heading 2', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 16, bold: true, spacingBefore: 10, spacingAfter: 4, keepWithNext: true, outlineLevel: 2 },
  h3: { id: 'h3', name: 'Heading 3', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 14, bold: true, spacingBefore: 8, spacingAfter: 4, keepWithNext: true, outlineLevel: 3 },
  h4: { id: 'h4', name: 'Heading 4', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 12, bold: true, italic: true, spacingBefore: 6, spacingAfter: 3, keepWithNext: true, outlineLevel: 4 },
  h5: { id: 'h5', name: 'Heading 5', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 11, bold: true, color: '#374151', spacingBefore: 6, spacingAfter: 2, keepWithNext: true, outlineLevel: 5 },
  h6: { id: 'h6', name: 'Heading 6', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 11, italic: true, color: '#4b5563', spacingBefore: 6, spacingAfter: 2, keepWithNext: true, outlineLevel: 6 },
  quote: { id: 'quote', name: 'Quote', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', italic: true, color: '#374151', leftIndent: 0.35, spacingBefore: 6, spacingAfter: 6, borderLeft: '#d1d5db' },
  caption: { id: 'caption', name: 'Caption', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', fontSize: 9, italic: true, color: '#5f6368', spacingBefore: 4, spacingAfter: 8 },
  listParagraph: { id: 'listParagraph', name: 'List Paragraph', type: 'paragraph', basedOn: 'normal', leftIndent: 0.25, hangingIndent: 0.25 }
});

export const DEFAULT_THEME = Object.freeze({
  fonts: { body: 'Arial', heading: 'Arial' },
  colors: {
    text: '#202124', accent1: '#2b579a', accent2: '#16a34a', accent3: '#dc2626',
    subtle: '#6b7280', background: '#ffffff'
  }
});

function clone(value) { return value === undefined ? undefined : JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value)); }

export function ensureDocumentStyleResources(doc) {
  if (!doc || typeof doc !== 'object') return doc;
  doc.styles ||= {};
  for (const [id, style] of Object.entries(DEFAULT_NAMED_STYLES)) {
    doc.styles[id] = { ...clone(style), ...(doc.styles[id] || {}), id };
  }
  doc.theme ||= clone(DEFAULT_THEME);
  doc.listStyles ||= {
    bullet: { id: 'bullet', name: 'Bullet', type: 'ul', marker: 'disc' },
    decimal: { id: 'decimal', name: 'Numbered', type: 'ol', format: 'decimal' },
    legal: { id: 'legal', name: 'Legal 1.1.1', type: 'ol', format: 'legal' },
    checklist: { id: 'checklist', name: 'Checklist', type: 'checklist' }
  };
  doc.fields ||= [];
  doc.captions ||= [];
  doc.autocorrect ||= {
    enabled: true,
    smartQuotes: true,
    replacements: {
      teh: 'the', adn: 'and', recieve: 'receive', seperate: 'separate', accomodate: 'accommodate'
    }
  };
  return doc;
}

export function resolveNamedStyle(doc, styleId, seen = new Set()) {
  const styles = doc?.styles || DEFAULT_NAMED_STYLES;
  const id = styleId && styles[styleId] ? styleId : 'normal';
  if (seen.has(id)) return { ...(styles[id] || DEFAULT_NAMED_STYLES.normal), id };
  seen.add(id);
  const style = { ...(styles[id] || DEFAULT_NAMED_STYLES[id] || DEFAULT_NAMED_STYLES.normal), id };
  if (style.basedOn && styles[style.basedOn]) return { ...resolveNamedStyle(doc, style.basedOn, seen), ...style };
  return style;
}

export function styleToCss(style = {}) {
  const css = {};
  if (style.fontFamily) css.fontFamily = style.fontFamily;
  if (style.fontSize) css.fontSize = `${Number(style.fontSize)}pt`;
  if (style.lineHeight) css.lineHeight = String(style.lineHeight);
  if (style.bold !== undefined) css.fontWeight = style.bold ? '700' : '400';
  if (style.italic !== undefined) css.fontStyle = style.italic ? 'italic' : 'normal';
  if (style.color) css.color = style.color;
  if (style.highlight) css.backgroundColor = style.highlight;
  if (style.align) css.textAlign = style.align;
  if (style.leftIndent !== undefined) css.paddingLeft = `${Number(style.leftIndent) || 0}in`;
  if (style.rightIndent !== undefined) css.paddingRight = `${Number(style.rightIndent) || 0}in`;
  if (style.firstLineIndent !== undefined) css.textIndent = `${Number(style.firstLineIndent) || 0}in`;
  if (style.hangingIndent !== undefined) {
    css.paddingLeft = `${Number(style.hangingIndent) || 0}in`;
    css.textIndent = `${-(Number(style.hangingIndent) || 0)}in`;
  }
  if (style.spacingBefore !== undefined) css.marginTop = `${Number(style.spacingBefore) || 0}pt`;
  if (style.spacingAfter !== undefined) css.marginBottom = `${Number(style.spacingAfter) || 0}pt`;
  if (style.borderLeft) {
    css.borderLeft = `3px solid ${style.borderLeft}`;
    css.paddingLeft = css.paddingLeft || '0.18in';
  }
  return css;
}

export function applyCssObject(element, css = {}) {
  if (!element) return;
  Object.entries(css).forEach(([prop, value]) => { if (value !== undefined && value !== null) element.style[prop] = value; });
}

export function getStyleDisplayName(doc, styleId) {
  return resolveNamedStyle(doc, styleId).name || styleId || 'Normal';
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/public/editor/table/table-manager.js (2026-07-18 03:14:14) =====
import { createTableSelection } from '../selection-model.js';

function esc(value) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = String(value ?? '');
    return div.innerHTML;
}

const TABLE_PRESETS = {
    plain: { name: 'Plain Table', borderColor: '#d1d5db', headerBackground: '#f9fafb', bandedRows: false },
    grid: { name: 'Grid Table', borderColor: '#64748b', headerBackground: '#e2e8f0', bandedRows: false },
    light: { name: 'Light Shading', borderColor: '#bfdbfe', headerBackground: '#dbeafe', bandedRows: true, bandColor: '#f8fbff' },
    medium: { name: 'Medium Shading', borderColor: '#2563eb', headerBackground: '#bfdbfe', bandedRows: true, bandColor: '#eff6ff' },
    report: { name: 'Professional Report', borderColor: '#334155', headerBackground: '#e5e7eb', bandedRows: true, bandColor: '#f9fafb' },
    financial: { name: 'Financial Table', borderColor: '#14532d', headerBackground: '#dcfce7', bandedRows: true, bandColor: '#f0fdf4', numericAlign: 'right' }
};

export class TableManager {
    constructor(controller) {
        this.ctrl = controller;
        this.state = controller.state;
        this.engine = controller.engine;
        this.dragging = false;
        this.ribbon = null;
        this.designPanel = null;
        this._refreshFrame = null;
        this._needsPaint = false;
    }

    setup() {
        this.ensureRibbon();
        this.ensureDesignPanel();
        document.addEventListener('mousedown', e => this.down(e));
        document.addEventListener('mouseover', e => this.over(e));
        document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => { this.dragging = false; });
        document.addEventListener('keydown', e => this.key(e), true);
        this.bind('ctx-btn-merge-cells', () => this.merge());
        this.bind('ctx-btn-split-cell', () => this.split());
        this.bind('ctx-btn-header-row', () => this.header());
        this.state.subscribe(() => this.scheduleRefresh(true));
        this.state.subscribeTo('SELECTION_CHANGED', () => this.scheduleRefresh(false));
    }

    scheduleRefresh(needsPaint = false) {
        this._needsPaint ||= needsPaint;
        if (this._refreshFrame) return;
        this._refreshFrame = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            this._refreshFrame = null;
            if (this._needsPaint) this.paint();
            this._needsPaint = false;
            this.updateRibbon();
        });
    }

    bind(id, fn) { document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click', fn); }

    ensureRibbon() {
        if (document.getElementById('table-context-ribbon')) { this.ribbon = document.getElementById('table-context-ribbon'); return; }
        const ribbon = document.createElement('div');
        ribbon.id = 'table-context-ribbon';
        ribbon.className = 'table-context-ribbon hidden';
        ribbon.innerHTML = `
            <button data-action="row-above">Row above</button><button data-action="row-below">Row below</button><button data-action="delete-row">Delete row</button>
            <button data-action="col-left">Col left</button><button data-action="col-right">Col right</button><button data-action="delete-col">Delete col</button>
            <button data-action="merge">Merge</button><button data-action="split">Split</button><button data-action="header">Header</button>
            <button data-action="shade">Shade</button><button data-action="borders">Borders</button><button data-action="design">Design</button>`;
        ribbon.addEventListener('click', event => this.runRibbonAction(event.target.closest('button')?.dataset.action));
        document.body.appendChild(ribbon);
        this.ribbon = ribbon;
    }

    ensureDesignPanel() {
        if (document.getElementById('table-design-panel')) { this.designPanel = document.getElementById('table-design-panel'); return; }
        const panel = document.createElement('aside');
        panel.id = 'table-design-panel';
        panel.className = 'table-design-panel hidden';
        panel.innerHTML = `
            <header><strong>Table Design</strong><button data-table-v3="close">×</button></header>
            <section class="table-v3-section">
                <h4>Table styles</h4>
                <div class="table-style-gallery">${Object.entries(TABLE_PRESETS).map(([id, preset]) => `<button data-table-v3="preset:${id}" class="table-style-swatch table-style-${id}">${esc(preset.name)}</button>`).join('')}</div>
            </section>
            <section class="table-v3-section table-option-grid">
                <label><input data-table-option="headerRows" type="checkbox"> Header row</label>
                <label><input data-table-option="totalRow" type="checkbox"> Total row</label>
                <label><input data-table-option="bandedRows" type="checkbox"> Banded rows</label>
                <label><input data-table-option="bandedColumns" type="checkbox"> Banded columns</label>
                <label><input data-table-option="firstColumn" type="checkbox"> First column</label>
                <label><input data-table-option="lastColumn" type="checkbox"> Last column</label>
                <label><input data-table-option="repeatHeaderRows" type="checkbox"> Repeat header</label>
                <label><input data-table-option="allowRowSplit" type="checkbox"> Allow row split</label>
            </section>
            <section class="table-v3-section table-v3-buttons">
                <button data-table-v3="autofit-contents">AutoFit contents</button>
                <button data-table-v3="autofit-window">AutoFit window</button>
                <button data-table-v3="fixed-width">Fixed width</button>
                <button data-table-v3="split-table">Split table</button>
                <button data-table-v3="text-to-table">Text → table</button>
                <button data-table-v3="table-to-text">Table → text</button>
                <button data-table-v3="sort-asc">Sort A→Z</button>
                <button data-table-v3="sort-desc">Sort Z→A</button>
                <button data-table-v3="formula-sum">Formula SUM</button>
                <button data-table-v3="caption">Caption</button>
            </section>
            <section class="table-v3-section table-cell-grid">
                <label>Cell padding <input id="table-cell-padding" type="number" min="0" step="1" value="6"></label>
                <label>Vertical <select id="table-cell-valign"><option value="top">Top</option><option value="middle">Middle</option><option value="bottom">Bottom</option></select></label>
                <label>Align <select id="table-cell-align"><option value="left">Left</option><option value="center">Center</option><option value="right">Right</option></select></label>
                <label>Background <input id="table-cell-bg" type="color" value="#ffffff"></label>
                <button data-table-v3="apply-cell-style">Apply cell style</button>
            </section>`;
        panel.addEventListener('click', event => this.handleDesignClick(event));
        panel.addEventListener('change', event => this.handleDesignChange(event));
        document.body.appendChild(panel);
        this.designPanel = panel;
    }

    cell(target) { return target?.closest?.('td[data-cell-id],th[data-cell-id]') || null; }
    table(cell) { return cell?.closest?.('table[data-block-id]') || null; }

    down(event) {
        const cell = this.cell(event.target), table = this.table(cell); if (!cell || !table) return;
        const old = this.engine.captureSelection();
        const anchor = event.shiftKey && old?.type === 'table' && old.tableId === table.dataset.blockId ? old.anchorCellId : cell.dataset.cellId;
        this.engine.setSelection(createTableSelection({ tableId: table.dataset.blockId, anchorCellId: anchor, focusCellId: cell.dataset.cellId }));
        this.dragging = true; this.paint(); this.updateRibbon();
    }

    over(event) {
        if (!this.dragging || !(event.buttons & 1)) return;
        const cell = this.cell(event.target), table = this.table(cell), old = this.engine.selection;
        if (!cell || !table || old?.type !== 'table' || old.tableId !== table.dataset.blockId) return;
        this.engine.setSelection({ ...old, focusCellId: cell.dataset.cellId }); this.paint(); this.updateRibbon();
    }

    cells(tableId) { return [...document.querySelectorAll(`table[data-block-id="${CSS.escape(tableId)}"] [data-cell-id]`)]; }

    current() {
        const selection = this.engine.selection?.type === 'table' ? this.engine.selection : null;
        const table = this.state.getBlockById(selection?.tableId);
        const anchor = this.state.getTableCellPosition(table, selection?.anchorCellId);
        const focus = this.state.getTableCellPosition(table, selection?.focusCellId);
        return { selection, table, anchor, focus };
    }

    key(event) {
        const cell = this.cell(event.target), table = this.table(cell); if (!cell || !table) return;
        const cells = this.cells(table.dataset.blockId), index = cells.indexOf(cell); if (index < 0) return;
        const cols = table.rows[0]?.cells.length || 1;
        let next = null;
        if (event.key === 'Tab') next = index + (event.shiftKey ? -1 : 1);
        else if (event.altKey && event.key === 'ArrowUp') { event.preventDefault(); this.insertRow(false); return; }
        else if (event.altKey && event.key === 'ArrowDown') { event.preventDefault(); this.insertRow(true); return; }
        else if (event.altKey && event.key === 'ArrowLeft') { event.preventDefault(); this.insertCol(false); return; }
        else if (event.altKey && event.key === 'ArrowRight') { event.preventDefault(); this.insertCol(true); return; }
        else if (event.key === 'ArrowDown' && this.isCaretAtBoundary(cell, 'end')) next = index + cols;
        else if (event.key === 'ArrowUp' && this.isCaretAtBoundary(cell, 'start')) next = index - cols;
        else if (event.key === 'ArrowRight' && this.isCaretAtBoundary(cell, 'end')) next = index + 1;
        else if (event.key === 'ArrowLeft' && this.isCaretAtBoundary(cell, 'start')) next = index - 1;
        else if ((event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey) && event.key === 'Backspace') { event.preventDefault(); this.deleteRow(); return; }
        if (next == null) return;
        event.preventDefault();
        if (next >= cells.length && event.key === 'Tab') {
            const model = this.state.getBlockById(table.dataset.blockId);
            this.state.insertTableRow(model.id, model.rowIds?.[model.rowIds.length - 1]);
            requestAnimationFrame(() => this.focus(this.cells(model.id)[index + 1]));
        } else this.focus(cells[Math.max(0, Math.min(cells.length - 1, next))]);
    }

    isCaretAtBoundary(cell, side) {
        const sel = window.getSelection();
        if (!sel?.rangeCount || !cell.contains(sel.anchorNode)) return true;
        const text = cell.textContent || '';
        if (!text) return true;
        const range = sel.getRangeAt(0).cloneRange();
        const pre = document.createRange(); pre.selectNodeContents(cell); pre.setEnd(range.startContainer, range.startOffset);
        const offset = pre.toString().length;
        return side === 'start' ? offset === 0 : offset >= text.length;
    }

    focus(cell) {
        if (!cell) return; cell.focus(); const range = document.createRange(); range.selectNodeContents(cell); range.collapse(true); const sel = window.getSelection(); sel.removeAllRanges(); sel.addRange(range);
        const table = this.table(cell); this.engine.setSelection(createTableSelection({ tableId: table.dataset.blockId, anchorCellId: cell.dataset.cellId })); this.paint(); this.updateRibbon();
    }

    ids(selection = this.engine.selection) {
        const table = this.state.getBlockById(selection?.tableId), a = this.state.getTableCellPosition(table, selection?.anchorCellId), f = this.state.getTableCellPosition(table, selection?.focusCellId); if (!table || !a || !f) return [];
        const out = []; for (let r = Math.min(a.row, f.row); r <= Math.max(a.row, f.row); r += 1) for (let c = Math.min(a.col, f.col); c <= Math.max(a.col, f.col); c += 1) out.push(table.cellIds[r][c]); return out;
    }

    paint() { document.querySelectorAll('.table-cell-selected').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('table-cell-selected')); this.ids().forEach(id => document.querySelector(`[data-cell-id="${CSS.escape(id)}"]`)?.classList.add('table-cell-selected')); }

    updateRibbon() {
        if (!this.ribbon) return;
        const active = this.engine.selection?.type === 'table';
        this.ribbon.classList.toggle('hidden', !active);
        if (!active) this.designPanel?.classList.add('hidden');
        else this.syncDesignPanel();
    }

    runRibbonAction(action) {
        if (!action) return;
        if (action === 'row-above') this.insertRow(false);
        if (action === 'row-below') this.insertRow(true);
        if (action === 'delete-row') this.deleteRow();
        if (action === 'col-left') this.insertCol(false);
        if (action === 'col-right') this.insertCol(true);
        if (action === 'delete-col') this.deleteCol();
        if (action === 'merge') this.merge();
        if (action === 'split') this.split();
        if (action === 'header') this.header();
        if (action === 'shade') this.setCellStyle({ background: '#eaf2f8' });
        if (action === 'borders') this.setCellStyle({ borderColor: '#2b579a', borderWidth: 1 });
        if (action === 'design') this.openDesignPanel();
    }

    handleDesignClick(event) {
        const action = event.target.closest('[data-table-v3]')?.dataset.tableV3;
        if (!action) return;
        if (action === 'close') return this.designPanel?.classList.add('hidden');
        if (action.startsWith('preset:')) return this.applyPreset(action.slice('preset:'.length));
        if (action === 'autofit-contents') return this.autofit('contents');
        if (action === 'autofit-window') return this.autofit('window');
        if (action === 'fixed-width') return this.autofit('fixed');
        if (action === 'split-table') return this.splitTable();
        if (action === 'text-to-table') return this.convertTextToTable();
        if (action === 'table-to-text') return this.convertTableToText();
        if (action === 'sort-asc') return this.sortTable('asc');
        if (action === 'sort-desc') return this.sortTable('desc');
        if (action === 'formula-sum') return this.insertFormula('SUM');
        if (action === 'caption') return this.addCaption();
