            ctrl.engine.dispatch('toggleUnderline');
        }, { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-strikethrough', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('toggleStrikethrough');
        }, { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-superscript', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('toggleSuperscript');
        }, { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-subscript', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('toggleSubscript');
        }, { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-link', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('createLink');
        }, { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-code', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('toggleInlineCode');
        }, { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-clear-fmt', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('clearFormatting');
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-format-painter', () => {
            if (this.formatPainterActive) {
                this.paintFormat();
            } else {
                this.toggleFormatPainter();
            }
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-save', async () => {
            const saveBtn = document.getElementById('btn-save');
            if (saveBtn) {
                saveBtn.disabled = true;
                saveBtn.innerHTML = '<span class="save-spinner"></span>';
            }
            try {
                await this.state.flushSave?.() || await this.state.save();
                this.showShellToast('All changes saved');
            } catch (err) {
                this.showShellToast('Save failed: ' + (err.message || 'Unknown error'));
            } finally {
                if (saveBtn) {
                    saveBtn.disabled = false;
                    saveBtn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="save"></i>';
                    if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
                }
            }
        });
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-undo', () => this.state.history.undo());
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-redo', () => this.state.history.redo());
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-page-setup', () => document.getElementById('modal-page').classList.remove('hidden'));
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-view-page', () => this.renderer.setMode(true));
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-view-web', () => this.renderer.setMode(false));

        ['left', 'center', 'right', 'justify'].forEach((a) => {
            this.bindToolbarButton(`btn-align-${a}`, () => {
                if (ctrl.activeBlockIndex !== null) {
                    const b = this.state.doc.blocks[ctrl.activeBlockIndex];
                    if (b.type === 'image') ctrl.engine.dispatch('updateImageProps', { blockId: b.id, props: { align: a } });
                    else if (b.type === 'object') {
                        const side = a === 'left' ? 'right' : a === 'right' ? 'left' : 'both';
                        ctrl.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: b.id, patch: { wrap: { side }, legacy: { align: a } }, source: 'objectAlign' }, { restoreSelection: false });
                    } else ctrl.engine.dispatch('updateBlockProps', { blockId: b.id, props: { align: a } });
                }
            });
        });

        const fontSel = document.getElementById('sel-font');
        if (fontSel) {
            fontSel.addEventListener('mousedown', () => this.captureToolbarSelection());
            fontSel.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                this.restoreToolbarSelection();
                ctrl.engine.dispatch('setFontFamily', { fontFamily: e.target.value });
            });
        }

        const fontSizeSel = document.getElementById('sel-font-size');
        if (fontSizeSel) {
            fontSizeSel.addEventListener('mousedown', () => this.captureToolbarSelection());
            fontSizeSel.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                this.restoreToolbarSelection();
                ctrl.engine.dispatch('setFontSize', { fontSize: e.target.value });
            });
        }

        const textColor = document.getElementById('inp-text-color');
        if (textColor) {
            textColor.addEventListener('mousedown', () => this.captureToolbarSelection());
            textColor.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                this.restoreToolbarSelection();
                ctrl.engine.dispatch('setTextColor', { color: e.target.value });
            });
        }

        const hlColor = document.getElementById('inp-highlight-color');
        if (hlColor) {
            hlColor.addEventListener('mousedown', () => this.captureToolbarSelection());
            hlColor.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                this.restoreToolbarSelection();
                ctrl.engine.dispatch('setHighlight', { color: e.target.value });
            });
        }

        document.getElementById('sel-line-height').onchange = (e) => {
            const blockIndex = ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex();
            if (blockIndex !== null && blockIndex >= 0) this.state.updateBlockProps(blockIndex, { lineHeight: e.target.value });
        };

        const setupSpacingSelect = (id, prop) => {
            const sel = document.getElementById(id);
            if (!sel) return;
            sel.addEventListener('mousedown', () => this.captureToolbarSelection());
            sel.onchange = (e) => {
                const blockIndex = ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex();
                if (blockIndex !== null && blockIndex >= 0) {
                    this.state.updateBlockProps(blockIndex, { [prop]: parseInt(e.target.value) });
                }
            };
        };
        setupSpacingSelect('sel-space-before', 'marginTop');
        setupSpacingSelect('sel-space-after', 'marginBottom');
        document.getElementById('sel-block-style').addEventListener('mousedown', () => this.captureToolbarSelection());
        document.getElementById('sel-block-style').onchange = (e) => {
            const blockIndex = ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex();
            if (blockIndex !== null && blockIndex >= 0) this.state.changeBlockStyle(blockIndex, e.target.value);
        };

        let z = 1.0;
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-zoom-in', () => {
            z = Math.min(2.0, z + 0.1);
            this.renderer.setZoom(z);
            ctrl.savePreference('zoom', z);
            const slider = document.getElementById('zoom-slider');
            if (slider) slider.value = Math.round(z * 100);
        });
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-zoom-out', () => {
            z = Math.max(0.5, z - 0.1);
            this.renderer.setZoom(z);
            ctrl.savePreference('zoom', z);
            const slider = document.getElementById('zoom-slider');
            if (slider) slider.value = Math.round(z * 100);
        });

        const zoomSlider = document.getElementById('zoom-slider');
        if (zoomSlider) {
            zoomSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                z = parseInt(e.target.value) / 100;
                this.renderer.setZoom(z);
                ctrl.savePreference('zoom', z);
            });
        }

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-indent-inc', () => this.modifyIndent(1));
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-indent-dec', () => this.modifyIndent(-1));

        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-link', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('createLink');
        }, { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-indent-inc', () => this.modifyIndent(1));
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-indent-dec', () => this.modifyIndent(-1));
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-ul', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertBlock', {
                block: { type: 'ul', items: [{ text: '', level: 0 }] },
                source: 'list'
            });
        }, { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-ol', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertBlock', {
                block: { type: 'ol', items: [{ text: '', level: 0 }] },
                source: 'list'
            });
        }, { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-toggle-list-type', () => {
            if (ctrl.activeBlockIndex !== null) {
                ctrl.engine.dispatch('toggleListType', { index: ctrl.activeBlockIndex });
            }
        });
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-list-to-text', () => {
            if (ctrl.activeBlockIndex !== null) {
                ctrl.engine.dispatch('convertBlockToText', { index: ctrl.activeBlockIndex });
            }
        });
        ['left', 'center', 'right'].forEach((a) => {
            this.bindToolbarButton(`ctx-btn-align-${a}`, () => {
                if (ctrl.activeBlockIndex !== null) {
                    const b = this.state.doc.blocks[ctrl.activeBlockIndex];
                    if (b.type === 'image') ctrl.engine.dispatch('updateImageProps', { index: ctrl.activeBlockIndex, props: { align: a } });
                    else if (b.type === 'object') ctrl.engine.dispatch('updateObject', { objectId: b.id, patch: { wrap: { side: a === 'left' ? 'right' : a === 'right' ? 'left' : 'both' }, legacy: { align: a } }, source: 'objectAlign' }, { restoreSelection: false });
                }
            });
        });
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-del-image', () => {
            if (ctrl.activeBlockIndex !== null) {
                const b = this.state.doc.blocks[ctrl.activeBlockIndex];
                if (b.type === 'image' || b.type === 'object') ctrl.engine.dispatch('removeBlock', { blockId: b.id, index: ctrl.activeBlockIndex });
            }
        });
        const getFocusedTableCell = () => {
            const sel = window.getSelection();
            if (!sel || !sel.rangeCount) return null;
            let n = sel.anchorNode;
            if (n && n.nodeType === 3) n = n.parentElement;
            const td = n?.closest?.('td');
            if (!td) return null;
            return { row: parseInt(td.dataset.row), col: parseInt(td.dataset.col), td };
        };

        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-insert-row', () => {
            const idx = ctrl.activeBlockIndex;
            if (idx === null) return;
            const cell = getFocusedTableCell();
            const rowIdx = cell !== null ? cell.row + 1 : undefined;
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertTableRow', { index: idx, rowIdx });
        });
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-insert-col', () => {
            const idx = ctrl.activeBlockIndex;
            if (idx === null) return;
            const cell = getFocusedTableCell();
            const colIdx = cell !== null ? cell.col + 1 : undefined;
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertTableCol', { index: idx, colIdx });
        });
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-del-row', () => {
            const idx = ctrl.activeBlockIndex;
            if (idx === null) return;
            const cell = getFocusedTableCell();
            const rowIdx = cell !== null ? cell.row : undefined;
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('removeTableRow', { index: idx, rowIdx });
        });
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-del-col', () => {
            const idx = ctrl.activeBlockIndex;
            if (idx === null) return;
            const cell = getFocusedTableCell();
            const colIdx = cell !== null ? cell.col : undefined;
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('removeTableCol', { index: idx, colIdx });
        });
        this.bindToolbarButton('ctx-btn-del-table', () => {
            if (ctrl.activeBlockIndex !== null) {
                const b = this.state.doc.blocks[ctrl.activeBlockIndex];
                if (b.type === 'table') ctrl.engine.dispatch('removeBlock', { index: ctrl.activeBlockIndex });
            }
        });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-page-break', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertBlock', {
                block: { type: 'pageBreak' },
                source: 'page-break',
                focusOffset: 1,
                focusBlock: { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: '<br>' }
            });
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        const insertOrConvertList = (listType) => {
            const idx = ctrl.activeBlockIndex;
            if (idx !== null) {
                const block = this.state.doc.blocks[idx];
                if (block && block.type === 'text') {
                    ctrl.engine.dispatch('convertBlockToList', { index: idx, listType });
                    return;
                }
            }
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertBlock', {
                block: { type: listType, items: [{ text: '', level: 0 }] },
                source: 'list'
            });
        };

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-ul', () => insertOrConvertList('ul'), { preserveSelection: true });
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-ol', () => insertOrConvertList('ol'), { preserveSelection: true });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-toc', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertBlock', {
                block: { type: 'toc' },
                source: 'toc'
            });
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-toc-ref', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertBlock', {
                block: { type: 'toc' },
                source: 'toc'
            });
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-footnote', () => {
            const noteContent = prompt('Enter footnote content:', '');
            if (noteContent !== null && noteContent !== '') {
                ctrl.insertNoteAtSelection('footnote', noteContent);
            }
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-endnote', () => {
            const noteContent = prompt('Enter endnote content:', '');
            if (noteContent !== null && noteContent !== '') {
                ctrl.insertNoteAtSelection('endnote', noteContent);
            }
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-track-changes', () => {
            const active = this.state.toggleTrackChanges();
            const btn = document.getElementById('btn-track-changes');
            if (btn) btn.classList.toggle('active', active);
            const panel = document.getElementById('review-panel');
            if (panel) panel.classList.toggle('hidden', !active && this.state.listRunRevisions().length === 0);
            ctrl.updateReviewPanel();
        });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-accept-all', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('acceptAllRevisions');
            ctrl.updateReviewPanel();
        });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-reject-all', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('rejectAllRevisions');
            ctrl.updateReviewPanel();
        });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-table', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertBlock', {
                block: { type: 'table', rows: [['', ''], ['', '']], colWidths: [50, 50] },
                source: 'table'
            });
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-box-text', () => {
            ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertTextBoxObject', {
                content: 'Text box',
                anchorBlockId: ctrl.activeBlockId || ctrl.engine.captureSelection()?.anchor?.blockId || null,
                x: 50, y: 50, width: 220, height: 110
            });
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-img-inline', () => {
            ctrl.pendingInsertIndex = ctrl.getInsertBaseIndex();
            document.getElementById('inp-image-upload').click();
        }, { preserveSelection: true });

        document.getElementById('inp-image-upload').onchange = async (e) => {
            const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
            if (!file) return;

            const replaceObjectId = e.target.dataset.replaceObjectId || null;
            delete e.target.dataset.replaceObjectId;
            const res = await this.state.uploadImage(file);
            if (res.url) {
                if (replaceObjectId) {
                    ctrl.engine.dispatch('updateObject', {
                        objectId: replaceObjectId,
                        patch: { image: { src: res.url, assetId: res.asset?.id || null, naturalWidth: null, naturalHeight: null } },
                        source: 'replaceImage'
                    }, { restoreSelection: false });
                } else {
                    ctrl.engine.dispatch('insertImageObject', {
                        src: res.url,
                        assetId: res.asset?.id || null,
                        anchorBlockId: ctrl.activeBlockId || ctrl.engine.captureSelection()?.anchor?.blockId || null,
                        mode: 'inline',
                        wrapType: 'inline'
                    });
                }
            }

            e.target.value = '';
        };

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-close-hf', () => this.state.toggleHFMode(false));
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-print', () => ctrl.printDocument());
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-exp-pdf', () => ctrl.exportPDF());
        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-export-docx', () => ctrl.exportDOCX());

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-toggle-outline', () => {
            const sidebar = document.getElementById('outline-sidebar');
            const rail = document.getElementById('outline-rail');
            if (!sidebar || !rail) return;
            if (sidebar.classList.contains('collapsed')) {
                sidebar.classList.remove('collapsed');
                rail.classList.add('hidden');
                ctrl._outlineOpen = true;
            } else {
                sidebar.classList.add('collapsed');
                rail.classList.remove('hidden');
                ctrl._outlineOpen = false;
            }
            ctrl.savePreference('outlineOpen', ctrl._outlineOpen);
        });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-toggle-ruler', () => {
            const ruler = document.querySelector('.ruler-container');
            if (!ruler) return;
            const isHidden = ruler.style.display === 'none';
            ruler.style.display = isHidden ? '' : 'none';
            ctrl.savePreference('rulerVisible', !isHidden);
        });

        this.bindToolbarButton('btn-split-view', () => {
            ctrl.toggleSplitView();
        });

        document.getElementById('btn-import-docx').onclick = () => {
            document.getElementById('inp-docx-import').click();
        };
        document.getElementById('inp-docx-import').onchange = async (e) => {
            const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
            if (!file) return;
            await ctrl.importDOCX(file);
            e.target.value = '';
        };

        const btnReviewClose = document.getElementById('btn-review-close');
        if (btnReviewClose) {
            btnReviewClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
                document.getElementById('review-panel').classList.add('hidden');
            });
        }

        const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('btn-toolbar-toggle');
        const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-toolbar-drawer');
        if (toggleBtn && drawer) {
            const menuIcon = '<i data-lucide="menu"></i>';
            const closeIcon = '<i data-lucide="x"></i>';

            const addToDrawer = (container, label) => {
                const groupDiv = document.createElement('div');
                groupDiv.className = 'toolbar-group';
                if (label) {
                    const labelEl = document.createElement('span');
                    labelEl.className = 'toolbar-label';
                    labelEl.textContent = label;
                    groupDiv.appendChild(labelEl);
                }
                const els = container.querySelectorAll('button, select, input[type="color"]');
                let hasContent = false;
                els.forEach(el => {
                    const origId = el.id;
                    const commandTarget = el.dataset.commandTarget;
                    const selectTarget = el.dataset.selectTarget;
                    const colorTarget = el.dataset.colorTarget;
                    if (!origId && !commandTarget && !selectTarget && !colorTarget && el.tagName !== 'INPUT') return;
                    if (el.type === 'file') return;
                    if (el.classList.contains('ribbon-toggle')) return;

                    const clone = el.cloneNode(true);
                    clone.id = `mob-${origId || commandTarget || selectTarget || colorTarget || Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;

                    if (commandTarget) {
                        clone.addEventListener('click', () => {
                            document.getElementById(commandTarget)?.click();
                            drawer.classList.remove('open');
                        });
                    } else if (selectTarget) {
                        clone.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                            const target = document.getElementById(selectTarget);
                            if (!target) return;
                            target.value = e.target.value;
                            target.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
                        });
                    } else if (colorTarget) {
                        clone.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                            const target = document.getElementById(colorTarget);
                            if (!target) return;
                            target.value = e.target.value;
                            target.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
                        });
                    } else if (origId) {
                        const orig = document.getElementById(origId);
                        if (orig && el.tagName !== 'SELECT' && el.tagName !== 'INPUT') {
                            clone.addEventListener('click', () => {
                                orig.click();
                                drawer.classList.remove('open');
                            });
                        }
                        if (orig && el.tagName === 'INPUT' && el.type === 'color') {
                            clone.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                                orig.value = e.target.value;
                                orig.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
                            });
                        }
                        if (orig && el.tagName === 'SELECT') {
                            clone.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                                orig.value = e.target.value;
                                orig.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
                            });
                        }
                    }
                    groupDiv.appendChild(clone);
                    hasContent = true;
                });
                if (hasContent) drawer.appendChild(groupDiv);
            };

            const compactToolbar = document.getElementById('compact-toolbar');
            if (compactToolbar) addToDrawer(compactToolbar, 'Quick tools');

            const quickActions = ['btn-undo', 'btn-redo', 'btn-save'];
            quickActions.forEach((id) => {
                const original = document.getElementById(id);
                if (!original) return;
                const clone = original.cloneNode(true);
                clone.id = `mob-${id}`;
                clone.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    original.click();
                    drawer.classList.remove('open');
                });
                const groupDiv = document.createElement('div');
                groupDiv.className = 'toolbar-group';
                groupDiv.appendChild(clone);
                drawer.appendChild(groupDiv);
            });

            const ribbonGroups = document.querySelectorAll('.ribbon-body .ribbon-group');
            ribbonGroups.forEach(group => {
                const label = group.querySelector('.ribbon-group-label')?.textContent?.trim() || '';
                const buttonsEl = group.querySelector('.ribbon-group-buttons');
                if (buttonsEl) addToDrawer(buttonsEl, label);
            });

            // Add ribbon tabs as pill buttons in mobile drawer
            const tabsContainer = document.createElement('div');
            tabsContainer.className = 'mobile-ribbon-tabs';
            const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.ribbon-tab-row .ribbon-tab');
            tabs.forEach(tab => {
                const tabBtn = document.createElement('button');
                tabBtn.className = 'mobile-ribbon-tab';
                tabBtn.textContent = tab.textContent.trim();
                tabBtn.dataset.tab = tab.dataset.tab;
                if (tab.classList.contains('active')) {
                    tabBtn.classList.add('active');
                }
                tabBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    const originalTab = document.querySelector(`.ribbon-tab-row .ribbon-tab[data-tab="${tab.dataset.tab}"]`);
                    if (originalTab) originalTab.click();
                    document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-ribbon-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
                    tabBtn.classList.add('active');
                });
                tabsContainer.appendChild(tabBtn);
            });
            drawer.insertBefore(tabsContainer, drawer.firstChild);

            toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                drawer.classList.toggle('open');
                toggleBtn.innerHTML = drawer.classList.contains('open') ? closeIcon : menuIcon;
                if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') {
                    lucide.createIcons();
                }
            });

            document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (drawer.classList.contains('open') &&
                    !drawer.contains(e.target) &&
                    !toggleBtn.contains(e.target)) {
                    drawer.classList.remove('open');
                    toggleBtn.innerHTML = menuIcon;
                    if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
                }
            });
        }
    }
}

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/action-validator.js (2026-07-10 01:52:55) =====
'use strict';

const crypto = require('crypto');
const ALLOWED_COMMANDS = new Set([
  'replaceText', 'insertText', 'insertBlocks', 'deleteRange', 'setBlockStyle',
  'setInlineFormatting', 'convertBlock', 'createTable', 'updateTable',
  'addComment', 'addCitation', 'addFootnote', 'applyDocumentStyle'
]);
const ALLOWED_BLOCK_TYPES = new Set(['text', 'ul', 'ol', 'checklist', 'table', 'pageBreak', 'horizontalRule', 'toc']);
const ALLOWED_STYLES = new Set(['title', 'subtitle', 'normal', 'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6', 'quote', 'code', 'caption']);

function cleanText(value, max = 100000) {
  return String(value ?? '')
    .replace(/<script[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, '')
    .replace(/<style[\s\S]*?<\/style>/gi, '')
    .replace(/on\w+\s*=\s*["'][^"']*["']/gi, '')
    .replace(/javascript\s*:/gi, '')
    .slice(0, max);
}

function cleanUrl(value) {
  try {
    const url = new URL(String(value || ''));
    if (!['http:', 'https:'].includes(url.protocol)) return null;
    return url.toString().slice(0, 2048);
  } catch (_) { return null; }
}

function makeId(prefix) { return `${prefix}_${crypto.randomBytes(8).toString('hex')}`; }

function normalizeBlock(block) {
  const type = ALLOWED_BLOCK_TYPES.has(block?.type) ? block.type : 'text';
  const id = /^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{3,128}$/.test(String(block?.id || '')) ? String(block.id) : makeId('blk');
  if (type === 'text') return { id, type, style: ALLOWED_STYLES.has(block?.style) ? block.style : 'normal', content: cleanText(block?.content ?? block?.text ?? '', 50000) };
  if (['ul', 'ol', 'checklist'].includes(type)) {
    return { id, type, items: (block?.items || []).slice(0, 200).map(item => ({ text: cleanText(item?.text ?? item, 5000), level: Math.max(0, Math.min(8, Number(item?.level) || 0)), ...(type === 'checklist' ? { checked: !!item?.checked } : {}) })) };
  }
  if (type === 'table') {
    const rows = (block?.rows || []).slice(0, 100).map(row => (Array.isArray(row) ? row : []).slice(0, 30).map(cell => cleanText(typeof cell === 'object' ? cell.content : cell, 5000)));
    return { id, type, rows, headerRows: Math.max(0, Math.min(rows.length, Number(block?.headerRows) || 1)) };
  }
  return { id, type };
}

function validateAction(action, document) {
  if (!action || !ALLOWED_COMMANDS.has(action.command)) return null;
  const command = action.command;
  const result = { command };
  const blockIds = new Set((document.blocks || []).map(block => block.id));
  const requireBlock = ['replaceText', 'insertText', 'deleteRange', 'setBlockStyle', 'setInlineFormatting', 'convertBlock', 'updateTable'].includes(command);
  if (requireBlock) {
    if (!blockIds.has(action.blockId)) return null;
    result.blockId = action.blockId;
  }
  if (['replaceText', 'insertText', 'deleteRange'].includes(command)) {
    result.startOffset = Math.max(0, Number(action.startOffset) || 0);
    result.endOffset = Math.max(result.startOffset, Number(action.endOffset ?? result.startOffset) || result.startOffset);
  }
  if (['replaceText', 'insertText'].includes(command)) result.text = cleanText(action.text, 100000);
  if (command === 'insertBlocks') {
    result.index = Math.max(0, Math.min((document.blocks || []).length, Number(action.index) || 0));
    result.replaceDocument = !!action.replaceDocument;
    result.blocks = (action.blocks || []).slice(0, 500).map(normalizeBlock);
    if (!result.blocks.length) return null;
  }
  if (command === 'setBlockStyle') {
    if (!ALLOWED_STYLES.has(action.style)) return null;
    result.style = action.style;
  }
  if (command === 'setInlineFormatting') {
    const allowed = ['bold', 'italic', 'underline', 'strikethrough', 'code', 'fontFamily', 'fontSize', 'color', 'highlight'];
    result.formatting = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(action.formatting || {}).filter(([key]) => allowed.includes(key)).map(([key, value]) => [key, typeof value === 'boolean' ? value : cleanText(value, 100)]));
  }
  if (command === 'convertBlock') {
    if (!ALLOWED_BLOCK_TYPES.has(action.type)) return null;
    result.type = action.type;
    result.items = Array.isArray(action.items) ? action.items.slice(0, 200).map(item => cleanText(item?.text ?? item, 5000)) : undefined;
  }
  if (command === 'createTable') {
    result.index = Math.max(0, Math.min((document.blocks || []).length, Number(action.index) || 0));
    result.rows = (action.rows || []).slice(0, 100).map(row => (row || []).slice(0, 30).map(cell => cleanText(cell, 5000)));
    result.headerRows = Math.max(0, Math.min(result.rows.length, Number(action.headerRows) || 1));
  }
  if (command === 'updateTable') {
    result.rows = (action.rows || []).slice(0, 100).map(row => (row || []).slice(0, 30).map(cell => cleanText(cell, 5000)));
    result.headerRows = Math.max(0, Math.min(result.rows.length, Number(action.headerRows) || 1));
  }
  if (command === 'addComment') {
    result.blockId = blockIds.has(action.blockId) ? action.blockId : null;
    result.body = cleanText(action.body, 10000);
    if (!result.body) return null;
  }
  if (command === 'addCitation') {
    result.blockId = blockIds.has(action.blockId) ? action.blockId : null;
    result.url = cleanUrl(action.url);
    result.title = cleanText(action.title, 500);
    result.publisher = cleanText(action.publisher, 300);
    result.publishedAt = cleanText(action.publishedAt, 64);
    result.accessedAt = cleanText(action.accessedAt, 64);
    result.evidence = cleanText(action.evidence, 2000);
    if (!result.url) return null;
  }
  if (command === 'addFootnote') {
    result.blockId = blockIds.has(action.blockId) ? action.blockId : null;
    result.content = cleanText(action.content, 10000);
  }
  if (command === 'applyDocumentStyle') {
    result.preset = cleanText(action.preset || 'professional-report', 100);
    result.styles = action.styles && typeof action.styles === 'object' ? action.styles : {};
  }
  return result;
}

function validateBundle(input, document, request = {}) {
  const bundle = input && typeof input === 'object' ? input : {};
  if (Number(bundle.baseRevision) !== Number(document.revision)) {
    const error = new Error('stale_revision'); error.code = 'stale_revision'; throw error;
  }
  const actions = (bundle.actions || []).slice(0, 1000).map(action => validateAction(action, document)).filter(Boolean);
  const claimResults = (bundle.claimResults || []).slice(0, 500).map(claim => ({
    id: cleanText(claim.id || makeId('claim'), 100),
    claim: cleanText(claim.claim, 5000),
    status: ['supported', 'partially_supported', 'contradicted', 'outdated', 'not_enough_evidence', 'opinion'].includes(claim.status) ? claim.status : 'not_enough_evidence',
    explanation: cleanText(claim.explanation, 5000),
    confidence: Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(claim.confidence) || 0)),
    suggestedText: cleanText(claim.suggestedText, 5000),
    blockId: (document.blocks || []).some(block => block.id === claim.blockId) ? claim.blockId : null,
    citations: (claim.citations || []).slice(0, 10).map(citation => ({ ...citation, url: cleanUrl(citation.url), title: cleanText(citation.title, 500), publisher: cleanText(citation.publisher, 300), evidence: cleanText(citation.evidence, 2000) })).filter(citation => citation.url)
  }));
  return {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    requestId: cleanText(bundle.requestId || request.requestId || makeId('ai'), 200),
    baseRevision: Number(document.revision) || 0,
    task: cleanText(bundle.task || request.task || 'rewrite', 100),
    summary: cleanText(bundle.summary || 'AI proposal ready for review.', 5000),
    answer: cleanText(bundle.answer || '', 30000),
    actions,
    issues: Array.isArray(bundle.issues) ? bundle.issues.slice(0, 500).map(issue => ({
      id: cleanText(issue.id || makeId('issue'), 100), type: cleanText(issue.type, 100), severity: ['info', 'warning', 'error'].includes(issue.severity) ? issue.severity : 'info',
      blockId: (document.blocks || []).some(block => block.id === issue.blockId) ? issue.blockId : null,
      text: cleanText(issue.text, 3000), suggestion: cleanText(issue.suggestion, 5000), explanation: cleanText(issue.explanation, 5000)
    })) : [],
    health: bundle.health && typeof bundle.health === 'object' ? {
      clarity: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(bundle.health.clarity) || 0)), grammar: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(bundle.health.grammar) || 0)),
      consistency: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(bundle.health.consistency) || 0)), accessibility: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(bundle.health.accessibility) || 0)),
      words: Math.max(0, Number(bundle.health.words) || 0), averageSentenceWords: Math.max(0, Number(bundle.health.averageSentenceWords) || 0), readingGrade: Math.max(0, Number(bundle.health.readingGrade) || 0)
    } : null,
    claimResults,
    warnings: (bundle.warnings || []).slice(0, 50).map(value => cleanText(value, 1000)),
    usage: bundle.usage || null
  };
}

module.exports = { ALLOWED_COMMANDS, ALLOWED_BLOCK_TYPES, cleanText, cleanUrl, normalizeBlock, validateAction, validateBundle };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/ai-service.js (2026-07-10 01:53:27) =====
'use strict';
const crypto = require('crypto');
const { buildContext } = require('./context-builder');
const { validateBundle } = require('./action-validator');
const { ProviderRouter } = require('./provider-router');
const { ResearchService } = require('./research-service');

const OUTPUT_SCHEMA = {
  schemaVersion: 1, requestId: 'string', baseRevision: 'number', summary: 'string', answer: 'string',
  actions: [{ command: 'allowed command', blockId: 'existing block id when required', startOffset: 0, endOffset: 0, text: 'string' }],
  issues: [{ id: 'string', type: 'string', severity: 'info|warning|error', blockId: 'string', text: 'string', suggestion: 'string', explanation: 'string' }],
  health: { clarity: 0, grammar: 0, consistency: 0, accessibility: 0, words: 0, averageSentenceWords: 0, readingGrade: 0 },
  claimResults: [{ id: 'string', claim: 'string', status: 'supported|partially_supported|contradicted|outdated|not_enough_evidence|opinion', explanation: 'string', confidence: 0.0, suggestedText: 'string', blockId: 'string', citations: [] }], warnings: []
};

class AIService {
  constructor({ usageManager }) { this.router = new ProviderRouter(); this.research = new ResearchService(); this.usage = usageManager; this.controllers = new Map(); this.cache = new Map(); }
  cacheKey(document, request, userId) { return crypto.createHash('sha256').update(JSON.stringify({ userId, documentId: document.id, revision: document.revision, task: request.task, scope: request.scope, outputMode: request.outputMode, instruction: request.instruction, selection: request.selection, context: request.context, preferences: request.preferences, sources: request.sources })).digest('hex'); }
  cached(key, requestId, revision, userId) { const item = this.cache.get(key); const ttl = Number(process.env.AI_CACHE_TTL_MS || 600000); if (!item || Date.now() - item.createdAt > ttl) { if (item) this.cache.delete(key); return null; } const bundle = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(item.bundle)); bundle.requestId = requestId; bundle.baseRevision = revision; bundle.usage = { ...(bundle.usage || {}), cacheHit: true, account: this.usage.get(userId) }; return bundle; }
  remember(key, bundle) { if (process.env.AI_DISABLE_CACHE === '1') return; this.cache.set(key, { createdAt: Date.now(), bundle: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(bundle)) }); while (this.cache.size > Number(process.env.AI_CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES || 100)) this.cache.delete(this.cache.keys().next().value); }

  capabilities() { return { ...this.router.capabilities(), tasks: ['draft', 'rewrite', 'shorten', 'expand', 'proofread', 'fact_check', 'format', 'summarize', 'ask', 'translate', 'continue_writing', 'review'], scopes: ['selection', 'paragraph', 'section', 'document'], outputModes: ['suggest', 'replace', 'insert', 'comment', 'preview'] }; }
  cancel(requestId, userId = 'local') { const active = this.controllers.get(requestId); if (!active || active.userId !== userId) return false; active.controller.abort(); this.controllers.delete(requestId); return true; }
  async run(document, rawRequest, userId = 'local') {
    const proposedRequestId = String(rawRequest?.requestId || '').slice(0, 200); const requestId = /^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{3,200}$/.test(proposedRequestId) ? proposedRequestId : `ai_${crypto.randomBytes(10).toString('hex')}`;
    if (this.controllers.has(requestId)) { const error = new Error('request_id_in_use'); error.code = 'request_id_in_use'; throw error; }
    const request = { ...rawRequest, requestId, task: String(rawRequest?.task || 'rewrite'), instruction: String(rawRequest?.instruction || '').slice(0, 20000), preferences: rawRequest?.preferences || {}, outputMode: rawRequest?.outputMode || 'suggest', outputSchema: OUTPUT_SCHEMA };
    if (Number(request.baseRevision) !== Number(document.revision)) { const error = new Error('revision_conflict'); error.code = 'revision_conflict'; error.currentRevision = document.revision; throw error; }
    const context = buildContext(document, request);
    const cacheKey = this.cacheKey(document, request, userId); const cached = process.env.AI_DISABLE_CACHE === '1' ? null : this.cached(cacheKey, requestId, document.revision, userId); if (cached) return cached;
    const estimated = this.usage.estimateTokens(JSON.stringify({ request, context })) + 4000; this.usage.assertAvailable(userId, estimated);
    const controller = new AbortController(); this.controllers.set(requestId, { controller, userId });
    try {
      const sources = await this.research.collectSources(request, context, controller.signal);
      context.sources = sources;
      const rawBundle = await this.router.run({ request, context, signal: controller.signal });
      rawBundle.requestId = requestId; rawBundle.baseRevision = document.revision; rawBundle.task = request.task;
      let bundle = validateBundle(rawBundle, document, request);
      bundle = this.research.attachVerification(bundle, sources, context.researchWarning || '');
      const usage = bundle.usage || rawBundle.usage || { totalTokens: estimated };
      bundle.usage = { ...usage, account: this.usage.record(userId, { totalTokens: usage.totalTokens || usage.total_tokens || estimated }) };
      this.remember(cacheKey, bundle); return bundle;
    } finally { this.controllers.delete(requestId); }
  }
}

module.exports = { AIService, OUTPUT_SCHEMA };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/citation-service.js (2026-07-10 01:52:40) =====
'use strict';

const { cleanUrl, cleanText } = require('./action-validator');

function normalizeCitation(citation = {}) {
  const url = cleanUrl(citation.url);
  if (!url) return null;
  return {
    id: cleanText(citation.id || '', 100), url,
    title: cleanText(citation.title || url, 500), publisher: cleanText(citation.publisher, 300),
    publishedAt: cleanText(citation.publishedAt, 64), accessedAt: cleanText(citation.accessedAt || new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), 64),
    evidence: cleanText(citation.evidence, 2000), verification: citation.verification === 'provided-source' ? 'provided-source' : 'model-supplied'
  };
}

function dedupeCitations(citations = []) {
  const seen = new Set(); const result = [];
  for (const raw of citations) { const citation = normalizeCitation(raw); if (!citation || seen.has(citation.url)) continue; seen.add(citation.url); result.push(citation); }
  return result;
}

module.exports = { normalizeCitation, dedupeCitations };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/context-builder.js (2026-07-10 01:53:00) =====
'use strict';

function stripHtml(value) {
  return String(value || '')
    .replace(/<br\s*\/?\s*>/gi, '\n')
    .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '')
    .replace(/&nbsp;/gi, ' ')
    .replace(/&amp;/gi, '&')
    .replace(/&lt;/gi, '<')
    .replace(/&gt;/gi, '>')
    .replace(/&quot;/gi, '"')
    .replace(/&#39;/gi, "'");
}

function blockText(block) {
  if (!block) return '';
  if (block.type === 'text') return stripHtml(block.content);
  if (['ul', 'ol', 'checklist'].includes(block.type)) return (block.items || []).map(item => stripHtml(item.text)).join('\n');
  if (block.type === 'table') return (block.rows || []).map(row => row.map(cell => stripHtml(typeof cell === 'object' ? cell.content : cell)).join('\t')).join('\n');
  if (block.type === 'object') return (block.textBox?.blocks || []).map(blockText).join('\n');
  return '';
}

function headingLevel(block) {
  const match = String(block?.style || '').match(/^h([1-6])$/);
  return match ? Number(match[1]) : null;
}

function findSectionRange(blocks, activeIndex) {
  let start = Math.max(0, activeIndex);
  while (start > 0 && headingLevel(blocks[start]) == null) start -= 1;
  const level = headingLevel(blocks[start]) || 1;
  let end = blocks.length;
  for (let index = start + 1; index < blocks.length; index += 1) {
    const candidate = headingLevel(blocks[index]);
    if (candidate != null && candidate <= level) { end = index; break; }
  }
  return { start, end };
}

function normalizeScope(document, request = {}) {
  const blocks = Array.isArray(document?.blocks) ? document.blocks : [];
  const scope = ['selection', 'paragraph', 'section', 'document'].includes(request.scope) ? request.scope : 'selection';
  const activeBlockId = request.selection?.anchor?.blockId || request.activeBlockId || request.context?.activeBlockId || null;
  const activeIndex = Math.max(0, blocks.findIndex(block => block.id === activeBlockId));

  if (scope === 'document') return { scope, blocks, startIndex: 0, endIndex: blocks.length };
  if (scope === 'section') {
    const range = findSectionRange(blocks, activeIndex);
    return { scope, blocks: blocks.slice(range.start, range.end), startIndex: range.start, endIndex: range.end };
  }
  const block = blocks[activeIndex] || blocks[0] || null;
  return { scope, blocks: block ? [block] : [], startIndex: activeIndex, endIndex: activeIndex + (block ? 1 : 0) };
}

function buildContext(document, request = {}, options = {}) {
  const maxChars = Math.max(4000, Number(options.maxChars || process.env.AI_MAX_CONTEXT_CHARS || 120000));
  const normalized = normalizeScope(document, request);
  const excludeConfidential = request.preferences?.excludeConfidential !== false;
  const isExcluded = block => excludeConfidential && !!(block?.aiExcluded || block?.confidential || block?.protected || block?.metadata?.aiExcluded || block?.metadata?.confidential);
  const scopedBlocks = normalized.blocks.filter(block => !isExcluded(block));
  const activeBlockId = request.selection?.anchor?.blockId || request.activeBlockId || request.context?.activeBlockId || null;
  const activeExcluded = normalized.blocks.some(block => block.id === activeBlockId && isExcluded(block));
  const selectedText = activeExcluded ? '' : String(request.context?.selectedText || request.selectedText || '').slice(0, maxChars);
  const entries = scopedBlocks.map((block, offset) => ({
    blockId: block.id,
    blockIndex: normalized.startIndex + offset,
    type: block.type,
    style: block.style || null,
    text: blockText(block)
  }));
  let total = selectedText.length;
  const clipped = [];
  for (const entry of entries) {
    if (total >= maxChars) break;
    const remaining = maxChars - total;
    clipped.push({ ...entry, text: entry.text.slice(0, remaining) });
    total += Math.min(entry.text.length, remaining);
  }
  return {
    document: {
      id: document.id,
      title: document.title,
      revision: Number(document.revision) || 0,
      locale: document.aiPreferences?.language || document.locale || 'en-CA',
      styleGuide: document.aiStyleGuide || {},
      settings: document.settings || {}
    },
    scope: normalized.scope,
    selection: request.selection || null,
    selectedText,
    blocks: clipped,
    sources: Array.isArray(request.sources) ? request.sources.slice(0, 30) : [],
    privacy: { excludeConfidential, omittedBlocks: normalized.blocks.length - scopedBlocks.length }
  };
}

module.exports = { stripHtml, blockText, headingLevel, findSectionRange, normalizeScope, buildContext };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/prompt-registry.js (2026-07-10 01:52:38) =====
'use strict';

const BASE_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `You are OpenDoc's document copilot. Return only JSON matching the requested schema. Never return executable code, script tags, event handlers, data URLs, or arbitrary HTML. Preserve facts, numbers, names, citations, and the user's locale unless the instruction explicitly asks to change them. Prefer small, reviewable edits. Do not invent sources. When evidence is unavailable, mark a claim as not_enough_evidence.`;

const TASK_PROMPTS = {
  draft: `Create a complete document from the brief. Return insertBlocks actions containing semantic blocks (title, headings, normal paragraphs, lists, and tables).`,
  rewrite: `Rewrite only the supplied scope according to the instruction. Use replaceText actions and preserve meaning unless explicitly told otherwise.`,
  shorten: `Make the supplied text more concise without removing important facts.`,
  expand: `Expand the supplied text with useful detail, transitions, and examples while clearly separating assumptions from facts.`,
  proofread: `Find grammar, spelling, clarity, consistency, terminology, accessibility, and readability issues. Return issues and optional replaceText actions.`,
  fact_check: `Extract factual claims and assess them only against supplied sources or verifiable citations. Return claimResults. Never fabricate citations.`,
  format: `Apply semantic document roles and styles. Use setBlockStyle, setInlineFormatting, createTable, or applyDocumentStyle actions.`,
  summarize: `Create a concise summary that reflects the source accurately.`,
  ask: `Answer the question using only the supplied document context. Include block references where useful.`,
  translate: `Translate the supplied text while preserving meaning, structure, numbers, names, and formatting intent.`,
  continue_writing: `Continue the text in the same voice and structure without repeating existing content.`,
  review: `Review the document for missing sections, contradictions, repetition, unclear logic, commitments, deadlines, and reviewer questions.`
};

function getPrompt(task) {
  return `${BASE_SYSTEM_PROMPT}\n\nTask guidance: ${TASK_PROMPTS[task] || TASK_PROMPTS.rewrite}`;
}

module.exports = { BASE_SYSTEM_PROMPT, TASK_PROMPTS, getPrompt };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/provider-router.js (2026-07-10 01:53:16) =====
'use strict';
const { OpenAICompatibleProvider } = require('./providers/openai-compatible-provider');
const { LocalProvider } = require('./providers/local-provider');

class ProviderRouter {
  constructor() { this.primary = new OpenAICompatibleProvider(); this.fallback = new LocalProvider(); }
  capabilities() { return { provider: this.primary.configured ? this.primary.name : this.fallback.name, model: process.env.AI_MODEL || (this.primary.configured ? 'configured-model' : 'local-rules'), configured: this.primary.configured, fallback: true, streaming: true, research: !!process.env.AI_RESEARCH_ENDPOINT }; }
  async run(payload) {
    if (this.primary.configured) {
      try { return await this.primary.run(payload); }
      catch (error) { if (payload.signal?.aborted || error.name === 'AbortError' || process.env.AI_DISABLE_FALLBACK === '1') throw error; const result = await this.fallback.run(payload); result.warnings ||= []; result.warnings.unshift(`Primary AI provider failed: ${error.message}`); return result; }
    }
    return this.fallback.run(payload);
  }
}
module.exports = { ProviderRouter };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/providers/local-provider.js (2026-07-10 01:53:14) =====
'use strict';

const crypto = require('crypto');
const { ProviderBase } = require('./provider-base');

function id(prefix) { return `${prefix}_${crypto.randomBytes(6).toString('hex')}`; }
function sentences(text) { return String(text || '').split(/(?<=[.!?])\s+/).map(value => value.trim()).filter(Boolean); }
function concise(text) { return String(text || '').replace(/\bin order to\b/gi, 'to').replace(/\bdue to the fact that\b/gi, 'because').replace(/\bat this point in time\b/gi, 'now').replace(/\bvery\s+/gi, '').replace(/\s{2,}/g, ' ').trim(); }
function formal(text) { return String(text || '').replace(/\bcan't\b/gi, 'cannot').replace(/\bwon't\b/gi, 'will not').replace(/\bdon't\b/gi, 'do not').replace(/\bget\b/gi, 'obtain').replace(/\ba lot of\b/gi, 'many'); }
function scopeText(context) { return context.selectedText || (context.blocks || []).map(block => block.text).join('\n\n'); }
function targetAction(context, text) {
  const block = context.blocks?.[0]; if (!block) return [];
  const start = context.selection?.anchor?.blockId === block.blockId ? Math.min(context.selection.anchor.offset || 0, context.selection.focus?.offset || 0) : 0;
  const end = context.selection?.focus?.blockId === block.blockId ? Math.max(context.selection.anchor?.offset || 0, context.selection.focus.offset || 0) : block.text.length;
  return [{ command: 'replaceText', blockId: block.blockId, startOffset: context.scope === 'selection' && context.selectedText ? start : 0, endOffset: context.scope === 'selection' && context.selectedText ? end : block.text.length, text }];
}
function draftBlocks(brief, preferences = {}) {
  const title = String(preferences.title || brief || 'Untitled Document').split(/[.!?\n]/)[0].slice(0, 90) || 'Untitled Document';
  const requested = Array.isArray(preferences.sections) && preferences.sections.length ? preferences.sections : ['Executive Summary', 'Background', 'Analysis', 'Recommendations', 'Next Steps'];
  const blocks = [{ type: 'text', style: 'title', content: title }];
  blocks.push({ type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: `This document was prepared for ${preferences.audience || 'the intended audience'} to ${preferences.purpose || 'address the requested objective'}.` });
  requested.forEach((section, index) => {
    blocks.push({ type: 'text', style: index === 0 ? 'h1' : 'h2', content: section });
    blocks.push({ type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: index === 0 ? concise(brief) || 'Summarize the main findings, implications, and recommended actions here.' : `Develop the ${String(section).toLowerCase()} section using the source material, confirmed facts, and the organization's style guide.` });
  });
  return blocks;
}
function proofIssues(context) {
  const issues = []; const repeated = /\b(\w+)\s+\1\b/gi; const wordy = [{ re: /in order to/gi, fix: 'to' }, { re: /due to the fact that/gi, fix: 'because' }, { re: /at this point in time/gi, fix: 'now' }];
  for (const block of context.blocks || []) {
    let match; while ((match = repeated.exec(block.text))) issues.push({ id: id('issue'), type: 'Repeated word', severity: 'warning', blockId: block.blockId, text: match[0], suggestion: match[1], explanation: 'The same word appears twice.' });
    for (const rule of wordy) while ((match = rule.re.exec(block.text))) issues.push({ id: id('issue'), type: 'Wordiness', severity: 'info', blockId: block.blockId, text: match[0], suggestion: rule.fix, explanation: 'A shorter phrase improves clarity.' });
    for (const sentence of sentences(block.text)) if (sentence.split(/\s+/).length > 35) issues.push({ id: id('issue'), type: 'Long sentence', severity: 'info', blockId: block.blockId, text: sentence.slice(0, 240), suggestion: '', explanation: 'Consider splitting this sentence.' });
  }
  return issues;
}
function claimResults(context) {
  const claims = [];
  for (const block of context.blocks || []) {
    for (const sentence of sentences(block.text)) {
      if (!/\b\d[\d,.%$]*\b|\b(is|are|was|were|has|have|will)\b/i.test(sentence)) continue;
      claims.push({ id: id('claim'), claim: sentence, status: 'not_enough_evidence', explanation: 'No independently verifiable research connector or supplied source was available.', confidence: 0.2, suggestedText: '', blockId: block.blockId, citations: [] });
    }
  }
  return claims.slice(0, 100);
}

class LocalProvider extends ProviderBase {
  get name() { return 'local-fallback'; }
  get configured() { return true; }
  async run({ request, context, signal }) {
    if (signal?.aborted) throw signal.reason || Object.assign(new Error('AI request cancelled'), { name: 'AbortError' });
    const text = scopeText(context); const instruction = String(request.instruction || '').toLowerCase();
    const base = { schemaVersion: 1, requestId: request.requestId, baseRevision: context.document.revision, task: request.task, actions: [], issues: [], claimResults: [], warnings: ['Using the local fallback provider. Configure AI_API_KEY for model-backed results.'] };
    if (request.task === 'draft') { base.summary = 'Generated a structured document draft.'; base.actions = [{ command: 'insertBlocks', index: 0, replaceDocument: request.preferences?.replaceDocument !== false, blocks: draftBlocks(request.instruction, request.preferences) }]; }
    else if (request.task === 'proofread') { const issues = proofIssues(context); const words = text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length; const sentenceCount = Math.max(1, sentences(text).length); const issuePenalty = Math.min(55, issues.length * 3); base.summary = 'Document proofing scan completed.'; base.issues = issues; base.health = { clarity: Math.max(35, 92 - issuePenalty), grammar: Math.max(40, 96 - issuePenalty), consistency: Math.max(35, 90 - Math.round(issuePenalty * .8)), accessibility: Math.max(40, 88 - Math.round(issuePenalty * .5)), words, averageSentenceWords: Math.round(words / sentenceCount), readingGrade: Math.max(1, Math.min(18, Math.round(words / sentenceCount / 2 + 5))) }; }
    else if (request.task === 'fact_check') { base.summary = 'Claims were extracted, but external verification is not configured.'; base.claimResults = claimResults(context); }
    else if (request.task === 'summarize') { const summary = sentences(text).slice(0, Math.max(2, Number(request.preferences?.sentenceCount) || 4)).join(' '); base.summary = 'Summary proposal ready.'; base.actions = request.outputMode === 'insert' ? [{ command: 'insertBlocks', index: 0, blocks: [{ type: 'text', style: 'h2', content: 'Summary' }, { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: summary }] }] : targetAction(context, summary); base.answer = summary; }
    else if (request.task === 'format') { base.summary = 'Professional semantic formatting proposal ready.'; base.actions = [{ command: 'applyDocumentStyle', preset: request.preferences?.preset || 'professional-report' }]; }
    else if (request.task === 'ask' || request.task === 'review') { base.summary = 'Document response ready.'; base.answer = request.task === 'review' ? `Review notes: ${proofIssues(context).length} deterministic writing issues were found. The document contains ${(context.blocks || []).length} blocks.` : `Based on the available document context: ${sentences(text).slice(0, 5).join(' ')}`; }
    else {
      let next = text;
      if (request.task === 'shorten' || /short|concise/.test(instruction)) next = concise(text);
      else if (/formal|professional|diplomatic/.test(instruction)) next = formal(text);
      else if (request.task === 'expand') next = `${text}\n\nAdditional context: clarify the rationale, evidence, implications, and next steps.`;
      else if (request.task === 'translate') next = text;
      else if (request.task === 'continue_writing') next = `${text}\n\nContinue by connecting the preceding point to its implications, supporting evidence, and recommended next action.`;
      base.summary = 'Rewrite proposal ready.'; base.actions = targetAction(context, next);
    }
    const promptTokens = Math.ceil(JSON.stringify({ request, context }).length / 4); const completionTokens = Math.ceil(JSON.stringify(base).length / 4);
    base.usage = { promptTokens, completionTokens, totalTokens: promptTokens + completionTokens, model: 'local-rules', provider: this.name };
    return base;
  }
}

module.exports = { LocalProvider };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/providers/openai-compatible-provider.js (2026-07-10 01:53:04) =====
'use strict';

const { ProviderBase } = require('./provider-base');
const { getPrompt } = require('../prompt-registry');

class OpenAICompatibleProvider extends ProviderBase {
  get name() { return process.env.AI_PROVIDER || 'openai-compatible'; }
  get configured() { return !!process.env.AI_API_KEY; }
  async run({ request, context, signal }) {
    const baseUrl = String(process.env.AI_BASE_URL || 'https://api.openai.com/v1').replace(/\/$/, '');
    const modelClass = String(request.preferences?.modelClass || 'general').toUpperCase();
    const model = request.model || process.env[`AI_MODEL_${modelClass}`] || process.env.AI_MODEL || 'gpt-4.1-mini';
    const timeoutController = new AbortController(); const timeout = setTimeout(() => timeoutController.abort(new Error('AI provider timeout')), Number(process.env.AI_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS || 90000));
    const abortFromParent = () => timeoutController.abort(signal?.reason || new Error('AI request cancelled')); signal?.addEventListener?.('abort', abortFromParent, { once: true });
    let extraHeaders = {}; try { extraHeaders = JSON.parse(process.env.AI_EXTRA_HEADERS_JSON || '{}'); } catch (_) { extraHeaders = {}; }
    const payloadBody = {
      model, temperature: request.task === 'draft' ? 0.5 : 0.2,
      messages: [
          { role: 'system', content: getPrompt(request.task) },
          { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ schema: request.outputSchema, request: { task: request.task, instruction: request.instruction, preferences: request.preferences, outputMode: request.outputMode }, context }) }
        ]
    };
    if (process.env.AI_RESPONSE_FORMAT !== 'none') payloadBody.response_format = { type: 'json_object' };
    let response;
    try { response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/chat/completions`, {
      method: 'POST', signal: timeoutController.signal,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.AI_API_KEY}`, ...extraHeaders },
      body: JSON.stringify(payloadBody)
    }); } finally { clearTimeout(timeout); signal?.removeEventListener?.('abort', abortFromParent); }
    const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
    if (!response.ok) { const error = new Error(payload?.error?.message || `AI provider failed (${response.status})`); error.status = response.status; throw error; }
    const content = String(payload?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || '{}').trim().replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '');
    let result; try { result = JSON.parse(content); } catch (_) { throw new Error('AI provider returned invalid JSON'); }
    result.usage = { promptTokens: payload.usage?.prompt_tokens || 0, completionTokens: payload.usage?.completion_tokens || 0, totalTokens: payload.usage?.total_tokens || 0, model, provider: this.name };
    return result;
  }
}

module.exports = { OpenAICompatibleProvider };

'use strict';
class ProviderBase { constructor(options = {}) { this.options = options; } get name() { return 'base'; } get configured() { return false; } async run() { throw new Error('Provider not implemented'); } }
module.exports = { ProviderBase };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/research-service.js (2026-07-10 01:53:20) =====
'use strict';

const { dedupeCitations } = require('./citation-service');
const { stripHtml } = require('./context-builder');
const { cleanText } = require('./action-validator');

function candidateClaims(context) {
  const claims = [];
  for (const block of context.blocks || []) {
    const sentences = String(block.text || '').split(/(?<=[.!?])\s+/).map(value => value.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    for (const sentence of sentences) {
      if (/\b\d[\d,.%$]*\b|\b(is|are|was|were|has|have|will|increased|decreased)\b/i.test(sentence)) claims.push(sentence.slice(0, 800));
      if (claims.length >= 20) return claims;
    }
  }
  return claims;
}

class ResearchService {
  prepareSources(request = {}) {
    const raw = Array.isArray(request.sources) ? request.sources.slice(0, 30) : [];
    const citations = dedupeCitations(raw.filter(source => source?.url).map(source => ({ ...source, verification: 'provided-source' }))).slice(0, 20);
    const notes = raw.filter(source => !source?.url && source?.evidence).slice(0, 10).map((source, index) => ({ id: `note_${index + 1}`, type: 'note', title: cleanText(source.title || 'Provided note', 200), evidence: cleanText(source.evidence, 5000), verification: 'provided-note' }));
    return [...citations, ...notes];
  }
  async connectorSources(request, context, signal) {
    const endpoint = String(process.env.AI_RESEARCH_ENDPOINT || '').trim();
    if (!endpoint || request.task !== 'fact_check') return [];
    const queries = candidateClaims(context); if (!queries.length) return [];
    const response = await fetch(endpoint, {
      method: 'POST', signal,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...(process.env.AI_RESEARCH_API_KEY ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.AI_RESEARCH_API_KEY}` } : {}) },
      body: JSON.stringify({ queries, maxResultsPerQuery: 3, locale: context.document?.locale || 'en-CA' })
    });
    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Research connector failed (${response.status})`);
    const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
    const results = Array.isArray(payload.results) ? payload.results : [];
    return dedupeCitations(results.flatMap(item => Array.isArray(item.results) ? item.results : item).map(result => ({
      url: result.url, title: result.title, publisher: result.publisher || result.siteName, publishedAt: result.publishedAt || result.date,
      evidence: stripHtml(result.snippet || result.evidence || ''), verification: 'research-connector'
    }))).slice(0, 60);
  }
  async collectSources(request, context, signal) {
    const provided = this.prepareSources(request);
    try { return [...provided.filter(source => !source.url), ...dedupeCitations([...provided.filter(source => source.url), ...(await this.connectorSources(request, context, signal))])]; }
    catch (error) { if (signal?.aborted || error.name === 'AbortError') throw error; context.researchWarning = error.message; return provided; }
  }
  attachVerification(bundle, sources, warning = '') {
    const verifiedUrls = new Set(sources.filter(source => ['provided-source', 'research-connector'].includes(source.verification) && String(source.evidence || '').trim()).map(source => source.url));
    for (const claim of bundle.claimResults || []) {
      claim.citations = (claim.citations || []).map(citation => ({ ...citation, verification: verifiedUrls.has(citation.url) ? 'verified-input' : 'model-supplied' }));
      if (!claim.citations.some(citation => citation.verification === 'verified-input') && claim.status === 'supported') {
        claim.status = 'not_enough_evidence'; claim.explanation = `${claim.explanation || ''} No independently verified source was attached.`.trim();
      }
    }
    if (warning) { bundle.warnings ||= []; bundle.warnings.push(warning); }
    return bundle;
  }
}

module.exports = { ResearchService, candidateClaims };

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/server/ai/usage-manager.js (2026-07-10 01:52:43) =====
'use strict';

const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');

class UsageManager {
  constructor(filePath) { this.filePath = filePath; this.store = this.read(); }
  read() { try { return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(this.filePath, 'utf8')); } catch (_) { return { version: 1, users: {} }; } }
  write() { fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(this.filePath), { recursive: true }); const temp = `${this.filePath}.tmp`; fs.writeFileSync(temp, JSON.stringify(this.store, null, 2)); fs.renameSync(temp, this.filePath); }
  estimateTokens(value) { return Math.max(1, Math.ceil(String(value || '').length / 4)); }
  limits() { return { dailyTokens: Number(process.env.AI_DAILY_TOKEN_LIMIT || 250000), monthlyTokens: Number(process.env.AI_MONTHLY_TOKEN_LIMIT || 3000000) }; }
  keys(now = new Date()) { return { day: now.toISOString().slice(0, 10), month: now.toISOString().slice(0, 7) }; }
  get(userId = 'local') {
    const keys = this.keys(); const user = this.store.users[userId] || { days: {}, months: {}, requests: 0 };
    const limits = this.limits();
    return { userId, day: keys.day, month: keys.month, dailyTokens: user.days[keys.day] || 0, monthlyTokens: user.months[keys.month] || 0, requests: user.requests || 0, limits };
  }
  assertAvailable(userId, estimatedTokens) {
    const current = this.get(userId); const nextDaily = current.dailyTokens + estimatedTokens; const nextMonthly = current.monthlyTokens + estimatedTokens;
    if (nextDaily > current.limits.dailyTokens || nextMonthly > current.limits.monthlyTokens) { const error = new Error('ai_usage_limit'); error.code = 'ai_usage_limit'; error.usage = current; throw error; }
  }
  record(userId = 'local', usage = {}) {
    const keys = this.keys(); const tokens = Math.max(0, Number(usage.totalTokens || usage.total_tokens || 0));
    const user = this.store.users[userId] ||= { days: {}, months: {}, requests: 0 };
    user.days[keys.day] = (user.days[keys.day] || 0) + tokens;
    user.months[keys.month] = (user.months[keys.month] || 0) + tokens;
    user.requests += 1; user.lastUsedAt = new Date().toISOString(); this.write(); return this.get(userId);
  }
}

module.exports = { UsageManager };

let pdfBrowserPromise = null;
async function getPdfBrowser() {
    if (!pdfBrowserPromise) {
        pdfBrowserPromise = puppeteer.launch({ headless: 'new' }).catch(error => {
            pdfBrowserPromise = null;
            throw error;
        });
    }
    const browser = await pdfBrowserPromise;
    if (!browser.connected) {
        pdfBrowserPromise = null;
        return getPdfBrowser();
    }
    return browser;
}

async function closePdfBrowser() {
    if (!pdfBrowserPromise) return;
    const promise = pdfBrowserPromise;
    pdfBrowserPromise = null;
    const browser = await promise.catch(() => null);
    if (browser) await browser.close().catch(() => undefined);
}
process.once('SIGINT', () => closePdfBrowser().finally(() => process.exit(0)));
process.once('SIGTERM', () => closePdfBrowser().finally(() => process.exit(0)));

};

app.get('/vendor/:asset', (req, res) => {
    const assetPath = VENDOR_ASSETS[req.params.asset];

    if (!fs.existsSync(assetPath)) {
        return res.status(503).type('text/plain').send('Export dependency is not installed. Run npm install and restart OpenWord.');
    }
    res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'public, max-age=31536000, immutable');
    return res.sendFile(assetPath);
});
