    // The block may inherit bold from CSS, so execCommand toggles it
    expect(result.before).not.toBe(result.after);
  });

  test('italic formatting via execCommand', async ({ page }) => {
    const result = await page.evaluate(() => {
      const el = document.querySelector('.page-content-area .block-text');
      if (!el) return null;
      el.innerHTML = 'test';
      el.focus();
      const range = document.createRange();
      range.selectNodeContents(el);
      const sel = window.getSelection();
      sel.removeAllRanges();
      sel.addRange(range);
      const before = document.queryCommandState('italic');
      document.execCommand('styleWithCSS', false, true);
      document.execCommand('italic', false, null);
      const after = document.queryCommandState('italic');
      return { before, after, html: el.innerHTML };
    });
    expect(result).not.toBeNull();
    expect(result.after).toBe(true);
  });

  test('toolbar buttons respond to clicks', async ({ page }) => {
    await switchRibbonTab(page, 'home');
    await expect(page.locator('#btn-bold')).toBeVisible();
    await expect(page.locator('#btn-italic')).toBeVisible();
    await expect(page.locator('#btn-underline')).toBeVisible();
    await expect(page.locator('#btn-strikethrough')).toBeVisible();
    await expect(page.locator('#btn-code')).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('heading style changes block style', async ({ page }) => {
    const editor = page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').first();
    await editor.click();
    await page.keyboard.type('Heading Text');
    await switchRibbonTab(page, 'layout');
    await page.locator('#sel-block-style').selectOption('h1');
    const hasClass = await editor.evaluate(el => el.classList.contains('style-h1'));
    expect(hasClass).toBe(true);
  });

  test('page break button inserts a page break block', async ({ page }) => {
    const blocksBefore = await page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').count();
    await switchRibbonTab(page, 'insert');
    await page.locator('#btn-page-break').click();
    await page.waitForTimeout(300);
    const blocksAfter = await page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').count();
    expect(blocksAfter).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(blocksBefore);
  });

  test('undo reverts last typing', async ({ page }) => {
    const editor = page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').first();
    await editor.click();
    await page.keyboard.type('Hello');
    await page.locator('#btn-undo').click();
    await page.waitForTimeout(200);
  });

  test('redo restores undone typing', async ({ page }) => {
    const editor = page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').first();
    await editor.click();
    await page.keyboard.type('World');
    await page.locator('#btn-undo').click();
    await page.waitForTimeout(100);
    await page.locator('#btn-redo').click();
    await page.waitForTimeout(100);
  });

  test('insert bullet list creates list block', async ({ page }) => {
    await switchRibbonTab(page, 'home');
    await page.locator('#btn-ul').click();
    await page.waitForTimeout(500);
    const listItems = page.locator('.page-content-area ul li, .page-content-area li');
    await expect(listItems.first()).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('save status shows Saved on load', async ({ page }) => {
    const saveStatus = page.locator('#save-status');
    await expect(saveStatus).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('editor is focused on click and accepts keyboard input', async ({ page }) => {
    const editor = page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').first();
    await editor.click();
    await expect(editor).toBeFocused();
    await page.keyboard.type('Test input');
    const content = await editor.textContent();
    expect(content.trim().length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
  });

  test('pagination shows multiple pages for long content', async ({ page }) => {
    await page.evaluate(() => {
      const editor = document.querySelector('.page-content-area .block-text');
      if (editor) {
        editor.focus();
        const text = Array(300).fill('Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.').join(' ');
        document.execCommand('insertText', false, text);
      }
    });
    await page.waitForTimeout(1500);
    const pages = await page.locator('.page').count();
    expect(pages).toBeGreaterThan(1);
  });

  test('insert table creates table block in workspace', async ({ page }) => {
    await switchRibbonTab(page, 'insert');
    await page.locator('#btn-table').click();
    await page.waitForTimeout(500);
    const table = page.locator('.page-content-area table').first();
    await expect(table).toBeVisible();
    const cells = await table.locator('td').count();
    expect(cells).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(4);
  });

  test('insert image button triggers file picker', async ({ page }) => {
    const fileInput = page.locator('#inp-image-upload').first();
    await expect(fileInput).toBeAttached();
    await switchRibbonTab(page, 'insert');
    const [fileChooser] = await Promise.all([
      page.waitForEvent('filechooser', { timeout: 5000 }).catch(() => null),
      page.locator('#btn-img-inline').click()
    ]);
    expect(fileChooser).not.toBeNull();
  });

  test('view mode toggle switches between page and pageless', async ({ page }) => {
    await switchRibbonTab(page, 'view');
    await page.locator('#btn-view-web').click();
    await page.waitForTimeout(200);
    const isPageless = await page.locator('#workspace').evaluate(el => el.classList.contains('mode-pageless'));
    expect(isPageless).toBe(true);
    await page.locator('#btn-view-page').click();
    await page.waitForTimeout(200);
    const isPage = await page.locator('#workspace').evaluate(el => el.classList.contains('mode-page'));
    expect(isPage).toBe(true);
  });

  test('page count updates in status bar', async ({ page }) => {
    const pageCount = page.locator('#page-count');
    await expect(pageCount).toBeVisible();
    const text = await pageCount.textContent();
    expect(text).toContain('Page');
  });

  test('word count updates on typing', async ({ page }) => {
    const wordCount = page.locator('#word-count');
    await expect(wordCount).toBeVisible();
    const textBefore = await wordCount.textContent();
    const countBefore = parseInt(textBefore.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '')) || 0;
    const editor = page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').first();
    await editor.click();
    await page.keyboard.type(' three more unique words here ');
    await page.waitForTimeout(500);
    const textAfter = await wordCount.textContent();
    const countAfter = parseInt(textAfter.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '')) || 0;
    expect(countAfter).toBeGreaterThan(countBefore);
  });

  test('slash command opens quick-insert menu', async ({ page }) => {
    const editor = page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').first();
    await editor.click();
    await page.keyboard.type('/');
    await page.waitForTimeout(300);
    const menu = page.locator('#quick-insert-menu');
    const isVisible = await menu.evaluate(el => !el.classList.contains('hidden'));
    expect(isVisible).toBe(true);
  });

  test('markdown divider creates horizontal rule block', async ({ page }) => {
    const editor = page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').first();
    await editor.click();
    await page.keyboard.type('---');
    await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
    await page.waitForTimeout(500);
    const hrBlock = page.locator('.block-horizontal-rule');
    await expect(hrBlock.first()).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('context menu shows block-specific items', async ({ page }) => {
    const editor = page.locator('.page-content-area .block-text').first();
    await editor.click();
    await page.keyboard.type('test');
    await page.click('.page-content-area .block-text', { button: 'right' });
    await page.waitForTimeout(200);
    const menu = page.locator('#context-menu');
    await expect(menu).toBeVisible();
    const deleteItem = menu.locator('[data-action="deleteBlock"]');
    await expect(deleteItem).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('persistence dialog elements exist', async ({ page }) => {
    const backdrop = page.locator('#persistence-dialog-backdrop');
    await expect(backdrop).toBeAttached();
    const recoveryBackdrop = page.locator('#recovery-dialog-backdrop');
    await expect(recoveryBackdrop).toBeAttached();
  });
});


test('download menu makes Word and PDF exports easy to find', async ({ page }) => {
  await page.goto('/');
  await page.waitForSelector('#workspace', { timeout: 10000 });

  const trigger = page.locator('#btn-export-menu');
  await expect(trigger).toBeVisible();
  await trigger.click();

  await expect(page.locator('#export-menu [data-export-action="docx"]')).toBeVisible();
  await expect(page.locator('#export-menu [data-export-action="pdf"]')).toBeVisible();
  await expect(trigger).toHaveAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/editor-engine.test.js (2026-07-13 01:02:11) =====
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, vi } from 'vitest';
import { EditorEngine } from '../public/editor/editor-engine.js';
import { createStableId } from '../public/editor/id.js';
import { Transaction } from '../public/editor/transaction.js';
import { createTextSelection, createTextPosition } from '../public/editor/selection-model.js';
import { PositionMapper } from '../public/editor/position-mapper.js';
import { CommandRegistry } from '../public/editor/command-registry.js';
import { SelectionBridge } from '../public/editor/selection-bridge.js';

describe('createStableId', () => {
    it('creates IDs with prefix', () => {
        const id = createStableId('blk');
        expect(id).toMatch(/^blk_/);
    });

    it('creates unique IDs', () => {
        const ids = new Set();
        for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
            ids.add(createStableId('blk'));
        }
        expect(ids.size).toBe(100);
    });

    it('creates different prefixes', () => {
        const fn = createStableId('fn');
        const en = createStableId('en');
        const item = createStableId('item');
        expect(fn).toMatch(/^fn_/);
        expect(en).toMatch(/^en_/);
        expect(item).toMatch(/^item_/);
    });
});

describe('Transaction', () => {
    it('creates transaction with operations', () => {
        const tx = new Transaction({
            operations: [
                { type: 'ADD_BLOCK', index: 0, block: { id: 'blk_1', type: 'text', content: '' } }
            ]
        });
        expect(tx.operations).toHaveLength(1);
        expect(tx.timestamp).toBeGreaterThan(0);
        expect(tx.id).toBeTruthy();
    });

    it('creates empty transaction', () => {
        const tx = new Transaction();
        expect(tx.operations).toHaveLength(0);
    });
});

describe('SelectionModel', () => {
    it('creates text selection', () => {
        const sel = createTextSelection(
            { blockId: 'blk_1', offset: 5 },
            { blockId: 'blk_1', offset: 10 }
        );
        expect(sel.type).toBe('text');
        expect(sel.anchor.blockId).toBe('blk_1');
        expect(sel.anchor.offset).toBe(5);
        expect(sel.focus.blockId).toBe('blk_1');
        expect(sel.focus.offset).toBe(10);
    });

    it('creates text position', () => {
        const pos = createTextPosition('blk_1', 5);
        expect(pos.blockId).toBe('blk_1');
        expect(pos.offset).toBe(5);
        expect(pos.affinity).toBe('forward');
    });
});

describe('SelectionBridge compatibility', () => {
    it('keeps resolvePosition as a stable alias for resolveDomPosition', () => {
        const bridge = new SelectionBridge({}, { doc: { blocks: [] } });
        const expected = { container: document.body, offset: 0, host: document.body };
        bridge.resolveDomPosition = vi.fn(() => expected);

        const position = { blockId: 'blk_1', offset: 4 };
        expect(bridge.resolvePosition(position)).toBe(expected);
        expect(bridge.resolveDomPosition).toHaveBeenCalledWith(position);
    });
});

describe('PositionMapper', () => {
    it('passes through when no operations', () => {
        const pos = { blockId: 'blk_1', offset: 5 };
        const mapper = new PositionMapper({ doc: { blocks: [] } });
        const result = mapper.mapPosition(pos, []);
        expect(result.blockId).toBe('blk_1');
        expect(result.offset).toBe(5);
    });
});

describe('CommandRegistry', () => {
    it('registers and executes commands', () => {
        const registry = new CommandRegistry();
        let executed = false;
        registry.register('test', () => { executed = true; });
        registry.execute('test');
        expect(executed).toBe(true);
    });

    it('throws for unknown command', () => {
        const registry = new CommandRegistry();
        expect(() => registry.execute('unknown')).toThrow();
    });

    it('checks command existence', () => {
        const registry = new CommandRegistry();
        registry.register('exists', () => {});
        expect(registry.has('exists')).toBe(true);
        expect(registry.has('nope')).toBe(false);
    });
});

describe('EditorEngine', () => {
    let engine;

    beforeEach(() => {
        document.body.innerHTML = '<div id="workspace"><div class="page"><div class="page-content-area" contenteditable="true"></div></div></div>';
        engine = new EditorEngine({
            doc: { blocks: [], footnotes: [], endnotes: [], settings: {} },
            markDirty: () => {},
            notify: () => {},
            insertBlockAt: () => {},
            removeBlock: () => {},
            replaceBlockAt: () => {},
            splitTextBlock: () => {},
            moveBlock: () => {},
            updateBlockContent: () => {},
            addFootnote: () => {},
            addEndnote: () => {},
            signal: () => {},
            sanitizeTextContentHtml: (html) => html,
            updateBlockProps: () => {},
            updateImageProps: () => {}
        });
    });

    it('initializes without error', () => {
        expect(engine).toBeTruthy();
        expect(engine.commands).toBeTruthy();
    });

    it('registers core commands', () => {
        expect(engine.commands.has('toggleBold')).toBe(true);
        expect(engine.commands.has('toggleItalic')).toBe(true);
        expect(engine.commands.has('toggleUnderline')).toBe(true);
        expect(engine.commands.has('insertBlock')).toBe(true);
        expect(engine.commands.has('removeBlock')).toBe(true);
        expect(engine.commands.has('splitTextBlock')).toBe(true);
    });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/export-import.test.js (2026-07-15 01:07:36) =====
import { afterEach, beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import { ExportImport, sanitizeDownloadName } from '../public/export-import.js';

class FakeDocxNode {
  constructor(options) {
    this.options = options;
  }
}

function createDocxRuntime() {
  return {
    Document: FakeDocxNode,
    Paragraph: FakeDocxNode,
    TextRun: FakeDocxNode,
    ExternalHyperlink: FakeDocxNode,
    Header: FakeDocxNode,
    Footer: FakeDocxNode,
    Packer: { toBlob: vi.fn(async () => new Blob(['word-file'], { type: 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' })) },
    HeadingLevel: {
      HEADING_1: 'Heading1', HEADING_2: 'Heading2', HEADING_3: 'Heading3',
      HEADING_4: 'Heading4', HEADING_5: 'Heading5', HEADING_6: 'Heading6'
    },
    AlignmentType: { LEFT: 'left', CENTER: 'center', RIGHT: 'right', JUSTIFIED: 'both' },
    PageOrientation: { PORTRAIT: 'portrait', LANDSCAPE: 'landscape' },
    PageNumber: { CURRENT: 'current' }
  };
}

function createController() {
  const state = {
    doc: {
      id: 'doc_export_test',
      title: 'Quarter / Report:*?',
      blocks: [{ id: 'block_1', type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: '<strong>Hello</strong> world' }],
      settings: { pageSize: 'letter', orientation: 'portrait', margins: { top: 1, right: 1, bottom: 1, left: 1 } },
      styles: { normal: { id: 'normal', name: 'Normal', fontFamily: 'Arial', fontSize: 12 } }
    },
    flushSave: vi.fn(async () => undefined)
  };
  return {
    state,
    syncCurrentTextBlockFromDom: vi.fn(),
    toolbar: { showShellToast: vi.fn() }
  };
}

describe('DOCX export', () => {
  let originalDocx;
  let createObjectURL;
  let revokeObjectURL;
  let clickSpy;

  beforeEach(() => {
    originalDocx = globalThis.docx;
    globalThis.docx = createDocxRuntime();
    createObjectURL = vi.fn(() => 'blob:openword-export');
    revokeObjectURL = vi.fn();
    Object.defineProperty(window.URL, 'createObjectURL', { configurable: true, value: createObjectURL });
    Object.defineProperty(window.URL, 'revokeObjectURL', { configurable: true, value: revokeObjectURL });
    clickSpy = vi.spyOn(HTMLAnchorElement.prototype, 'click').mockImplementation(() => undefined);
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    globalThis.docx = originalDocx;
    clickSpy.mockRestore();
    vi.restoreAllMocks();
  });

  it('creates safe Word filenames without duplicating the extension', () => {
    expect(sanitizeDownloadName('Quarter / Report:*?', '.docx')).toBe('Quarter Report.docx');
    expect(sanitizeDownloadName('Board Minutes.docx', 'docx')).toBe('Board Minutes.docx');
    expect(sanitizeDownloadName('CON', '.docx')).toBe('_CON.docx');
  });

  it('builds and downloads a DOCX from the current document model', async () => {
    const controller = createController();
    const exporter = new ExportImport(controller);
    let downloadedName = '';
    clickSpy.mockImplementation(function captureDownload() {
      downloadedName = this.download;
    });

    const stateEvents = [];
    document.addEventListener('opendoc:export-state', event => stateEvents.push(event.detail), { once: false });
    const result = await exporter.exportDOCX();

    expect(result).toBeInstanceOf(Blob);
    expect(controller.syncCurrentTextBlockFromDom).toHaveBeenCalledOnce();
    expect(controller.state.flushSave).toHaveBeenCalledOnce();
    expect(globalThis.docx.Packer.toBlob).toHaveBeenCalledOnce();
    expect(createObjectURL).toHaveBeenCalledWith(result);
    expect(downloadedName).toBe('Quarter Report.docx');
    expect(controller.toolbar.showShellToast).toHaveBeenLastCalledWith('Word document downloaded');
    expect(stateEvents.at(0)).toMatchObject({ format: 'docx', busy: true });
    expect(stateEvents.at(-1)).toMatchObject({ format: 'docx', busy: false });
  });

  it('fails cleanly when the DOCX runtime is unavailable', async () => {
    delete globalThis.docx;
    const controller = createController();
    const exporter = new ExportImport(controller);

    await expect(exporter.exportDOCX()).resolves.toBe(false);
    expect(clickSpy).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
    expect(controller.toolbar.showShellToast).toHaveBeenLastCalledWith(expect.stringContaining('Word export components are unavailable'));
  });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/formatter.test.js (2026-07-01 13:17:53) =====
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { Formatter } from './setup.js';

describe('Formatter', () => {
  describe('normalizeText', () => {
    it('returns empty string for null/undefined', () => {
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText(null)).toBe('');
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText(undefined)).toBe('');
    });

    it('replaces NBSP with regular space and trims', () => {
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('\u00A0')).toBe('');
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('a\u00A0b')).toBe('a b');
    });

    it('removes zero-width characters', () => {
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('\u200Bfoo\u200D')).toBe('foo');
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('\uFEFF')).toBe('');
    });

    it('collapses multiple whitespace into single space', () => {
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('hello   world')).toBe('hello world');
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('a    b')).toBe('a b');
    });

    it('trims leading and trailing whitespace', () => {
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('  hello  ')).toBe('hello');
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('\n\t hello \n')).toBe('hello');
    });

    it('returns empty string for whitespace-only input', () => {
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('   ')).toBe('');
      expect(Formatter.normalizeText('\n\t')).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('escapeHtml', () => {
    it('escapes ampersand', () => {
      expect(Formatter.escapeHtml('a & b')).toBe('a &amp; b');
    });

    it('escapes less-than', () => {
      expect(Formatter.escapeHtml('<tag>')).toBe('&lt;tag&gt;');
    });

    it('escapes greater-than', () => {
      expect(Formatter.escapeHtml('a > b')).toBe('a &gt; b');
    });

    it('escapes double quote', () => {
      expect(Formatter.escapeHtml('he said "hello"')).toBe('he said &quot;hello&quot;');
    });

    it('escapes single quote', () => {
      expect(Formatter.escapeHtml("it's")).toBe('it&#39;s');
    });

    it('handles null and undefined', () => {
      expect(Formatter.escapeHtml(null)).toBe('');
      expect(Formatter.escapeHtml(undefined)).toBe('');
    });

    it('leaves normal text unchanged', () => {
      expect(Formatter.escapeHtml('Hello World 123')).toBe('Hello World 123');
    });
  });

  describe('preservePlainTextSpacing', () => {
    it('replaces tabs with 4 spaces then applies leading-space rule', () => {
      expect(Formatter.preservePlainTextSpacing('\t')).toBe('&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;');
      expect(Formatter.preservePlainTextSpacing('a\tb')).toBe('a   &nbsp;b');
    });

    it('replaces leading spaces with &nbsp;', () => {
      expect(Formatter.preservePlainTextSpacing('  hello')).toBe('&nbsp;&nbsp;hello');
    });

    it('replaces multiple consecutive spaces with space+&nbsp;', () => {
      const result = Formatter.preservePlainTextSpacing('a  b');
      expect(result).toBe('a &nbsp;b');
    });

    it('handles null/undefined', () => {
      expect(Formatter.preservePlainTextSpacing(null)).toBe('');
      expect(Formatter.preservePlainTextSpacing(undefined)).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('plainTextToHtml', () => {
    it('converts simple text', () => {
      expect(Formatter.plainTextToHtml('hello')).toBe('hello');
    });

    it('converts newlines to <br>', () => {
      expect(Formatter.plainTextToHtml('hello\nworld')).toBe('hello<br>world');
      expect(Formatter.plainTextToHtml('line1\nline2\nline3')).toBe('line1<br>line2<br>line3');
    });

    it('returns <br> for empty input', () => {
      expect(Formatter.plainTextToHtml('')).toBe('<br>');
    });

    it('handles carriage return and mixed line endings', () => {
      expect(Formatter.plainTextToHtml('a\r\nb')).toBe('a<br>b');
      expect(Formatter.plainTextToHtml('a\rb')).toBe('a<br>b');
    });

    it('preserves leading spaces as &nbsp;', () => {
      const result = Formatter.plainTextToHtml('  hello');
      expect(result).toContain('&nbsp;');
    });

    it('escapes HTML special characters', () => {
      expect(Formatter.plainTextToHtml('<b>bold</b>')).toBe('&lt;b&gt;bold&lt;/b&gt;');
    });
  });

  describe('isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml', () => {
    it('returns true for null/undefined/empty string', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml(null)).toBe(true);
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml(undefined)).toBe(true);
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('')).toBe(true);
    });

    it('returns true for only <br> tags', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<br>')).toBe(true);
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<br><br>')).toBe(true);
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<br />')).toBe(true);
    });

    it('returns true for only &nbsp;', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('&nbsp;')).toBe(true);
    });

    it('returns true for mixed empty markup', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<br>&nbsp;<br>')).toBe(true);
    });

    it('returns false when text content exists', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('hello')).toBe(false);
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<b>hello</b>')).toBe(false);
    });

    it('returns false when img tag present', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<img src="x.png">')).toBe(false);
    });

    it('returns false when table tag present', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<table><tr><td>x</td></tr></table>')).toBe(false);
    });

    it('strips HTML comments before evaluating', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<!-- comment -->')).toBe(true);
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<!-- comment -->hello')).toBe(false);
    });

    it('strips <hr> tags as non-meaningful', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isMeaningfullyEmptyHtml('<hr>')).toBe(true);
    });
  });

  describe('isBlockLikeTextContainer', () => {
    it('returns true for block-like tags', () => {
      const blockTags = ['div', 'p', 'section', 'article', 'header', 'footer', 'blockquote', 'pre'];
      blockTags.forEach(tag => {
        expect(Formatter.isBlockLikeTextContainer(tag)).toBe(true);
      });
    });

    it('is case insensitive', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isBlockLikeTextContainer('DIV')).toBe(true);
      expect(Formatter.isBlockLikeTextContainer('P')).toBe(true);
    });

    it('returns false for inline tags', () => {
      const inlineTags = ['span', 'a', 'strong', 'em', 'b', 'i', 'u', 'code'];
      inlineTags.forEach(tag => {
        expect(Formatter.isBlockLikeTextContainer(tag)).toBe(false);
      });
    });

    it('returns false for null/undefined/empty string', () => {
      expect(Formatter.isBlockLikeTextContainer(null)).toBe(false);
      expect(Formatter.isBlockLikeTextContainer(undefined)).toBe(false);
      expect(Formatter.isBlockLikeTextContainer('')).toBe(false);
    });
  });

  describe('getPlainTextFromHtml', () => {
    it('extracts plain text from simple HTML', () => {
      expect(Formatter.getPlainTextFromHtml('hello')).toBe('hello');
      expect(Formatter.getPlainTextFromHtml('<p>hello</p>')).toBe('hello');
    });

    it('converts <br> to newline', () => {
      expect(Formatter.getPlainTextFromHtml('hello<br>world')).toBe('hello\nworld');
    });

    it('handles nested tags', () => {
      expect(Formatter.getPlainTextFromHtml('<div><p><b>bold</b> text</p></div>')).toBe('bold text');
    });

    it('returns empty string for empty/self-closing input', () => {
      expect(Formatter.getPlainTextFromHtml('')).toBe('');
      expect(Formatter.getPlainTextFromHtml(null)).toBe('');
      expect(Formatter.getPlainTextFromHtml(undefined)).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('getTextLengthFromHtml', () => {
    it('counts text length correctly', () => {
      expect(Formatter.getTextLengthFromHtml('hello')).toBe(5);
      expect(Formatter.getTextLengthFromHtml('<b>hello</b>')).toBe(5);
    });

    it('counts <br> as one character', () => {
      expect(Formatter.getTextLengthFromHtml('a<br>b')).toBe(3);
    });

    it('returns 0 for empty HTML', () => {
      expect(Formatter.getTextLengthFromHtml('')).toBe(0);
      expect(Formatter.getTextLengthFromHtml('<br>')).toBe(1);
    });
  });

  describe('normalizeTextBlockHtml', () => {
    it('returns <br> for empty input with default emptyAsBr=true', () => {
      expect(Formatter.normalizeTextBlockHtml('')).toBe('<br>');
      expect(Formatter.normalizeTextBlockHtml(null)).toBe('<br>');
      expect(Formatter.normalizeTextBlockHtml(undefined)).toBe('<br>');
    });

    it('returns empty string for empty input when emptyAsBr=false', () => {
      expect(Formatter.normalizeTextBlockHtml('', { emptyAsBr: false })).toBe('');
    });

    it('strips HTML comments', () => {
      const result = Formatter.normalizeTextBlockHtml('hello<!-- comment -->world');
      expect(result).toBe('helloworld');
    });

    it('removes zero-width characters', () => {
      const result = Formatter.normalizeTextBlockHtml('he\u200Bllo');
      expect(result).toBe('hello');
    });

    it('normalizes nested block containers', () => {
      const result = Formatter.normalizeTextBlockHtml('<p>hello</p><p>world</p>');
      expect(result).toBe('hello<br>world');
    });
  });

  describe('splitHtmlByTextOffset', () => {
    it('returns empty a and full b when offset is 0', () => {
      const result = Formatter.splitHtmlByTextOffset('hello world', 0);
      expect(result.a).toBe('');
      expect(result.b).toBe('hello world');
    });

    it('returns full a and empty b when offset >= length', () => {
      const result = Formatter.splitHtmlByTextOffset('hi', 10);
      expect(result.a).toBe('hi');
      expect(result.b).toBe('');
    });

    it('splits simple text at offset', () => {
      const result = Formatter.splitHtmlByTextOffset('hello', 2);
      expect(result.a).toBe('he');
      expect(result.b).toBe('llo');
    });

    it('splits HTML with tags', () => {
      const result = Formatter.splitHtmlByTextOffset('<b>hello</b>', 2);
      expect(result.a).toBe('<b>he</b>');
      expect(result.b).toBe('<b>llo</b>');
    });

    it('handles empty input', () => {
      const result = Formatter.splitHtmlByTextOffset('', 0);
      expect(result.a).toBe('');
      expect(result.b).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('parseHTMLToBlocks', () => {
    it('parses simple paragraph into text block', () => {
      const blocks = Formatter.parseHTMLToBlocks('<p>Hello World</p>');
      expect(blocks.length).toBe(1);
      expect(blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
      expect(blocks[0].style).toBe('normal');
    });

    it('parses h1 and h2 into blocks with appropriate style', () => {
      const blocks = Formatter.parseHTMLToBlocks('<h1>Title</h1><h2>Subtitle</h2>');
      expect(blocks.length).toBe(2);
      expect(blocks[0].style).toBe('h1');
      expect(blocks[1].style).toBe('h2');
    });

    it('parses blockquote into quote style', () => {
      const blocks = Formatter.parseHTMLToBlocks('<blockquote>Quote text</blockquote>');
      expect(blocks.length).toBe(1);
      expect(blocks[0].style).toBe('quote');
    });

    it('parses pre tag as preserved whitespace block', () => {
      const blocks = Formatter.parseHTMLToBlocks('<pre>  code  </pre>');
      expect(blocks.length).toBe(1);
      expect(blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
      expect(blocks[0].preserveWhitespace).toBe(true);
    });

    it('parses img tag as image block', () => {
      const blocks = Formatter.parseHTMLToBlocks('<img src="test.png">');
      expect(blocks.length).toBe(1);
      expect(blocks[0].type).toBe('image');
    });

    it('returns empty array for empty input', () => {
      const blocks = Formatter.parseHTMLToBlocks('');
      expect(Array.isArray(blocks)).toBe(true);
    });
  });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/object-wrap-proxy.test.js (2026-07-03 19:16:02) =====
/* @vitest-environment jsdom */
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import { Renderer } from '../public/renderer.js';
import { generatePageHtml } from '../public/page-layout.mjs';

function createRenderer() {
  const renderer = Object.create(Renderer.prototype);
  renderer.zoom = 1;
  return renderer;
}

function textBox(overrides = {}) {
  return {
    id: 'obj_box',
    type: 'object',
    objectType: 'textBox',
    anchor: { blockId: 'p1', moveWithText: true },
    layout: { mode: 'floating', relativeTo: 'paragraph', x: 300, y: 40, width: 200, height: 100, zIndex: 2 },
    wrap: { type: 'tight', side: 'both', distance: { top: 8, right: 8, bottom: 8, left: 8 } },
    textBox: { blocks: [{ id: 'tb1', type: 'text', content: 'Box' }] },
    ...overrides
  };
}

describe('floating object wrap proxies', () => {
  it('matches the visible object geometry instead of collapsing to the page edge', () => {
    const renderer = createRenderer();
    const container = document.createElement('div');
    Object.defineProperty(container, 'clientWidth', { value: 600 });
    const proxy = renderer.createObjectWrapProxy(textBox(), 1, container, { x: 300, y: 40 });

    expect(proxy.style.float).toBe('right');
    expect(proxy.style.width).toBe('216px');
    expect(proxy.style.height).toBe('116px');
    expect(proxy.style.marginTop).toBe('32px');
    expect(proxy.style.marginRight).toBe('92px');
    expect(proxy.style.shapeOutside).toBe('margin-box');
  });

  it('keeps paragraph-relative y coordinates relative to the anchor insertion point', () => {
    const renderer = createRenderer();
    const page = document.createElement('div');
    const content = document.createElement('div');
    page.appendChild(content);
    page.getBoundingClientRect = () => ({ left: 0, top: 0 });
    content.getBoundingClientRect = () => ({ left: 96, top: 96 });

    expect(renderer.resolveWrapProxyOffsets(textBox(), page, content, null)).toEqual({ x: 300, y: 40 });
  });

  it('emits the print proxy next to the anchor and the visible object separately', () => {
    const html = generatePageHtml([
      { id: 'p1', type: 'text', content: 'Paragraph text that should wrap.' },
      textBox()
    ], { pageSize: 'letter', margins: { top: 1, right: 1, bottom: 1, left: 1 } }, { styles: {} });

    const anchorIndex = html.indexOf('data-block-id="p1"');
    const proxyIndex = html.indexOf('print-wrap-proxy-tight');
    const objectIndex = html.indexOf('data-block-id="obj_box"');
    expect(proxyIndex).toBeGreaterThan(-1);
    expect(proxyIndex).toBeLessThan(anchorIndex);
    expect(objectIndex).toBeGreaterThan(anchorIndex);
  });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/object-wrap-regressions.test.js (2026-07-03 17:42:58) =====
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import {
  createTextBoxObject,
  isFlowObject,
  normalizeObjectBlock,
  usesWrapProxy,
} from '../public/editor/objects/object-model.js';
import { generatePageHtml } from '../public/page-layout.mjs';

describe('floating text-box wrapping', () => {
  it('keeps tight-wrapped text boxes floating and preserves coordinates', () => {
    const block = createTextBoxObject({
      id: 'obj_textbox',
      anchor: { blockId: 'blk_anchor' },
      layout: {
        mode: 'floating',
        relativeTo: 'paragraph',
        x: 72,
        y: 44,
        width: 260,
        height: 130,
      },
      wrap: { type: 'tight', side: 'right' },
    });
    block.revision = { id: 'rev_object', type: 'insertion' };

    const normalized = normalizeObjectBlock(block).block;

    expect(isFlowObject(normalized)).toBe(false);
    expect(usesWrapProxy(normalized)).toBe(true);
    expect(normalized.layout).toMatchObject({ mode: 'floating', x: 72, y: 44 });
    expect(normalized.revision).toEqual(block.revision);
  });

  it('exports a separate wrap proxy without floating the visible text box', () => {
    const block = createTextBoxObject({
      id: 'obj_textbox',
      layout: { mode: 'floating', x: 80, y: 120, width: 240, height: 140 },
      wrap: { type: 'tight', side: 'right' },
      content: 'Wrapped box',
    });

    const html = generatePageHtml(
      [{ id: 'blk_anchor', type: 'text', content: 'Paragraph' }, block],
      { pageSize: 'letter', margins: { top: 1, right: 1, bottom: 1, left: 1 } },
      { styles: {}, sections: [], header: {}, footer: {} },
    );

    expect(html).toContain('print-wrap-proxy-tight');
    expect(html).toContain('wrap-tight positioned-object');
    expect(html).toContain('left:80px;top:120px;margin:0;');
    expect(html).toContain('.print-object.positioned-object{position:absolute}');
  });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/page-metrics.test.js (2026-07-09 05:08:29) =====
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { getPageMetrics, normalizeMargins } from '../public/layout/page-metrics.js';

describe('page metrics', () => {
  it('computes shared page and content metrics', () => {
    const metrics = getPageMetrics({ pageSize: 'letter', margins: { top: 1, right: 1, bottom: 1, left: 1 } }, 1.25);
    expect(metrics.widthIn).toBe(8.5);
    expect(metrics.contentWidthPx).toBeCloseTo(6.5 * 96);
    expect(metrics.pageWidthScreenPx).toBeCloseTo(8.5 * 96 * 1.25);
  });
  it('clamps unsafe margins', () => {
    const margins = normalizeMargins({ left: 99, right: -5, top: 0, bottom: 99 }, 'letter');
    expect(margins.left).toBeLessThan(4.3);
    expect(margins.right).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0.15);
  });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/paste-normalizer.test.js (2026-07-09 05:08:31) =====
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { JSDOM } from 'jsdom';
import { normalizeClipboardToBlocks, plainTextToRichBlocks } from '../public/editor/clipboard/paste-normalizer.js';

describe('paste normalizer', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    const dom = new JSDOM('<!doctype html><html><body></body></html>', { url: 'http://localhost/' });
    global.document = dom.window.document;
    global.window = dom.window;
    global.Node = dom.window.Node;
    global.DOMParser = dom.window.DOMParser;
    global.localStorage = dom.window.localStorage;
  });

  it('keeps plain text paragraph boundaries', () => {
    const blocks = plainTextToRichBlocks('First paragraph.\n\nSecond paragraph.\nThird sentence.');
    expect(blocks.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(2);
    expect(blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
  });

  it('prefers plain text when html collapses a multi-paragraph paste', () => {
    const text = 'To: Councillor\nSubject: Request\n\nDear Councillor,\n\nBody text.';
    const blocks = normalizeClipboardToBlocks({ html: '<b>To: Councillor Subject: Request Dear Councillor Body text.</b>', text });
    expect(blocks.length).toBeGreaterThan(1);
    expect(blocks.every(block => block.type !== 'text' || !/font-weight/i.test(block.content || ''))).toBe(true);
  });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/performance-core.test.js (2026-07-18 03:18:27) =====
/* @vitest-environment jsdom */

import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import { StateManager } from '../public/state.js';
import { Transaction } from '../public/editor/transaction.js';
import { Renderer } from '../public/renderer.js';
import { EditorController } from '../public/controller.js';

describe('performance core: indexed document access', () => {
  let state;

  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '<div id="save-status"></div>';
    state = new StateManager();
    state.doc.blocks = [
      { id: 'blk_a', type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'A' },
      { id: 'blk_b', type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'B' },
      { id: 'blk_c', type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'C' }
    ];
    state.rebuildBlockIndex();
  });

  it('keeps O(1) block indexes correct after add, remove and move operations', () => {
    state.applyOp({
      type: 'ADD_BLOCK',
      index: 1,
      block: { id: 'blk_new', type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'New' }
    }, false, { dirty: false });
    expect(state.getBlockIndexById('blk_new')).toBe(1);
    expect(state.getBlockIndexById('blk_b')).toBe(2);

    state.applyOp({ type: 'REMOVE_BLOCK', blockId: 'blk_a', index: 0 }, false, { dirty: false });
    expect(state.getBlockIndexById('blk_new')).toBe(0);
    expect(state.getBlockIndexById('blk_c')).toBe(2);

    state.applyOp({ type: 'MOVE_BLOCK', blockId: 'blk_c', fromIndex: 2, toIndex: 0 }, false, { dirty: false });
    expect(state.getBlockIndexById('blk_c')).toBe(0);
    expect(state.getBlockById('blk_new')?.content).toBe('New');
  });

  it('rebuilds the index once for a batch of indexed structural operations', () => {
    const rebuild = vi.spyOn(state, 'rebuildBlockIndex');
    const transaction = new Transaction({
      source: 'paste',
      operations: [
        { type: 'ADD_BLOCK', index: 1, block: { id: 'blk_1', type: 'text', content: '1' } },
        { type: 'ADD_BLOCK', index: 2, block: { id: 'blk_2', type: 'text', content: '2' } },
        { type: 'ADD_BLOCK', index: 3, block: { id: 'blk_3', type: 'text', content: '3' } }
      ]
    });

    state.applyTransaction(transaction, false, { dirty: false });

    expect(rebuild).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
    expect(state.getBlockIndexById('blk_3')).toBe(3);
  });

  it('refreshes indexes between structural operations inside one transaction', () => {
    const transaction = new Transaction({
      source: 'test',
      operations: [
        {
          type: 'ADD_BLOCK',
          index: 1,
          blockId: 'blk_inserted',
          block: { id: 'blk_inserted', type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'Inserted' }
        },
        {
          type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE',
          blockId: 'blk_inserted',
          block: { id: 'blk_inserted', type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'Updated' }
        }
      ]
    });

    state.applyTransaction(transaction, false, { dirty: false });
    expect(state.getBlockIndexById('blk_inserted')).toBe(1);
    expect(state.getBlockById('blk_inserted')?.content).toBe('Updated');
  });
});

describe('performance core: renderer registries and layout reads', () => {
  it('reuses the DOM registry for rendered block lookup', () => {
    document.body.innerHTML = `
      <div id="workspace">
        <div data-block-id="blk_a" data-index="0"></div>
        <div data-block-id="blk_a" data-index="0" data-split-part="1"></div>
        <div data-block-id="blk_b" data-index="1"></div>
      </div>`;
    const renderer = new Renderer('workspace', { doc: { settings: {}, blocks: [] } });
    renderer.rebuildDomRegistry();

    expect(renderer.getRenderedElementsByBlockId('blk_a')).toHaveLength(2);
    expect(renderer.getRenderedElementsByIndex(1)).toHaveLength(1);
  });

  it('invalidates stale deferred pagination generations', () => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '<div id="workspace"></div>';
    const renderer = new Renderer('workspace', { doc: { settings: {}, blocks: [] } });
    const first = renderer.beginPaginationGeneration();
    expect(renderer.isPaginationCurrent(first)).toBe(true);

    const second = renderer.beginPaginationGeneration();
    expect(second).toBeGreaterThan(first);
    expect(renderer.isPaginationCurrent(first)).toBe(false);
    expect(renderer.isPaginationCurrent(second)).toBe(true);
  });

  it('checks the appended candidate without scanning every previous child', () => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '<div id="workspace"><div id="area"><div id="old"></div><div id="candidate"></div></div></div>';
    const renderer = new Renderer('workspace', { doc: { settings: {}, blocks: [] } });
    const area = document.getElementById('area');
    const old = document.getElementById('old');
    const candidate = document.getElementById('candidate');

    Object.defineProperty(area, 'clientHeight', { configurable: true, value: 100 });
    Object.defineProperty(area, 'scrollHeight', { configurable: true, value: 100 });
    area.getBoundingClientRect = vi.fn(() => ({ top: 0, bottom: 100, height: 100 }));
    old.getBoundingClientRect = vi.fn(() => ({ top: 0, bottom: 60, height: 60 }));
    candidate.getBoundingClientRect = vi.fn(() => ({ top: 60, bottom: 90, height: 30 }));

    expect(renderer.checkOverflow(area, candidate)).toBe(false);
    expect(candidate.getBoundingClientRect).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
    expect(old.getBoundingClientRect).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
  });
});

describe('performance core: coordinated editor updates', () => {
  it('updates document statistics using only dirty blocks', () => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '<span id="word-count"></span><span id="char-count"></span>';
    const blocks = [
      { id: 'blk_a', type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'one two' },
      { id: 'blk_b', type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'three' }
    ];
    const state = {
      doc: { blocks },
      getBlockById: id => blocks.find(block => block.id === id) || null
    };
    const controller = Object.assign(Object.create(EditorController.prototype), {
      state,
      _blockStatsCache: new Map(),
      _documentStats: { words: 0, chars: 0 },
      _statsScratchElement: null
    });

    controller.updateStats(blocks);
    expect(document.getElementById('word-count').innerText).toBe('3 words');

    blocks[0].content = 'one two four five';
    expect(controller.updateStatsIncrementally(blocks, ['blk_a'])).toBe(true);
    expect(document.getElementById('word-count').innerText).toBe('5 words');
    expect(controller._blockStatsCache.get('blk_b')?.words).toBe(1);
  });

  it('deduplicates repeated selection notifications', () => {
    const selection = {
      type: 'text',
      anchor: { blockId: 'blk_a', offset: 1 },
      focus: { blockId: 'blk_a', offset: 1 },
      marks: ['bold']
    };
    const signal = vi.fn();
    const controller = Object.assign(Object.create(EditorController.prototype), {
      engine: { captureSelection: vi.fn(() => selection) },
      state: { getBlockIndexById: vi.fn(() => 0), signal },
      toolbar: {
        updateToolbarState: vi.fn(),
        updateContextualToolbar: vi.fn(),
        updateFloatingToolbar: vi.fn()
      },
      getActiveBlockContextFromSelection: vi.fn(() => ({ index: 0, blockId: 'blk_a', el: document.body })),
      _selectionSignature: null,
      activeBlockId: null,
      activeBlockIndex: null,
      lastFocusedBlockEl: null
    });

    controller.flushSelectionSync();
    controller.flushSelectionSync();

    expect(controller.engine.captureSelection).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);
    expect(controller.toolbar.updateToolbarState).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
    expect(signal).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
  });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/setup.js (2026-07-03 19:16:19) =====
import { vi } from 'vitest';

if (typeof CSS === 'undefined') {
  globalThis.CSS = {};
}
if (!CSS.escape) {
  CSS.escape = (value) => String(value).replace(/([!"#$%&'()*+,./:;<=>?@[\]^`{|}~])/g, '\\$1');
}

document.body.innerHTML = '<div id="save-status">Saved</div>';

globalThis.fetch = vi.fn(() =>
  Promise.resolve(new Response('{}', { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }))
);

export { Formatter } from '../public/formatter.js';
export { HistoryManager } from '../public/history.js';
export { StateManager } from '../public/state.js';

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/state.test.js (2026-07-09 17:26:41) =====
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, vi } from 'vitest';
import { Formatter, HistoryManager, StateManager } from './setup.js';

describe('StateManager', () => {
  let sm;

  beforeEach(() => {
    sm = new StateManager();
  });

  describe('constructor', () => {
    it('initializes with empty document structure', () => {
      expect(sm.doc).toBeDefined();
      expect(sm.doc.blocks).toEqual([]);
      expect(sm.doc.id).toBeNull();
      expect(sm.doc.title).toBe('Loading...');
      expect(sm.doc.settings.pageSize).toBe('letter');
      expect(sm.doc.settings.margins).toEqual({ top: 1, bottom: 1, left: 1, right: 1 });
    });

    it('initializes history manager', () => {
      expect(sm.history).toBeInstanceOf(HistoryManager);
    });

    it('initializes dirty flag as false', () => {
      expect(sm.isDirty).toBe(false);
    });

    it('initializes hfMode as false', () => {
      expect(sm.hfMode).toBe(false);
    });
  });

  describe('subscribe / notify', () => {
    it('calls registered listeners on notify', () => {
      const listener = vi.fn();
      sm.subscribe(listener);
      sm.notify('TEST_OP');
      expect(listener).toHaveBeenCalledWith(sm.doc, sm.hfMode, 'TEST_OP');
    });
  });

  describe('clamp', () => {
    it('clamps value within range', () => {
      expect(sm.clamp(5, 0, 10)).toBe(5);
      expect(sm.clamp(-1, 0, 10)).toBe(0);
      expect(sm.clamp(15, 0, 10)).toBe(10);
    });

    it('handles edge cases', () => {
      expect(sm.clamp(0, 0, 0)).toBe(0);
      expect(sm.clamp(5, 5, 5)).toBe(5);
    });
  });

  describe('getPageMetrics', () => {
    it('returns letter dimensions by default', () => {
      const metrics = sm.getPageMetrics();
      expect(metrics.width).toBe(8.5);
      expect(metrics.height).toBe(11);
    });

    it('returns letter dimensions for letter', () => {
      const metrics = sm.getPageMetrics('letter');
      expect(metrics.width).toBe(8.5);
      expect(metrics.height).toBe(11);
    });

    it('returns A4 dimensions for a4', () => {
      const metrics = sm.getPageMetrics('a4');
      expect(metrics.width).toBe(8.27);
      expect(metrics.height).toBe(11.69);
    });
  });

  describe('sanitizeMargins', () => {
    it('clamps margins to valid range for letter page', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeMargins({ top: 0.5, bottom: 0.5, left: 0.5, right: 0.5 });
      expect(result.top).toBe(0.5);
      expect(result.left).toBe(0.5);
    });

    it('caps excessive margins', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeMargins({ top: 10, bottom: 10, left: 10, right: 10 });
      expect(result.top).toBeLessThanOrEqual(9);
      expect(result.left).toBeLessThanOrEqual(6.5);
    });

    it('ensures minimum margin of 0.25', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeMargins({ top: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0, right: 0 });
      expect(result.top).toBe(0.25);
      expect(result.left).toBe(0.25);
    });

    it('uses defaults for non-finite values', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeMargins({ top: NaN, bottom: 'invalid', left: undefined, right: null });
      expect(result.top).toBe(1);
      expect(result.bottom).toBe(1);
      expect(result.left).toBe(1);
      expect(result.right).toBe(1);
    });

    it('scales horizontal margins proportionally when sum exceeds max', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeMargins({ top: 1, bottom: 1, left: 5, right: 5 });
      expect(result.left + result.right).toBeLessThanOrEqual(6.5);
    });
  });

  describe('normalizeText', () => {
    it('normalizes whitespace', () => {
      expect(sm.normalizeText('  hello   world  ')).toBe('hello world');
      expect(sm.normalizeText('\u00A0hello')).toBe('hello');
      expect(sm.normalizeText('\u200Bfoo')).toBe('foo');
    });
  });

  describe('isMeaningfullyEmptyTextBlock', () => {
    it('returns true for empty content text block', () => {
      const block = { type: 'text', content: '' };
      const tmp = document.createElement('div');
      expect(sm.isMeaningfullyEmptyTextBlock(block, tmp)).toBe(true);
    });

    it('returns false for non-text block type', () => {
      const block = { type: 'pageBreak' };
      const tmp = document.createElement('div');
      expect(sm.isMeaningfullyEmptyTextBlock(block, tmp)).toBe(false);
    });

    it('returns true for block with only <br> tags', () => {
      const block = { type: 'text', content: '<br><br>' };
      const tmp = document.createElement('div');
      expect(sm.isMeaningfullyEmptyTextBlock(block, tmp)).toBe(true);
    });

    it('returns false for block with real text', () => {
      const block = { type: 'text', content: 'hello' };
      const tmp = document.createElement('div');
      expect(sm.isMeaningfullyEmptyTextBlock(block, tmp)).toBe(false);
    });

    it('returns false for null/undefined block', () => {
      const tmp = document.createElement('div');
      expect(sm.isMeaningfullyEmptyTextBlock(null, tmp)).toBe(false);
      expect(sm.isMeaningfullyEmptyTextBlock(undefined, tmp)).toBe(false);
    });
  });

  describe('sanitizeBlocks', () => {
    it('returns a default block when blocks array is missing', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeBlocks(null);
      expect(result.changed).toBe(true);
      expect(result.blocks.length).toBe(1);
      expect(result.blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
    });

    it('filters out null/undefined blocks', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeBlocks([null, undefined, { type: 'text', content: 'hello' }]);
      expect(result.blocks.length).toBe(1);
    });

    it('assigns IDs to blocks missing them', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeBlocks([{ type: 'text', content: 'hello' }]);
      expect(result.blocks[0].id).toBeDefined();
      expect(result.changed).toBe(true);
    });

    it('collapses consecutive empty text blocks beyond limit of 2', () => {
      const id = Date.now();
      const blocks = [
        { type: 'text', content: '', id },
        { type: 'text', content: '', id: id + 1 },
        { type: 'text', content: '', id: id + 2 },
        { type: 'text', content: '', id: id + 3 },
      ];
      const result = sm.sanitizeBlocks(blocks);
      expect(result.blocks.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(2);
    });

    it('collapses consecutive pageBreaks to one', () => {
      const id = Date.now();
      const blocks = [
        { type: 'text', content: 'a', id },
        { type: 'pageBreak', id: id + 1 },
        { type: 'pageBreak', id: id + 2 },
        { type: 'text', content: 'b', id: id + 3 },
      ];
      const result = sm.sanitizeBlocks(blocks);
      const pageBreaks = result.blocks.filter(b => b.type === 'pageBreak');
      expect(pageBreaks.length).toBe(1);
    });

    it('removes leading pageBreaks', () => {
      const id = Date.now();
      const blocks = [
        { type: 'pageBreak', id: id },
        { type: 'text', content: 'hello', id: id + 1 },
      ];
      const result = sm.sanitizeBlocks(blocks);
      expect(result.blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
      expect(result.changed).toBe(true);
    });

    it('removes trailing pageBreaks', () => {
      const id = Date.now();
      const blocks = [
        { type: 'text', content: 'hello', id },
        { type: 'pageBreak', id: id + 1 },
      ];
      const result = sm.sanitizeBlocks(blocks);
      const last = result.blocks[result.blocks.length - 1];
      expect(last.type).not.toBe('pageBreak');
    });

    it('ensures at least one block exists', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeBlocks([{ type: 'pageBreak', id: 1 }]);
      expect(result.blocks.length).toBe(1);
      expect(result.blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
    });
  });

  describe('addBlock', () => {
    it('adds a text block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text', 'normal');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(1);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].style).toBe('normal');
    });

    it('adds a heading 1 block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text', 'h1');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].style).toBe('h1');
    });

    it('adds a bullet list block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('ul');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('ul');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].items).toBeDefined();
    });

    it('adds an ordered list block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('ol');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('ol');
    });

    it('adds a table block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('table');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('table');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].rows).toBeDefined();
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].colWidths).toBeDefined();
    });

    it('adds a page break block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('pageBreak');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('pageBreak');
    });

    it('adds a floating block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('floating');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('floating');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].subType).toBe('text');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].x).toBe(50);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].pageIndex).toBe(0);
    });

    it('assigns unique IDs to each new block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      sm.addBlock('text');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].id).not.toBe(sm.doc.blocks[1].id);
    });
  });

  describe('removeBlock', () => {
    it('removes a block at the given index', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      sm.addBlock('text');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(2);
      sm.removeBlock(0);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(1);
    });
  });

  describe('insertBlockAt', () => {
    it('inserts a block at a specific index', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      sm.addBlock('text');
      const newBlock = { type: 'text', style: 'h1', content: 'Heading', id: 999 };
      sm.insertBlockAt(1, newBlock);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(3);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[1].style).toBe('h1');
    });
  });

  describe('applyOp - UPDATE_BLOCK', () => {
    it('updates block content via operation', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      sm.applyOp({ type: 'UPDATE_BLOCK', index: 0, content: 'updated' });
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toBe('updated');
    });
  });

  describe('applyOp - ADD_BLOCK', () => {
    it('adds a block via operation', () => {
      const block = { type: 'text', style: 'h1', content: 'new', id: 42 };
      sm.applyOp({ type: 'ADD_BLOCK', index: 0, block });
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(1);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toBe('new');
    });
  });

  describe('applyOp - REMOVE_BLOCK', () => {
    it('removes a block via operation', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      sm.addBlock('text');
      sm.applyOp({ type: 'REMOVE_BLOCK', index: 0 });
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(1);
    });
  });

  describe('applyOp - REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE', () => {
    it('replaces a block entirely', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      const newBlock = { type: 'pageBreak', id: 99 };
      sm.applyOp({ type: 'REPLACE_BLOCK_STATE', index: 0, block: newBlock });
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('pageBreak');
    });
  });

  describe('applyOp - SPLIT_BLOCK', () => {
    it('splits a block into two at the given index', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      const block = { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'first', id: 1 };
      const newBlock = { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'second', id: 2 };
      sm.applyOp({ type: 'SPLIT_BLOCK', index: 0, block, newBlock });
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(2);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toBe('first');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[1].content).toBe('second');
    });
  });

  describe('applyOp - MERGE_BLOCKS', () => {
    it('merges two consecutive text blocks', () => {
      const b1 = { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'hello ', id: 1 };
      const b2 = { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'world', id: 2 };
      sm.doc.blocks = [b1, b2];
      sm.applyOp({ type: 'MERGE_BLOCKS', index: 1, removedBlock: b2, prevContent: 'hello ' });
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(1);
    });
  });

  describe('splitTextBlock', () => {
    it('splits text block into two', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      sm.doc.blocks[0].content = 'abc';
      const original = { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'abc', id: sm.doc.blocks[0].id };
      const block = { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'a', id: 1 };
      const newBlock = { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'bc', id: 2 };
      sm.splitTextBlock(0, block, newBlock);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(2);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toBe('a');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[1].content).toBe('bc');
    });
  });

  describe('mergeBlockWithPrevious', () => {
    it('merges current text block with previous text block', () => {
      const b1 = { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'hello ', id: 1 };
      const b2 = { type: 'text', style: 'normal', content: 'world', id: 2 };
      sm.doc.blocks = [b1, b2];
      const result = sm.mergeBlockWithPrevious(1);
      expect(result).toBe(true);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks.length).toBe(1);
    });

    it('returns false if index is 0', () => {
      const result = sm.mergeBlockWithPrevious(0);
      expect(result).toBe(false);
    });

    it('returns false if blocks are not both text type', () => {
      const b1 = { type: 'text', content: 'hello', id: 1 };
      const b2 = { type: 'pageBreak', id: 2 };
      sm.doc.blocks = [b1, b2];
      const result = sm.mergeBlockWithPrevious(1);
      expect(result).toBe(false);
    });
  });

  describe('updateBlockContent', () => {
    it('updates content of a text block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      sm.doc.blocks[0].content = 'old';
      sm.updateBlockContent(0, 'new');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toBe('new');
    });

    it('does nothing if content is unchanged', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text');
      sm.doc.blocks[0].content = 'same';
      const markDirty = vi.spyOn(sm, 'markDirty');
      sm.updateBlockContent(0, 'same');
      expect(markDirty).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
    });
  });

  describe('moveBlock', () => {
    it('moves a block from one index to another', () => {
      const b1 = { type: 'text', content: 'first', id: 1 };
      const b2 = { type: 'text', content: 'second', id: 2 };
      sm.doc.blocks = [b1, b2];
      sm.moveBlock(0, 1);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toBe('second');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[1].content).toBe('first');
    });
  });

  describe('changeBlockStyle', () => {
    it('changes the style of a text block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('text', 'normal');
      sm.changeBlockStyle(0, 'h1');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].style).toBe('h1');
    });
  });

  describe('sanitizeTextContentHtml', () => {
    it('normalizes HTML content via Formatter', () => {
      const result = sm.sanitizeTextContentHtml('  <b>hello</b>  ', { emptyAsBr: false });
      expect(typeof result).toBe('string');
      expect(result).toContain('hello');
    });
  });

  describe('addBlock - Phase 4 structured blocks', () => {
    it('adds a checklist block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('checklist');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('checklist');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].items).toBeDefined();
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].items[0].checked).toBe(false);
    });

    it('adds a horizontalRule block', () => {
      sm.addBlock('horizontalRule');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('horizontalRule');
    });

    it('checklist items default to unchecked', () => {
      sm.addBlock('checklist');
      const items = sm.doc.blocks[0].items;
      expect(items.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
      expect(items[0].checked).toBe(false);
    });
  });

  describe('toggleListType', () => {
    it('converts ul to ol', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'ul', items: [{ text: 'item', level: 0, checked: false }], id: 1 }];
      sm.toggleListType(0);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('ol');
    });

    it('converts ol to ul', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'ol', items: [{ text: 'item', level: 0, checked: false }], id: 1 }];
      sm.toggleListType(0);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('ul');
    });

    it('converts checklist to ul', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'checklist', items: [{ text: 'item', level: 0, checked: true }], id: 1 }];
      sm.toggleListType(0);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('ul');
    });

    it('ignores non-list block types', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'text', content: 'hello', id: 1 }];
      const result = sm.toggleListType(0);
      expect(result).toBe(false);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
    });
  });

  describe('convertBlockToText', () => {
    it('converts a list block to text', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'ul', items: [{ text: 'hello', level: 0 }], id: 1 }];
      sm.convertBlockToText(0);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toContain('hello');
    });

    it('converts a checklist block to text', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'checklist', items: [{ text: 'task', level: 0, checked: true }], id: 1 }];
      sm.convertBlockToText(0);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
    });
  });

  describe('replaceBlockAt', () => {
    it('replaces a block at the given index', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'text', content: 'old', id: 1 }];
      const newBlock = { type: 'text', content: 'new', id: 2 };
      sm.replaceBlockAt(0, newBlock);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toBe('new');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].id).toMatch(/^blk_/);
    });

    it('does nothing for out-of-range index', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'text', content: 'keep', id: 1 }];
      sm.replaceBlockAt(5, { type: 'text', content: 'nope', id: 2 });
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toBe('keep');
    });
  });

  describe('updateListItemChecked', () => {
    it('toggles checked state of a checklist item', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'checklist', items: [{ text: 'task', level: 0, checked: false }], id: 1 }];
      sm.updateListItemChecked(0, 0, true);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].items[0].checked).toBe(true);
    });
  });

  describe('loadDoc normalization - inline checks', () => {
    it('checklist items get defaults when missing properties', () => {
      const blocks = [{ type: 'checklist', items: [{ text: 'a' }] }];
      blocks.forEach(b => {
        if (b.type === 'checklist') {
          b.items = (b.items || []).map(item => ({ text: '', level: 0, checked: false, ...item }));
        }
      });
      expect(blocks[0].items[0].checked).toBe(false);
      expect(blocks[0].items[0].level).toBe(0);
    });

    it('checklist items preserve existing checked state', () => {
      const blocks = [{ type: 'checklist', items: [{ text: 'done', checked: true, level: 1 }] }];
      blocks.forEach(b => {
        if (b.type === 'checklist') {
          b.items = (b.items || []).map(item => ({ text: '', level: 0, checked: false, ...item }));
        }
      });
      expect(blocks[0].items[0].checked).toBe(true);
      expect(blocks[0].items[0].level).toBe(1);
    });

    it('string items are converted to objects', () => {
      const blocks = [{ type: 'ul', items: ['item1', 'item2'] }];
      blocks.forEach(b => {
        if (['ul', 'ol', 'checklist'].includes(b.type) && Array.isArray(b.items) && typeof b.items[0] === 'string') {
          b.items = b.items.map(t => ({ text: t, level: 0, checked: false }));
        }
      });
      expect(blocks[0].items[0].text).toBe('item1');
      expect(blocks[0].items[0].level).toBe(0);
    });
  });

  describe('convertBlockToText - list types', () => {
    it('converts ul items to bullet text', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{
        type: 'ul',
        items: [{ text: 'item 1', level: 0 }, { text: 'item 2', level: 1 }],
        id: 1
      }];
      sm.convertBlockToText(0);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].content).toContain('item 1');
    });

    it('converts ol items to numbered text', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{
        type: 'ol',
        items: [{ text: 'first', level: 0 }],
        id: 1
      }];
      sm.convertBlockToText(0);
      expect(sm.doc.blocks[0].type).toBe('text');
    });
  });

  describe('addFootnote / addEndnote', () => {
    it('adds a footnote to the footnotes array', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'text', content: 'Hello', id: 1 }];
      sm.doc.footnotes = [];
      const fn = sm.addFootnote(0, 'Footnote text');
      expect(fn).toBeDefined();
      expect(fn.content).toBe('Footnote text');
      expect(fn.number).toBe(1);
      expect(fn.type).toBe('footnote');
      expect(sm.doc.footnotes.length).toBe(1);
    });

    it('adds an endnote to the endnotes array', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [{ type: 'text', content: 'Hello', id: 1 }];
      sm.doc.endnotes = [];
      const en = sm.addEndnote(0, 'Endnote text');
      expect(en).toBeDefined();
      expect(en.content).toBe('Endnote text');
      expect(en.number).toBe(1);
      expect(en.type).toBe('endnote');
      expect(sm.doc.endnotes.length).toBe(1);
    });

    it('numbers footnotes sequentially', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [
        { type: 'text', content: 'A', id: 1 },
        { type: 'text', content: 'B', id: 2 }
      ];
      sm.doc.footnotes = [];
      sm.addFootnote(0, 'First note');
      sm.addFootnote(1, 'Second note');
      expect(sm.doc.footnotes[0].number).toBe(1);
      expect(sm.doc.footnotes[1].number).toBe(2);
    });

    it('numbers endnotes sequentially', () => {
      sm.doc.blocks = [
        { type: 'text', content: 'A', id: 1 },
        { type: 'text', content: 'B', id: 2 }
      ];
      sm.doc.endnotes = [];
      sm.addEndnote(0, 'First endnote');
      sm.addEndnote(1, 'Second endnote');
      expect(sm.doc.endnotes[0].number).toBe(1);
      expect(sm.doc.endnotes[1].number).toBe(2);
    });
  });
});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tests/tracked-changes-engine.test.js (2026-07-03 16:19:59) =====
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import { StateManager } from '../public/state.js';
import { EditorEngine } from '../public/editor/editor-engine.js';
import { createTextPosition, createTextSelection } from '../public/editor/selection-model.js';
import { getBlockText } from '../public/editor/inline/block-inline.js';

function textBlock(id, text) {
  return {
    id,
    type: 'text',
    style: 'normal',
    contentFormat: 'runs',
    children: [{ id: `run_${id}`, text, marks: {} }],
    content: text
  };
}

function selection(blockId, start, end = start) {
  return createTextSelection(
    createTextPosition(blockId, start),
    createTextPosition(blockId, end)
  );
}

function createEditor(blocks = [textBlock('b1', 'Hello world')]) {
  const state = new StateManager();
  state.doc = {
    id: null,
    title: 'Tracked changes test',
    revision: 0,
    settings: { trackChanges: true, editingMode: 'suggesting' },
    blocks,
    header: {},
    footer: {},
    footnotes: [],
    endnotes: []
  };
  const controller = { renderer: null };
  const engine = new EditorEngine(state, controller, null);
  return { state, engine };
}

describe('tracked changes engine', () => {
  it('registers the review commands used by the UI', () => {
    const { engine } = createEditor();
    expect(engine.commands.has('acceptRevision')).toBe(true);
    expect(engine.commands.has('rejectRevision')).toBe(true);
    expect(engine.commands.has('acceptAllRevisions')).toBe(true);
    expect(engine.commands.has('rejectAllRevisions')).toBe(true);
  });

  it('tracks replacement text and accepts all changes atomically', () => {
    const { state, engine } = createEditor();
    engine.dispatch('replaceSelection', { text: 'planet' }, {
      selection: selection('b1', 6, 11),
      restoreSelection: false
    });

    expect(state.listRunRevisions().map(item => item.type).sort()).toEqual(['deletion', 'insertion']);
    engine.dispatch('acceptAllRevisions', {}, { restoreSelection: false });

    expect(getBlockText(state.doc.blocks[0])).toBe('Hello planet');
    expect(state.listRunRevisions()).toHaveLength(0);
  });

  it('rejects all replacement changes and restores the original text', () => {
    const { state, engine } = createEditor();
    engine.dispatch('replaceSelection', { text: 'planet' }, {
      selection: selection('b1', 6, 11),
      restoreSelection: false
    });

    engine.dispatch('rejectAllRevisions', {}, { restoreSelection: false });
    expect(getBlockText(state.doc.blocks[0])).toBe('Hello world');
    expect(state.listRunRevisions()).toHaveLength(0);
  });

  it('accepts and rejects individual insertions and deletions', () => {
    const accepted = createEditor();
    accepted.engine.dispatch('replaceSelection', { text: 'planet' }, {
      selection: selection('b1', 6, 11),
      restoreSelection: false
    });
    const acceptedRevisions = accepted.state.listRunRevisions();
    const insertion = acceptedRevisions.find(item => item.type === 'insertion');
    const deletion = acceptedRevisions.find(item => item.type === 'deletion');
    accepted.engine.dispatch('acceptRevision', { revisionId: insertion.id }, { restoreSelection: false });
    accepted.engine.dispatch('acceptRevision', { revisionId: deletion.id }, { restoreSelection: false });
    expect(getBlockText(accepted.state.doc.blocks[0])).toBe('Hello planet');

    const rejected = createEditor();
    rejected.engine.dispatch('replaceSelection', { text: 'planet' }, {
      selection: selection('b1', 6, 11),
      restoreSelection: false
    });
    const rejectedRevisions = rejected.state.listRunRevisions();
    rejected.engine.dispatch('rejectRevision', {
      revisionId: rejectedRevisions.find(item => item.type === 'insertion').id
    }, { restoreSelection: false });
    rejected.engine.dispatch('rejectRevision', {
      revisionId: rejectedRevisions.find(item => item.type === 'deletion').id
    }, { restoreSelection: false });
    expect(getBlockText(rejected.state.doc.blocks[0])).toBe('Hello world');
  });

  it('tracks Backspace and lets rejection restore the deleted character', () => {
    const { state, engine } = createEditor();
    engine.dispatch('deleteBackward', {}, {
      selection: selection('b1', 5),
      restoreSelection: false
    });

    const revision = state.listRunRevisions()[0];
    expect(revision).toMatchObject({ type: 'deletion', text: 'o' });
    engine.dispatch('rejectRevision', { revisionId: revision.id }, { restoreSelection: false });
    expect(getBlockText(state.doc.blocks[0])).toBe('Hello world');
  });

  it('cancels a pending insertion when that inserted text is deleted', () => {
    const { state, engine } = createEditor();
    engine.dispatch('insertText', { text: 'X' }, {
      selection: selection('b1', 5),
      restoreSelection: false
    });
    engine.dispatch('deleteBackward', {}, {
      selection: selection('b1', 6),
      restoreSelection: false
    });

    expect(getBlockText(state.doc.blocks[0])).toBe('Hello world');
    expect(state.listRunRevisions().some(item => item.text.includes('X'))).toBe(false);
  });

  it('tracks inserted and deleted paragraph breaks', () => {
    const inserted = createEditor([textBlock('b1', 'One')]);
    inserted.engine.dispatch('splitParagraph', {}, {
      selection: selection('b1', 1),
      restoreSelection: false
    });
    const insertedBreak = inserted.state.listRunRevisions().find(item => item.kind === 'paragraphBreak');
    expect(insertedBreak).toMatchObject({ type: 'insertion' });
    inserted.engine.dispatch('rejectRevision', { revisionId: insertedBreak.id }, { restoreSelection: false });
    expect(inserted.state.doc.blocks).toHaveLength(1);
    expect(getBlockText(inserted.state.doc.blocks[0])).toBe('One');

    const deleted = createEditor([textBlock('b1', 'One'), textBlock('b2', 'Two')]);
    deleted.engine.dispatch('deleteBackward', {}, {
      selection: selection('b2', 0),
      restoreSelection: false
    });
    const deletedBreak = deleted.state.listRunRevisions().find(item => item.kind === 'paragraphBreak');
    expect(deletedBreak).toMatchObject({ type: 'deletion' });
    deleted.engine.dispatch('acceptRevision', { revisionId: deletedBreak.id }, { restoreSelection: false });
    expect(deleted.state.doc.blocks).toHaveLength(1);
    expect(getBlockText(deleted.state.doc.blocks[0])).toBe('OneTwo');
  });

  it('tracks structural block insertion and deletion', () => {
    const inserted = createEditor([textBlock('b1', 'One')]);
    inserted.engine.dispatch('insertBlock', {
      index: 1,
      block: { type: 'pageBreak' },
      source: 'pageBreak'
    }, { restoreSelection: false });
    const insertion = inserted.state.listRunRevisions().find(item => item.kind === 'block');
    expect(insertion).toMatchObject({ type: 'insertion' });
    inserted.engine.dispatch('rejectRevision', { revisionId: insertion.id }, { restoreSelection: false });
    expect(inserted.state.doc.blocks).toHaveLength(1);

    const deleted = createEditor([textBlock('b1', 'One'), { id: 'img1', type: 'object', objectType: 'image' }]);
    deleted.engine.dispatch('removeBlock', { blockId: 'img1' }, { restoreSelection: false });
    const deletion = deleted.state.listRunRevisions().find(item => item.blockId === 'img1');
    expect(deletion).toMatchObject({ type: 'deletion', kind: 'block' });
    expect(deleted.state.doc.blocks).toHaveLength(2);
    deleted.engine.dispatch('acceptRevision', { revisionId: deletion.id }, { restoreSelection: false });
    expect(deleted.state.doc.blocks).toHaveLength(1);
  });

});

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/tmp-test.mjs (2026-07-03 03:03:19) =====
import { chromium } from 'playwright';

const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true });
const page = await browser.newPage({ viewport: { width: 1280, height: 800 } });

page.on('pageerror', err => console.log('PAGE ERROR:', err.message));
page.on('console', msg => {
  if (msg.type() === 'error') console.log('CONSOLE ERROR:', msg.text());
});

await page.goto('http://localhost:5173/', { timeout: 15000, waitUntil: 'networkidle' });
await page.waitForTimeout(3000);

console.log('Title:', await page.title());

const cdn = await page.evaluate(() => ({
  lucide: typeof lucide !== 'undefined',
  mammoth: typeof mammoth !== 'undefined',
  docx: typeof docx !== 'undefined',
}));
console.log('CDN:', JSON.stringify(cdn));

const ws = await page.$('#workspace');
console.log('Workspace:', !!ws);

const pgs = await page.$$('#workspace .page');
console.log('Pages:', pgs.length);

const eds = await page.$$('[contenteditable="true"]');
console.log('Editable:', eds.length);

const firstBlock = await page.evaluate(() => {
  try {
    const b = document.querySelector('[data-index]');
    return b ? b.dataset.index : 'no-index';
  } catch(e) {
    return e.message;
  }
});
console.log('First block index:', firstBlock);

// Test clicking a toolbar button
const boldBtn = await page.$('#btn-bold');
console.log('Bold button:', !!boldBtn);

await browser.close();
console.log('DONE');

// ===== /home/luanngo/opendoc/vitest.config.mjs (2026-07-01 13:15:52) =====
import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config';

export default defineConfig({
  test: {
    environment: 'jsdom',
    setupFiles: ['./tests/setup.js'],
    include: ['./tests/**/*.test.js'],
  },
});
